analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 数据集规模大、模态丰富，但仅针对单一游戏，创新性和影响中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BEACON是一个大规模多模态游戏行为数据集，用于连续身份认证研究。

papers.title: BenchCAD: A Comprehensive, Industry-Standard Benchmark for Programmatic CAD
papers.abstract: Industrial Computer-Aided Design (CAD) code generation requires models to produce executable parametric programs from visual or textual inputs. Beyond recognizing the outer shape of a part, this task involves understanding its 3D structure, inferring engineering parameters, and choosing CAD operations that reflect how the part would be designed and manufactured. Despite the promise of Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) for this task, they are rarely evaluated on whether these capabilities jointly hold in realistic industrial CAD settings. We present BenchCAD, a unified benchmark for industrial CAD reasoning. BenchCAD contains 17,900 execution-verified CadQuery programs across 106 industrial part families, including bevel gears, compression springs, twist drills, and other reusable engineering designs. It evaluates models through visual question answering, code question answering, image-to-code generation, and instruction-guided code editing, enabling fine-grained analysis across perception, parametric abstraction, and executable program synthesis. Across 10+ frontier models, BenchCAD shows that current systems often recover coarse outer geometry but fail to produce faithful parametric CAD programs. Common failures include missing fine 3D structure, misinterpreting industrial design parameters, and replacing essential operations such as sweeps, lofts, and twist-extrudes with simpler sketch-and-extrude patterns. Fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improve in-distribution performance, but generalization to unseen part families remains limited. These results position BenchCAD as a benchmark for measuring and improving the industrial readiness of multimodal CAD automation.

analysis.tldr: BenchCAD 是一个面向工业级程序化 CAD 代码生成的综合基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业 CAD 代码生成需要模型从视觉或文本输入生成可执行的参数化程序，但现有评估很少在真实工业场景中联合测试这些能力，缺乏统一基准。
analysis.problem: 当前多模态大模型在工业 CAD 任务中缺乏系统评估，无法衡量其在感知、参数推断和程序合成方面的联合能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前模型常能恢复粗略外部几何形状，但无法生成忠实参数化 CAD 程序，常见失败包括缺失精细 3D 结构、误解工业设计参数、用简单拉伸替代扫掠/放样/扭转等关键操作。
analysis.method: 构建包含 17,900 个执行验证的 CadQuery 程序（覆盖 106 个工业零件族）的基准，通过视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成和指令引导代码编辑四个任务进行细粒度评估。
contributions: 提出了 BenchCAD，一个包含 17,900 个可执行 CadQuery 程序、覆盖 106 个工业零件族的统一基准。
设计了四个评估任务（VQA、CQA、图像到代码、指令编辑），支持对感知、参数抽象和程序合成的细粒度分析。
在 10+ 前沿模型上实验，揭示了当前模型在工业 CAD 任务中的常见失败模式，并验证了微调和强化学习可提升分布内性能但泛化有限。
analysis.experiments: 在 10+ 前沿模型上评估，包括视觉问答、代码问答、图像到代码生成和指令引导代码编辑任务，并进行了微调和强化学习实验。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 106 个零件族，可能无法完全代表所有工业 CAD 场景。
微调和强化学习在分布内性能提升但泛化到未见零件族有限，提示基准难度较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准填补了工业 CAD 代码生成评估的空白，实验覆盖多个模型并揭示关键失败模式，对多模态模型在工程领域的应用有重要参考价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BenchCAD 是一个面向工业级程序化 CAD 代码生成的综合基准，揭示了当前多模态大模型在感知、参数抽象和可执行程序合成方面的不足。

papers.title: Masked Generative Transformer Is What You Need for Image Editing
papers.abstract: Diffusion models dominate image editing, yet their global denoising mechanism entangles edited regions with surrounding context, causing modifications to propagate into areas that should remain intact. We propose a fundamentally different approach by leveraging Masked Generative Transformers (MGTs), whose localized token-prediction paradigm naturally confines changes to intended regions. We present EditMGT, an MGT-based editing framework that is the first of its kind. Our approach employs multi-layer attention consolidation to aggregate cross-attention maps into precise edit localization signals, and region-hold sampling to explicitly prevent token flipping in non-target areas. To support training, we construct CrispEdit-2M, a 2M-sample high-resolution (>1024) editing dataset spanning seven categories. With only 960M parameters, EditMGT achieves state-of-the-art image similarity on multiple benchmarks while delivering 6x faster editing, demonstrating that MGTs offer a compelling alternative to diffusion-based editing.

analysis.tldr: EditMGT首次用掩码生成式Transformer替代扩散模型实现图像编辑，速度提升6倍且保持高保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型的全局去噪机制会导致编辑区域与周围上下文纠缠，使修改扩散到不应改变的区域，缺乏局部可控性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用掩码生成式Transformer的局部token预测范式实现精确、高效的图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的全局去噪机制导致编辑区域与上下文纠缠，修改会传播到非目标区域。
analysis.method: 提出EditMGT框架，包含多层注意力整合（将交叉注意力图聚合为精确编辑定位信号）和区域保持采样（显式阻止非目标区域的token翻转）。
contributions: 首个基于掩码生成式Transformer的图像编辑框架EditMGT，提供扩散模型的替代方案。
构建CrispEdit-2M数据集，包含200万高分辨率（>1024）样本，覆盖7类编辑任务。
在多个基准上达到最先进的图像相似度，同时实现6倍编辑速度提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估图像相似度，并报告6倍速度提升。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对复杂语义编辑（如大幅改变物体类别）效果有限。
数据集CrispEdit-2M的类别覆盖可能不够全面。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（首次用MGT替代扩散模型），实验显示显著速度提升和SOTA保真度，但摘要未提供详细数值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EditMGT首次用掩码生成式Transformer替代扩散模型实现图像编辑，速度提升6倍且保持高保真度。

papers.title: Is Your Driving World Model an All-Around Player?
papers.abstract: Today's driving world models can generate remarkably realistic dash-cam videos, yet no single model excels universally. Some generate photorealistic textures but violate basic physics; others maintain geometric consistency but fail when subjected to closed-loop planning. This disconnect exposes a critical gap: the field evaluates how real generated worlds appear, but rarely whether they behave realistically. We introduce WorldLens, a unified benchmark that measures world-model fidelity across the full spectrum, from pixel quality and 4D geometry to closed-loop driving and human perceptual alignment, through five complementary aspects and 24 standardized dimensions. Our evaluation of six representative models reveals that no existing approach dominates across all axes: texture-rich models violate geometry, geometry-aware models lack behavioral fidelity, and even the strongest performers achieve only 2-3 out of 10 on human realism ratings. To bridge algorithmic metrics with human perception, we further contribute WorldLens-26K, a 26,808-entry human-annotated preference dataset pairing numerical scores with textual rationales, and WorldLens-Agent, a vision-language evaluator distilled from these judgments that enables scalable, explainable auto-assessment. Together, the benchmark, dataset, and agent form a unified ecosystem for assessing generated worlds not merely by visual appeal, but by physical and behavioral fidelity.

analysis.tldr: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型在像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知等多维度的保真度，发现现有模型无一全能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有驾驶世界模型评估仅关注视觉真实性，忽略物理和行为保真度，导致模型在闭环规划等实际任务中失败。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、全面的基准来评估驾驶世界模型在像素质量、4D几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知对齐等多方面的保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 纹理丰富的模型违反物理规律，几何一致的模型缺乏行为保真度，最强模型在人类真实感评分中仅得2-3/10。
analysis.method: 提出WorldLens基准，包含5个互补方面和24个标准化维度；构建WorldLens-26K人类标注偏好数据集；训练WorldLens-Agent视觉语言评估器。
contributions: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型的像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知保真度。
构建WorldLens-26K人类标注偏好数据集，包含26,808条数值评分和文本理由。
训练WorldLens-Agent视觉语言评估器，实现可扩展、可解释的自动评估。
analysis.experiments: 评估了6个代表性模型，发现无模型在所有维度上占优。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有驾驶场景。
评估器依赖人类标注数据，可能引入标注偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准全面，数据集和评估器有实用价值，但方法创新中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WorldLens基准，全面评估驾驶世界模型在像素、几何、闭环驾驶和人类感知等多维度的保真度，发现现有模型无一全能。

papers.title: The Generalized Turing Test: A Foundation for Comparing Intelligence
papers.abstract: We introduce the Generalized Turing Test (GTT), a formal framework for comparing the capabilities of arbitrary agents via indistinguishability. For agents A and B, we define the Turing comparator A $\geq$ B to hold if B, acting as a distinguisher, cannot reliably distinguish between interactions with A (instructed to imitate B) and another instance of B. This yields a dataset- and task-agnostic notion of relative intelligence. We study the comparator's structure, including conditions under which it is transitive and therefore induces an ordering over equivalence classes, and we define and analyze variants with querying, bounded interaction, and fixed distinguishers. To complement the theory, we instantiate the framework on a collection of modern models, empirically evaluating pairwise indistinguishability across thousands of trials. The resulting comparisons exhibit a stratified structure consistent with existing rankings, hinting that the proposed framework yields meaningful empirical orderings. Our results position indistinguishability as a unifying lens for reasoning about intelligence, suggesting a foundation for evaluation and, potentially, training objectives that are inherently independent of fixed datasets or benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出广义图灵测试（GTT）作为比较任意智能体能力的统一框架，并通过实验验证其排序与现有排名一致。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能评估依赖固定数据集或基准，缺乏任务无关的统一比较标准，难以泛化到不同智能体。
analysis.problem: 如何定义一种与数据集和任务无关的、基于不可区分性的智能比较框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义广义图灵测试（GTT），通过不可区分性比较智能体：A ≥ B 当且仅当 B 作为区分者无法可靠区分与 A（模仿 B）的交互和另一个 B 的交互。研究比较器的传递性等结构性质，并引入查询、有限交互等变体。
contributions: 提出广义图灵测试（GTT）作为比较任意智能体能力的正式框架。
理论分析比较器的传递性及变体性质。
在多个现代模型上实证评估，展示有意义的排序结构。
analysis.experiments: 在多个现代模型上进行了数千次成对不可区分性实验，结果呈现分层结构，与现有排名一致。
limitations: 实证评估的模型范围有限，可能未覆盖所有类型智能体。
框架的实际应用（如训练目标）尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 理论框架有创新性，但当前与主流ML方向（如VLM、生成模型）关联较弱，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出广义图灵测试（GTT）作为比较任意智能体能力的统一框架，并通过实验验证其排序与现有排名一致。

papers.title: Verification Mirage: Mapping the Reliability Boundary of Self-Verification in Medical VQA
papers.abstract: Self-verification, re-invoking the same vision language model (VLM) in a fresh context to check its own generated answer, is increasingly used as a default safety layer for medical visual question answering (VQA). We argue that this practice is fundamentally unreliable. We introduce [METHOD NAME], a diagnostic framework for mapping the reliability boundary of medical VLM self-verification by decomposing verifier behavior into discrimination capability and agreement bias. Because the verifier and answer generator are capacity-coupled, the verifier can overly agree with the generator, creating a verification mirage: a regime with both high verifier error and high agreement bias, driven by false acceptance of incorrect answers. Evaluating six open-weight VLMs across five medical VQA datasets and seven medical tasks, we find that this boundary is strongly task-conditioned. Knowledge-intensive clinical tasks fall deepest into the mirage, simpler tasks are more resistant, and perceptual tasks lie in between. Verification also fails to provide an independent safety signal: logistic mixed-effects analysis shows that verifier error and agreement bias become more likely when the generator is wrong, while saliency analyses show that verifiers under-attend to image evidence relative to generators, a phenomenon we call the lazy verifier. Cross-verification reduces but does not eliminate the mirage. Moreover, when verification is reused in multi-turn actor-verifier loops, most initially wrong answers become locked in by false verification. Since our experiments use clean benchmarks, the observed reliability boundary likely underestimates failures in real clinical deployment.

analysis.tldr: 医疗VLM自验证不可靠，存在验证幻象，知识密集型任务最严重。
analysis.research_motivation: 自验证被广泛用作医疗VQA的安全层，但其可靠性未经系统检验，可能导致错误答案被误接受。
analysis.problem: 揭示并量化医疗VLM自验证的可靠性边界，分析其失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 验证器与生成器能力耦合导致过度同意，形成验证幻象（高错误率+高同意偏差）；知识密集型任务最易陷入，简单任务较鲁棒；验证器对图像证据关注不足（懒惰验证器）；交叉验证可缓解但无法消除幻象；多轮交互中错误答案易被锁定。
analysis.method: 提出诊断框架，分解验证器行为为判别能力和同意偏差，通过逻辑混合效应分析和显著性分析评估可靠性边界。
contributions: 首次系统揭示医疗VLM自验证的不可靠性，定义验证幻象现象。
提出诊断框架量化可靠性边界，发现任务条件依赖性。
识别懒惰验证器现象及多轮交互中的错误锁定机制。
analysis.experiments: 在6个开源VLM、5个医疗VQA数据集、7个医疗任务上评估，使用逻辑混合效应分析和显著性分析。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅使用干净基准，可能低估真实临床部署中的失败。
未探索不同验证策略或模型架构的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对医疗VLM安全部署有重要警示意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 医疗VLM自验证不可靠，存在验证幻象，知识密集型任务最严重。

papers.title: Rethinking Agentic Search with Pi-Serini: Is Lexical Retrieval Sufficient?
papers.abstract: Does a lexical retriever suffice as large language models (LLMs) become more capable in an agentic loop? This question naturally arises when building deep research systems. We revisit it by pairing BM25 with frontier LLMs that have better reasoning and tool-use abilities. To support researchers asking the same question, we introduce Pi-Serini, a search agent equipped with three tools for retrieving, browsing, and reading documents. Our results show that, on BrowseComp-Plus, a well-configured lexical retriever with sufficient retrieval depth can support effective deep research when paired with more capable LLMs. Specifically, Pi-Serini with gpt-5.5 achieves 83.1% answer accuracy and 94.7% surfaced evidence recall, outperforming released search agents that use dense retrievers. Controlled ablations further show that BM25 tuning improves answer accuracy by 18.0% and surfaced evidence recall by 11.1% over the default BM25 setting, while increasing retrieval depth further improves surfaced evidence recall by 25.3% over the shallow-retrieval setting. Source code is available at https://github.com/justram/pi-serini.

analysis.tldr: Pi-Serini 表明，搭配强 LLM 的 BM25 词法检索在深度研究任务中足以超越稠密检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建深度研究系统时，随着 LLM 能力增强，词法检索是否足够是一个自然且实际的问题，但缺乏系统性验证。
analysis.problem: 评估词法检索器（BM25）在 LLM 智能体循环中是否足以支持有效的深度研究。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Pi-Serini 搜索智能体，集成检索、浏览和阅读三个工具，使用 BM25 作为检索器，并搭配前沿 LLM（如 gpt-5.5）进行推理和工具调用。
contributions: 引入 Pi-Serini 搜索智能体，验证词法检索在深度研究中的有效性。
在 BrowseComp-Plus 上达到 83.1% 答案准确率和 94.7% 证据召回率，超越使用稠密检索的现有智能体。
开源代码，便于研究者复现和进一步探索。
analysis.experiments: 在 BrowseComp-Plus 基准上评估，Pi-Serini 搭配 gpt-5.5 达到 83.1% 答案准确率和 94.7% 证据召回率；消融实验显示 BM25 调优提升准确率 18.0%，增加检索深度提升证据召回率 25.3%。
limitations: 仅验证了 BM25 一种词法检索器，未与其他词法方法对比。
实验限于 BrowseComp-Plus 单一基准，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法简单但实验扎实，对 Agent 检索设计有参考价值，但创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pi-Serini 表明，搭配强 LLM 的 BM25 词法检索在深度研究任务中足以超越稠密检索。

papers.title: BabelDOC: Better Layout-Preserving PDF Translation via Intermediate Representation
papers.abstract: As global cross-lingual communication intensifies, language barriers in visually rich documents such as PDFs remain a practical bottleneck. Existing document translation pipelines face a tension between linguistic processing and layout preservation: text-oriented Computer-Assisted Translation (CAT) systems often discard structural metadata, while document parsers focus on extraction and do not support faithful re-rendering after translation. We introduce BabelDOC, an Intermediate Representation (IR)-based framework for layout-preserving PDF translation. BabelDOC decouples visual layout metadata from semantic content, enabling document-level translation operations such as terminology extraction, cross-page context handling, glossary-constrained generation, and formula placeholdering. The translated content is then re-anchored to the original layout through an adaptive typesetting engine. Experiments on a curated 200-page benchmark, together with human evaluation and multimodal LLM-as-a-judge evaluation, show that BabelDOC improves layout fidelity, visual aesthetics, and terminology consistency over representative baselines, while maintaining competitive translation precision. The open-source toolkit and its interactive downstream applications are publicly available and have attracted over 8.4K GitHub stars and 17 contributors at the time of writing. A demonstration video is also available.

analysis.tldr: BabelDOC 通过中间表示解耦布局与语义，实现高保真 PDF 翻译。
analysis.research_motivation: 全球跨语言交流日益频繁，但 PDF 等富视觉文档的翻译面临语言处理与布局保真之间的张力：传统 CAT 系统丢弃结构元数据，文档解析器则不支持翻译后的忠实重渲染。
analysis.problem: 如何在 PDF 翻译中同时保证高翻译质量和原始布局的精确保留。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法在语言处理与布局保真之间存在矛盾，缺乏统一的中间表示来协调两者。
analysis.method: 提出基于中间表示（IR）的框架 BabelDOC，将视觉布局元数据与语义内容解耦，支持术语提取、跨页上下文处理、术语表约束生成和公式占位等文档级翻译操作，并通过自适应排版引擎将翻译内容重新锚定到原始布局。
contributions: 提出基于中间表示的布局保持 PDF 翻译框架 BabelDOC
构建了 200 页的基准测试集，并通过人工评估和多模态 LLM 评估验证了方法在布局保真度、视觉美观性和术语一致性上的优势
analysis.experiments: 在 200 页基准测试上进行了实验，包括人工评估和多模态 LLM 评估，结果显示 BabelDOC 在布局保真度、视觉美观性和术语一致性上优于代表性基线，同时保持有竞争力的翻译精度。
limitations: 可能对复杂排版（如多栏、嵌套表格）的适应性有限
依赖中间表示的设计质量，可能引入新的错误模式
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，开源且获得社区认可，实验充分，与文档翻译和布局保持方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BabelDOC 通过中间表示解耦布局与语义，实现高保真 PDF 翻译。

papers.title: Training-Free Cultural Alignment of Large Language Models via Persona Disagreement
papers.abstract: Large language models increasingly mediate decisions that turn on moral judgement, yet a growing body of evidence shows that their implicit preferences are not culturally neutral. Existing cultural alignment methods either require per-country preference data and fine-tuning budgets or assume white-box access to model internals that commercial APIs do not expose. In this work, we focus on this realistic black-box, public-data-only regime and observe that within-country sociodemographic disagreement, not consensus, is the primary steering signal. We introduce DISCA (Disagreement-Informed Steering for Cultural Alignment), an inference-time method that instantiates each country as a panel of World-Values-Survey-grounded persona agents and converts their disagreement into a bounded, loss-averse logit correction. Across 20 countries and 7 open-weight backbones (2B--70B), DISCA reduces cultural misalignment on MultiTP by 10--24% on the six backbones >=3.8B, and 2--7% on open-ended scenarios, without changing any weights. Our results suggest that inference-time calibration is a scalable alternative to fine-tuning for serving the long tail of global moral preferences.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的推理时文化对齐方法DISCA，利用群体内分歧信号校正LLM输出，在20国7个模型上降低文化偏差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在道德判断中隐含的文化偏好不中立，现有对齐方法需要各国偏好数据、微调预算或白盒访问，不适用于黑盒API场景。
analysis.problem: 如何在黑盒、仅使用公开数据的条件下，实现LLM的文化对齐，避免微调或模型内部访问。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到同一国家内的社会人口学分歧（而非共识）是主要的引导信号，即群体内意见不一致比一致更能指示文化差异。
analysis.method: DISCA：将每个国家实例化为一组基于世界价值观调查的人格代理，将代理间的分歧转化为有界、损失厌恶的logit校正，在推理时调整模型输出。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练、仅依赖公开数据的推理时文化对齐方法DISCA，适用于黑盒LLM。
在20个国家和7个开源模型（2B-70B）上验证，DISCA在MultiTP基准上降低文化偏差10-24%（≥3.8B模型），在开放场景中降低2-7%。
analysis.experiments: 在20个国家、7个开源模型（2B-70B）上评估，使用MultiTP基准和开放场景，DISCA在≥3.8B模型上降低文化偏差10-24%，开放场景降低2-7%。
limitations: 仅依赖世界价值观调查数据，可能无法覆盖所有文化维度。
推理时校正可能影响模型在其他任务上的通用性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（无需训练、黑盒对齐），实验覆盖多国多模型，效果显著，但技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的推理时文化对齐方法DISCA，利用群体内分歧信号校正LLM输出，在20国7个模型上降低文化偏差。

papers.title: Clin-JEPA: A Multi-Phase Co-Training Framework for Joint-Embedding Predictive Pretraining on EHR Patient Trajectories
papers.abstract: We present Clin-JEPA, a multi-phase co-training framework for joint-embedding predictive (JEPA) pretraining on EHR patient trajectories. JEPA architectures have enabled latent-space planning in robotics and high-quality representation learning in vision, but extending the paradigm to EHR data -- to obtain a single backbone that simultaneously forecasts patient trajectories and serves diverse downstream risk-prediction tasks without per-task fine-tuning -- remains an open challenge. Existing JEPA frameworks either discard the predictor after pretraining (I-JEPA, V-JEPA) or train it on a frozen pretrained encoder (V-JEPA 2-AC), leaving the encoder unaware of the rollout signal that the retained predictor must use at inference; co-training the encoder and predictor under a shared JEPA prediction objective would supply this grounding, but naïve co-training is unstable, with representation collapse and online/target drift causing autoregressive rollout to diverge. Clin-JEPA's five-phase pretraining curriculum -- predictor warmup, joint refinement, EMA target alignment, hard sync, and predictor finalization -- addresses each failure mode by phase, stably co-training a Qwen3-8B-based encoder and a 92M-parameter latent trajectory predictor. On MIMIC-IV ICU data, three independent evaluations support the framework: (1) latent $\ell_1$ rollout drift uniquely converges ($-$15.7%) over 48-hour horizons while baselines and ablations diverge (+3% to +4951%); (2) the encoder learns a clinically discriminative latent geometry (deteriorating-patient cohorts displace 4.83$\times$ further than stable patients in latent space, vs $\leq$2.62$\times$ for baseline encoders); (3) a single backbone outperforms strong tabular and sequence baselines on multi-task downstream evaluation. Clin-JEPA achieves mean AUROC 0.851 on ICareFM EEP and 0.883 on 8 binary risk tasks (+0.038 and +0.041 vs baseline average).

analysis.tldr: Clin-JEPA 提出多阶段协同训练框架，首次将 JEPA 预训练成功应用于 EHR 患者轨迹，实现单一骨干网络同时支持轨迹预测与下游风险预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 JEPA 框架在机器人规划和视觉表征学习中表现优异，但将其扩展到 EHR 数据时面临挑战：要么丢弃预测器，要么在冻结编码器上训练预测器，导致编码器无法感知预测信号；而简单协同训练不稳定，会出现表征崩溃和漂移。
analysis.problem: 如何稳定地协同训练编码器和预测器，使得单一骨干网络既能预测患者轨迹，又能直接用于多种下游风险预测任务而无需微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出简单协同训练不稳定，表征崩溃和在线/目标漂移导致自回归 rollout 发散；而 Clin-JEPA 的五阶段课程训练逐步解决了这些失败模式。
analysis.method: Clin-JEPA 提出五阶段预训练课程：预测器预热、联合精炼、EMA 目标对齐、硬同步、预测器最终化，稳定协同训练基于 Qwen3-8B 的编码器和 92M 参数的潜在轨迹预测器。
contributions: 提出多阶段协同训练框架 Clin-JEPA，首次实现 JEPA 在 EHR 轨迹上的稳定预训练
在 MIMIC-IV ICU 数据上验证：潜在 rollout 漂移收敛（-15.7%），编码器学习到临床判别性潜在几何，单一骨干在多任务下游评估中优于强基线
analysis.experiments: 在 MIMIC-IV ICU 数据上进行三项独立评估：潜在 rollout 漂移、潜在空间几何分析、多任务下游评估。Clin-JEPA 在 ICareFM EEP 上平均 AUROC 0.851，在 8 个二元风险任务上平均 AUROC 0.883（比基线平均高 0.038 和 0.041）。
limitations: 仅在 MIMIC-IV ICU 数据上评估，泛化到其他 EHR 数据集或非 ICU 场景有待验证
五阶段课程训练可能增加预训练复杂度，超参数调优成本较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（多阶段协同训练），实验充分且结果显著，与 EHR 和临床预测方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Clin-JEPA 提出多阶段协同训练框架，首次将 JEPA 预训练成功应用于 EHR 患者轨迹，实现单一骨干网络同时支持轨迹预测与下游风险预测。

papers.title: Transcoda: End-to-End Zero-Shot Optical Music Recognition via Data-Centric Synthetic Training
papers.abstract: Optical Music Recognition (OMR), the task of transcribing sheet music into a structured textual representation, is currently bottlenecked by a lack of large-scale, annotated datasets of real scans. This forces models to rely on either few-shot transfer or synthetic training pipelines that remain overly simplistic. A secondary challenge is encoding non-uniqueness: in the popular Humdrum **kern format for transcribing music, multiple different text encodings can render into the same visual sheet music. This one-to-many mapping creates a harder learning task and introduces high uncertainty during decoding. We propose Transcoda, an OMR system built on (i) an advanced synthetic data generation pipeline, (ii) a normalization of the **kern encoding to enforce a unique normal form and (iii) grammar-based decoding to ensure the syntactic correctness of the output. This approach allows us to train a compact 59M-parameter model in just 6 hours on a single GPU that outperforms billion-parameter baselines. Transcoda achieves the best score among state of the art baselines on a newly curated benchmark of synthetically rendered scores at 18.46% OMR-NED (compared to 43.91% for the next-best system, Legato) and reduces the error rate on historical Polish scans to 63.97% OMR-NED (down from 80.16% for SMT++).

analysis.tldr: 通过数据合成和编码规范化，实现零样本光学音乐识别，小模型超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 光学音乐识别（OMR）因缺乏大规模真实扫描标注数据集而进展缓慢，现有合成训练方法过于简单，且音乐编码存在一对多映射导致解码不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实标注数据的情况下，实现高精度的零样本光学音乐识别，并解决编码非唯一性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Transcoda系统，包含高级合成数据生成管道、**kern编码规范化（强制唯一范式）和基于语法的解码，训练紧凑的59M参数模型。
contributions: 提出数据驱动的合成训练方法，实现零样本OMR。
引入编码规范化解决一对多映射问题，降低解码不确定性。
在合成和真实历史扫描数据上达到最优性能，小模型超越大模型。
analysis.experiments: 在合成基准上OMR-NED为18.46%（次优Legato为43.91%），在历史波兰扫描上错误率降至63.97%（SMT++为80.16%）。
limitations: 仅针对**kern格式，可能不适用于其他音乐编码。
真实扫描数据性能仍较低，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且效果显著，但应用领域较窄，推荐阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数据合成和编码规范化，实现零样本光学音乐识别，小模型超越大模型。

papers.title: From Controlled to the Wild: Evaluation of Pentesting Agents for the Real-World
papers.abstract: AI pentesting agents are increasingly credible as offensive security systems, but current benchmarks still provide limited guidance on which will perform best in real-world targets. Existing evaluation protocols assess and optimize for predefined goals such as capture-the-flag, remote code execution, exploit reproduction, or trajectory similarity, in simplified or narrow settings. These tools are valuable for measuring bounded capabilities, yet they do not adequately capture the complexity, open-ended exploration, and strategic decision-making required in realistic pentesting. In this paper, we present a practical evaluation protocol that shifts assessment from task completion to validated vulnerability discovery, allowing evaluation in sufficiently complex targets spanning multiple attack surfaces and vulnerability classes. The protocol combines structured ground-truth with LLM-based semantic matching to identify vulnerabilities, bipartite resolution to score findings under realistic ambiguity, continuous ground-truth maintenance, repeated and cumulative evaluation of stochastic agents, efficiency metrics, and reduced-suite selection for sustainable experimentation. This protocol extends the state of the art by enabling a more realistic, operationally informative comparison of AI pentesting agents. To enable reproducibility, we also release expert-annotated ground truth and code for the proposed evaluation protocol: https://github.com/jd0965199-oss/ethibench.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从简化任务转向真实漏洞发现的AI渗透测试智能体评估协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI渗透测试基准在简化或狭窄环境中评估智能体，无法反映真实渗透测试的复杂性、开放探索和战略决策需求。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能评估AI渗透测试智能体在真实世界目标中漏洞发现能力的实用协议。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合结构化真实标注与LLM语义匹配识别漏洞、二分图解析处理模糊性、持续维护真实标注、重复累积评估随机智能体、效率指标以及缩减套件选择。
contributions: 提出从任务完成转向漏洞发现的实用评估协议，支持多攻击面和漏洞类别的复杂目标。
发布专家标注的真实标注和代码以促进可复现性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 协议依赖LLM语义匹配的准确性，可能引入偏差。
真实标注的维护成本较高，可能限制大规模应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实用，但缺乏实验细节，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从简化任务转向真实漏洞发现的AI渗透测试智能体评估协议。

papers.title: MMVIAD: Multi-view Multi-task Video Understanding for Industrial Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Industrial anomaly detection is critical for manufacturing quality control, yet existing datasets mainly focus on static images or sparse views, which do not fully reflect continuous inspection processes in real industrial scenarios. We introduce MMVIAD (Multi-view Multi-task Video Industrial Anomaly Detection), to the best of our knowledge the first continuous multi-view video dataset for industrial anomaly detection and understanding, together with a benchmark for multi-task evaluation. MMVIAD contains object-centric 2-second inspection clips with approximately 120 degrees of camera motion, covering 48 object categories, 14 environments, and 6 structural anomaly types. It supports anomaly detection, defect classification, object classification, and anomaly visible-time localization. Systematic evaluations on MMVIAD show that current commercial and open-source video MLLMs remain far below human performance, especially for fine-grained defect recognition and temporal grounding. To improve transferable anomaly understanding, we further develop a two-stage post-training pipeline where PS-SFT (Perception-Structured Supervised Fine-Tuning) initializes perception-structured reasoning and VISTA-GRPO (Visibility-grounded Industrial Structured Temporal Anomaly Group Relative Policy Optimization) refines the model with semantic-gated defect reward and visibility-aware temporal reward, producing the final model VISTA. On MMVIAD-Unseen, VISTA improves the base model's average score across the four tasks from 45.0 to 57.5, surpassing GPT-5.4. Source code is available at https://github.com/Georgekeepmoving/MMVIAD.

analysis.tldr: 首个多视角视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD及两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别与时间定位上的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工业异常检测数据集主要基于静态图像或稀疏视角，无法反映真实工业场景中的连续检测过程，限制了视频多模态大模型在该领域的应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏多视角连续视频数据集及有效的视频异常理解方法，导致当前视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位上远低于人类水平。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前商业和开源视频MLLM在MMVIAD上远低于人类表现，尤其在细粒度缺陷识别和时间定位方面。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段后训练流程：第一阶段PS-SFT初始化感知结构化推理，第二阶段VISTA-GRPO通过语义门控缺陷奖励和可见性感知时间奖励优化模型，得到最终模型VISTA。
contributions: 构建了首个多视角连续视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD，包含48个物体类别、14种环境和6种结构异常类型，支持四项任务。
提出两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在工业异常检测任务上的性能，在未见类别上平均得分从45.0提升至57.5。
analysis.experiments: 在MMVIAD数据集上进行了系统评估，结果显示VISTA在MMVIAD-Unseen上平均得分从45.0提升至57.5，超越GPT-5.4。
limitations: 数据集仅包含2秒剪辑和约120度视角，可能无法覆盖所有工业场景。
方法依赖多任务标注，标注成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个多视角视频工业异常检测数据集，方法创新且实验充分，与视频理解和应用方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个多视角视频工业异常检测数据集MMVIAD及两阶段后训练方法VISTA，显著提升视频MLLM在细粒度缺陷识别与时间定位上的性能。

papers.title: SLIM: Sparse Latent Steering for Interpretable and Property-Directed LLM-Based Molecular Editing
papers.abstract: Large language models possess strong chemical reasoning capabilities, making them effective molecular editors. However, property-relevant information is implicitly entangled across their dense hidden states, providing no explicit handle for property control: a substantial fraction of edits fail to improve or even degrade target properties. To address these issues, we propose SLIM (Sparse Latent Interpretable Molecular editing), a plug-and-play framework that decomposes the editor's hidden states into sparse, property-aligned features via a Sparse Autoencoder with learnable importance gates. Steering in this sparse feature space precisely activates property-relevant dimensions, improving editing success rate without modifying model parameters. The same sparse basis further supports interpretable analysis of editing behavior. Experiments on the MolEditRL benchmark across four model architectures and eight molecular properties show consistent gains over baselines, with improvements of up to 42.4 points.

analysis.tldr: SLIM通过稀疏自编码器分解LLM隐藏状态，实现可解释、属性可控的分子编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在分子编辑中具有化学推理能力，但其隐藏状态中属性相关信息纠缠不清，导致大量编辑失败或损害目标属性，缺乏显式的属性控制机制。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM的密集隐藏状态中提取稀疏、属性对齐的特征，以实现可解释且属性导向的分子编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，LLM隐藏状态中属性相关信息纠缠，导致编辑失败率较高。
analysis.method: 提出SLIM框架，使用带可学习重要性门的稀疏自编码器将编辑器隐藏状态分解为稀疏、属性对齐的特征，并在该稀疏特征空间中进行引导，无需修改模型参数。
contributions: 提出SLIM，一种即插即用的框架，通过稀疏自编码器实现属性导向的分子编辑。
在MolEditRL基准上，跨四种模型架构和八种分子属性，编辑成功率提升高达42.4个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在MolEditRL基准上，对四种模型架构和八种分子属性进行实验，与基线相比取得一致提升，最高提升42.4个百分点。
limitations: 可能依赖于稀疏自编码器的训练质量。
未提及在更复杂分子或属性上的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，提升显著，但属于特定应用领域。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SLIM通过稀疏自编码器分解LLM隐藏状态，实现可解释、属性可控的分子编辑。

papers.title: Predicting 3D structure by latent posterior sampling
papers.abstract: The remarkable achievements of both generative models of 2D images and neural field representations for 3D scenes present a compelling opportunity to integrate the strengths of both approaches. In this work, we propose a methodology that combines a NeRF-based representation of 3D scenes with probabilistic modeling and reasoning using diffusion models. We view 3D reconstruction as a perception problem with inherent uncertainty that can thereby benefit from probabilistic inference methods. The core idea is to represent the 3D scene as a stochastic latent variable for which we can learn a prior and use it to perform posterior inference given a set of observations. We formulate posterior sampling using the score-based inference method of diffusion models in conjunction with a likelihood term computed from a reconstruction model that includes volumetric rendering. We train the model using a two-stage process: first we train the reconstruction model while auto-decoding the latent representations for a dataset of 3D scenes, and then we train the prior over the latents using a diffusion model. By using the model to generate samples from the posterior we demonstrate that various 3D reconstruction tasks can be performed, differing by the type of observation used as inputs. We showcase reconstruction from single-view, multi-view, noisy images, sparse pixels, and sparse depth data. These observations vary in the amount of information they provide for the scene and we show that our method can model the varying levels of inherent uncertainty associated with each task. Our experiments illustrate that this approach yields a comprehensive method capable of accurately predicting 3D structure from diverse types of observations.

analysis.tldr: 结合NeRF和扩散模型，通过潜在后验采样实现从多种观测中预测3D结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 2D图像生成模型和3D神经场表示的成功为整合两者提供了机会，但3D重建存在固有不确定性，需要概率推理方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从单视图、多视图、噪声图像、稀疏像素或稀疏深度等不同观测中，以概率方式准确预测3D结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同观测类型提供的信息量不同，导致重建任务的不确定性水平各异，现有方法难以统一建模。
analysis.method: 将3D场景表示为随机潜变量，学习其先验，并使用基于扩散模型的得分推断方法结合体积渲染的似然项进行后验采样；采用两阶段训练：先训练重建模型并自动解码潜表示，再用扩散模型训练潜变量先验。
contributions: 提出一种结合NeRF和扩散模型的概率3D重建框架，将3D重建视为后验推理问题。
展示了该方法能处理多种观测类型（单视图、多视图、噪声图像、稀疏像素、稀疏深度），并建模不同不确定性水平。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量3D场景数据集进行训练。
两阶段训练可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合NeRF和扩散模型进行概率3D重建，但摘要未提供实验细节，需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合NeRF和扩散模型，通过潜在后验采样实现从多种观测中预测3D结构。

papers.title: The First Drop of Ink: Nonlinear Impact of Misleading Information in Long-Context Reasoning
papers.abstract: As large language models are increasingly deployed in retrieval-augmented generation and agentic systems that accumulate extensive context, understanding how distracting information affects long-context performance becomes critical. Prior work shows that semantically relevant yet misleading documents degrade performance, but the quantitative relationship between the proportion of distractors and performance remains unstudied. In this work, we systematically vary the hard-distractor proportion in fixed-length contexts, revealing a striking nonlinear pattern: as the proportion of hard distractors increases, performance drops sharply within the first small fraction, while the remainder of the range yields only marginal additional decline. We term this ''The First Drop of Ink'' effect, analogous to how a single drop of ink contaminates water. Our theoretical and empirical analyses grounded in attention mechanics show that hard distractors capture disproportionate attention even at small proportions, with diminishing marginal impact as their proportion grows. Controlled experiments further show that filtering gains mainly come from context-length reduction rather than distractor removal; substantial recovery requires reducing the hard-distractor proportion to near zero, highlighting the importance of upstream retrieval precision.

analysis.tldr: 长上下文推理中，误导信息比例与性能呈非线性关系，少量硬干扰物即导致性能急剧下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在检索增强生成和智能体系统中积累长上下文，理解干扰信息对性能的影响至关重要，但现有研究未量化干扰物比例与性能的关系。
analysis.problem: 揭示长上下文中硬干扰物比例与模型性能之间的定量关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现非线性模式：硬干扰物比例在小范围内急剧增加时性能大幅下降，之后边际影响递减，称为“第一滴墨水”效应。
analysis.method: 系统改变固定长度上下文中的硬干扰物比例，结合注意力机制的理论与实证分析。
contributions: 发现并命名了长上下文推理中的“第一滴墨水”效应。
通过注意力机制的理论和实证分析解释了该效应的成因。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对固定长度上下文，未考虑可变长度场景。
仅研究硬干扰物，未涉及其他类型干扰。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 发现重要非线性现象，对长上下文推理有指导意义，但实验细节不足。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 长上下文推理中，误导信息比例与性能呈非线性关系，少量硬干扰物即导致性能急剧下降。

papers.title: MaD Physics: Evaluating information seeking under constraints in physical environments
papers.abstract: Scientific discovery is fundamentally a resource-constrained process that requires navigating complex trade-offs between the quality and quantity of measurements due to physical and cost constraints. Measurements drive the scientific process by revealing novel phenomena to improve our understanding. Existing benchmarks for evaluating agents for scientific discovery focus on either static knowledge-based reasoning or unconstrained experimental design tasks, and do not capture the ability to make measurements and plan under constraints. To bridge this gap, we propose Measuring and Discovering Physics (MaD Physics), a benchmark to evaluate the ability of agents to make informative measurements and conclusions subject to constraints on the quality and quantity of measurements. The benchmark consists of three environments, each based on a distinct physical law. To mitigate contamination from existing knowledge, MaD Physics includes altered physical laws. In each trial, the agent makes measurements of the system until it exhausts an allotted budget and then the agent has to infer the underlying physical law to make predictions about the state of the system in the future. MaD Physics evaluates two fundamental capabilities of scientific agents: inferring models from data and planning under constraints. We also demonstrate how MaD Physics can be used to evaluate other capabilities such as multimodality and in-context learning. We benchmark agents on MaD Physics using four Gemini models (2.5 Flash Lite, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Pro, and 3 Flash), identifying shortcomings in their structured exploration and data collection capabilities and highlighting directions to improve their scientific reasoning.

papers.title: ALAM: Algebraically Consistent Latent Transitions for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models remain constrained by the scarcity of action-labeled robot data, whereas action-free videos provide abundant evidence of how the physical world changes. Latent action models offer a promising way to extract such priors from videos, but reconstruction-trained latent codes are not necessarily suitable for policy generation: they may predict future observations while lacking the structure needed to be reused or generated coherently with robot actions. We introduce ALAM (Algebraic Latent Action Model), an Algebraically Consistent Latent Action Model that turns temporal relations in action-free video into structural supervision. Given frame triplets, ALAM learns latent transitions that are grounded by reconstruction while being regularized by composition and reversal consistency, encouraging a locally additive transition space. For downstream VLA learning, we freeze the pretrained encoder and use its latent transition sequences as auxiliary generative targets, co-generated with robot actions under a joint flow-matching objective. This couples structured latent transitions with flow-based policy generation, allowing the policy to exploit ALAM's locally consistent transition geometry without requiring latent-to-action decoding. Representation probes show that ALAM reduces additivity and reversibility errors by 25-85 times over unstructured latent-action baselines and improves long-horizon cumulative reconstruction. When transferred to VLA policies, ALAM raises the average success rate from 47.9% to 85.0% on MetaWorld MT50 and from 94.1% to 98.1% on LIBERO, with consistent gains on real-world manipulation tasks. Ablations further confirm that the strongest improvements arise from the synergy between algebraically structured latent transitions and joint flow matching.

analysis.tldr: 提出代数一致潜在动作模型ALAM，利用无动作视频中的时间关系学习结构化潜在转移，显著提升VLA策略成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型受限于动作标注机器人数据稀缺，而无动作视频蕴含丰富物理世界变化信息，但现有潜在动作模型提取的潜在编码缺乏策略生成所需的结构化特性。
analysis.problem: 如何从无动作视频中学习具有代数一致性的潜在转移表示，使其既能预测未来观测又能与机器人动作协同生成，从而提升VLA策略性能。

papers.title: CLEF: EEG Foundation Model for Learning Clinical Semantics
papers.abstract: Clinical EEG interpretation requires reasoning over full EEG sessions and integrating signal patterns with clinical context. Existing EEG foundation models are largely designed for short-window decoding and do not incorporate clinical context. We introduce CLEF, a clinically grounded long-context EEG foundation model. CLEF represents EEG sessions as 3D multitaper spectrogram tokens, enabling tractable Transformer modeling at session scale, and aligns embeddings with neurologist reports and structured EHR data through contrastive objectives. We evaluate CLEF on a new 234-task benchmark spanning disease phenotypes, medication exposures, and EEG findings, with more than 260k EEG sessions from over 108k patients. CLEF outperforms prior EEG foundation models on 229 of 234 tasks, improving mean AUROC from 0.65 to 0.74. Reconstruction-only pretraining surpasses prior EEG foundation models, while report and EHR alignment yields further gains. Held-out concept and external-cohort experiments suggest that these representations transfer beyond observed alignment targets. These results support session-scale, clinically grounded representation learning as a promising foundation-model paradigm for clinical EEG.

analysis.tldr: 提出临床脑电图基础模型CLEF，通过长上下文建模和临床语义对齐，在234个任务中显著超越现有模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床脑电图解读需要处理完整会话并整合信号与临床上下文，但现有基础模型仅适用于短窗口解码且缺乏临床信息整合。

papers.title: Policy Gradient Methods for Non-Markovian Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: We study policy gradient methods for reinforcement learning in non-Markovian decision processes (NMDPs), where observations and rewards depend on the entire interaction history. To handle this dependence, the agent maintains an internal state that is recursively updated to provide a compact summary of past observations and actions. In contrast to approaches that treat the agent state dynamics as fixed or learn it via predictive objectives, we propose a reward-centric formulation that jointly optimizes the agent state dynamics and the control policy to maximize the expected cumulative reward. To this end, we consider a class of Agent State-Markov (ASM) policies, comprising an agent state dynamics and a control policy that maps the agent state to actions. We establish a novel policy gradient theorem for ASM policies, extending the classical policy gradient results from the Markovian setting to episodic and infinite-horizon discounted NMDPs. Building on this gradient expression, we propose the Agent State-Markov Policy Gradient (ASMPG) algorithm, which leverages the recursive structure of the agent state dynamics for efficient optimization. We establish finite-time and almost sure convergence guarantees, and empirically demonstrate that, on a range of non-Markovian tasks, ASMPG outperforms baselines that learn state representations via predictive objectives.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种联合优化智能体状态动态与控制策略的策略梯度方法，用于非马尔可夫强化学习。

papers.title: Probing Cross-modal Information Hubs in Audio-Visual LLMs
papers.abstract: Audio-visual large language models (AVLLMs) have recently emerged as a powerful architecture capable of jointly reasoning over audio, visual, and textual modalities. In AVLLMs, the bidirectional interaction between audio and video modalities introduces intricate processing dynamics, necessitating a deeper understanding of their internal mechanisms. However, unlike extensively studied text-only or large vision language models, the internal workings of AVLLMs remain largely unexplored. In this paper, we focus on cross-modal information flow between audio and visual modalities in AVLLMs, investigating where information derived from one modality is encoded within the token representations of the other modality. Through an analysis of multiple recent AVLLMs, we uncover two common findings. First, AVLLMs primarily encode integrated audio-visual information in sink tokens. Second, sink tokens do not uniformly hold cross-modal information. Instead, a distinct subset of sink tokens, which we term cross-modal sink tokens, specializes in storing such information. Based on these findings, we further propose a simple training-free hallucination mitigation method by encouraging reliance on integrated cross-modal information within cross-modal sink tokens. Our code is available at https://github.com/kaistmm/crossmodal-hub.

analysis.tldr: 揭示AVLLM中跨模态信息集中在sink token的子集，并提出无训练幻觉缓解方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 音频-视觉大语言模型（AVLLM）虽能联合推理多模态，但其内部机制（尤其是跨模态信息流）尚未被探索，理解这些机制有助于改进模型。
analysis.problem: AVLLM中音频和视觉模态之间的跨模态信息如何编码和流动，以及如何利用该知识缓解幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现两个现象：1) AVLLM主要在sink token中编码集成音频-视觉信息；2) sink token中有一个子集（跨模态sink token）专门存储跨模态信息。
analysis.method: 提出一种无需训练的方法，通过鼓励模型依赖跨模态sink token中的集成信息来缓解幻觉。
contributions: 首次系统分析AVLLM中音频-视觉跨模态信息流，发现sink token和跨模态sink token的作用。
提出一种简单有效的无训练幻觉缓解方法。

papers.title: NanoResearch: Co-Evolving Skills, Memory, and Policy for Personalized Research Automation
papers.abstract: LLM-powered multi-agent systems can now automate the full research pipeline from ideation to paper writing, but a fundamental question remains: automation for whom? Researchers operate under different resource configurations, hold different methodological preferences, and target different output formats. A system that produces uniform outputs regardless of these differences will systematically under-serve every individual user, making personalization a precondition for research automation to be genuinely usable. However, achieving it requires three capabilities that current systems lack: accumulating reusable procedural knowledge across projects, retaining user-specific experience across sessions, and internalizing implicit preferences that resist explicit formalization. We propose NanoResearch, a multi-agent framework that addresses these gaps through tri-level co-evolution. A skill bank distills recurring operations into compact procedural rules reusable across projects. A memory module maintains user- and project-specific experience that grounds planning decisions in each user's research history. A label-free policy learning converts free-form feedback into persistent parameter updates of the planner, reshaping subsequent coordination. These three layers co-evolve: reliable skills produce richer memory, richer memory informs better planning, and preference internalization continuously realigns the loop to each user. Extensive experiments demonstrate that NanoResearch delivers substantial gains over state-of-the-art AI research systems, and progressively refines itself to produce better research at lower cost over successive cycles.

analysis.tldr: 提出NanoResearch框架，通过技能库、记忆模块和无标签策略学习的三层协同进化，实现个性化研究自动化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的多智能体研究自动化系统忽视用户个性化需求，导致输出千篇一律，无法适应不同资源、偏好和输出格式，阻碍了实际可用性。

papers.title: Switching-Geometry Analysis of Deflated Q-Value Iteration
papers.abstract: This paper develops a joint spectral radius (JSR) framework for analyzing rank-one deflated Q-value iteration (Q-VI) in discounted Markov decision process control. Focusing on an all-ones residual correction, we interpret the resulting algorithm through the geometry of switching systems and, to the best of our knowledge, give the first JSR-based convergence analysis of deflated Q-VI for policy optimization problems. Our analysis reveals that the standard Q-VI switching system model has JSR exactly the discount factor $γ\in (0,1)$, since all admissible subsystems share the all-ones vector as an invariant direction. By passing to the quotient space that removes this direction, we obtain a projected switching system model whose JSR governs the relevant error dynamics and may be strictly smaller than $γ$. Therefore, the deflated Q-VI admits a potentially sharper convergence-rate characterization than the ambient-space $γ$-bound. Finally, we prove that the correction is equivalent to a scalar recentering of standard Q-VI. Hence, the projected trajectory, and therefore the greedy-policy sequence, is unchanged relative to standard Q-VI initialized from the same point. The benefit of deflation is not a change in the induced decision-making problem, but a more precise JSR-based description of the convergence geometry after the redundant all-ones component is removed.

analysis.tldr: 通过联合谱半径框架分析降阶Q值迭代的收敛几何，揭示其收敛率可能比标准γ界更紧。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准Q值迭代的收敛分析依赖于折扣因子γ，但实际收敛可能更快，需要更精确的几何刻画。

papers.title: Threat Modelling using Domain-Adapted Language Models: Empirical Evaluation and Insights
papers.abstract: Large Language Models(LLMs) are increasingly explored for cybersecurity applications such as vulnerability detection. In the domain of threat modelling, prior work has primarily evaluated a number of general-purpose Large Language Models under limited prompting settings. In this study, we extend the research area of structured threat modelling by systematically evaluating domain-adapted language models of different sizes to their general counterparts. We use both LLMs and Small Language Models(SLMs) that were domain adapted to telecommunications and cybersecuirty. For the structured threat modelling, we selected the widely used STRIDE approach and the application area is 5G security. We present a comprehensive empirical evaluation using 52 different configurations (on 8 different language models) to analyze the impact of 1) domain adaptation, 2) model scale, 3) decoding strategies (greedy vs. stochastic sampling), and 4) prompting technique on STRIDE threat classification. Our results show that domain-adapted models do not consistently outperform their general-purpose counterparts, and decoding strategies significantly affect model behavior and output validity. They also show that while larger models generally achieve higher performance, these gains are neither consistent nor sufficient for reliable threat modelling. These findings highlight fundamental limitations of current LLMs for structured threat modelling tasks and suggest that improvements require more than additional training data or model scaling, motivating the need for incorporating more task-specific reasoning and stronger grounding in security concepts. We present insights on invalid outputs encountered and present suggestions for prompting tailored specifically for STRIDE threat modelling.

analysis.tldr: 领域自适应语言模型在结构化威胁建模（STRIDE）中并不一致优于通用模型，解码策略显著影响输出有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在网络安全应用（如漏洞检测）中受到关注，但先前工作仅在有限提示设置下评估通用模型，缺乏对领域自适应模型在结构化威胁建模中的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 系统评估领域自适应语言模型（包括大小模型）在5G安全场景下进行STRIDE威胁分类的性能，并分析领域自适应、模型规模、解码策略和提示技术的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 领域自适应模型并不一致优于通用模型；解码策略显著影响模型行为和输出有效性；更大模型性能提升不一致且不足以实现可靠威胁建模。
analysis.method: 使用52种配置（8种语言模型）进行实证评估，比较领域自适应与通用模型、不同规模、解码策略（贪婪vs随机采样）和提示技术对STRIDE威胁分类的影响。
contributions: 系统评估了领域自适应语言模型在结构化威胁建模中的性能，发现其并不一致优于通用模型。
揭示了解码策略对输出有效性的显著影响，并指出当前LLM在结构化威胁建模中的根本局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在5G安全场景下，使用52种配置（8种语言模型）进行STRIDE威胁分类实验，分析了领域自适应、模型规模、解码策略和提示技术的影响。
limitations: 仅针对5G安全场景和STRIDE方法，泛化性有限。
未提供具体性能数值或基准对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 系统评估了领域自适应模型在威胁建模中的表现，但未提供具体实验结果，且应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 领域自适应语言模型在结构化威胁建模（STRIDE）中并不一致优于通用模型，解码策略显著影响输出有效性。

papers.title: PhyGround: Benchmarking Physical Reasoning in Generative World Models
papers.abstract: Generative world models are increasingly used for video generation, where learned simulators are expected to capture the physical rules that govern real-world dynamics. However, evaluating whether generated videos actually follow these rules remains challenging. Existing physics-focused video benchmarks have made important progress, but they still face three key challenges, including the coarse evaluation frameworks that hide law-specific failures, response biases and fatigue that undermine the validity of annotation judgments, and automated evaluators that are insufficiently physics-aware or difficult to audit. To address those challenges, we introduce PhyGround, a criteria-grounded benchmark for evaluating physical reasoning in video generation. The benchmark contains 250 curated prompts, each augmented with an expected physical outcome, and a taxonomy of 13 physical laws across solid-body mechanics, fluid dynamics, and optics. Each law is operationalized through observable sub-questions to enable per-law diagnostics. We evaluate eight modern video generation models through a large-scale, quality-controlled human study, grounded on social science lab experiment design. A total of 459 annotators provided 5,796 complete annotations and over 37.4K fine-grained labels; after quality control, the retained annotations exhibited high split-half model-ranking correlations (Spearman's rho > 0.90). To support reproducible automated evaluation, we release PhyJudge-9B, an open physics-specialized VLM judge. PhyJudge-9B achieves substantially lower aggregate relative bias than Gemini-3.1-Pro (3.3% vs. 16.6%). We release prompts, human annotations, model checkpoints, and evaluation code on the project page https://phyground.github.io/.

analysis.tldr: PhyGround 是一个用于评估视频生成模型物理推理能力的基准，包含 250 个提示、13 条物理定律和细粒度标注，并通过大规模人类研究和专用 VLM 裁判实现可靠评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型常被期望遵循物理规则，但缺乏细粒度、无偏且可审计的物理推理评估方法。
analysis.problem: 现有物理视频基准存在评估框架粗糙、标注者偏差与疲劳、自动评估器物理感知不足或难以审计的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含 250 个提示和 13 条物理定律（固体力学、流体动力学、光学）的基准，每个提示附带预期物理结果；通过大规模质量控制人类研究（459 名标注者，5,796 条完整标注）和开源物理专用 VLM 裁判 PhyJudge-9B 进行评估。
contributions: 提出 PhyGround 基准，包含 250 个提示和 13 条物理定律的细粒度评估框架。
通过大规模人类研究（459 人，5,796 条标注）验证基准可靠性，标注后分半模型排名相关性 >0.90。
开源 PhyJudge-9B VLM 裁判，相对偏差显著低于 Gemini-3.1-Pro（3.3% vs 16.6%）。
analysis.experiments: 评估了 8 个现代视频生成模型，通过大规模人类研究（459 名标注者，5,796 条完整标注，37.4K 细粒度标签）和 PhyJudge-9B 自动评估。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖 13 条物理定律，可能未涵盖所有物理现象。
PhyJudge-9B 的泛化能力可能受限于训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计细致，人类研究规模大，自动评估器开源且偏差低，对视频生成物理推理评估有重要价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhyGround 是一个用于评估视频生成模型物理推理能力的基准，包含 250 个提示、13 条物理定律和细粒度标注，并通过大规模人类研究和专用 VLM 裁判实现可靠评估。

papers.title: Reasoning Is Not Free: Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing for LLM-as-a-Judge
papers.abstract: Reasoning-capable large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted as automated judges, but their benefits and costs in LLM-as-a-Judge settings remain unclear. Through controlled comparisons between reasoning and non-reasoning judges, we show that explicit reasoning substantially improves judgment accuracy on tasks requiring structured verification (e.g., math and coding), while offering limited or even negative gains on simpler evaluations and incurring significantly higher computational cost. These findings motivate that reasoning should be used selectively rather than universally, with awareness of possible distribution shift. We propose a Robust Adaptive Cost-Efficient Routing (RACER), which dynamically selects between reasoning and non-reasoning judges under a fixed budget by formulating routing as a constrained distributionally robust optimization problem. RACER explicitly accounts for distribution shift via a KL-divergence uncertainty set, admits an efficient primal--dual algorithm, and enjoys theoretical guarantees including uniqueness of the optimal policy and linear convergence. Extensive experiments show that RACER achieves superior accuracy--cost trade-offs under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 提出RACER框架，在LLM裁判任务中根据分布偏移动态选择推理/非推理模型，实现成本与准确率的帕累托最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 推理型LLM作为裁判时虽能提升结构化验证任务的准确率，但计算成本高昂，且对简单任务收益有限甚至为负，亟需一种成本感知的选择策略。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定预算下，针对不同评估任务动态选择推理型或非推理型LLM裁判，以在分布偏移场景下实现准确率与成本的最佳权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 推理型裁判在数学、代码等结构化验证任务上准确率显著提升，但在简单评估任务上增益有限甚至为负，且计算成本远高于非推理模型。
analysis.method: 将路由问题建模为带KL散度不确定集的约束分布鲁棒优化，设计原始-对偶算法求解，保证策略唯一性和线性收敛。
contributions: 通过控制实验揭示推理型LLM裁判在不同任务上的收益-成本非单调关系
提出RACER框架，将路由形式化为分布鲁棒优化问题，显式建模分布偏移
给出理论保证（策略唯一性、线性收敛）并实验验证其准确率-成本权衡优势
analysis.experiments: 在多种LLM裁判任务上验证RACER在分布偏移下实现更优的准确率-成本权衡。
limitations: 仅考虑推理与非推理两类模型，未扩展至更多模型类型
KL散度不确定集可能无法覆盖所有实际分布偏移模式
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖（分布鲁棒优化路由），理论扎实，实验充分，与LLM推理成本优化高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RACER框架，在LLM裁判任务中根据分布偏移动态选择推理/非推理模型，实现成本与准确率的帕累托最优。

papers.title: New AI-Driven Tools for Enhancing Campus Well-being: A Prevention and Intervention Approach
papers.abstract: Campus well-being underpins academic success, yet many universities lack effective methods for monitoring satisfaction and detecting mental health risks. This dissertation addresses these gaps through prevention (improving feedback collection) and intervention (advancing mental health detection), unified under an integrated framework. For prevention, we developed TigerGPT, a personalized survey chatbot leveraging LLMs to engage users in context-aware conversations grounded in conversational design and engagement theory, achieving 75% usability and 81% satisfaction. To address its limitations in repetitiveness and response depth, we introduced AURA, a reinforcement-learning framework that adapts follow-up question types (validate, specify, reflect, probe) within a session using an LSDE quality signal (Length, Self-disclosure, Emotion, Specificity), initialized from 96 prior conversations. AURA achieved +0.12 mean quality gain (p=0.044, d=0.66), with 63% fewer specification prompts and 10x more validation behavior. For intervention, we examine Expressive Narrative Stories (ENS) for mental health screening, showing BERT(128) captures nuanced linguistic features without keyword cues, while conventional classifiers depend heavily on explicit mental health terms. We then developed PsychoGPT, an LLM built on DSM-5 and PHQ-8 guidelines that performs initial distress classification, symptom-level scoring, and reconciliation with external ratings for explainable assessment. To reduce hallucinations, we proposed Stacked Multi-Model Reasoning (SMMR), layering expert models where early layers handle localized subtasks and later layers reconcile findings, outperforming single-model solutions on DAIC-WOZ in accuracy, F1, and PHQ-8 scoring. Finally, a cohesive framework unifies these tools, enabling adaptive survey insights to flow directly into specialized mental health detection models.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI工具（TigerGPT、AURA、PsychoGPT）提升校园幸福感，涵盖预防性反馈收集与干预性心理健康检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 大学缺乏有效的满意度监测和心理健康风险检测方法，现有工具在用户参与度、检测准确性和可解释性方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过AI驱动的预防（改进反馈收集）和干预（提升心理健康检测）来增强校园幸福感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出TigerGPT存在重复性和响应深度不足的问题，以及传统分类器依赖显式心理健康术语。
analysis.method: 预防方面：TigerGPT（基于LLM的个性化调查聊天机器人）和AURA（强化学习框架，自适应调整追问类型）；干预方面：PsychoGPT（基于DSM-5和PHQ-8的LLM）和Stacked Multi-Model Reasoning（SMMR，分层专家模型减少幻觉）。
contributions: 提出TigerGPT和AURA用于预防性反馈收集，AURA通过强化学习提升对话质量。
开发PsychoGPT和SMMR用于可解释的心理健康检测，减少幻觉。
构建统一框架整合预防与干预工具。
analysis.experiments: TigerGPT达到75%可用性和81%满意度；AURA实现平均质量增益+0.12（p=0.044, d=0.66），规范提示减少63%，验证行为增加10倍；PsychoGPT在DAIC-WOZ上优于单模型方案。
limitations: TigerGPT存在重复性和响应深度不足。
PsychoGPT的幻觉问题虽通过SMMR缓解，但可能仍有残留。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但实验规模有限，适合关注AI心理健康应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI工具（TigerGPT、AURA、PsychoGPT）提升校园幸福感，涵盖预防性反馈收集与干预性心理健康检测。

papers.title: The Last Word Often Wins: A Format Confound in Chain-of-Thought Corruption Studies
papers.abstract: Corruption studies, the primary tool for evaluating chain-of-thought (CoT) faithfulness, identify which chain positions are "computationally important" by measuring accuracy when steps are replaced with errors. We identify a systematic confound: for chains with explicit terminal answer statements, the dominant format in standard benchmarks, corruption studies detect where the answer text appears, not where computation occurs. A within-dataset format ablation provides the key evidence: on standard GSM8K chains ending with "the answer is X," removing only the answer statement, preserving all reasoning, collapses suffix sensitivity ~19x at 3B (N=300, p=0.022). Conflicting-answer experiments quantify the causal mechanism: at 7B, CC accuracy drops to near-zero (<=0.02) across five architecture families; the followed-wrong rate spans 0.63-1.00 at 3B-7B and attenuates at larger scales (0.300 at Phi-4-14B, ~0.01 at 32B). A within-stable 7B replication (9.3x attenuation, N=76, p=7.8e-3; Qwen3-8B N=299, p=0.004) provides converging evidence, and the pattern replicates on MATH (DeepSeek-R1-7B: 10.9x suffix-survival recovery). On chains without answer suffixes the same protocol identifies the prefix as load-bearing (Delta=-0.77, p<10^-12). Generation-time probes confirm a dissociation: the answer is not early-determined during generation (early commitment <5%), yet at consumption time model outputs systematically follow the explicit answer text. The format-determination effect persists through 14B (8.5x ratio, p=0.001) and converges toward zero at 32B. We propose a three-prerequisite protocol (question-only control, format characterization, all-position sweep) as a minimum standard for corruption-based faithfulness studies.

analysis.tldr: 链式思维（CoT）忠实性评估中的格式混淆：答案语句位置主导了腐败研究结果，而非实际计算步骤。
analysis.research_motivation: 腐败研究是评估链式思维忠实性的主要工具，但现有方法可能因格式混淆而错误识别关键步骤，影响对模型推理机制的理解。
analysis.problem: 腐败研究在评估CoT忠实性时，由于链中显式答案语句的存在，检测到的是答案文本位置而非实际计算位置，导致系统性混淆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过格式消融实验发现，移除答案语句后后缀敏感性下降约19倍；冲突答案实验显示模型输出系统性地跟随显式答案文本，且该效应在14B规模仍显著，在32B趋于消失。
analysis.method: 提出三前提协议（仅问题对照、格式表征、全位置扫描）作为基于腐败的忠实性研究的最低标准。
contributions: 识别并量化了CoT腐败研究中的格式混淆效应，证明答案语句位置主导了检测结果。
提出改进的评估协议以消除格式混淆，提高忠实性研究的可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在GSM8K和MATH数据集上，使用3B至32B不同规模模型（包括Qwen3-8B、DeepSeek-R1-7B等）进行格式消融和冲突答案实验，统计显著性p值均小于0.05。
limitations: 实验主要基于数学推理任务，其他领域（如常识推理）的泛化性未验证。
三前提协议可能增加评估复杂度，实际应用中的效率需进一步考量。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验系统，对CoT忠实性评估有重要改进意义，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 链式思维（CoT）忠实性评估中的格式混淆：答案语句位置主导了腐败研究结果，而非实际计算步骤。

papers.title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Football Performance Analysis: Evidence of Limited Transferability from Elite Leagues to University Competition
papers.abstract: Machine learning has become increasingly prevalent in football performance analysis, yet most studies prioritize predictive accuracy while implicitly assuming that learned performance determinants and their interpretations are transferable across competition levels. Whether interpretability remains reliable under domain shift-from elite to university football remains largely unexplored. This study investigates whether performance determinants learned from elite competitions are structurally transferable to university-level football and whether their interpretations remain robust under domain shift. Models were trained on large-scale event data from the top five European leagues and applied to university football data from National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) using an identical feature space. Random Forest and Multilayer Perceptron models were interpreted using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Counterfactual Impact Score (CIS). Across five experiments, elite football exhibited a stable and consistent hierarchy of performance determinants across leagues, models, and explanation methods. In contrast, NTHU university football showed substantial reordering of key indicators, reduced explanation stability, weaker structural agreement with elite domains, and increased sensitivity to explanation method. These findings suggest that interpretability robustness is domain-dependent. Rather than reflecting methodological limitations alone, instability in explanations under domain shift may serve as a diagnostic signal of structural ambiguity in the target domain.

analysis.tldr: 精英联赛学到的足球表现因素在大学比赛中不可迁移，解释稳定性随领域变化显著下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器学习足球分析大多假设跨竞赛级别的表现因素可迁移，但领域偏移下可解释性是否可靠尚未探索。
analysis.problem: 验证从精英联赛学到的表现决定因素及其解释是否在结构上可迁移至大学足球，并评估领域偏移下解释的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 精英联赛的表现因素层级稳定一致，而大学足球的关键指标排序显著变化、解释稳定性降低、与精英领域结构一致性弱，且对解释方法更敏感。
analysis.method: 使用随机森林和多层感知机在相同特征空间上训练，并用SHAP和反事实影响分数进行解释，通过五个实验比较跨领域解释稳定性。
contributions: 首次系统评估足球表现分析中跨竞赛级别的可解释性迁移性
发现解释不稳定性可作为目标领域结构模糊的诊断信号
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅涉及一个大学数据集，泛化性有限
未探讨其他解释方法或模型架构
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 主题与核心方向距离较远，且摘要未提供实验细节，贡献有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 精英联赛学到的足球表现因素在大学比赛中不可迁移，解释稳定性随领域变化显著下降。

papers.title: Can You Keep a Secret? Involuntary Information Leakage in Language Model Writing
papers.abstract: Language models are deployed in settings that require compartmentalization: system prompts should not be disclosed, chain-of-thought reasoning is hidden from users, and sensitive data passes through shared contexts. We test whether models can keep prompted information out of their writing. We give each model a secret word with instructions not to reveal it, then ask it to write a story. A second model tries to identify the secret from the story in a binary discrimination test. The secret word never appears literally in any output, but all five frontier models we test leak it thematically -- through topic choice, imagery, and setting--6hy-at rates significantly different from chance, up to 79\%. When told to actively hide the secret, models write \emph{away from} it, and this avoidance is itself detectable. The leakage is cross-model readable, scales sharply with model size within two model families, and disappears entirely for short-form writing like jokes. Giving the model a decoy concept to ``focus on instead'' partially redirects the leakage from the real secret to the decoy. Attending to a secret appears to open up an information channel that frontier LLMs cannot close, even when instructed to.

analysis.tldr: 前沿LLM在写作时会无意识泄露提示中的秘密信息，即使明确要求保密也无法完全避免。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型被部署在需要信息隔离的场景中（如系统提示保密、思维链隐藏、敏感数据处理），但模型是否能在生成文本中真正保守秘密尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 测试语言模型能否在写作任务中不泄露提示中的秘密信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有五个前沿模型均以显著高于随机水平的概率（最高79%）通过主题、意象和场景选择泄露秘密词；主动隐藏时反而因回避行为暴露秘密；泄露程度随模型规模增大而增强；短文本（如笑话）中泄露消失；提供干扰项可部分转移泄露。
analysis.method: 给模型一个秘密词并要求保密，然后让其写故事；用另一个模型进行二选一判别测试，判断故事中是否隐含了秘密词。
contributions: 首次系统量化了语言模型在写作任务中的无意识信息泄露现象
揭示了泄露的跨模型可读性、规模缩放规律和任务依赖性，并发现干扰项可部分缓解泄露
analysis.experiments: 在五个前沿模型上进行了秘密词泄露测试，包括不同模型家族、不同写作长度和干扰项条件，结果以泄露率（最高79%）和统计显著性报告。
limitations: 仅测试了单一秘密词和故事写作任务，其他任务（如对话、摘要）可能不同
未深入探究泄露的机制或提出有效的防御方法
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 揭示了LLM部署中未被充分认识的安全漏洞，实验设计巧妙且结果显著，对隐私保护有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前沿LLM在写作时会无意识泄露提示中的秘密信息，即使明确要求保密也无法完全避免。

papers.title: PathISE: Learning Informative Path Supervision for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
papers.abstract: Knowledge Graph Question Answering (KGQA) aims to answer user questions by reasoning over Knowledge Graphs (KGs). Recent KGQA methods mainly follow the retrieval-augmented generation paradigm to ground Large Language Models~(LLMs) with structured knowledge from KGs. However, training effective models to retrieve question-relevant evidence from KGs typically requires high-quality intermediate supervision signals, such as question-relevant paths or subgraphs, which are time- and resource-intensive to obtain. We propose PathISE, a novel framework for learning high-quality intermediate supervision from answer-level labels. PathISE introduces a lightweight transformer-based estimator that estimates the informativeness of relation paths to construct pseudo path-level supervision. This supervision is then distilled into an LLM path generator, whose generated paths are grounded in the KG to provide compact evidence for inductive answer reasoning. ExtensiveISE experiments on three KGQA benchmarks show that PathISE achieves competitive or state-of-the-art KGQA performance, and provides reusable supervision signals that can enhance existing KGQA models, without relying on costly LLM-refined supervision signals. Our source code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/PathISE-2F87.

analysis.tldr: PathISE通过从答案标签中学习路径级监督信号，无需昂贵的人工标注即可提升知识图谱问答性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有KGQA方法依赖高质量中间监督（如路径或子图）来训练检索模型，但这些监督信号获取成本高昂，限制了方法的可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何从答案标签中自动学习高质量的路径级监督信号，以训练LLM生成紧凑的证据路径用于KGQA。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PathISE框架包含一个轻量级Transformer估计器，用于评估关系路径的信息量并构建伪路径监督，然后将该监督蒸馏到LLM路径生成器中，使其生成可被KG验证的路径。
contributions: 提出PathISE框架，从答案标签中学习路径级监督，无需昂贵的人工标注。
在三个KGQA基准上达到竞争或最优性能，且生成的监督信号可复用于增强现有KGQA模型。
analysis.experiments: 在三个KGQA基准上进行实验，结果表明PathISE取得了竞争性或最优性能，且无需LLM精炼的监督信号。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Rapid Forest Fuel Load Estimation via Virtual Remote Sensing and Metric-Scale Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Accurate quantification of forest coverage and combustible biomass (fuel load) is critical for wildfire risk assessment and ecosystem management. However, traditional methods relying on airborne LiDAR or field surveys are cost-prohibitive and time-intensive, while satellite imagery often lacks the vertical resolution required for canopy volume analysis. This paper proposes a novel, automated pipeline for rapid forest inventory using virtual remote sensing data derived from Google Earth Studio (GES). Our approach first generates low-altitude orbital imagery and camera poses for a target region. For dense 3D reconstruction, we employ Pi-Long, developed within the VGGT-Long framework. This model serves as a scalable extension of the Pi-3 feed-forward Transformer architecture. To address the inherent scale ambiguity in monocular reconstruction, we introduce a metric recovery module that aligns the reconstructed trajectory with GES ground truth poses via Sim(3) Umeyama optimization. The metric-scale point cloud is then orthogonally projected into Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) height and density maps. Finally, we employ a watershed-based segmentation algorithm combined with height variance analysis to classify tree species (conifer vs. broadleaf), calculate Leaf Area Index (LAI), and estimate total fuel load. Experimental results demonstrate that this pipeline offers a scalable, cost-effective alternative to physical scanning, enabling near-real-time estimation of forest biomass with high geometric consistency.

analysis.tldr: 提出利用虚拟遥感数据和前馈3D重建的自动化流程，实现快速、低成本的森林燃料负荷估算。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统森林燃料负荷估算依赖机载LiDAR或实地调查，成本高且耗时；卫星图像缺乏垂直分辨率，难以进行冠层体积分析。
analysis.problem: 如何利用虚拟遥感数据实现低成本、近实时的森林燃料负荷估算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从Google Earth Studio获取虚拟遥感图像和相机位姿，使用基于VGGT-Long框架的Pi-Long模型进行稠密3D重建，通过Sim(3) Umeyama优化恢复公制尺度，生成鸟瞰高度和密度图，再结合分水岭分割和高度方差分析进行树种分类、叶面积指数计算和燃料负荷估算。
contributions: 提出一种结合虚拟遥感和前馈3D重建的自动化森林燃料负荷估算流程。
引入公制恢复模块解决单目重建的尺度模糊问题。

limitations: 依赖Google Earth Studio的虚拟数据，可能受限于数据可用性和质量。
方法在复杂地形或多种植被混合场景下的泛化能力未验证。
