papers.title: Towards Understanding Continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition of Language Models: From Theory to Algorithm
papers.abstract: Continual Pre-Training (CPT) is essential for enabling Language Models (LMs) to integrate new knowledge without erasing old. While classical CPT techniques like data replay have become the standard paradigm, the mechanisms underlying how LMs acquire and retain facts over time, termed as continual Factual Knowledge Acquisition (cFKA), remain unclear. In this work, we present a theoretical framework that characterizes the training dynamics of cFKA using a single-layer Transformer, offering a unified explanation for the behavior of representative CPT methods. Our analysis reveals that regularization-based methods merely adjust the convergence rate of parameters without altering the inherent forgetting tendency, whereas data replay methods succeed in shifting convergence dynamics and stabilizing pretrained knowledge. Building on these insights, we propose a novel generative data replay approach, called \textbf{S}electing \textbf{T}okens via attenti\textbf{O}n \textbf{C}ontribution~(STOC), which identifies influential factual snippets to guide replay data generation. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets validate our findings and demonstrate that STOC effectively enhances cFKA by mitigating catastrophic forgetting.

analysis.tldr: 本文从理论和算法角度理解语言模型持续事实知识获取，提出基于注意力贡献的生成式数据回放方法STOC。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言模型需要持续预训练以整合新知识而不遗忘旧知识，但现有方法（如数据回放）的底层机制尚不明确，缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 理解语言模型在持续预训练中获取和保留事实知识的机制，并设计更有效的算法来缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论分析表明，正则化方法仅调整参数收敛速度而不改变固有遗忘趋势，而数据回放方法能改变收敛动态并稳定预训练知识。
analysis.method: 提出STOC（Selecting Tokens via Attention Contribution），一种生成式数据回放方法，通过识别有影响力的事实片段来指导回放数据生成。
contributions: 提出了一个理论框架，用单层Transformer刻画持续事实知识获取的训练动态，统一解释了代表性CPT方法的行为。
基于理论洞察，设计了STOC方法，通过注意力贡献选择关键token生成回放数据，有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上进行了实验，验证了理论发现并展示了STOC的有效性。
limitations: 理论分析基于单层Transformer，可能无法完全推广到深层模型。
STOC方法依赖注意力贡献计算，可能增加计算开销。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文从理论和算法角度理解语言模型持续事实知识获取，提出基于注意力贡献的生成式数据回放方法STOC。

papers.title: Navigating the Sea of LLM Evaluation: Investigating Bias in Toxicity Benchmarks
papers.abstract: The rapid adoption of LLMs in both research and industry highlights the challenges of deploying them safely and reveals a gap in the systematic evaluation of toxicity benchmarks. As organizations increasingly rely on these benchmarks to certify models for customer-facing applications and automated moderation, unrecognized evaluation biases could lead to the deployment of vulnerable or unsafe systems. This work investigates the robustness of established benchmarking setups and examines how to measure currently neglected intrinsic biases, such as those related to model choice, metrics, and task types. Our experiments uncover significant discrepancies in benchmark behaviors when evaluation setups are altered. Specifically, shifting the task from text completion to summarization increases the tendency of benchmarks to flag content as harmful. Additionally, certain benchmarks fail to maintain consistent behavior when the input data domain is changed. Furthermore, we observe model-specific instabilities, demonstrating a clear need for more robust and comprehensive safety evaluation frameworks.

papers.title: Teacher-Aware Evolution of Heuristic Programs from Learned Optimization Policies
papers.abstract: LLM-based automatic heuristic design has shown promise for generating executable heuristics for combinatorial optimization, but existing methods mainly rely on delayed endpoint performance. We propose a \emph{teacher-aware evolutionary framework} that uses independently trained learned optimization policies as behavioral teachers. Instead of deploying or imitating the teacher, our method queries it on states visited by candidate heuristic programs and uses its action preferences as local feedback for evolution. The resulting search discovers static executable heuristics guided by both task performance and teacher-derived behavioral signals. Experiments on scheduling, routing, and graph optimization benchmarks show that our method improves over performance-driven LLM heuristic evolution baselines while requiring no neural inference at deployment. These results suggest that learned optimization policies can be repurposed as behavioral feedback sources for automatic heuristic discovery.

analysis.tldr: 利用学习到的优化策略作为行为教师，引导进化搜索生成静态可执行启发式程序。

papers.title: Intrinsic Guardrails: How Semantic Geometry of Personality Interacts with Emergent Misalignment in LLMs
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning Large Language Models (LLMs) on benign narrow data can sometimes induce broad harmful behaviors, a vulnerability termed emergent misalignment (EM). While prior work links these failures to specific directions in the activation space, their relationship to the model's broader persona remains unexplored. We map the latent personality space of LLMs through established psychometric profiles like the Big Five, Dark Triad, and LLM-specific behaviors (e.g. evil, sycophancy), and show that the semantic geometry is highly stable across aligned models and their corrupted fine-tunes. Through causal interventions, we find that directions isolating social valence, such as the 'Evil' persona vector, and a Semantic Valence Vector (SVV) that we introduce, function as intrinsic guardrails: ablating them drives the misalignment rates above $40$%, while amplifying them suppresses the failure mode to less than $3$%. Leveraging the structural stability of the personality space, we show that vectors extracted $\textit{a priori}$ from an instruct-tuned model transfer zero-shot to successfully regulate EM in corrupted fine-tunes. Overall, our findings suggest that harmful fine-tuning does not overwrite a model's internal representation of personality, allowing conserved representations to serve as robust, cross-distribution guardrails.

analysis.tldr: LLM的语义人格几何结构在有害微调后保持稳定，可作为内在护栏抑制突发性失调。

papers.title: Product-of-Gaussian-Mixture Diffusion Models for Joint Nonlinear MRI Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Recently, diffusion models have attracted considerable attention for magnetic resonance image reconstruction due to their high sample quality. However, most existing methods rely on large networks with opaque time-conditioning mechanisms, and require offline coil sensitivity estimation. This results in limited interpretability of the reconstruction process and reduced flexibility in the acquisition setup. To address these limitations, we jointly reconstruct the image and the coil sensitivities by combining the parameter-efficient product-of-Gaussian-mixture diffusion model as an image prior with a classical smoothness prior on the coil sensitivities. The proposed method is fast and robust to both contrast and anatomical distribution shifts as well as changing k-space trajectories. Finally, we propose a more expressive parameterization of the image prior which improves results in denoising and magnetic resonance image reconstruction.

papers.title: Hypergraph-Enhanced Training-Free and Language-Free Few-Shot Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Few-shot anomaly detection (FSAD) has made significant strides, yet existing methods still face critical challenges: (i) dependence on task- or dataset-specific training/fine-tuning, (ii) reliance on language supervision or carefully hand-crafted prompts, and (iii) limited robustness across domains. In this paper, we introduce HyperFSAD, a novel FSAD framework that is training-free, language-free, and robust across domains, offering a powerful solution to these challenges. Built upon DINOv3 and a hypergraph-based inference mechanism, our approach performs inference without any task-specific optimization or text prompts, while remaining competitive. Specifically, we replace sensitive nearest-neighbor / top-$n$ matching with \textbf{Sparse Hyper Matching}: \textit{sparsemax} first selects the most relevant support patches, which are then aggregated into a \textit{hyperedge} as compact normal evidence to suppress background noise and distractors. We further introduce \textbf{Dual-Branch Image Scoring}, which fuses \emph{spatial anomaly evidence} from the patch-grid anomaly map with \emph{global semantic deviation} captured by support-aware CLS matching, yielding a robust image-level anomaly score in a strictly visual manner. Notably, all components of HyperFSAD are purely visual, eliminating the need for labor-intensive hand-crafted text prompts. Under the stringent training-free and language-free setting, HyperFSAD achieves state-of-the-art performance across six datasets spanning four industrial datasets (MVTecAD, VisA, MPDD, BTAD) and two medical datasets (RESC, BraTS).

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD，利用超图推理和双分支图像评分实现跨域鲁棒检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有少样本异常检测方法依赖任务特定训练/微调、语言监督或手工提示，且跨域鲁棒性不足，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决少样本异常检测中训练依赖、语言依赖和跨域鲁棒性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于DINOv3和超图推理，提出稀疏超匹配（Sparse Hyper Matching）选择支持补丁并聚合为超边作为正常证据，以及双分支图像评分融合空间异常图和全局语义偏差。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD
引入稀疏超匹配和双分支图像评分机制，提升跨域鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 在MVTecAD、VisA、MPDD、BTAD四个工业数据集和RESC、BraTS两个医学数据集上取得最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对高度纹理化的异常检测效果有限
超图构建的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，但技术细节摘要有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练、无需语言提示的少样本异常检测框架HyperFSAD，利用超图推理和双分支图像评分实现跨域鲁棒检测。

papers.title: Interpretable Coreference Resolution Evaluation Using Explicit Semantics
papers.abstract: Coreference resolution is typically evaluated using aggregate statistical metrics such as CoNLL-F1, which measure structural overlap between predicted and gold clusters. While widely used, these metrics offer limited diagnostic insights, penalizing errors without revealing whether a system struggles with specific semantic categories, such as people, locations, or events, and making it difficult to interpret model capabilities or derive actionable improvements. We address this gap by introducing a semantically-enhanced evaluation framework for coreference resolution. Our approach overlays Concept and Named Entity Recognition (CNER) onto coreference outputs, assigning semantic labels to nominal mentions and propagating them to entire coreference clusters. This enables the computation of typed scores aimed at evaluating mention extraction and linking capabilities stratified by semantic class. Across our experiments on OntoNotes, LitBank, and PreCo, we show that our framework uncovers systematic weaknesses that remain obscured by aggregate metrics. Furthermore, we demonstrate that these diagnostics can be used to design targeted, low-cost data augmentation strategies, achieving measurable out-of-domain improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于显式语义的共指消解评估框架，通过语义标签揭示系统在特定类别上的弱点，并指导数据增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有共指消解评估指标（如CoNLL-F1）仅提供聚合统计，无法诊断模型在特定语义类别（如人物、地点、事件）上的表现，限制了模型能力的解释和针对性改进。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种能按语义类别分层评估共指消解系统性能的框架，并利用诊断结果指导模型改进。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在共指消解输出上叠加概念和命名实体识别（CNER），为名词性提及分配语义标签并传播至整个共指簇，从而计算按语义类别分层的提及抽取和链接评分。
contributions: 提出一种语义增强的共指消解评估框架，支持按语义类别（如人物、地点、事件）分层评估。
在OntoNotes、LitBank和PreCo上验证框架能揭示聚合指标掩盖的系统性弱点，并利用诊断结果设计低成本数据增强策略，实现可测量的域外改进。
analysis.experiments: 在OntoNotes、LitBank和PreCo三个数据集上进行实验，展示了框架能发现聚合指标掩盖的弱点，并通过数据增强实现域外改进。
limitations: 可能依赖CNER的准确性，错误传播会影响评估可靠性。
语义类别覆盖范围有限，可能无法涵盖所有共指消解中的语义现象。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但实验规模有限，且未提供具体数值结果，适合阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于显式语义的共指消解评估框架，通过语义标签揭示系统在特定类别上的弱点，并指导数据增强。

papers.title: Hierarchical Causal Abduction: A Foundation Framework for Explainable Model Predictive Control
papers.abstract: Model Predictive Control (MPC) is widely used to operate safety-critical infrastructure by predicting future trajectories and optimizing control actions. However, nonlinear dynamics, hard safety constraints, and numerical optimization often render individual control moves opaque to human operators, undermining trust and hindering deployment. This paper presents Hierarchical Causal Abduction (HCA), which combines (i) physics-informed reasoning via domain knowledge graphs, (ii) optimization evidence from Karush--Kuhn--Tucker (KKT) multipliers, and (iii) temporal causal discovery via the PCMCI algorithm to generate faithful, human-interpretable explanations for control actions computed by nonlinear MPC. Across three diverse control applications (greenhouse climate, building HVAC, chemical process engineering) with expert validation, HCA improves explanation accuracy by 53\% over LIME (0.478 vs. 0.311) using a single set of cross-domain parameters without per-domain tuning; domain-specific KKT-threshold calibration over 2--3 days further increases accuracy to 0.88. Ablation studies confirm that each evidence source is essential, with 32--37\% accuracy degradation when any component is removed, and HCA's ranking-and-validation methodology generalizes beyond MPC to other prediction-based decision systems, including learning-based control and trajectory planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层因果溯因框架，结合物理知识、KKT乘子和因果发现为非线性MPC生成可解释控制决策，准确率显著优于LIME。
analysis.research_motivation: 非线性MPC因动力学复杂、约束严格和数值优化导致控制动作不透明，削弱操作者信任，阻碍部署。
analysis.problem: 为非线性MPC计算的控制动作生成忠实、人类可理解的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 分层因果溯因（HCA），融合物理信息推理（领域知识图谱）、优化证据（KKT乘子）和时间因果发现（PCMCI算法）。
contributions: 提出HCA框架，整合三种证据源为非线性MPC生成可解释性解释。
在三个不同控制领域（温室气候、建筑HVAC、化工过程）验证，跨域参数下解释准确率比LIME提升53%。
消融实验表明每个证据源不可或缺，移除任一组件准确率下降32-37%。
analysis.experiments: 在温室气候、建筑HVAC、化工过程三个控制应用上，经专家验证，HCA跨域参数下准确率0.478 vs LIME 0.311；领域特定KKT阈值校准2-3天后准确率达0.88。
limitations: 依赖领域知识图谱的构建质量。
KKT阈值校准需要2-3天领域特定调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，但应用领域较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层因果溯因框架，结合物理知识、KKT乘子和因果发现为非线性MPC生成可解释控制决策，准确率显著优于LIME。

papers.title: Vocabulary Hijacking in LVLMs: Unveiling Critical Attention Heads by Excluding Inert Tokens to Mitigate Hallucination
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have achieved remarkable progress in multimodal tasks, yet their reliability is persistently undermined by hallucinations-generating text that contradicts visual input. Recent studies often attribute these errors to inadequate visual attention. In this work, we analyze the attention mechanisms via the logit lens, uncovering a distinct anomaly we term Vocabulary Hijacking. We discover that specific visual tokens, defined as Inert Tokens, disproportionately attract attention. Crucially, when their intermediate hidden states are projected into the vocabulary space, they consistently decode to a fixed set of unrelated words (termed Hijacking Anchors) across layers, revealing a rigid semantic collapse. Leveraging this semantic rigidity, we propose Hijacking Anchor-Based Identification (HABI), a robust strategy to accurately localize these Inert Tokens. To quantify the impact of this phenomenon, we introduce the Non-Hijacked Visual Attention Ratio (NHAR), a novel metric designed to identify attention heads that remain resilient to hijacking and are critical for factual accuracy. Building on these insights, we propose Hijacking-Aware Visual Attention Enhancement (HAVAE), a training-free intervention that selectively strengthens the focus of these identified heads on salient visual content. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that HAVAE significantly mitigates hallucinations with no additional computational overhead, while preserving the model's general capabilities. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/HAVAE.

analysis.tldr: 通过识别惰性标记和劫持锚点，提出无训练干预方法增强视觉注意力，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LVLM在生成文本时经常出现与视觉输入矛盾的幻觉，现有研究多归因于视觉注意力不足，但缺乏对注意力异常模式的深入分析。
analysis.problem: LVLM中视觉注意力被特定无关标记劫持导致幻觉的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现特定视觉标记（惰性标记）吸引过多注意力，其隐藏状态在词汇空间中一致解码为固定无关词（劫持锚点），形成语义坍缩。
analysis.method: 提出HABI方法定位惰性标记，定义NHAR指标识别对劫持鲁棒的关键注意力头，并设计HAVAE无训练干预增强这些头对显著视觉内容的关注。
contributions: 揭示LVLM中词汇劫持现象，发现惰性标记和劫持锚点。
提出HABI定位惰性标记和NHAR指标识别关键注意力头。
提出HAVAE无训练干预方法，有效缓解幻觉且不增加计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，HAVAE显著缓解幻觉，保持模型通用能力，无额外计算开销。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构的LVLM。
NHAR指标的有效性可能依赖基准选择。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与VLM幻觉方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过识别惰性标记和劫持锚点，提出无训练干预方法增强视觉注意力，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: MulTaBench: Benchmarking Multimodal Tabular Learning with Text and Image
papers.abstract: Tabular Foundation Models have recently established the state of the art in supervised tabular learning, by leveraging pretraining to learn generalizable representations of numerical and categorical structured data. However, they lack native support for unstructured modalities such as text and image, and rely on frozen, pretrained embeddings to process them. On established Multimodal Tabular Learning benchmarks, we show that tuning the embeddings to the task improves performance. Existing benchmarks, however, often focus on the mere co-occurrence of modalities; this leads to high variance across datasets and masks the benefits of task-specific tuning. To address this gap, we introduce MulTaBench, a benchmark of 40 datasets, split equally between image-tabular and text-tabular tasks. We focus on predictive tasks where the modalities provide complementary predictive signal, and where generic embeddings lose critical information, necessitating Target-Aware Representations that are aligned with the task. Our experimental results demonstrate that the gains from target-aware representation tuning generalize across both text and image modalities, several tabular learners, encoder scales, and embedding dimensions. MulTaBench constitutes the largest image-tabular benchmarking effort to date, spanning high-impact domains such as healthcare and e-commerce. It is designed to enable the research of novel architectures which incorporate joint modeling and target-aware representations, paving the way for the development of novel Multimodal Tabular Foundation Models.

analysis.tldr: 提出MulTaBench基准，证明多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优优于固定嵌入。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表格基础模型不支持文本和图像等非结构化模态，依赖固定预训练嵌入，而现有基准仅关注模态共现，掩盖了任务特定调优的收益。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能评估多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优效果的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定嵌入在多模态表格任务中丢失关键信息，而任务感知表示调优能提升性能，且该增益在文本和图像模态、多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度上泛化。
analysis.method: 构建包含40个数据集（图像-表格和文本-表格各20个）的基准MulTaBench，聚焦模态提供互补预测信号的任务，并采用任务感知表示调优。
contributions: 提出MulTaBench，目前最大的图像-表格基准，覆盖医疗和电商等领域。
实验证明任务感知表示调优在多模态表格学习中的泛化有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在40个数据集上测试多种表格学习器、编码器尺度和嵌入维度，显示任务感知调优优于固定嵌入。
limitations: 基准仅包含图像和文本模态，未涉及其他非结构化数据。
未提供具体性能数值或与现有方法的详细对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准规模大且聚焦关键问题，但摘要未提供具体实验结果，适合精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MulTaBench基准，证明多模态表格学习中任务感知表示调优优于固定嵌入。

papers.title: PRISM: Generation-Time Detection and Mitigation of Secret Leakage in Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems introduce a security risk in which sensitive information accessed by one agent can propagate through shared context and reappear in downstream outputs, even without explicit adversarial intent. We formalise this phenomenon as propagation amplification, where leakage risk increases across agent boundaries as sensitive content is repeatedly exposed to downstream generators. Existing defences, including prompt-based safeguards, static pattern matching, and LLM-as-judge filtering, are not designed for this setting: they either operate after generation, rely primarily on surface-form patterns, or add substantial latency without modelling the generation process itself. To resolve these issues, we propose PRISM, a real-time defence that treats credential leakage as a sequential risk accumulation problem during generation. At each decoding step, PRISM combines 16 signals spanning lexical, structural, information-theoretic, behavioural, and contextual features into a calibrated risk score, enabling per-token intervention through green, yellow, and red risk zones. Our central observation is that credential reproduction is often preceded by a measurable shift in generation dynamics, characterised by entropy collapse and increasing logit concentration. When combined with text-structural cues such as identifier-pattern detection, these temporal signals provide an early warning of leakage before a secret is fully reconstructed. Across a 2,000-task adversarial benchmark covering 13 attack categories and three pressure levels in a heterogeneous four-agent pipeline, PRISM achieves F1 = 0.832 with precision = 1.000 and recall = 0.712, while producing no observed leakage on our benchmark (0.0% task-level leak rate) and preserving output utility of 0.893. It substantially outperforms the strongest baseline, Span Tagger, which achieves F1 = 0.719 with a 15.0% task-level leak rate.

analysis.tldr: PRISM 在生成过程中实时检测并阻止多智能体 LLM 流水线中的秘密泄露，通过逐 token 风险评分实现零泄露。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体 LLM 系统中，一个智能体访问的敏感信息可能通过共享上下文传播到下游输出，造成安全风险。现有防御方法（如提示词防护、静态模式匹配、LLM 作为裁判过滤）不适用于这种场景，它们要么在生成后操作，要么依赖表面形式，要么增加延迟而不建模生成过程。
analysis.problem: 多智能体 LLM 流水线中敏感信息（如凭证）的传播放大问题，即泄露风险随智能体边界增加而累积，需要一种实时、低延迟的防御方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 凭证再现前通常会出现生成动态的可测量变化，表现为熵崩溃和 logit 集中度增加，结合文本结构线索（如标识符模式检测）可提供早期预警。
analysis.method: PRISM 将凭证泄露视为生成过程中的顺序风险累积问题，在每个解码步骤结合 16 个信号（涵盖词汇、结构、信息论、行为、上下文特征）计算校准风险分数，并通过绿、黄、红三个风险区域实现逐 token 干预。
contributions: 形式化定义了多智能体 LLM 流水线中的传播放大现象。
提出 PRISM，一种实时、逐 token 的泄露检测与缓解方法，利用生成动态变化作为早期预警信号。
构建了一个包含 13 种攻击类别和三种压力水平的 2000 任务对抗基准，用于评估多智能体流水线中的泄露。
analysis.experiments: 在异构四智能体流水线上，针对 2000 任务对抗基准（13 种攻击类别、三种压力水平），PRISM 达到 F1=0.832（精确率=1.000，召回率=0.712），任务级泄露率为 0.0%，输出效用保持 0.893，显著优于最强基线 Span Tagger（F1=0.719，泄露率 15.0%）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于文本生成场景，对其他模态（如图像、音频）的泄露未验证。
16 个信号的计算可能增加推理开销，尽管摘要未提及具体延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，直接解决多智能体 LLM 安全对齐的关键问题，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRISM 在生成过程中实时检测并阻止多智能体 LLM 流水线中的秘密泄露，通过逐 token 风险评分实现零泄露。

papers.title: Re-Triggering Safeguards within LLMs for Jailbreak Detection
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a jailbreaking prompt detection method for large language models (LLMs) to defend against jailbreak attacks. Although recent LLMs are equipped with built-in safeguards, it remains possible to craft jailbreaking prompts that bypass them. We argue that such jailbreaking prompts are inherently fragile, and thus introduce an embedding disruption method to re-activate the safeguards within LLMs. Unlike previous defense methods that aim to serve as standalone solutions, our approach instead cooperates with the LLM's internal defense mechanisms by re-triggering them. Moreover, through extensive analysis, we gain a comprehensive understanding of the disruption effects and develop an efficient search algorithm to identify appropriate disruptions for effective jailbreak detection. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach effectively defends against state-of-the-art jailbreak attacks in white-box and black-box settings, and remains robust even against adaptive attacks.

analysis.tldr: 通过嵌入扰动重新触发LLM内置安全机制，实现高效越狱检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM虽内置安全机制，但越狱提示仍可绕过，亟需更鲁棒的检测方法。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测并防御针对LLM的越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 越狱提示具有内在脆弱性，通过嵌入扰动可重新激活LLM内部安全机制。
analysis.method: 提出嵌入扰动方法，重新触发LLM内置安全机制，并设计高效搜索算法寻找最优扰动。
contributions: 提出一种与LLM内部防御机制协同的越狱检测方法，而非独立防御。
通过大量分析理解扰动效果，开发高效搜索算法，在白盒和黑盒设置下有效防御SOTA攻击。
analysis.experiments: 在白盒和黑盒设置下进行实验，防御SOTA越狱攻击，并对自适应攻击保持鲁棒。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM内部机制的可访问性。
对未知攻击类型的泛化能力需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与LLM安全对齐高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过嵌入扰动重新触发LLM内置安全机制，实现高效越狱检测。

papers.title: Measuring Embedding Sensitivity to Authorial Style in French: Comparing Literary Texts with Language Model Rewritings
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can convincingly imitate human writing styles, yet it remains unclear how much stylistic information is encoded in embeddings from any language model and retained after LLM rewriting. We investigate these questions in French, using a controlled literary dataset to quantify the effect of stylistic variation via changes in embedding dispersion. We observe that embeddings reliably capture authorial stylistic features and that these signals persist after rewriting, while also exhibiting LLM-specific patterns. These analytical results offer promising directions for authorship imitation detection in the era of language models.

analysis.tldr: 在法语文学文本中，嵌入向量对作者风格的敏感性在LLM改写后仍保留，可用于检测作者模仿。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM能逼真模仿人类写作风格，但嵌入向量中编码了多少风格信息以及改写后是否保留尚不清楚，这对检测LLM生成的作者模仿至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化语言模型嵌入向量对作者风格的敏感性，并评估LLM改写后风格信息的保留程度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 嵌入向量可靠地捕捉作者风格特征，且这些信号在LLM改写后仍然存在，同时表现出LLM特有的模式。
analysis.method: 使用受控的法语文学数据集，通过嵌入分散度的变化来量化风格变异的影响。
contributions: 首次在法语文学文本中系统测量嵌入向量对作者风格的敏感性。
发现LLM改写后风格信号仍保留，为作者模仿检测提供新方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对法语文学文本，可能不适用于其他语言或非文学体裁。
未比较不同LLM改写方法对风格保留的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单但问题新颖，实验细节不足，适合保存后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在法语文学文本中，嵌入向量对作者风格的敏感性在LLM改写后仍保留，可用于检测作者模仿。

papers.title: Fairness vs Performance: Characterizing the Pareto Frontier of Algorithmic Decision Systems
papers.abstract: Designing fair algorithmic decision systems requires balancing model performance with fairness toward affected individuals: More fairness might require sacrificing some performance and vice versa, yet the space of possible trade-offs is still poorly understood. We investigate fairness in binary prediction-based decision problems by conceptualizing decision making as a multi-objective optimization problem that simultaneously considers decision-maker utility and group fairness. We investigate the set of Pareto-optimal decision rules for arbitrary utility functions for decision maker, arbitrary population distributions, and a wide range of group fairness metrics. We find that the Pareto frontier consists of deterministic, group-specific threshold rules applied to individuals' success probability. This complements existing optimality theorems from literature which, for specific fairness constraints, posit lower-bound threshold rules only. However we also show that, depending on the used fairness metric, the Pareto frontier may include upper-bound threshold rules, thus preferring individuals with lower success probabilities. We show that the location of the Pareto frontier depends only on population characteristics, utility functions and fairness score, but not on the technical design of the algorithm - our findings hold for pre-, in-, and post-processing approaches alike. Our results generalize existing optimality theorems for fairness-constrained classification and extend them to generalized fairness metrics and fairness principles, and to partial fairness regimes. This paper connects formal fairness research with legal and ethical requirements to search for less discriminatory alternatives, offering a principled foundation for evaluating and comparing algorithmic decision systems.

analysis.tldr: 将公平决策建模为多目标优化，刻画了帕累托前沿由确定性分组阈值规则构成，并发现其与算法设计无关。
analysis.research_motivation: 公平与性能之间的权衡空间尚不明确，现有研究多针对特定公平约束给出下界阈值规则，缺乏对完整帕累托前沿的刻画。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地表征公平性与决策者效用之间的帕累托最优权衡，并揭示其与算法设计的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 帕累托前沿由确定性分组阈值规则构成，且可能包含上界阈值规则（偏好低成功概率个体），前沿位置仅取决于人口特征、效用函数和公平度量，与算法预处理、处理或后处理方式无关。
analysis.method: 将决策问题形式化为多目标优化，同时优化决策者效用和群体公平性，推导任意效用函数和公平度量下的帕累托最优决策规则。
contributions: 证明了帕累托前沿由确定性分组阈值规则构成，并发现上界阈值规则的存在。
将现有公平约束分类的最优性定理推广到广义公平度量和部分公平场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖于二元预测决策问题的假设。
未讨论多个公平度量同时优化时的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 理论贡献扎实，但缺乏实验验证，适合关注公平性理论的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将公平决策建模为多目标优化，刻画了帕累托前沿由确定性分组阈值规则构成，并发现其与算法设计无关。

papers.title: Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation
papers.abstract: Despite strong zero-shot performance, SAM is unreliable under domain shift due to Mask-level Confidence Confusion (MCC), where a single IoU-based mask score fails to reflect pixel-wise reliability near boundaries. Motivated by the contrast between texture-biased shortcuts in neural networks and shape-centric processing in human vision, we model out-of-domain variation as appearance shifts and non-rigid deformations that jointly stress calibration. We propose Segment Anything with Robust Uncertainty-Accuracy Correlation (RUAC) for robust pixel-wise uncertainty estimation under appearance and deformation shifts. RUAC adds a lightweight uncertainty head, trains it with a collaborative style-deformation attack that jointly perturbs texture and geometry, and applies Uncertainty-Accuracy Alignment to ensure uncertainty consistently highlights erroneous pixels even under adversarial perturbations. Across 23 zero-shot domains, RUAC improves segmentation quality and yields more faithful uncertainty with stronger uncertainty-accuracy correlation. Project page: https://github.com/HongyouZhou/ruac.git.

analysis.tldr: 提出RUAC方法，通过协同风格-变形攻击和不确定性-精度对齐，提升SAM在域偏移下的像素级不确定性估计可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: SAM在域偏移下因掩码级置信度混淆（MCC）而不可靠，单个IoU掩码分数无法反映边界附近的像素级可靠性，且神经网络存在纹理偏差而人类视觉依赖形状，需要鲁棒的不确定性估计方法。
analysis.problem: 解决SAM在域偏移（外观变化和非刚性变形）下像素级不确定性估计不准确、不确定性-精度相关性弱的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到SAM存在掩码级置信度混淆（MCC），即单一IoU分数无法反映像素级可靠性，尤其在边界区域；神经网络倾向于纹理偏差，而人类视觉更关注形状。
analysis.method: 添加轻量级不确定性头，使用协同风格-变形攻击（联合扰动纹理和几何）训练，并应用不确定性-精度对齐（UAA）确保不确定性在对抗扰动下仍能突出错误像素。
contributions: 提出RUAC方法，实现鲁棒的像素级不确定性估计，在23个零样本域上提升分割质量和不确定性-精度相关性。
设计协同风格-变形攻击，联合模拟外观和变形偏移，增强不确定性头的泛化能力。
引入不确定性-精度对齐机制，确保不确定性在对抗扰动下仍能准确指示错误像素。
analysis.experiments: 在23个零样本域上进行实验，结果表明RUAC提升了分割质量，并实现了更强的不确定性-精度相关性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于SAM架构，对其他分割模型的迁移性未知。
协同攻击的计算开销可能较大，实时性受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对SAM在域偏移下的不确定性估计有显著改进，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RUAC方法，通过协同风格-变形攻击和不确定性-精度对齐，提升SAM在域偏移下的像素级不确定性估计可靠性。

papers.title: The Open-Box Fallacy: Why AI Deployment Needs a Calibrated Verification Regime
papers.abstract: AI deployment in sensitive domains such as health care, credit, employment, and criminal justice is often treated as unsafe to authorize until model internals can be explained. This often leads to an excessive reliance on mechanistic interpretability to address a deployment challenge beyond its intended scope. We argue that the gate should instead be calibrated verification: authorization should be domain-scoped, independently checkable, monitored after release, accountable, contestable, and revocable. The reason is twofold. First, model capability is uneven across nearby tasks, so authorization must attach to a specific use rather than to a model in general. Second, societies have long governed opaque expertise through credentials, monitoring, liability, appeal, and revocation rather than mechanism-level explanation. Recent evidence reinforces this distinction between mechanistic understanding and deployment authority: a 53-percentage-point gap between internal representations and output correction shows that understanding may not translate into action, while one scoping review found that only 9.0% of FDA-approved AI/ML device documents contained a prospective post-market surveillance study. We propose Verification Coverage, a six-component reportable standard with a minimum-composition rule, as the metric that should sit beside capability scores in model cards, leaderboards, and regulatory disclosures.

analysis.tldr: 论文提出AI部署应转向“校准验证”而非依赖机制可解释性，并引入“验证覆盖度”标准。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI在医疗、信贷等敏感领域部署时，过度依赖机制可解释性作为授权前提，但可解释性无法保证实际部署安全，且存在理解与行动脱节的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决AI部署授权标准不当的问题，即如何从依赖模型内部解释转向基于领域范围、可独立检查、可监控、可问责、可争议和可撤销的校准验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到两个现象：1) 模型能力在邻近任务间不均匀，授权应针对具体用途而非通用模型；2) 社会长期通过凭证、监控、责任、申诉和撤销来管理不透明专业知识，而非机制级解释。实证显示内部表征与输出修正之间存在53个百分点的差距，且仅9.0%的FDA批准的AI/ML设备文档包含前瞻性上市后监测研究。
analysis.method: 提出“验证覆盖度”（Verification Coverage），一个六组件可报告标准，包含最小组成规则，作为模型卡、排行榜和监管披露中与能力分数并列的指标。
contributions: 指出机制可解释性在部署授权中的局限性，提出校准验证作为替代框架。
提出验证覆盖度标准，为AI部署提供可操作、可报告的度量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 验证覆盖度的具体实施细节和有效性尚未在摘要中验证。
可能面临监管采纳和行业标准化的挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 论文提出新颖的部署验证框架，对AI安全领域有较高影响，但缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文提出AI部署应转向“校准验证”而非依赖机制可解释性，并引入“验证覆盖度”标准。

papers.title: Budget-Efficient Automatic Algorithm Design via Code Graph
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have emerged as powerful tools for automatic algorithm design (AAD). However, existing pipelines remain inefficient. They operate at the granularity of full algorithms, redundantly rewriting recurring substructures and discarding low-fitness candidates that may contain valuable algorithmic features. We formalize budget-efficient automatic algorithm design, wherein the search policy maximizes realized fitness subject to limited computational cost. We propose a directed acyclic graph representation of algorithms and build a search framework that fully exploits the LLM's output. Instead of querying the LLM for full algorithms, we use it to obtain corrections: compact operators that add, replace, or remove code blocks. Each correction augments the graph, yielding new algorithms that compose with prior corrections. This graph structure decomposes algorithms into sets of corrections, enabling correction-level credit assignment that informs subsequent queries. We complement this framework with theoretical insights into the ideal balance between search depth and breadth at different budget levels. We validate our method empirically on three combinatorial optimization problems, demonstrating consistent superiority of our graph-based search over full-algorithm search at equal token budget. Finally, our experiments suggest that rich contexts help only when the LLM's prior knowledge is shallow, and can hinder performance otherwise.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于代码图的预算高效自动算法设计框架，通过增量修正替代完整算法生成，显著提升搜索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM驱动的自动算法设计方法效率低下，以完整算法为粒度重复生成冗余子结构，且丢弃低适应度候选中的有价值特征，导致计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限计算预算下最大化自动算法设计的搜索效率，避免冗余生成并利用部分有效信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将算法表示为有向无环图，使用LLM生成增量修正（添加、替换、删除代码块），每个修正扩展图结构，实现修正级别的信用分配，并理论分析搜索深度与广度的最优平衡。
contributions: 形式化预算高效自动算法设计问题，提出基于代码图的搜索框架。
理论推导不同预算下搜索深度与广度的最优平衡。
在三个组合优化问题上验证图搜索优于完整算法搜索。
analysis.experiments: 在三个组合优化问题上进行实验，比较图搜索与完整算法搜索在相同token预算下的性能，结果显示图搜索一致更优。
limitations: 仅验证了组合优化问题，未涉及其他领域。
依赖LLM生成修正的质量，可能受限于模型能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，理论分析扎实，实验验证有效，但应用范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于代码图的预算高效自动算法设计框架，通过增量修正替代完整算法生成，显著提升搜索效率。

papers.title: CrackMeBench: Binary Reverse Engineering for Agents
papers.abstract: Benchmarks for coding agents increasingly measure source-level software repair, and cybersecurity benchmarks increasingly measure broad capture-the-flag performance. Classical binary reverse engineering remains less precisely specified: given only an executable, can an agent recover validation logic and produce an input, serial, artifact, or key generator accepted by the program? We introduce CrackMeBench, a benchmark for evaluating language-model agents on educational CrackMe-style reverse-engineering tasks. CrackMeBench focuses on deterministic binary validation problems with executable oracles, symbol-poor binaries, explicit local tool access, and externally scored submissions rather than free-form explanations. The v0 benchmark combines eight public calibration CrackMes with twelve generated main-score tasks built from seeded C, Rust, and Go templates, and agents run through an equal shell interface in a no-network Linux Docker sandbox with standard reverse-engineering tools. In a three-model evaluation with a five-minute budget and three scored submissions per task, pass@3 on the generated split is 11/12 tasks (92%) for GPT-5.5, 7/12 (58%) for Claude Opus 4.7, and 5/12 (42%) for Kimi K2. The harder generated half separates the models more sharply, with pass@3 of 5/6, 2/6, and 1/6, respectively; on the eight-task public calibration split, pass@3 is 3/8, 2/8, and 1/8. CrackMeBench records pass@1 and pass@3, scored submissions, wall-clock time, command traces, tool categories, provider-reported token usage, estimated cost, and qualitative failure labels, providing a reproducible testbed for measuring progress from source-code reasoning toward autonomous binary analysis while restricting scope to educational, purpose-built programs.

analysis.tldr: 提出CrackMeBench基准，评估语言模型代理在二进制逆向工程中的能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编码基准聚焦源代码修复，网络安全基准侧重CTF，而经典的二进制逆向工程缺乏精确规范，难以评估代理从可执行文件中恢复验证逻辑并生成合法输入的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可复现的基准，用于评估语言模型代理在确定性二进制验证任务上的表现，包括恢复验证逻辑并生成被程序接受的输入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建CrackMeBench基准，包含8个公开校准CrackMe和12个生成任务（基于C、Rust、Go模板），代理通过等价的shell接口在无网络Linux Docker沙箱中运行，使用标准逆向工程工具，并记录多种指标。
contributions: 提出了CrackMeBench，一个专注于教育级CrackMe风格二进制逆向工程的基准，具有确定性验证、符号贫乏二进制、显式本地工具访问和外部评分等特点。
通过三个模型（GPT-5.5、Claude Opus 4.7、Kimi K2）的评估，展示了基准的区分度，并提供了详细的性能指标和失败标签。
analysis.experiments: 在三个模型上评估，每个任务5分钟预算和3次提交，生成集pass@3分别为92%、58%、42%，校准集pass@3分别为3/8、2/8、1/8。
limitations: 基准仅限于教育级、目的构建的程序，可能无法泛化到真实世界的复杂二进制。
评估预算（5分钟）可能不足以处理更难的逆向任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计有创新性，但应用范围有限，实验规模较小。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CrackMeBench基准，评估语言模型代理在二进制逆向工程中的能力。

papers.title: LLARS: Enabling Domain Expert & Developer Collaboration for LLM Prompting, Generation and Evaluation
papers.abstract: We demonstrate LLARS (LLM Assisted Research System), an open-source platform that bridges the gap between domain experts and developers for building LLM-based systems. It integrates three tightly connected modules into an end-to-end pipeline: Collaborative Prompt Engineering for real-time co-authoring with version control and instant LLM testing, Batch Generation for configurable output production across user-selected prompts $\times$ models $\times$ data with cost control, and Hybrid Evaluation where human and LLM evaluators jointly assess outputs through diverse assessment methods, with live agreement metrics and provenance analysis to identify the best model-prompt combination for a given use case. New prompts and models are automatically available for batch generation and completed batches can be turned into evaluation scenarios with a single click. Interviews with six domain experts and three developers in online counselling confirmed that LLARS feels intuitive, saves considerable time by keeping everything in one place and makes interdisciplinary collaboration seamless.

analysis.tldr: LLARS是一个开源平台，通过协作提示工程、批量生成和混合评估模块，促进领域专家与开发者共同构建LLM系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 构建LLM系统时，领域专家与开发者之间存在协作鸿沟，现有工具缺乏端到端集成，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个平台，让非技术领域专家和开发者能高效协作完成LLM提示工程、生成和评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LLARS平台，包含三个模块：协作提示工程（实时共同编辑、版本控制、即时测试）、批量生成（可配置输出、成本控制）、混合评估（人类与LLM联合评估、一致性指标和溯源分析）。
contributions: 提出一个集成提示工程、批量生成和混合评估的端到端开源平台。
通过在线咨询领域的用户研究验证了平台的易用性和协作效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及对六位领域专家和三位开发者的访谈确认了平台直观、省时且促进协作。
limitations: 用户研究样本量较小，可能不具广泛代表性。
平台功能可能依赖特定LLM后端，通用性待验证。

analysis.reason: 平台设计有实用价值，但技术贡献偏工程集成，实验证据有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLARS是一个开源平台，通过协作提示工程、批量生成和混合评估模块，促进领域专家与开发者共同构建LLM系统。

papers.title: A Resilient Solution for Sewer Overflow Monitoring across Cloud and Edge
papers.abstract: Aging combined sewer systems in many historical cities are increasingly stressed by extreme rainfall events, which can trigger combined sewer overflows (CSO) with significant environmental and public health impacts. Forecasting the filling dynamics of overflow basins is critical for anticipating capacity exceedance and enabling timely preventive actions for CSO. We present a web-based demonstrator (https://riwwer.demo.calgo-lab.de) that integrates Deep Learning forecasting methods in both cloud and edge settings into an interactive monitoring dashboard for overflow monitoring, resilient to network outages. A video showcase is available online (https://cloud.bht-berlin.de/index.php/s/b9xt4T3SdiLBiFZ).

analysis.tldr: 提出一个结合深度学习的云边协同下水道溢流监测系统，提升网络中断下的韧性。
analysis.research_motivation: 历史城市的老化合流制下水道系统在极端降雨下易发生溢流，造成环境和健康危害，现有监测方案在断网时失效。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个在云和边缘端均能运行、且对网络中断具有韧性的下水道溢流预测与监测系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 开发一个基于Web的演示系统，将深度学习预测方法部署在云端和边缘端，集成到交互式监测仪表板中，实现网络中断下的韧性运行。
contributions: 提出一个云边协同的CSO监测架构，支持网络中断时边缘端独立运行。
开发了在线演示系统和视频展示，验证了系统可行性。

papers.title: Thinking with Novel Views: A Systematic Analysis of Generative-Augmented Spatial Intelligence
papers.abstract: Current Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) struggle with spatial reasoning tasks requiring viewpoint-dependent understanding, largely because they are confined to a single, static observation. We propose Thinking with Novel Views (TwNV), a paradigm that integrates generative novel-view synthesis into the reasoning loop: a Reasoner LMM identifies spatial ambiguity, instructs a Painter to synthesize an alternative viewpoint, and re-examines the scene with the additional evidence. Through systematic experiments we address three research questions. (1) Instruction format: numerical camera-pose specifications yield more reliable view control than free-form language. (2) Generation fidelity: synthesized view quality is tightly coupled with downstream spatial accuracy. (3) Inference-time visual scaling: iterative multi-turn view refinement further improves performance, echoing recent scaling trends in language reasoning. Across four spatial subtask categories and four LMM architectures (both closed- and open-source), TwNV consistently improves accuracy by +1.3 to +3.9 pp, with the largest gains on viewpoint-sensitive subtasks. These results establish novel-view generation as a practical lever for advancing spatial intelligence of LMMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出TwNV框架，通过生成新视角图像增强LMM空间推理能力，实验显示准确率提升1.3-3.9个百分点。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前大型多模态模型在需要视角依赖理解的空间推理任务中表现不佳，主要受限于单一静态观察。
analysis.problem: 如何通过生成新视角图像来增强LMM的空间推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数值相机位姿指令比自由语言更可靠；合成视图质量与下游空间准确性紧密耦合；多轮迭代视图细化可进一步提升性能。
analysis.method: TwNV框架：Reasoner LMM识别空间歧义，指示Painter合成新视角图像，再结合额外证据重新审视场景。
contributions: 提出TwNV范式，将生成式新视角合成集成到推理循环中。
系统分析了指令格式、生成保真度和推理时视觉缩放三个关键因素。
在四个空间子任务类别和四种LMM架构上验证了有效性，准确率提升1.3-3.9个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在四个空间子任务类别和四种LMM架构（闭源和开源）上进行实验，TwNV一致提升准确率1.3-3.9个百分点，视角敏感子任务提升最大。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的新视角生成模型。
多轮迭代可能增加推理计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，系统实验验证有效，与VLM空间推理强相关，但技术细节未完全展开。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TwNV框架，通过生成新视角图像增强LMM空间推理能力，实验显示准确率提升1.3-3.9个百分点。

papers.title: CausalGS: Learning Physical Causality of 3D Dynamic Scenes with Gaussian Representations
papers.abstract: Learning a physical model from video data that can comprehend physical laws and predict the future trajectories of objects is a formidable challenge in artificial intelligence. Prior approaches either leverage various Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) as soft constraints in the form of PINN losses, or integrate physics simulators into neural networks; however, they often rely on strong priors or high-quality geometry reconstruction. In this paper, we propose CausalGS, a framework that learns the causal dynamics of complex dynamic 3D scenes solely from multi-view videos, while dispensing with the reliance on explicit priors. At its core is an inverse physics inference module that decouples the complex dynamics problem from the video into the joint inference of two factors: the initial velocity field representing the scene's kinematics, and the intrinsic material properties governing its dynamics. This inferred physical information is then utilized within a differentiable physics simulator to guide the learning process in a physics-regularized manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CausalGS surpasses the state-of-the-art on the highly challenging task of long-term future frame extrapolation, while also exhibiting advanced performance in novel view interpolation. Crucially, our work shows that, without any human annotation, the model is able to learn the complex interactions between multiple physical properties and understand the causal relationships driving the scene's dynamic evolution, solely from visual observations.

analysis.tldr: CausalGS 从多视角视频中学习 3D 动态场景的物理因果模型，无需显式先验，实现长期未来帧外推。
analysis.research_motivation: 从视频中学习物理模型以理解物理规律并预测物体未来轨迹是 AI 的挑战，现有方法依赖强先验或高质量几何重建。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从多视角视频中学习复杂动态 3D 场景的因果动力学，无需显式先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 CausalGS 框架，核心是逆物理推理模块，将视频中的复杂动力学解耦为初始速度场（运动学）和内在材料属性（动力学）的联合推断，并在可微物理模拟器中以物理正则化方式引导学习。
contributions: 提出 CausalGS 框架，从多视角视频中学习 3D 动态场景的物理因果模型，无需显式先验。
在长期未来帧外推任务上超越现有方法，并在新视角插值上表现先进。
analysis.experiments: 在长期未来帧外推任务上超越现有方法，并在新视角插值上表现先进。摘要未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能依赖多视角视频输入，单视角场景适用性未知。
物理模拟器的可微性可能限制复杂场景的扩展。

papers.title: An agentic framework for gravitational-wave counterpart association in the multi-messenger era
papers.abstract: With the detection of gravitational waves (GWs), multi-messenger astronomy has opened a new window for advancing our understanding of astrophysics, dense matter, gravitation, and cosmology. The GW sources detected to date are from mergers of compact object binaries, which possess the potential to generate detectable electromagnetic (EM) counterparts. Searching for associations between GW signals and their EM counterparts is an essential step toward enabling subsequent multi-messenger studies. In the era of next-generation GW and EM detectors, the rapid increase in the number of events brings not only unprecedented scientific opportunities, but also substantial challenges to the existing data analysis paradigm. To help address these challenges, we develop GW-Eyes, an agentic framework powered by large language models (LLMs). For the first time, GW-Eyes integrates domain-specific tools and autonomously performs counterpart association tasks between GW and candidate EM events. It supports natural language interaction to assist human experts with auxiliary tasks such as catalog management, skymap visualization, and rapid verification. Our framework leverages the complex decision-making capabilities of LLMs and their traceable reasoning processes, offering a new perspective to the multi-messenger astronomy.

analysis.tldr: 提出LLM驱动的智能体框架GW-Eyes，自动关联引力波与电磁对应体，支持自然语言交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 多信使天文学中，引力波与电磁对应体的关联分析面临事件数量激增带来的数据处理挑战，现有范式难以高效应对。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大语言模型构建智能体，自动完成引力波信号与候选电磁事件的关联任务。

contributions: 首次将LLM驱动的智能体框架应用于引力波-电磁对应体关联任务

papers.title: FrequencyCT: Frequency domain pseudo-label generation for self-supervised low-dose CT denoising
papers.abstract: Despite extensive research on computed tomography (CT) denoising, few studies exploit projection-domain data characteristics to mitigate noise correlation. To address this, this work proposes FrequencyCT, the first zero-shot self-supervised method for pseudo-label generation in the frequency domain for low-dose CT denoising. Leveraging the characteristic of the frequency domain that largely isolates noise from clean signals, a regional low-frequency anchoring technique is proposed. Phase-preserving amplitude modulation and mask perturbation in the high-frequency region generate pseudo-label data for self-supervision. The fluctuating noise variance in the projection domain prompts truncation of the generated samples to stabilize the network's optimization gradient. Evaluation results on multiple public and real-world datasets confirm the clinical application potential of this research, which will have a revolutionary impact on the field of denoising. The code can be obtained from https://github.com/yqx7150/FrequencyCT.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个零样本自监督频域伪标签生成方法用于低剂量CT去噪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CT去噪方法很少利用投影域数据特性来缓解噪声相关性，且依赖配对数据或预训练模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在无配对数据条件下，利用频域特性生成高质量伪标签以实现低剂量CT去噪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 频域能有效分离噪声与干净信号；投影域噪声方差波动影响网络训练稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出FrequencyCT，采用区域低频锚定、相位保持幅度调制和高频掩码扰动生成伪标签，并通过截断操作稳定梯度。
contributions: 首个零样本自监督频域伪标签生成方法
提出区域低频锚定和相位保持幅度调制技术

papers.title: Guaranteed Jailbreaking Defense via Disrupt-and-Rectify Smoothing
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a guaranteed defense method for large language models (LLMs) to safeguard against jailbreaking attacks. Drawing inspiration from the denoised-smoothing approach in the adversarial defense domain, we propose a novel smoothing-based defense method, termed Disrupt-and-Rectify Smoothing (DR-Smoothing). Specifically, we integrate a two-stage prompt processing scheme-first disrupting the input prompt, then rectifying it-into the conventional smoothing defense framework. This disrupt-and-rectify approach improves upon previous disrupt-only approaches by restoring out-of-distribution disrupted prompts to an in-distribution form, thereby reducing the risk of unpredictable LLM behavior. In addition, this two-stage scheme offers a distinct advantage in striking a balance between harmlessness and helpfulness in jailbreaking defense. Notably, we present a theoretical analysis for generic smoothing framework, offering a tight bound for the defense success probability and the requirements on the disruption strength. Our approach can defend against both token-level and prompt-level jailbreaking attacks, under both established and adaptive attacking scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach surpasses current state-of-the-art defense methods in terms of both harmlessness and helpfulness.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于平滑的LLM越狱防御方法，通过干扰-修正两阶段处理提升安全性与实用性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM面临越狱攻击威胁，现有防御方法在无害性和有用性之间难以平衡，且缺乏理论保证。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既有理论保证又能平衡无害性与有用性的LLM越狱防御方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Disrupt-and-Rectify Smoothing (DR-Smoothing)，在平滑防御框架中集成两阶段提示处理：先干扰输入提示，再将其修正回分布内形式。
contributions: 提出DR-Smoothing方法，通过干扰-修正两阶段方案提升越狱防御效果。
给出通用平滑框架的理论分析，提供防御成功概率的紧界及干扰强度要求。

limitations: 可能依赖特定平滑噪声分布的选择。

papers.title: Polygon-mamba: Retinal vessel segmentation using polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention
papers.abstract: Retinal vessel segmentation is crucial for diagnosis and assessment of ocular diseases. Notably, segmentation of small retinal vessels has been consistently recognized as a challenging and complex task. To tackle this challenge, we design a hybrid CNN-Mamba fusion network that integrates polygon scanning mamba and space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism for the detection of small vessels. Considering that the traditional mamba architecture with horizontal-vertical scanning may compromise the topological integrity of target structures and result in local discontinuities in small retinal vessels, we present a polygon scanning visual state space model (PS-VSS) to identify small vessel structural features by multi-layer reverse scanning way. Which effectively preserves pixels connectivity, thereby substantially mitigating the loss of information pertaining to small vessels. Furthermore, as we all known that the spatial domain prioritizes positional and structural information, while the frequency domain emphasizes global perception and local detail components, a space-frequency collaborative attention mechanism (SFCAM) is introduced within the skip connection to extract efficient features from the spatial and frequency domains. This strategy empowers the model to dynamically enhance the key features while effectively suppressing clutters. To assess the efficacy of our model, it was tested on three publicly available datasets: DRIVE, STARE, and CHASE_DB1. Compared to manual annotations, our model demonstrated F1 scores of 0.8283, 0.8282, and 0.8251, Area Under Curve (AUC) values of 0.9806, 0.9840, and 0.9866, and Sensitivity (SE) values of of 0.8268, 0.8314, and 0.8484 across three datasets, respectively. The effectiveness of our model was validated through both visual inspection and quantitative analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出多边形扫描Mamba和空频协同注意力用于视网膜小血管分割，在三个公开数据集上取得不错效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 视网膜血管分割对眼病诊断至关重要，但小血管分割因拓扑完整性易受损和局部不连续而极具挑战。
analysis.problem: 传统Mamba的水平-垂直扫描会破坏小血管拓扑完整性，导致局部不连续；空间域和频率域特征未有效协同。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统Mamba扫描方式导致小血管像素连接性丢失，空间域侧重位置结构，频率域侧重全局与细节。
analysis.method: 设计混合CNN-Mamba融合网络，包含多边形扫描视觉状态空间模型（PS-VSS）和空频协同注意力机制（SFCAM）。
contributions: 提出多边形扫描Mamba（PS-VSS），通过多层反向扫描保留小血管像素连接性。
引入空频协同注意力（SFCAM），在跳跃连接中动态增强关键特征并抑制杂波。
limitations: 可能仅在视网膜血管分割任务上验证，泛化性未知。
计算复杂度可能较高，未提及效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新，但实验规模较小且仅针对视网膜分割，影响有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多边形扫描Mamba和空频协同注意力用于视网膜小血管分割，在三个公开数据集上取得不错效果。

papers.title: SenseBench: A Benchmark for Remote Sensing Low-Level Visual Perception and Description in Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Low-level visual perception underpins reliable remote sensing (RS) image analysis, yet current image quality assessment (IQA) methods output uninterpretable scalar scores rather than characterizing physics-driven RS degradations, deviating markedly from the diagnostic needs of RS experts. While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) present a compelling alternative by delivering language-grounded IQA, their visual priors are heavily biased toward ground-level natural images. Consequently, whether VLMs can overcome this domain gap to perceive and articulate RS artifacts remains insufficiently studied. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{SenseBench}, the first dedicated diagnostic benchmark for RS low-level visual perception and description. Driven by a physics-based hierarchical taxonomy that unifies both non-reference and reference-based paradigms, SenseBench features over 10K meticulously curated instances across 6 major and 22 fine-grained RS degradation categories. Specifically, two complementary protocols are designed for evaluation: objective low-level visual \textit{perception} and subjective diagnostic \textit{description}. Comprehensive evaluation of 29 state-of-the-art VLMs reveals not only skewed domain priors and multi-distortion collapse, but also \textit{fluency illusion} and a \textit{perception-description inversion} effect. We hope SenseBench provides a robust evaluation testbed and high-quality diagnostic data to advance the development of VLMs in RS low-level perception. Code and datasets are available \href{https://github.com/Zhong-Chenchen/SenseBench}{\textcolor{blue}{here}}.

analysis.tldr: 首个遥感低层视觉感知与描述诊断基准，揭示VLM在遥感退化描述中的领域偏差与幻觉现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像质量评估方法输出不可解释的标量分数，无法满足遥感专家对物理退化诊断的需求；VLM虽能提供语言化评估，但其视觉先验偏向自然图像，领域差距尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: VLM能否克服领域差距，准确感知并描述遥感图像中的低层退化（如模糊、噪声等）？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估29个VLM发现：领域先验偏斜、多退化混淆、流畅性幻觉（fluency illusion）以及感知-描述反转效应（perception-description inversion）。
analysis.method: 构建基于物理分层分类法的基准SenseBench，包含6大类22细粒度退化类别、超1万实例，设计客观感知与主观描述两种互补评估协议。
contributions: 首个针对遥感低层视觉感知与描述的诊断基准SenseBench，统一无参考与全参考范式。
系统评估29个VLM，揭示领域偏差、多退化混淆、流畅性幻觉及感知-描述反转等关键失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在29个SOTA VLM上评估，涵盖6大类22细粒度退化，结果揭示了多种失败模式。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖6大类退化，可能未包含所有遥感退化类型。
评估协议依赖人工标注，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个遥感低层视觉诊断基准，方法系统，实验充分，对VLM在遥感领域应用有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个遥感低层视觉感知与描述诊断基准，揭示VLM在遥感退化描述中的领域偏差与幻觉现象。

papers.title: Acceptance Cards:A Four-Diagnostic Standard for Safe Fine-Tuning Defense Claims
papers.abstract: Safe fine-tuning defenses are often endorsed on the basis of a held-out gap reduction, but the same reduction can come from sampling noise, subject artifacts, capability loss, or a mechanism that does not transfer. We introduce Acceptance Cards: an evaluation protocol, a documentation object, an executable audit package, and a claim-specific evidential standard for safe fine-tuning defense claims. The protocol checks statistical reliability, fresh semantic generalization, mechanism alignment, and cross-task transfer before treating a gap reduction as a full-card pass. Re-scored under this installed-gap protocol, SafeLoRA fails the full-card pass on Gemma-2-2B-it: under strict mechanism-class coding it fails all four diagnostics, and under a permissive shrinkage relabel it still fails three of four. This is a narrow installed-gap audit on one model family, not a global judgment of SafeLoRA's effectiveness. In a 46-cell audit, no cell satisfies the strict conjunction. The closest family is a near miss that passes reliability and mechanism checks where the required data are available, but fails the fresh-subject threshold, lacks a strict transfer pass, and carries a measurable deployment-accuracy cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出Acceptance Cards四维评估协议，发现SafeLoRA在严格标准下无法通过安全微调防御验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全微调防御评估仅依赖留出集性能下降，但该指标可能受采样噪声、能力损失等干扰，缺乏系统性的可信验证标准。
analysis.problem: 如何建立严格、可复现的评估协议，以区分真正的安全防御效果与虚假的统计假象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: SafeLoRA在Gemma-2-2B-it上严格标准下四项诊断全部失败，宽松标准下仍失败三项；46个测试单元无一满足严格联合条件。
analysis.method: 提出Acceptance Cards协议，包含统计可靠性、新鲜语义泛化、机制对齐、跨任务迁移四个诊断维度，并配套文档对象与可执行审计包。
contributions: 提出四维评估协议Acceptance Cards，为安全微调防御声明提供标准化验证框架。
通过重评SafeLoRA揭示现有防御方法在严格标准下的失效模式。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma-2-2B-it模型上对SafeLoRA进行46单元审计，严格标准下无一通过，宽松标准下仅接近通过但失败新鲜主题阈值。
limitations: 仅针对单一模型族（Gemma-2-2B-it）进行审计，结论可能不具普适性。
未提供跨模型或跨防御方法的对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 提出系统性的安全防御评估协议，方法创新且实验揭示现有方法缺陷，但仅针对单一模型族。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Acceptance Cards四维评估协议，发现SafeLoRA在严格标准下无法通过安全微调防御验证。

papers.title: LLM Jaggedness Unlocks Scientific Creativity
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence advances, models are not improving uniformly. Instead, progress unfolds in a jagged fashion, with capabilities growing unevenly across tasks, domains, and model scales. In this work, we examine this dynamic jaggedness through the lens of scientific idea generation. We introduce SciAidanBench, a benchmark of open-ended scientific questions designed to measure the scientific creativity of large language models (LLMs). Given a scientific question, models are asked to generate as many unique and coherent ideas as possible, with the total number of valid responses serving as a proxy for creative potential. Evaluating 19 base models across 8 providers (30 total variants including reasoning versions), we find that jaggedness manifests both across models and within models. First, in a cross-task comparison between general and scientific creativity, improvements in general creativity do not translate uniformly to scientific creativity, revealing divergent capability profiles across models. Second, at the prompt level, stronger models do not improve uniformly; instead, they exhibit high variability, with bursts of creativity on some questions and limited performance on others. Third, at the domain level, individual models display uneven strengths across scientific subfields, reflecting fragmented internal capability profiles. Finally, we show that this jaggedness can be harnessed. We explore mechanisms of inference-time compute, knowledge pooling, and brainstorming to combine models effectively and construct meta-model ensembles that outperform any single model. Our results position jaggedness not as a limitation, but as a resource, a structural feature of AI progress that, when understood and leveraged, can amplify LLM-driven scientific creativity.

analysis.tldr: LLM能力的不均匀增长（锯齿性）可被利用来提升科学创造力，通过集成多个模型超越单一模型。
analysis.research_motivation: AI模型能力并非均匀提升，而是呈锯齿状分布，这种不均匀性在科学创意生成中可能被忽视或视为缺陷，但实际可被利用来增强创造力。
analysis.problem: 如何量化和利用LLM在科学创意生成中的能力不均匀性（锯齿性）以提升整体创造力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1) 通用创造力与科学创造力提升不一致；2) 同一模型在不同问题上的创造力波动大；3) 模型在不同科学子领域表现不均。
analysis.method: 提出SciAidanBench基准，评估19个基础模型（30个变体）的科学创意生成能力，并通过推理时计算、知识池化和头脑风暴等机制构建元模型集成。
contributions: 引入SciAidanBench基准，用于评估LLM在开放式科学问题上的创意生成能力。
系统揭示LLM在科学创意生成中的锯齿性现象（跨任务、跨问题、跨领域）。
证明通过模型集成可有效利用锯齿性，提升科学创造力。
analysis.experiments: 在19个基础模型（30个变体）上评估，使用SciAidanBench，通过生成独特且连贯的想法数量衡量创造力，并比较集成模型与单一模型性能。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖科学问题，可能不适用于其他创意领域。

papers.title: Set-Based Groupwise Registration for Variable-Length, Variable-Contrast Cardiac MRI
papers.abstract: Quantitative cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) enables non-invasive myocardial tissue characterization but relies on robust motion correction within these variable-length, variable-contrast image sequences. Groupwise registration, which simultaneously aligns all images, has shown greater robustness than pairwise registration for motion correction. However, current deep-learning-based groupwise registration methods cannot generalize across MRI sequences: the architecture typically encodes input data as a fixed-length channel stack, which rigidly couples network design to protocol-specific sequence length, input ordering, and contrast dynamics. At inference time, any change in imaging protocols will render the network unusable. In this work, we introduce \emph{\AnyTwoReg}, a new set-based groupwise registration framework that takes a quantitative MRI sequence as an unordered set. This set formulation fundamentally decouples network design from sequence length and input ordering. By utilizing a shared encoder and correlation-guided feature aggregation, \emph{\AnyTwoReg} constructs a permutation-invariant canonical reference for registration, and learns a permutation-equivariant mapping from images to deformation fields. Additionally, we extract contrast-insensitive image features from an existing foundation model to handle extreme contrast variations. Trained exclusively on a single public $T_1$ mapping dataset (STONE, sequence length $L=11$), \AnyTwoReg generalizes to two unseen quantitative MRI datasets (MOLLI, ASL) with variable lengths ($L \in [11, 60]$) and different contrast dynamics. It achieves strong cross-protocol generalization in a zero-shot manner, and consistently improves downstream quantitative mapping quality. Notably, while designed for quantitative MRI sequences, our framework is directly applicable to Cine MRI sequences for inter-cardiac-phase registration.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于集合的组配准框架，可处理变长、变对比度的心脏MRI序列，实现零样本跨协议泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 定量心脏MRI依赖鲁棒的运动校正，但现有深度学习方法无法泛化到不同MRI序列，因为网络设计被固定长度的通道堆叠所限制，无法适应序列长度、输入顺序和对比度动态的变化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个与序列长度和输入顺序无关的组配准框架，使其能泛化到未见过的变长、变对比度MRI序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AnyTwoReg框架，将定量MRI序列视为无序集合，使用共享编码器和相关性引导的特征聚合构建置换不变的规范参考，并学习置换等变的形变场映射；同时利用现有基础模型提取对比度不敏感的图像特征以处理极端对比度变化。
contributions: 提出基于集合的组配准框架，解耦网络设计与序列长度和输入顺序。
利用基础模型提取对比度不敏感特征，实现零样本跨协议泛化。
在多个定量MRI数据集上验证了跨协议泛化能力，并提升下游定量映射质量。

limitations: 可能依赖基础模型的特征质量，若基础模型未覆盖某些对比度模式可能失效。

papers.title: Deep Arguing
papers.abstract: Deep learning has become the dominant approach for creating high capacity, scalable models across diverse data modalities. However, because these models rely on a large number of learned parameters, tightly couple feature extraction with task objectives, and often lack explicit reasoning mechanisms, it is difficult for humans to understand how they arrive at their predictions. Understanding what representations emerge and why they arise from the training data remains an open challenge. We introduce Deep Arguing, a novel neurosymbolic approach that integrates deep learning with argumentation construction and reasoning for interpretable classification with different data modalities. In our approach deep neural networks construct an argumentation structure wherein data points support their assigned label and attack different ones. Using differentiable argumentation semantics for reasoning, the model is trained end-to-end to jointly learn feature representation and argumentative interactions. This results in argumentation structures providing faithful case-based explanations for predictions. Structure constraints over the argumentation graph guide learning, improving both interpretability and predictive performance. Experiments with tabular and imaging datasets show that Deep Arguing achieves performance competitive with standard baselines whilst offering interpretable argumentative reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种神经符号方法Deep Arguing，将深度学习与论证推理结合，实现可解释分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型依赖大量参数、紧密耦合特征提取与任务目标、缺乏显式推理机制，导致人类难以理解其预测过程，亟需可解释方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让深度学习模型在保持性能的同时提供忠实、可理解的基于案例的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Deep Arguing：深度神经网络构建论证结构，数据点支持其标签并攻击其他标签；通过可微论证语义进行端到端训练，联合学习特征表示和论证交互。

通过可微论证语义实现端到端训练，同时学习特征表示和论证交互。

papers.title: VeloGauss: Learning Physically Consistent Gaussian Velocity Fields from Videos
papers.abstract: In this paper, we aim to jointly model the geometry, appearance, and physical information of 3D scenes solely from dynamic multi-view videos, without relying on any physical priors. Existing works typically employ physical losses merely as soft constraints or integrate physical simulations into neural networks; however, these approaches often fail to effectively learn complex motion physics. Although modeling velocity fields holds the potential to capture authentic physical information, due to the lack of appropriate physical constraints, current methods are unable to correctly learn the interaction mechanisms between rigid and non-rigid particles. To address this, we propose VeloGauss, designed to learn the physical properties of complex dynamic 3D scenes without physical priors. Our method learns the velocity field for each Gaussian particle by introducing a Physics Code and a Particle Dynamics System, and ultimately incorporates Global Physical Constraints to ensure the physical consistency of the scene. Extensive experiments on four public datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms achieves state-of-the-art performance in both Novel View Interpolation and Future Frame Extrapolation tasks.

analysis.tldr: VeloGauss通过物理编码和粒子动力学系统从视频中学习物理一致的3D高斯速度场，无需物理先验。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通常将物理损失作为软约束或集成物理模拟到神经网络中，但难以有效学习复杂运动物理，且无法正确建模刚性与非刚性粒子间的交互机制。
analysis.problem: 从动态多视角视频中联合建模3D场景的几何、外观和物理信息，且不依赖任何物理先验。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VeloGauss，为每个高斯粒子学习速度场，引入物理编码和粒子动力学系统，并施加全局物理约束以保证场景的物理一致性。
contributions: 提出无需物理先验即可学习复杂动态3D场景物理属性的方法。
通过物理编码和粒子动力学系统实现物理一致的速度场学习。

papers.title: DeepSight: Long-Horizon World Modeling via Latent States Prediction for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving systems are increasingly integrating Vision-Language Model (VLM) architectures, incorporating text reasoning or visual reasoning to enhance the robustness and accuracy of driving decisions. However, the reasoning mechanisms employed in most methods are direct adaptations from general domains, lacking in-depth exploration tailored to autonomous driving scenarios, particularly within visual reasoning modules. In this paper, we propose a driving world model that performs parallel prediction of latent semantic features for consecutive future frames in the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space, thereby enabling long-horizon modeling of future world states. We also introduce an efficient and adaptive text reasoning mechanism that utilizes additional social knowledge and reasoning capabilities to further improve driving performance in challenging long-tail scenarios. We present a novel, efficient, and effective approach that achieves state-of-the-art (SOTA) results on the closed-loop Bench2drive benchmark. Codes are available at: https://github.com/hotdogcheesewhite/DeepSight.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeepSight，通过BEV空间潜在状态预测实现长时域世界建模，在闭环Bench2drive基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端自动驾驶系统虽引入VLM架构，但现有推理机制多从通用领域直接迁移，缺乏针对驾驶场景的深度探索，尤其在视觉推理模块中。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自动驾驶中的长时域世界建模，并利用文本推理提升长尾场景性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在BEV空间中对连续未来帧的潜在语义特征进行并行预测，构建驾驶世界模型；同时引入高效自适应文本推理机制，利用社会知识和推理能力改善长尾场景。
contributions: 提出基于BEV潜在状态预测的长时域世界建模方法。
设计高效自适应文本推理机制，提升长尾场景驾驶性能。
在闭环Bench2drive基准上达到SOTA结果。
