papers.title: ThreatCore: A Benchmark for Explicit and Implicit Threat Detection
papers.abstract: Threat detection in Natural Language Processing lacks consistent definitions and standardized benchmarks, and is often conflated with broader phenomena such as toxicity, hate speech, or offensive language. In this work, we introduce ThreatCore, a public available benchmark dataset for fine-grained threat detection that distinguishes between explicit threats, implicit threats, and non-threats. The dataset is constructed by aggregating multiple publicly available resources and systematically re-annotating them under a unified operational definition of threat, revealing substantial inconsistencies across existing labels. To improve the coverage of underrepresented cases, particularly implicit threats, we further augment the dataset with synthetic examples, which are manually validated using the same annotation protocol adopted for the re-annotation of the public datasets, ensuring consistency across all data sources. We evaluate Perspective API, zero-shot classifiers, and recent language models on ThreatCore, showing that implicit threats remain substantially harder to detect than explicit ones. Our results also indicate that incorporating Semantic Role Labeling as an intermediate representation can improve performance by making the structure of harmful intent more explicit. Overall, ThreatCore provides a more consistent benchmark for studying fine-grained threat detection and highlights the challenges that current models still face in identifying indirect expressions of harmful intent.

analysis.tldr: ThreatCore是一个区分显式威胁、隐式威胁和非威胁的细粒度威胁检测基准数据集，揭示了现有标签的不一致性，并发现隐式威胁对当前模型更具挑战性。
analysis.research_motivation: 威胁检测在NLP中缺乏统一定义和标准化基准，常与毒性、仇恨言论等概念混淆，导致评估不一致且难以比较模型性能。
analysis.problem: 现有威胁检测数据集标签不一致，且对隐式威胁的覆盖不足，缺乏一个统一、细粒度的基准来评估模型区分显式威胁、隐式威胁和非威胁的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，通过统一重新标注多个公开资源，发现现有标签存在显著不一致性；实验表明隐式威胁比显式威胁更难检测，而引入语义角色标注作为中间表示可提升性能。
analysis.method: 聚合多个公开资源并基于统一的操作性威胁定义进行系统重新标注，同时使用合成数据增强隐式威胁样本，并采用相同标注协议进行人工验证，构建ThreatCore基准。
contributions: 构建了ThreatCore，一个公开可用的细粒度威胁检测基准数据集，区分显式威胁、隐式威胁和非威胁。
揭示了现有威胁检测标签的不一致性，并通过实验证明隐式威胁对当前模型更具挑战性，且语义角色标注可提升检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在ThreatCore上评估了Perspective API、零样本分类器和近期语言模型，结果显示隐式威胁检测难度显著高于显式威胁，且语义角色标注作为中间表示可提升性能。
limitations: 数据集主要基于英文资源，可能不适用于其他语言或文化背景。
合成数据可能无法完全覆盖真实世界中隐式威胁的多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该工作提供了统一的威胁检测基准，揭示了隐式威胁的挑战，对安全对齐研究有实际价值，但方法上主要是数据集构建和评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ThreatCore是一个区分显式威胁、隐式威胁和非威胁的细粒度威胁检测基准数据集，揭示了现有标签的不一致性，并发现隐式威胁对当前模型更具挑战性。

papers.title: EnergyLens: Interpretable Closed-Form Energy Models for Multimodal LLM Inference Serving
papers.abstract: As large language models span dense, mixture-of-experts, and state-space architectures and are deployed on heterogeneous accelerators under increasingly diverse multimodal workloads, optimising inference energy has become as critical as optimizing latency and throughput. Existing approaches either treat latency as an energy proxy or rely on data-hungry black-box surrogates. Both fail under varying parallelism strategies: latency and energy optima diverge in over 20% of configurations we tested, and black-box surrogates require hundreds of profiling samples to generalize across model families and hardware. We present EnergyLens, which uses symbolic regression as a structure-discovery tool over profiling data to derive a single twelve-parameter closed-form energy model expressed in terms of system properties such as degree of parallelism, batch size, and sequence length. Unlike black-box surrogates, EnergyLens decouples tensor and pipeline parallelism contributions and separates prefill from decode energy, making its predictions physically interpretable and actionable. Fitted from as few as 50 profiling measurements, EnergyLens achieves 88.2% Top-1 configuration selection accuracy across many evaluation scenarios compared to 60.9% for the closest prior analytical baseline, matches the predictive accuracy of ensemble ML methods with 10x fewer profiling samples, and extrapolates reliably to unseen batch sizes and hardware platforms without structural modification, making it a practical, interpretable tool for energy-optimal LLM deployment.

analysis.tldr: EnergyLens 通过符号回归从少量 profiling 数据中推导出可解释的闭式能量模型，用于多模态 LLM 推理服务的能量优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着 LLM 架构多样化和异构加速器部署，推理能量优化变得关键，但现有方法将延迟作为能量代理或依赖数据密集型黑盒代理，在变并行策略下失效。
analysis.problem: 现有能量模型在变并行策略下不准确（延迟与能量最优解在 20%+ 配置中不一致），且黑盒代理需要大量 profiling 样本才能泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 延迟与能量最优解在超过 20% 的测试配置中不一致，表明延迟不能可靠地作为能量代理。
analysis.method: 使用符号回归作为结构发现工具，从 profiling 数据中推导出一个包含 12 个参数的闭式能量模型，该模型以系统属性（并行度、批大小、序列长度）表示，并解耦张量/流水线并行贡献以及预填充/解码能量。
contributions: 提出 EnergyLens，一种可解释的闭式能量模型，仅需 50 个 profiling 样本即可拟合。
在多种评估场景下实现 88.2% 的 Top-1 配置选择准确率，优于先前分析基线（60.9%），且匹配集成 ML 方法的预测精度但样本量减少 10 倍。
模型能可靠外推到未见过的批大小和硬件平台，无需结构修改。
analysis.experiments: 在多种评估场景下，EnergyLens 的 Top-1 配置选择准确率为 88.2%，而先前分析基线为 60.9%；与集成 ML 方法相比，预测精度相当但 profiling 样本减少 10 倍。
limitations: 模型参数数量固定（12 个），可能无法捕捉更复杂的系统行为。
符号回归过程可能对噪声敏感，需要高质量 profiling 数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，实验充分，对 LLM 部署有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EnergyLens 通过符号回归从少量 profiling 数据中推导出可解释的闭式能量模型，用于多模态 LLM 推理服务的能量优化。

papers.title: Agent-First Tool API: A Semantic Interface Paradigm for Enterprise AI Agent Systems
papers.abstract: As AI agents transition from research prototypes to enterprise production systems, the tool interfaces they consume remain rooted in human-oriented CRUD paradigms. This paper identifies five fundamental architectural mismatches between conventional APIs and autonomous agent requirements: exact-identifier dependence, rendering-oriented responses, single-shot interaction assumptions, user-equivalent authorization, and opaque error semantics. We propose the Agent-First Tool API paradigm, comprising three integrated mechanisms: (1) a Six-Verb Semantic Protocol that decomposes tool interactions into search, resolve, preview, execute, verify, and recover phases; (2) a Normalized Tool Contract (NTC) providing structured decision-support metadata including confidence scores, evidence chains, and suggested next actions; and (3) a dual-layer governance pipeline combining static capability policies with dynamic risk escalation. The paradigm is implemented and validated in a production multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 85 registered tools across 6 business domains. Comparative experiments on 50 real operational tasks demonstrate that Agent-First APIs achieve 88% end-to-end task success rate versus 64% for optimized CRUD baselines (+37.5%), while reducing required human interventions by 72.7% and improving autonomous error recovery by 5.8x. We establish that the paradigm is orthogonal and complementary to transport-layer standards such as MCP, operating as the semantic application layer above existing tool discovery and invocation protocols.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向AI Agent的语义化工具API范式，显著提升企业Agent系统任务成功率并减少人工干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具API基于人类CRUD设计，与自主Agent需求存在根本性架构不匹配，导致Agent在真实企业场景中效率低下、错误频发。
analysis.problem: 解决传统API与AI Agent之间的五个架构不匹配问题：精确标识依赖、渲染导向响应、单次交互假设、用户等价授权和模糊错误语义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出传统API在Agent使用中存在系统性失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约和双层治理管道三个集成机制。
contributions: 识别并形式化了传统API与Agent之间的五个架构不匹配问题
提出Agent-First Tool API范式，包含六动词语义协议、标准化工具契约和双层治理管道
在生产级多租户SaaS平台上验证，任务成功率提升37.5%，人工干预减少72.7%，错误恢复提升5.8倍
analysis.experiments: 在包含85个注册工具、6个业务领域的生产SaaS平台上，基于50个真实操作任务进行对比实验。
limitations: 实验仅在单一平台进行，泛化性有待验证
未讨论与不同传输层标准（如MCP）的集成细节
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对企业Agent工具接口的痛点提出系统化方案，实验效果显著，与Agent方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向AI Agent的语义化工具API范式，显著提升企业Agent系统任务成功率并减少人工干预。

papers.title: TIE: Time Interval Encoding for Video Generation over Events
papers.abstract: Director-style prompting, robotic action prediction, and interactive video agents demand temporal grounding over concurrent events -- a regime in which 68% of general clips and over 99% of robotics/gameplay clips contain overlapping events, yet existing multi-event generators rest on a single-active-prompt assumption. However, modern video generators, such as Diffusion Transformers (DiT), represent time as discrete points through point-wise positional encodings. This formulation creates a fundamental dimension mismatch: temporally extended intervals and overlapping events are mathematically unrepresentable to the attention mechanism. In this paper, we propose Time Interval Encoding (TIE), a principled, plug-and-play interval-aware generalization of rotary embeddings that elevates time intervals to first-class primitives inside DiT cross-attention. Rather than introducing another heuristic interval embedding, we show that, within RoPE-compatible bilinear attention, TIE is characterized by two basic principles: Temporal Integrability, which requires an event to aggregate positional evidence over its full duration, and Duration Invariance, which removes the trivial bias toward longer intervals. Under a uniform kernel, this characterization yields an efficient closed-form sinc-based solution that preserves the standard attention interface and naturally attenuates boundary noise through interval integration. Empirically, TIE preserves the visual quality of the base DiT model while substantially improving temporal controllability. In our experiments on the OmniEvents dataset, it improves human-verified Temporal Constraint Satisfaction Rate from 77.34% to 96.03% and reduces temporal boundary error from 0.261s to 0.073s, while also improving trajectory-level temporal alignment metrics. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/MatrixTeam-AI/TIE.

analysis.tldr: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），将事件持续时间作为一等公民嵌入DiT交叉注意力，显著提升视频生成的时间可控性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成器（如DiT）将时间表示为离散点，无法处理重叠事件和持续区间，导致多事件生成时时间控制能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何让扩散Transformer在交叉注意力中有效表示和利用时间区间信息，以支持并发事件的时间可控生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出68%的通用视频片段和超过99%的机器人/游戏片段包含重叠事件，但现有方法基于单活动提示假设，且点式位置编码无法表示区间。
analysis.method: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），基于RoPE兼容的双线性注意力，满足时间可积性和持续时间不变性两个原则，通过均匀核导出闭式sinc解，作为即插即用模块嵌入DiT交叉注意力。
contributions: 提出TIE，一种将时间区间作为一等公民的区间感知位置编码，兼容RoPE和标准注意力接口。
在OmniEvents数据集上，TIE将时间约束满足率从77.34%提升至96.03%，时间边界误差从0.261s降至0.073s。
analysis.experiments: 在OmniEvents数据集上评估，报告了时间约束满足率、时间边界误差和轨迹级时间对齐指标，并开源代码和数据集。
limitations: 可能依赖均匀核假设，非均匀场景需进一步验证。
仅针对DiT架构，其他生成器适用性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验效果显著，与视频生成方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出时间区间编码（TIE），将事件持续时间作为一等公民嵌入DiT交叉注意力，显著提升视频生成的时间可控性。

papers.title: Bridging Sequence and Graph Structure for Epigenetic Age Prediction
papers.abstract: Epigenetic clocks based on DNA methylation have emerged as powerful tools for estimating biological age, with broad applications in aging research, age-related disease studies, and longevity science. Despite advances across machine learning approaches to epigenetic age prediction, spanning penalised linear regression, deep feedforward networks, residual architectures, and graph neural networks, no existing method jointly models co-methylation graph structure and site-specific DNA sequence context within a unified framework. We propose a unified sequence--graph integration framework for epigenetic age prediction that addresses this gap, integrating eight-dimensional DNA sequence statistical features through a lightweight gated modulation mechanism that adaptively scales each site's methylation signal according to its sequence-determined biological relevance prior to graph convolution. Evaluated on 3,707 blood methylation samples against a comprehensive set of baselines, our method achieves a test MAE of 3.149 years, a 12.8\% improvement over the strongest graph-based baseline. Biologically informed statistical features outperform CNN-based sequence encoding, demonstrating that handcrafted sequence features are more effective than end-to-end learned representations in this data regime. Post-hoc interpretability analysis identifies CpG density and local adenine frequency as features with age-dependent importance shifts, consistent with known mechanisms of age-related hypermethylation at CpG-dense promoter regions. Our code is at https://github.com/yaoli2022/graphage-seq.

analysis.tldr: 提出序列-图融合框架用于表观遗传年龄预测，在血液甲基化数据上实现3.149年MAE，比最强图基线提升12.8%。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有表观遗传时钟方法（如线性回归、深度网络、图神经网络）未能联合建模共甲基化图结构和位点特异性DNA序列上下文，限制了预测精度。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架中同时利用DNA序列特征和共甲基化图结构进行表观遗传年龄预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 手工设计的序列统计特征优于CNN端到端学习表示；CpG密度和局部腺嘌呤频率具有年龄依赖性重要性变化。
analysis.method: 提出序列-图融合框架，通过轻量级门控调制机制将八维DNA序列统计特征自适应缩放每个位点的甲基化信号，再输入图卷积网络。
contributions: 首次在统一框架中联合建模共甲基化图结构和DNA序列上下文用于表观遗传年龄预测。
提出轻量级门控调制机制，自适应整合序列特征与甲基化信号。
在3707个血液样本上实现12.8%的MAE改进，并揭示年龄相关甲基化的生物学解释。
analysis.experiments: 在3707个血液甲基化样本上评估，与多种基线比较，测试MAE为3.149年，比最强图基线提升12.8%。
limitations: 仅在血液样本上验证，其他组织泛化性未知。
序列特征为手工设计，可能未捕获全部序列信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有创新但应用领域较专，与核心方向弱相关，适合保存稍后阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出序列-图融合框架用于表观遗传年龄预测，在血液甲基化数据上实现3.149年MAE，比最强图基线提升12.8%。

papers.title: HH-SAE: Discovering and Steering Hierarchical Knowledge of Complex Manifolds
papers.abstract: Rare semantic innovations in high-dimensional, mission-critical domains are often obscured by dense background contexts, a challenge we define as \textit{feature density conflict}. We introduce the \textbf{Hybrid Hierarchical SAE (HH-SAE)} to resolve this by factorizing manifolds into a nested hierarchy of \textbf{Contextual} ($L_0$), \textbf{Atomic} ($f_1$), and \textbf{Compository} ($f_2$) tiers. Evaluating across disparate manifolds, HH-SAE demonstrates superior resolution by \textbf{``fracturing'' administrative clinical labels into physiological modes} and achieving a peak \textbf{cross-domain zero-shot AUC of 0.9156 in fraud detection}. Path ablation confirms the architecture's structural necessity, revealing a 13.46\% utility collapse when contextual subtraction is removed. Finally, knowledge-steered synthesis achieves a +9.9\% AUPRC lift over state-of-the-art generators, proving that HH-SAE effectively prioritizes high-order mechanistic innovation over environmental proxies to enable high-precision discovery in high-stakes environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合层次稀疏自编码器（HH-SAE），通过分解复杂流形为三级层次结构，解决高维关键领域中稀有语义创新被密集背景掩盖的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 在高维、关键任务领域（如医疗、金融），稀有语义创新常被密集背景上下文掩盖，现有方法难以有效分离和发现这些创新。
analysis.problem: 解决特征密度冲突问题，即在高维流形中，稀有语义创新被密集背景上下文淹没，导致难以发现和利用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到特征密度冲突现象，即稀有语义创新被密集背景掩盖；通过路径消融实验发现，去除上下文减法会导致13.46%的效用崩溃，验证了层次结构的必要性。
analysis.method: 提出混合层次稀疏自编码器（HH-SAE），将流形分解为三级嵌套层次：上下文层（L0）、原子层（f1）和组合层（f2），实现层次化特征分解。
contributions: 提出HH-SAE架构，通过层次化分解解决特征密度冲突问题。
在多个不同流形上验证了HH-SAE的优越性，包括临床标签分解和跨域零样本欺诈检测AUC达0.9156。
通过路径消融实验证明层次结构的必要性，并展示知识引导合成在AUPRC上提升9.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个不同流形上评估，包括临床标签分解和欺诈检测；跨域零样本AUC达0.9156；路径消融显示13.46%效用崩溃；知识引导合成AUPRC提升9.9%。
limitations: 层次结构的设计可能依赖于特定领域知识，泛化性需进一步验证。
摘要未提及计算开销和可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，层次化分解思路有潜力，但摘要未提供充分实验细节，且应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合层次稀疏自编码器（HH-SAE），通过分解复杂流形为三级层次结构，解决高维关键领域中稀有语义创新被密集背景掩盖的问题。

papers.title: A Reflective Storytelling Agent for Older Adults: Integrating Argumentation Schemes and Argument Mining in LLM-Based Personalised Narratives
papers.abstract: This work investigates whether knowledge-driven large language model (LLM)-based storytelling can support purposeful narrative interaction with a digital companion for older adults. To address known limitations of LLMs, including hallucinations and limited transparency, we present a reflective storytelling agent integrating knowledge graphs, user modelling, argumentation theory, and argument mining to guide and inspect narrative generation. The study consisted of two phases. Phase I employed participatory design involving 11 domain experts in a formative evaluation that informed iterative refinement. The resulting system generates narratives grounded in structured user models representing health-promoting activities and motivations. Phase II involved 55 older adults evaluating persona-based narratives across four prompts and two creativity levels. Participants assessed perceived purpose, usefulness, cultural relatability, and inconsistencies. The system additionally computed hallucination-risk indicators to evaluate generated narratives. Participants recognised personally relevant purposes in roughly two thirds of narratives, while argument-based purposes were identified in around half of these cases. Cultural recognisability strongly influenced willingness to use the functionality, whereas minor inconsistencies were often tolerated when narratives remained understandable and personally relevant. Narratives with higher hallucination-risk indicators were more often perceived as inconsistent, while higher argument-quality indicators tended to co-occur with higher clarity and meaningfulness ratings. Overall, the study positions argument mining as a reflective inspection mechanism for comparing formal grounding signals with human evaluations in health-oriented LLM storytelling for older adults.

analysis.tldr: 结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘，构建面向老年人的反思性叙事Agent，提升LLM故事生成的可信度与个性化。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在叙事生成中存在幻觉和透明度不足的问题，而面向老年人的健康促进叙事需要高可信度和个性化，现有方法难以满足。
analysis.problem: 如何利用论证理论和论证挖掘来引导和检查LLM生成的个性化叙事，使其对老年人更具目的性、可信度和文化相关性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：参与者约三分之二的叙事中识别出个人相关目的，约一半案例中识别出基于论证的目的；文化可识别性强烈影响使用意愿，而轻微不一致在叙事可理解且相关时被容忍；高幻觉风险指标与高不一致感知相关，高论证质量指标与高清晰度和有意义性评分相关。
analysis.method: 提出反思性叙事Agent，集成知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘，以引导和检查LLM生成的个性化叙事。
contributions: 提出一种结合论证方案和论证挖掘的LLM叙事生成框架，用于面向老年人的健康促进叙事。
通过两阶段研究（专家参与式设计和55名老年人评估）验证了方法的有效性，并分析了幻觉风险、论证质量与用户感知的关系。
analysis.experiments: 两阶段研究：第一阶段11名领域专家参与式设计；第二阶段55名老年人评估基于人设的叙事，涉及4个提示和2个创造力水平，评估感知目的、有用性、文化相关性和不一致性，并计算幻觉风险指标。
limitations: 样本量有限（55名老年人），可能影响泛化性。
论证挖掘的质量依赖于预定义方案，可能无法覆盖所有叙事类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合论证理论与LLM，针对老年人健康叙事有应用价值，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合知识图谱、用户建模、论证理论和论证挖掘，构建面向老年人的反思性叙事Agent，提升LLM故事生成的可信度与个性化。

papers.title: PrimeKG-CL: A Continual Graph Learning Benchmark on Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs underwrite drug repurposing and clinical decision support, yet the upstream ontologies they depend on update on independent cycles that add millions of edges and deprecate hundreds of thousands more between releases. Yet existing continual graph learning has been studied almost exclusively on synthetic random splits of static, generic KGs, a regime that cannot reproduce the asynchronous, structured evolution real biomedical KGs undergo. To this end, we introduce PrimeKG-CL, a CGL benchmark built from nine authoritative biomedical databases (129K+ nodes, 8.1M+ edges, 10 node types, 30 relation types) with two genuine temporal snapshots (June 2021, July 2023; 5.83M edges added, 889K removed, 7.21M persistent), 10 entity-type-grouped tasks, multimodal node features, and a per-task persistent/added/removed test stratification. On three tasks (biomedical relationship prediction, entity classification, KGQA), we evaluate six CL strategies across four KGE decoders, plus LKGE, an LLM-RAG agent, and CMKL. We find that decoder choice and continual learning strategy interact strongly: no single strategy performs best across all decoders, and mismatched combinations can significantly degrade performance. Moreover, only DistMult exhibits a clear separation between persistent and deprecated knowledge, indicating that standard metrics conflate retention of still-valid facts with failure to forget outdated ones; this effect is absent under RotatE. In addition, multimodal features improve entity-level tasks by up to 60%, and a recent CKGE framework (IncDE) failed to scale to our 5.67M-triple base task across five attempts up to 350GB RAM. Data, pipeline, baselines, and the stratified split are released openly. Dataset:huggingface.co/datasets/yradwan147/PrimeKGCL|Code:github.com/yradwan147/primekg-cl-neurips2026

analysis.tldr: 首个基于真实生物医学知识图谱演化的持续图学习基准，揭示解码器与持续学习策略的强交互及标准评测指标的缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有持续图学习研究几乎完全基于静态通用知识图谱的合成随机分割，无法模拟真实生物医学知识图谱的异步、结构化演化过程，导致方法评估脱离实际应用场景。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能反映真实生物医学知识图谱动态演化（节点/边新增、废弃）的持续图学习基准，以系统评估不同方法在关系预测、实体分类和知识图谱问答等任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 解码器选择与持续学习策略存在强交互，无单一策略在所有解码器上最优，错误组合会显著降低性能；DistMult解码器能清晰区分持久知识与废弃知识，而RotatE则不能，说明标准指标混淆了保留有效事实与遗忘过时事实的能力；多模态特征可提升实体级任务性能达60%；现有CKGE框架（IncDE）无法扩展到大规模基任务。
analysis.method: 构建PrimeKG-CL基准：整合9个权威生物医学数据库，提供两个真实时间快照（2021年6月、2023年7月），设计10个实体类型分组任务，包含多模态节点特征和分层测试集（持久/新增/移除），并评估6种持续学习策略、4种KGE解码器、LKGE（LLM-RAG智能体）和CMKL。
contributions: 首个基于真实生物医学知识图谱演化的持续图学习基准，包含大规模节点、边和多种任务类型。
揭示解码器与持续学习策略的强交互效应，以及标准指标在区分持久与废弃知识上的缺陷。
公开数据集、代码、基线和分层分割，促进可重复研究。
analysis.experiments: 在三个任务（生物医学关系预测、实体分类、知识图谱问答）上评估了六种持续学习策略、四种KGE解码器、LKGE和CMKL，并分析了多模态特征的影响及IncDE的可扩展性。
limitations: 仅基于两个时间快照，可能无法完全捕捉更细粒度的演化模式。
未探索更复杂的持续学习策略或解码器组合。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 构建了首个真实生物医学知识图谱持续学习基准，揭示了重要现象，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于真实生物医学知识图谱演化的持续图学习基准，揭示解码器与持续学习策略的强交互及标准评测指标的缺陷。

papers.title: GemDepth: Geometry-Embedded Features for 3D-Consistent Video Depth
papers.abstract: Video depth estimation extends monocular prediction into the temporal domain to ensure coherence. However, existing methods often suffer from spatial blurring in fine-detail regions and temporal inconsistencies. We argue that current approaches, which primarily rely on temporal smoothing via Transformers, struggle to maintain strict 3D geometric consistency-particularly under rotations or drastic view changes. To address this, we propose GemDepth, a framework built on the insight that an explicit awareness of camera motion and global 3D structure is a prerequisite for 3D consistency. Distinctively, GemDepth introduces a Geometry-Embedding Module (GEM) that predicts inter-frame camera poses to generate implicit geometric embeddings. This injection of motion priors equips the network with intrinsic 3D perception and alignment capabilities. Guided by these geometric cues, our Alternating Spatio-Temporal Transformer (ASTT) captures latent point-level correspondences to simultaneously enhance spatial precision for sharp details and enforce rigorous temporal consistency. Furthermore, GemDepth employs a data-efficient training strategy, effectively bridging the gap between high efficiency and robust geometric consistency. As shown in Fig.2, comprehensive evaluations demonstrate that GemDepth achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple datasets, particularly in complex dynamic scenarios. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Yuecheng919/GemDepth

analysis.tldr: 提出几何嵌入模块与交替时空Transformer，实现3D一致的视频深度估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频深度估计方法在细节区域存在空间模糊和时间不一致，尤其在旋转或剧烈视角变化下难以保持严格的3D几何一致性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用显式的相机运动和全局3D结构信息，提升视频深度估计的3D几何一致性与时空精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法主要依赖Transformer进行时间平滑，但在旋转或剧烈视角变化下难以维持严格的3D几何一致性。
analysis.method: 提出GemDepth框架，包含几何嵌入模块（GEM）预测帧间相机位姿生成隐式几何嵌入，以及交替时空Transformer（ASTT）捕捉点级对应以增强空间精度和时间一致性。
contributions: 提出几何嵌入模块（GEM），通过显式相机运动先验赋予网络3D感知和对齐能力。
设计交替时空Transformer（ASTT），利用几何线索同时提升空间细节和时间一致性。
采用数据高效训练策略，平衡效率与几何鲁棒性，在多个数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，尤其在复杂动态场景中表现优异，达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 可能依赖准确的相机位姿估计，在极端运动或遮挡场景下性能可能下降。
未提及对实时性的优化，可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且开源，与视频深度估计方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出几何嵌入模块与交替时空Transformer，实现3D一致的视频深度估计。

papers.title: Improving Human Image Animation via Semantic Representation Alignment
papers.abstract: The field of image-to-video generation has made remarkable progress. However, challenges such as human limb twisting and facial distortion persist, especially when generating long videos or modeling intensive motions. Existing human image animation works address these issues by incorporating human-specific semantic representations, e.g., dense poses or ID embeddings, as additional conditions. However, conditioning on these representations could decrease the generation flexibility. Moreover, their reliance on RGB pixel supervision also lacks emphasis on learning necessary 3D geometric relationships and temporal coherence. In contrast, we introduce a novel approach named SemanticREPA that leverages these semantic representations as supervision signals through representation alignment. Specifically, we begin by training a structure alignment module that aligns the structure representations obtained from video latents with video depth estimation features. We then fix the pretrained module, and utilize it to provide additional supervision on the structure representations of the diffusion models, achieving structure rectification to generate coherent and stable human structures. Simultaneously, we develop an ID alignment module to align the ID representations of the generated videos to face recognition features. We further propose to use the predicted structure representations to refine identity restoration in relevant regions. With structure and ID alignment, our method demonstrates superior quality on extended character motions and enhanced character consistency.

analysis.tldr: 通过语义表示对齐提升人体图像动画的生成质量与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像到视频生成中，人体肢体扭曲和面部畸变问题突出，尤其在长视频或剧烈运动场景下；已有方法依赖密集姿态或ID嵌入等条件，但降低了生成灵活性，且RGB像素监督缺乏3D几何和时间连贯性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲生成灵活性的前提下，增强人体图像动画的结构稳定性和身份一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法依赖人体语义表示（如密集姿态、ID嵌入）作为条件，但会降低生成灵活性；同时，仅使用RGB像素监督难以学习必要的3D几何关系和时间连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出SemanticREPA，通过表示对齐将语义表示作为监督信号：1）结构对齐模块：将视频潜在表示的结构表示与深度估计特征对齐，实现结构矫正；2）ID对齐模块：将生成视频的ID表示与人脸识别特征对齐，并用预测的结构表示优化身份恢复。
contributions: 提出利用语义表示作为监督信号而非条件，通过表示对齐提升生成质量。
设计结构对齐和ID对齐两个模块，分别改善结构稳定性和身份一致性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练的深度估计和人脸识别模型，泛化性受限。
对齐模块的额外训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性（表示对齐替代条件），但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分保守。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过语义表示对齐提升人体图像动画的生成质量与一致性。

papers.title: DuetFair: Coupling Inter- and Intra-Subgroup Robustness for Fair Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation models can perform unevenly across subgroups. Most existing fairness methods focus on improving average subgroup performance, implicitly treating each subgroup as internally homogeneous. However, this can hide difficult cases within a subgroup, where high-loss samples are obscured by the subgroup mean. We call this problem \textbf{intra-group hidden failure}. To solve this, we propose \textbf{DuetFair} mechanism, a dual-axis fairness framework that jointly considers inter-subgroup adaptation and intra-subgroup robustness. Based on DuetFair, we introduce \textbf{FairDRO}, which combines distribution-aware mixture-of-experts (dMoE) with subgroup-conditioned distributionally robust optimization (DRO) loss aggregation. This design allows the model to adapt across subgroups while also reducing hidden failures within each subgroup. We evaluate FairDRO on three medical image segmentation benchmarks with varying degrees of within-group heterogeneity. FairDRO achieves the best equity-scaled performance on Harvard-FairSeg and improves worst-case subgroup performance on HAM10000 under both age- and race-based grouping schemes. On the 3D radiotherapy target cohort, FairDRO further improves worst-group Dice by 3.5 points ($\uparrow 6.0\%$) under the tumor-stage grouping and by 4.1 points ($\uparrow 7.4\%$) under the institution grouping over the strongest baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出DuetFair框架，通过双轴公平性（组间适应+组内鲁棒）提升医学图像分割的公平性，FairDRO方法在多个基准上改善最差组性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割模型在不同亚组上表现不均，现有公平性方法仅关注平均亚组性能，忽略了亚组内部的高损失样本（组内隐藏失败），导致公平性不足。
analysis.problem: 解决医学图像分割中亚组内部隐藏失败问题，即高损失样本被亚组均值掩盖，需要同时考虑组间适应和组内鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有公平性方法将每个亚组视为内部同质，导致亚组内困难样本（高损失）被平均性能掩盖，即组内隐藏失败现象。
analysis.method: 提出DuetFair双轴公平框架，包含组间适应和组内鲁棒；具体实现FairDRO，结合分布感知混合专家（dMoE）和亚组条件分布鲁棒优化（DRO）损失聚合。
contributions: 首次提出组内隐藏失败问题，并设计双轴公平框架DuetFair同时处理组间和组内公平性。
提出FairDRO方法，结合dMoE和亚组条件DRO，在多个医学图像分割基准上提升最差组性能。
analysis.experiments: 在Harvard-FairSeg、HAM10000（年龄和种族分组）和3D放疗靶区数据集（肿瘤分期和机构分组）上评估，FairDRO在Harvard-FairSeg上取得最佳公平缩放性能，在HAM10000上改善最差组性能，在3D放疗靶区上最差组Dice提升3.5-4.1点。
limitations: 可能依赖亚组标签的可用性，实际场景中亚组信息可能不完整。
dMoE和DRO的组合可能增加计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新（双轴公平框架）且实验充分，在多个医学图像分割基准上显著提升最差组性能，与公平性方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DuetFair框架，通过双轴公平性（组间适应+组内鲁棒）提升医学图像分割的公平性，FairDRO方法在多个基准上改善最差组性能。

papers.title: Infinite Mask Diffusion for Few-Step Distillation
papers.abstract: Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models in language modeling, offering the advantages of parallel decoding and bidirectional context processing within a simple yet effective framework. Specifically, their explicit distinction between masked tokens and data underlies their simple framework and effective conditional generation. However, MDMs typically require many sampling iterations due to factorization errors stemming from simultaneous token updates. We observe that a theoretical lower bound of the factorization error exists, which standard MDMs cannot reduce due to their use of a deterministic single-state mask. In this paper, we propose the Infinite Mask Diffusion Model (IMDM), which introduces a stochastic infinite-state mask to mitigate the theoretical bound while directly inheriting the benefits of MDMs, including the compatibility with pre-trained weights. We empirically demonstrate that MDM fails to perform few-step generation even in a simple synthetic task due to the factorization error bound, whereas IMDM can find an efficient solution for the same task. Finally, when equipped with appropriate distillation methods, IMDM surpasses existing few-step distillation methods at small step counts on LM1B and OpenWebText. Code is available at https://Ugness.github.io/official_imdm.

analysis.tldr: 提出无限状态掩码扩散模型（IMDM），通过随机无限状态掩码降低分解误差，实现少步蒸馏生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）在语言建模中具有并行解码和双向上下文处理的优势，但需要大量采样迭代，限制了其效率。
analysis.problem: MDM因同时更新token导致的分解误差存在理论下界，标准MDM使用确定性单状态掩码无法降低该误差，难以实现少步生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到MDM在简单合成任务中因分解误差界无法进行少步生成，而IMDM能有效解决。
analysis.method: 提出无限状态掩码扩散模型（IMDM），引入随机无限状态掩码以缓解理论误差界，同时保留MDM的预训练权重兼容性。
contributions: 理论分析了MDM分解误差的下界，并指出标准MDM无法降低该误差。
提出IMDM，通过随机无限状态掩码降低分解误差，实现少步蒸馏生成。
在LM1B和OpenWebText上，结合蒸馏方法，IMDM在少步数下超越现有少步蒸馏方法。
analysis.experiments: 在LM1B和OpenWebText数据集上评估，IMDM结合蒸馏方法在少步数下优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能增加模型复杂度或训练难度。
仅验证了语言建模任务，其他模态适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 理论分析深入，方法创新，但实验规模有限，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无限状态掩码扩散模型（IMDM），通过随机无限状态掩码降低分解误差，实现少步蒸馏生成。

papers.title: Consistency as a Testable Property: Statistical Methods to Evaluate AI Agent Reliability
papers.abstract: This paper establishes a rigorous measurement science for AI agent reliability, providing a foundational framework for quantifying consistency under semantically preserving perturbations. By leveraging $U$-statistics for output-level reliability and kernel-based metrics for trajectory-level stability, we offer a principled approach to evaluating agents across diverse operating conditions. Our proposal highlights the important distinction between the core capability and execution robustness of an agent, showing that minor task-level variations can induce complete strategy breakdowns despite the agent possessing the requisite knowledge for the task. We validate our framework through extensive experiments on three agentic benchmarks, demonstrating that trajectory-level consistency metrics provide far greater diagnostic sensitivity than traditional pass@1 rates. By providing the mathematical tools to isolate where and why agents deviate, we enable the identification and rectification of architectural concerns that hinder the deployment of agents in high-stakes, real-world environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于U统计量和核方法的AI智能体可靠性评估框架，通过轨迹级一致性度量诊断策略崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: AI智能体在高风险场景部署时缺乏可靠的评估方法，传统pass@1指标无法检测语义保持扰动下的策略崩溃。
analysis.problem: 如何量化AI智能体在语义保持扰动下的输出一致性和轨迹稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，微小任务变化可导致智能体策略完全崩溃，即使其具备完成任务所需的知识。
analysis.method: 利用U统计量评估输出级可靠性，基于核方法度量轨迹级稳定性，区分核心能力与执行鲁棒性。
contributions: 建立了AI智能体可靠性的严格度量科学框架
提出轨迹级一致性指标，比pass@1具有更高诊断灵敏度
提供数学工具定位智能体偏差原因
analysis.experiments: 在三个智能体基准上验证，轨迹级一致性指标比传统pass@1更敏感。
limitations: 未提及跨领域泛化性
可能依赖特定扰动类型
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验验证有效，对智能体可靠性评估有重要贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于U统计量和核方法的AI智能体可靠性评估框架，通过轨迹级一致性度量诊断策略崩溃。

papers.title: SoK: A Systematic Bidirectional Literature Review of AI & DLT Convergence
papers.abstract: The integration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) with Distributed Ledger Technology (DLT) has become a growing research area, yet contributions tend to cluster around specific application domains or examine only one direction of the integration, leaving the broader architectural interplay between the two technologies poorly understood. This work addresses that gap through a structured, bidirectional review of peer-reviewed studies published between 2020 and 2025. We classify contributions along two directions: AI-enhanced DLT, and DLT-enhanced AI. In the first case, we examine how AI techniques improve DLT systems across five layers: data, network, consensus, execution, and application layers. In the second case, we analyse how DLT supports AI systems across five layers: infrastructure, data, model, inference, and application layers, with particular attention to federated learning, model evaluation, and multi-agent coordination. The analysis reveals that most works concentrate on a small subset of layers: execution and consensus for AI-enhanced DLT, data and model for DLT-enhanced AI. Other layers remain comparatively neglected. Despite reported improvements in controlled settings, no study demonstrates deployment at production scale, and the field has not yet offered satisfying answers to fundamental questions around scalability, interoperability, and verifiable execution. We argue that progress will require cross-layer co-design and empirical validation in real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: 对AI与DLT双向融合的文献综述，发现多数工作集中在少数层，缺乏生产级部署和跨层协同设计。
analysis.research_motivation: AI与DLT的集成研究日益增长，但现有工作多聚焦特定应用或单一方向，缺乏对两者架构互动的系统性理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对AI与DLT双向集成（AI增强DLT和DLT增强AI）的全面、结构化综述，导致对未充分探索的层和关键挑战（如可扩展性、互操作性）认识不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数工作集中在少数层：AI增强DLT集中在执行和共识层，DLT增强AI集中在数据和模型层；其他层相对被忽视；没有研究展示生产级部署；对可扩展性、互操作性和可验证执行等基本问题尚未给出满意答案。
analysis.method: 对2020-2025年间同行评审研究进行结构化双向综述，将贡献分为AI增强DLT和DLT增强AI两个方向，并分别按五层架构分类分析。
contributions: 提出了AI与DLT双向集成的五层分类框架（AI增强DLT：数据、网络、共识、执行、应用层；DLT增强AI：基础设施、数据、模型、推理、应用层）。
揭示了当前研究集中在少数层、缺乏生产级部署和跨层协同设计的现状，并指出了未来方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述范围限于2020-2025年同行评审研究，可能遗漏早期或非同行评审工作。
分类框架可能无法完全覆盖所有集成方式，且未提供定量分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 综述性工作，结构清晰但缺乏实验，与核心方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对AI与DLT双向融合的文献综述，发现多数工作集中在少数层，缺乏生产级部署和跨层协同设计。

papers.title: CMKL: Modality-Aware Continual Learning for Evolving Biomedical Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Biomedical knowledge graphs are increasingly large, dynamic, and multimodal, driven by rapid advances in biotechnology such as high-throughput sequencing. Machine learning models can infer previously unobserved biomedical relationships and characterize biomedical entities in these graphs, but existing knowledge graph embedding methods and their continual learning extensions either assume static graph structure or fail to exploit multimodal information under evolving data distributions. They also apply uniform regularization across all model parameters, ignoring that different modalities may exhibit distinct forgetting dynamics as the graph evolves. We propose the Continual Multimodal Knowledge Graph Learner (CMKL), a CL framework for biomedical KGs that natively encodes structure, text, and molecules, fuses them through a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) router, and protects previously learned knowledge with standard EWC regularization and a K-means-diverse multimodal replay buffer. We evaluate CMKL on a 129K-entity biomedical continual benchmark with 10 tasks. On continual biomedical entity classification, CMKL reaches AP 0.591 versus 0.370 for the strongest structural baseline, a 60% gain that is driven by access to multimodal features and preserved across the sequence with near-zero forgetting (AF 0.008). On continual relationship prediction, CMKL reaches AP $0.062$, matching Naive Sequential and EWC (0.058) within seed noise and outperforming Joint Training (0.047, p=0.045) and LKGE (0.039). A frozen-text ablation reaches AP 0.136, more than double any jointly trained model, yet that signal is unreachable by margin-ranking gradients: the greedy-modality asymmetry lives at the representation level, not the fusion level, and MoE routing manages it by suppressing the unreachable modality without forcing it through a learned bottleneck. Code: github.com/yradwan147/cmkl-neurips2026

analysis.tldr: 提出CMKL框架，通过多模态融合和持续学习策略，在生物医学知识图谱上实现低遗忘的实体分类和关系预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物医学知识图谱规模大、动态变化且多模态，现有方法要么假设静态图结构，要么无法利用多模态信息，且对所有参数统一正则化，忽略了不同模态的遗忘动态差异。
analysis.problem: 如何在动态演化的生物医学知识图谱中，利用多模态信息进行持续学习，同时避免灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现不同模态存在不同的遗忘动态，且存在贪婪模态不对称性：某些模态（如文本）的特征在表示层面无法被边际排序梯度有效利用，而MoE路由可以通过抑制不可达模态来管理这种不对称。
analysis.method: 提出CMKL框架，包含多模态编码（结构、文本、分子）、Mixture-of-Experts融合路由、EWC正则化和K-means多样多模态回放缓冲区。
contributions: 提出CMKL，首个针对生物医学知识图谱的持续多模态学习框架，原生编码结构、文本和分子。
通过MoE路由和K-means多样回放缓冲区，有效缓解多模态遗忘，并揭示贪婪模态不对称性现象。
analysis.experiments: 在包含129K实体和10个任务的生物医学持续基准上评估，实体分类AP达0.591（比最强结构基线提升60%），关系预测AP达0.062，且遗忘极低（AF 0.008）。
limitations: 关系预测的绝对AP值较低（0.062），可能受任务难度限制。
方法依赖预定义模态，对新模态的扩展性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，实验充分且效果显著，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CMKL框架，通过多模态融合和持续学习策略，在生物医学知识图谱上实现低遗忘的实体分类和关系预测。

papers.title: SLASH the Sink: Sharpening Structural Attention Inside LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable semantic understanding but often struggle with structural understanding when processing graph topologies in a serialized format. Existing solutions rely on training external graph-based adapters or fine-tuning, which incur high costs and lost generalizability. In this work, we investigate the internal mechanisms of LLMs and present a critical finding: LLMs spontaneously reconstruct the graph's topology internally, evidenced by a distinct "sawtooth" pattern in their attention maps that structurally aligns with the "token-level adjacency matrix". However, this intrinsic structural understanding is diluted by the attention sink. We theoretically formalize this dilution as a representation bottleneck, stemming from a fundamental conflict: the model's anisotropic bias, essential for language tasks, suppresses the topology-aware local aggregation required for graph reasoning. To address this, we propose a training-free solution, named StructuraL Attention SHarpening (Slash), which amplifies this internal structural understanding via a plug-and-play attention redistribution. Experiments on pure graph tasks and molecular prediction validate Slash delivers significant and consistent performance gains across diverse LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 无需训练，通过锐化注意力分布增强LLM对图结构的内部理解。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在序列化处理图拓扑时结构理解能力不足，现有方法依赖外部图适配器或微调，成本高且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: LLM内部对图结构的理解被注意力汇聚（attention sink）稀释，导致结构推理能力受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM注意力图呈现与token级邻接矩阵结构对齐的锯齿模式，表明其内部自发重建图拓扑，但该理解被注意力汇聚稀释。
analysis.method: 提出Slash方法，通过即插即用的注意力重分布锐化结构注意力，无需训练。
contributions: 发现LLM内部自发重建图拓扑的证据（注意力图中的锯齿模式）。
理论形式化注意力汇聚导致的结构理解稀释为表示瓶颈。
提出无需训练的注意力锐化方法Slash，提升LLM在图任务上的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在纯图任务和分子预测上验证，Slash在不同LLM上均取得显著且一致的性能提升。
limitations: 方法依赖LLM内部已有的结构理解，对完全不理解图结构的模型可能无效。
仅针对序列化图输入，未考虑其他结构化数据形式。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且无需训练，实验验证有效，但应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无需训练，通过锐化注意力分布增强LLM对图结构的内部理解。

papers.title: SkillEvolver: Skill Learning as a Meta-Skill
papers.abstract: Agent skills today are static artifact: authored once -- by human curation or one-shot generation from parametric knowledge -- and then consumed unchanged, with no mechanism to improve from real use. We propose \textbf{SkillEvolver}, a lightweight, plug-and-play solution for online skill learning, in which a single meta-skill iteratively authors, deploys, and refines domain-specific skills. The learning target of SkillEvolver is the skill's prose and code, not model weights, so that the resulting artifact drops into any agent without retraining; and the meta-skill itself is just another skill, loaded through the same interface by any protocol-compliant CLI-agent. Unlike trace-distillation, the meta-skill refines only after deploying the learnt skill, such that the learning signal comes from failures another agent encounters while using it -- not from exploratory traces alone. Refinement iterations are governed by a fresh-agent overfit audit that catches possible leakage as well as deployed-skill-specific failures, including the silent-bypass mode in which a skill appears valid in content but is never invoked at runtime. On $83$ SkillsBench tasks spanning $15^{+}$ domains, SkillEvolver reaches $56.8\%$ accuracy versus $43.6\%$ for curated human skills and $29.9\%$ for the no-skill baseline; on three GPU kernel optimization tasks from KernelBench, it also raises mean speedup from $1.16$ to $1.51$ on average.

analysis.tldr: SkillEvolver提出一种元技能，通过迭代编写、部署和精炼领域技能，使智能体技能能从实际使用中持续改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体技能是静态的，一旦创建便无法从实际使用中改进，限制了其适应性和性能。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体技能在部署后能自动从使用反馈中学习并提升，而无需重新训练模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态技能存在性能瓶颈，而基于轨迹蒸馏的方法缺乏真实部署反馈；同时存在“静默绕过”模式，即技能内容看似有效但运行时从未被调用。
analysis.method: SkillEvolver是一个轻量级元技能，它通过迭代方式编写、部署和精炼领域技能，学习目标为技能的文本描述和代码，而非模型权重；精炼过程基于其他智能体使用该技能时遇到的失败，并通过新智能体过拟合审计来检测泄漏和特定失败模式。
contributions: 提出一种在线技能学习框架，使技能能从实际使用中持续改进。
设计新智能体过拟合审计机制，检测技能泄漏和静默绕过等失败模式。
在83个SkillsBench任务和3个KernelBench任务上验证了有效性，显著超越人工技能和无技能基线。
analysis.experiments: 在83个SkillsBench任务（涵盖15+领域）上，SkillEvolver达到56.8%准确率，优于人工技能的43.6%和无技能基线的29.9%；在3个GPU内核优化任务上，平均加速比从1.16提升至1.51。
limitations: 可能依赖初始技能的质量和领域覆盖范围。

papers.title: Simultaneous Long-tailed Recognition and Multi-modal Fusion for Highly Imbalanced Multi-modal Data
papers.abstract: Long-tailed distributions in class-imbalanced data present a fundamental challenge for deep learning models, which tend to be biased toward majority classes. While recent methods for long-tailed recognition have mitigated this issue, they are largely restricted to single-modal inputs and cannot fully exploit complementary information from diverse data sources. In this work, we introduce a new framework for long-tailed recognition that explicitly handles multi-modal inputs. Our approach extends multi-expert architectures to the multi-modal setting by fusing heterogeneous data into a unified representation while leveraging modality-specific networks to estimate the informativeness of each modality. These confidence-guided weights dynamically modulate the fusion process, ensuring that more informative modalities contribute more strongly to the final decision. To further enhance performance, we design specialized training and test procedures that accommodate diverse modality combinations, including images and tabular data. Extensive experiments on benchmark and real-world datasets demonstrate that the proposed approach not only effectively integrates multi-modal information but also outperforms existing methods in handling long-tailed, class-imbalanced scenarios, highlighting its robustness and generalization capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种同时处理长尾识别与多模态融合的框架，通过置信度引导的动态融合提升不平衡多模态数据性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长尾识别方法局限于单模态输入，无法充分利用多模态数据的互补信息，而实际应用中多模态数据常伴随类别不平衡问题。

设计置信度引导的动态融合机制，确保信息量大的模态贡献更大。
在基准和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。

papers.title: M$^2$E-UAV: A Benchmark and Analysis for Onboard Motion-on-Motion Event-Based Tiny UAV Detection
papers.abstract: Tiny UAV detection from an onboard event camera is difficult when the observer and target move at the same time. In this motion-on-motion regime, ego-motion activates background edges across buildings, vegetation, and horizon structures, while the UAV may appear as a sparse event cluster. To explore this practical problem, we present M$^2$E-UAV, a benchmark and analysis setup for onboard motion-on-motion event-based tiny UAV detection. The processed M$^2$E-UAV benchmark contains 87,223 training samples and 21,395 validation samples across four scene families: sunny building-forest, sunny farm-village, sunset building-forest, and sunset farm-village. We provide M$^2$E-Point, a point-based event baseline, and M$^2$E-Point + IMU, an IMU-conditioned variant, to analyze the role of inertial cues under onboard motion-on-motion detection. M$^2$E-Point encodes events as $[x,y,t,p]$ point sets, extracts local event structure with EdgeConv, and predicts event-level UAV foreground scores, from which bounding boxes are derived via DBSCAN. Our validation-stage analysis shows that point-based event modeling is a strong baseline, while simple IMU conditioning provides only marginal aggregate gains. Under the train/validation split, M$^2$E-Point achieves 0.9673 F1 and 0.5501 mAP50-95, while the IMU-conditioned variant reaches 0.5561 mAP50-95 with only marginal aggregate changes, serving as an initial baseline for future exploration in this domain. Code will be ready in https://github.com/Wickyan/M2E-UAV.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对机载运动-运动场景下基于事件相机的微型无人机检测基准与基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当观测平台与目标同时运动时，机载事件相机上的微型无人机检测极具挑战，自运动会激活大量背景边缘噪声，而无人机仅表现为稀疏事件簇，现有方法缺乏对此场景的系统研究。
analysis.problem: 解决运动-运动（motion-on-motion）条件下，基于事件相机的机载微型无人机检测问题。

contributions: 构建了首个面向机载运动-运动场景的事件相机微型无人机检测基准M²E-UAV，包含87k训练样本和21k验证样本，覆盖四种场景。

analysis.experiments: 在M²E-UAV基准上，M²E-Point达到0.9673 F1和0.5501 mAP50-95，IMU条件变体达到0.5561 mAP50-95，仅带来边际提升。
limitations: IMU融合方式简单，未探索更复杂的融合策略。

papers.title: Multi-layer attentive probing improves transfer of audio representations for bioacoustics
papers.abstract: Probing heads map the representations learned from audio by a machine learning model to downstream task labels and are a key component in evaluating representation learning. Most bioacoustic benchmarks use a fixed, low-capacity probe, such as a linear layer on the final encoder layer. While this standardization enables model comparisons, it may bias results by overlooking the interaction between encoder features and probe design. In this work, we systematically study different probing strategies across two bioacoustic benchmarks, BEANs and BirdSet. We evaluate last- and multi-layer probing, across linear and attention probes. We show that larger probe heads that leverage time information have superior performance. Our results suggest that current benchmarks may misrepresent encoder quality when relying on a last-layer probing setup. Multi-layer probing improves downstream task performance across all tested models, while attention probing has superior performance to linear probing for transformer models.

analysis.tldr: 多层注意力探针能更有效地迁移音频表征到生物声学任务，优于传统线性探针。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前生物声学基准大多使用固定低容量探针（如最终编码器层的线性层），可能因忽略编码器特征与探针设计的交互而偏置结果，需要系统研究不同探针策略。

analysis.method: 系统比较了最后一层与多层探针、线性与注意力探针在BEANs和BirdSet两个生物声学基准上的表现。

papers.title: DeepRefine: Agent-Compiled Knowledge Refinement via Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Agent-compiled knowledge bases provide persistent external knowledge for large language model (LLM) agents in open-ended, knowledge-intensive downstream tasks. Yet their quality is systematically limited by \emph{incompleteness}, \emph{incorrectness}, and \emph{redundancy}, manifested as missing evidence or cross-document links, low-confidence or imprecise claims, and ambiguous or coreference resolution issues. Such defects compound under iterative use, degrading retrieval fidelity and downstream task performance. We present \textbf{DeepRefine}, a general LLM-based reasoning model for \emph{agent-compiled knowledge refinement} that improves the quality of any pre-constructed knowledge bases with user queries to make it more suitable for the downstream tasks. DeepRefine performs multi-turn interactions with the knowledge base and conducts abductive diagnosis over interaction history, localizes likely defects, and executes targeted refinement actions for incremental knowledge base updates. To optimize refinement policies of DeepRefine without gold references, we introduce a Gain-Beyond-Draft (GBD) reward and train the reasoning process end-to-end via reinforcement learning. Extensive experiments demonstrate consistent downstream gains over strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出DeepRefine，通过强化学习优化智能体编译知识库的质量，解决不完整、不正确和冗余问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 智能体编译的知识库在开放知识密集型任务中为LLM提供外部知识，但其质量受限于不完整、不正确和冗余问题，且缺陷在迭代使用中累积，降低检索保真度和下游任务性能。
analysis.problem: 如何自动改进预构建的智能体编译知识库，使其更适用于下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 知识库存在缺失证据或跨文档链接、低置信度或不精确声明、歧义或共指消解问题，且缺陷在迭代使用中恶化。
analysis.method: DeepRefine是一个基于LLM的推理模型，通过多轮交互与知识库进行溯因诊断，定位缺陷并执行针对性细化操作；使用Gain-Beyond-Draft (GBD)奖励通过强化学习端到端训练推理过程。
contributions: 提出DeepRefine，一种通用的基于LLM的推理模型，用于智能体编译知识库的细化。
引入Gain-Beyond-Draft (GBD)奖励，无需黄金参考即可通过强化学习优化细化策略。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上进行了广泛实验，显示一致的下游性能提升。
limitations: 可能依赖基础LLM的推理能力，对弱模型效果有限。
多轮交互可能增加计算开销。

analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合强化学习优化知识库，实验显示一致提升，与Agent方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DeepRefine，通过强化学习优化智能体编译知识库的质量，解决不完整、不正确和冗余问题。

papers.title: OpenSGA: Efficient 3D Scene Graph Alignment in the Open World
papers.abstract: Scene graph alignment establishes object correspondences between two 3D scene graphs constructed from partially overlapping observations. This enables efficient scene understanding and object-level relocalization when a robot revisits a place, as well as global map fusion across multiple agents. Such capabilities are essential for robots that require long-term memory for long-horizon tasks involving interactions with the environment. Existing approaches mainly focus on subscan-to-subscan (S2S) alignment and depend heavily on geometric point-cloud features, leaving frame-to-scan (F2S) alignment and open-set vision-language features underexplored. In addition, existing datasets for scene graph alignment remain small-scale with limited object diversity, constraining systematic training and evaluation. We present a unified and efficient scene graph alignment framework that predicts object correspondences by fusing vision-language, textual, and geometric features with spatial context. The framework comprises modules such as a distance-gated spatial attention encoder, a minimum-cost-flow-based allocator, and a global scene embedding generator to achieve accurate alignment even under large coordinate discrepancies. We further introduce ScanNet-SG, a large-scale dataset generated via an automated annotation pipeline with over 700k samples, covering 509 object categories from ScanNet labels and over 3k categories from GPT-4o-based tagging. Experiments show that our method achieves the best overall performance on both F2S and S2S tasks, substantially outperforming existing scene graph alignment methods. Our code and dataset are released at: https://autonomousrobots.nl/paper_websites/opensga.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一高效的3D场景图对齐框架OpenSGA，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征，并发布大规模数据集ScanNet-SG。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人长期任务需要场景图对齐实现场景理解和地图融合，但现有方法依赖几何特征且数据集规模小，限制了开放世界下的泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 现有3D场景图对齐方法局限于子扫描到子扫描（S2S）对齐，对帧到扫描（F2S）对齐和开放集视觉-语言特征探索不足，且数据集规模小、物体类别有限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 统一框架融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征与空间上下文，包含距离门控空间注意力编码器、基于最小成本流的分配器和全局场景嵌入生成器。
contributions: 提出OpenSGA，首个统一处理F2S和S2S场景图对齐的框架，融合多模态特征。
发布ScanNet-SG大规模数据集，含70万+样本，覆盖509个ScanNet类别和3000+GPT-4o标签类别。
analysis.experiments: 在F2S和S2S任务上均取得最佳性能，显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖GPT-4o标注质量，存在标签噪声。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一高效的3D场景图对齐框架OpenSGA，融合视觉-语言、文本和几何特征，并发布大规模数据集ScanNet-SG。

papers.title: ASIA: an Autonomous System Identification Agent
papers.abstract: Over the years, research in system identification has provided a rich set of methods for learning dynamical models, together with well-established theoretical guarantees. In practice, however, the choice of model class, training algorithm, and hyperparameter tuning is still largely left to empirical trial-and-error, requiring substantial expert time and domain experience. Motivated by recent advances in agentic artificial intelligence, we present ASIA, a framework that delegates this iterative search to a large language model acting as an autonomous coding agent. Building on existing agentic platforms, ASIA closes the loop between hypothesis, implementation, and evaluation without human intervention, requiring only a plain-English description of the identification problem. We conduct an empirical study of ASIA on two system identification benchmarks and analyse the agent's search behaviour, the architectures and training strategies it discovers, and the quality of the resulting models. We also discuss the potential of the approach and its current limitations, including implicit test leakage, reduced methodological transparency, and reproducibility concerns.

analysis.tldr: ASIA 利用 LLM 作为自主编码代理，自动完成系统辨识中的模型选择、训练和调参，无需人工干预。
analysis.research_motivation: 系统辨识方法丰富但实际应用依赖人工试错，耗费专家时间和经验，亟需自动化。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化系统辨识中的模型类选择、训练算法和超参数调优，减少人工干预。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 LLM 的自主编码代理框架，闭环执行假设、实现和评估，仅需自然语言描述问题。
contributions: 提出 ASIA 框架，将系统辨识的迭代搜索委托给 LLM 代理。

papers.title: Formally Verifying Analog Neural Networks Under Process Variations Using Polynomial Zonotopes
papers.abstract: Analog neural networks are gaining attention due to their efficiency in terms of power consumption and processing speed. However, since analog neural networks are implemented as physical circuits, they are highly sensitive to manufacturing process variations, which can cause large deviations from the nominal model. We present a polynomial-based model that resembles the performance of the neuron circuit under process variations. Then, we formally verify the behavior of the circuit-level model using reachability analysis with polynomial zonotopes, thus, avoiding conventional, time-consuming Monte Carlo simulations. We evaluate our proposed verification approach on three different datasets, verifying both fully-connected and convolutional analog neural networks. Our experimental results confirm the effectiveness of our verification approach by reducing the verification time from days to seconds while enclosing 99% of the variation samples.

analysis.tldr: 利用多项式 zonotopes 对模拟神经网络进行形式化验证，将验证时间从数天缩短到数秒。
analysis.research_motivation: 模拟神经网络功耗低、速度快，但受制造工艺偏差影响大，传统蒙特卡洛仿真耗时过长，亟需高效的形式化验证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且精确地验证模拟神经网络在工艺偏差下的行为偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模拟神经网络对工艺偏差高度敏感，导致实际性能与标称模型存在较大偏差。
analysis.method: 提出基于多项式的模型来近似神经元电路在工艺偏差下的性能，并利用多项式 zonotopes 进行可达性分析，实现形式化验证。
contributions: 提出一种多项式模型来模拟工艺偏差下模拟神经网络的行为。
将多项式 zonotopes 可达性分析应用于模拟神经网络的形式化验证，避免耗时的蒙特卡洛仿真。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同数据集上验证了全连接和卷积模拟神经网络，验证时间从数天降至数秒，且能覆盖99%的偏差样本。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的模拟神经元电路模型。
多项式模型的精度可能受限于电路复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且有效，但主题与主流机器学习方向关联较弱，适合形式化验证领域读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用多项式 zonotopes 对模拟神经网络进行形式化验证，将验证时间从数天缩短到数秒。

papers.title: Cavity-Enhanced Collective Quantum Processing with Polarization-Encoded Qubits
papers.abstract: We introduce a cavity-enhanced optical architecture for collective quantum processing in which logical qubits are encoded in the polarization subspace of recirculating intracavity modes. The physical carrier and computational degree of freedom are explicitly separated: harmonic cavity bundles provide a stable resonant substrate, while programmable polarization transformations implement single-qubit operations. A polarization-selective nonlinear interaction in the entanglement region generates tunable controlled-phase gates, enabling a universal gate set. A parameter-scaling analysis shows that order-unity conditional phases are attainable in centimeter-scale cavities using experimentally accessible solid-state nonlinear media, without requiring extreme nonlinear coefficients, millisecond photon lifetimes, or sub-hertz laser stabilization. The results indicate that resonant recirculation provides a physically plausible platform for cavity based collective quantum architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种腔增强集体量子处理架构，利用偏振编码量子比特和可编程偏振变换实现通用量子门集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有量子处理架构面临非线性系数要求高、光子寿命长、激光稳定度苛刻等挑战，需要更可行的物理平台。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种腔增强光学架构，在厘米尺度腔中利用可实现的固态非线性介质实现通用量子门操作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将逻辑量子比特编码在腔内循环模式的偏振子空间中，通过可编程偏振变换实现单量子比特操作，利用偏振选择性非线性相互作用产生可调谐受控相位门。

参数缩放分析表明在厘米尺度腔中可实现单位阶条件相位，无需极端非线性系数或毫秒光子寿命。

papers.title: Adaptive Context Matters: Towards Provable Multi-Modality Guidance for Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Super-resolution (SR) is a severely ill-posed problem with inherent ambiguity, as widely recognized in both empirical and theoretical studies. Although recent semantic-guided and multi-modal SR methods exploit large models or external priors to enhance semantic alignment, the fusion of heterogeneous modalities remains insufficiently understood in practice and theory. In this work, we provide the first theoretical modeling of multi-modal SR, revealing that prior methods are bottlenecked by sub-optimal modality utilization. Our analysis shows that the generalization risk bound can be improved by strengthening the alignment between modality weights and their effective contributions, while reducing representation complexity. This theoretical insight inspires us to propose the novel Multi-Modal Mixture-of-Experts Super-Resolution framework (M$^3$ESR) that employs generalization-oriented dynamic modality fusion for accurate risk control and modality contribution optimization. In detail, we propose a novel spatially dynamic modality weighting module and a temporally adaptive modality temperature scheduling mechanism, enabling flexible and adaptive spatial-temporal modality weighting for effective risk control. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our M$^3$ESR significantly boosts generalization and semantic consistency performances, which confirms our superiority.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个多模态超分辨率理论模型，并设计自适应动态模态融合框架M³ESR提升泛化性能。

papers.title: Automated Detection of Abnormalities in Zebrafish Development
papers.abstract: Zebrafish embryos are a valuable model for drug discovery due to their optical transparency and genetic similarity to humans. However, current evaluations rely on manual inspection, which is costly and labor-intensive. While machine learning offers automation potential, progress is limited by the lack of comprehensive datasets. To address this, we introduce a large-scale dataset of high-resolution microscopic image sequences capturing zebrafish embryonic development under both control conditions and exposure to compounds (3,4-dichloroaniline). This dataset, with expert annotations at fine-grained temporal levels, supports two benchmarking tasks: (1) fertility classification, assessing zebrafish egg viability (130,368 images), and (2) toxicity assessment, detecting malformations induced by toxic exposure over time (55,296 images). Alongside the dataset, we present the first transformer-based baseline model that integrates spatiotemporal features to predict developmental abnormalities at early stages. Experimental results present the model's effectiveness, achieving 98% accuracy in fertility classification and 92% in toxicity assessment. These findings underscore the potential of automated approaches to enhance zebrafish-based toxicity analysis.

papers.title: Automated high-frequency quantification of fish communities and biomass using computer vision
papers.abstract: Quantifying fish community structure is essential for understanding biodiversity and ecosystem responses in a changing environment, yet existing survey methods provide limited high-frequency, quantitative observations. Conventional approaches, including catch-based methods, underwater visual censuses, and environmental DNA metabarcoding, either require intensive labor or lack reliable estimates of abundance and biomass. Here, we develop an automated framework for quantifying fish communities from underwater video using computer vision. Using videos acquired with a custom-made stereo camera system, the framework integrates deep learning-based fish identification, multi-object tracking, and 3D reconstruction to estimate species-level abundance and biomass. We applied the approach to a reef fish community over a 20-day period with hourly daytime observations, revealing dynamic fluctuations in species richness, abundance, and biomass associated with changes in species composition. By comparing fish communities estimated from visual census and environmental DNA surveys, we demonstrate that our method provides complementary strengths for continuous, non-invasive, and quantitative monitoring of consistently observed species. This approach provides a scalable foundation for long-term monitoring and advances the capacity to resolve fine-scale temporal dynamics in fish communities.

papers.title: Can Agent Benchmarks Support Their Scores? Evidence-Supported Bounds for Interactive-Agent Evaluation
papers.abstract: Interactive agent benchmarks map an agent run to a binary outcome through outcome checks. When these checks rely on surface level signals or fail to capture the agent's actual action path, they cannot reliably determine whether the run succeeded. For example, a benchmark task may ask whether Alice's shipping address was changed, while the outcome check only verifies that the agent clicked "Save." This does not guarantee that the intended state change occurred, since the agent may have modified the wrong record. Treating such a run as successful therefore makes the reported score misleading. Benchmark quality thus depends not only on task design, but also on the reliability of outcome detection. We address this problem by introducing an outcome evidence reporting layer for existing benchmarks, without modifying their tasks, agents, or evaluators. The layer performs three functions. First, before scoring, it specifies which stored artifacts are required to verify the claimed outcome for each case. Second, it applies a locked checklist to each completed run and assigns one of three evidence labels: Evidence Pass, Evidence Fail, or Unknown. Third, it reports evidence supported score bounds that quantify uncertainty arising from Unknown cases. Rather than silently counting, discarding, or hiding uncertain cases inside a single aggregate success rate, the framework keeps them explicitly visible. We evaluate the outcome evidence layer on five public benchmarks: ANDROIDWORLD, AGENTDOJO, APPWORLD, tau3 bench retail, and MINIWOB. The resulting reports separate several empirically distinct failure modes.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种证据支持层，为交互式Agent基准测试提供更可靠的分数边界，揭示表面检查导致的评分偏差。

papers.title: Statistical Model Checking of the Keynes+Schumpeter Model: A Transient Sensitivity Analysis of a Macroeconomic ABM
papers.abstract: Agent-based models (ABMs) are increasingly used in macroeconomics, but their analysis still often relies on ad hoc Monte Carlo campaigns with heterogeneous statistical effort across parameter settings. We show how statistical model checking (SMC), implemented through MultiVeStA, can provide a principled analysis layer for a realistic macroeconomic ABM without rewriting the simulator in a dedicated formalism. Our case study is the heuristic-switching Keynes+Schumpeter(K+S) model, analysed hrough a transient sensitivity campaign over one-parameter sweeps, two macro observables (unemployment and GDP growth), and one auxiliary micro-level probe (market share) on the post-warmup phase of a 600-step horizon. The analysis is driven by reusable temporal queries, observable-specific precision targets, and confidence-based stopping rules that automatically determine the simulation effort required by each configuration. Results show a clear contrast across parameter families: macro-financial and structural sweeps produce the strongest transient effects, whereas several heuristic-rule sweeps remain much weaker under the same precision policy. More broadly, the paper shows that SMC can support reproducible and informative quantitative analysis of substantively rich economic ABMs, while making uncertainty estimates and simulation cost explicit parts of the reported results.

analysis.tldr: 将统计模型检查应用于宏观经济ABM，实现瞬态敏感性分析的自动化与可重复性。
analysis.research_motivation: 宏观经济ABM分析常依赖临时蒙特卡洛方法，统计努力因参数设置而异，缺乏系统性和可重复性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重写模拟器的情况下，为宏观经济ABM提供原则性的、自动化的瞬态敏感性分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同参数族对宏观可观测量的瞬态效应差异显著：宏观金融和结构参数扫描产生最强效应，而启发式规则参数扫描效应较弱。
analysis.method: 通过MultiVeStA实现统计模型检查，使用可重用时间查询、可观测特定精度目标和基于置信度的停止规则，自动确定每个配置所需的模拟努力。

通过瞬态敏感性分析揭示了不同参数族效应的显著差异，并提供了不确定性估计和模拟成本的显式报告。

papers.title: Uni-Synergy: Bridging Understanding and Generation for Personalized Reasoning via Co-operative Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (UMMs) excel in general tasks but struggle to bridge the gap between personalized understanding and generation. Prior works largely rely on implicit token-level alignment via supervised fine-tuning, which fails to fully capture the potential synergy between comprehension and creation. In this work, we propose Sync-R1, an end-to-end reinforcement learning framework that jointly optimizes personalized understanding and generation within a single, explicit reasoning loop. Through this unified feedback process, Sync-R1 enables personalized comprehension to guide content creation, while the resulting generation quality reciprocally refines understanding within an integrated reward landscape. To efficiently orchestrate this dual-task synergy, we introduce Sync-GRPO, a reinforcement learning method utilizing an ensemble reward system. Furthermore, we propose Dynamic Group Scaling (DGS), which adaptively filters low-potential trajectories to reduce gradient variance and accelerate convergence. To better reflect real-world complexity, we introduce UnifyBench++, featuring denser textual descriptions and richer user contexts. Experimental results demonstrate that Sync-R1 achieves state-of-the-art performance, showcasing superior cross-task reasoning and robust personalization without requiring complex cold-start procedures. The code and the UnifyBench++ dataset will be released at: https://github.com/arctanxarc/UniCTokens.

analysis.tldr: 提出Sync-R1框架，通过协同强化学习统一多模态模型的个性化理解与生成。

papers.title: StereoTales: A Multilingual Framework for Open-Ended Stereotype Discovery in LLMs
papers.abstract: Multilingual studies of social bias in open-ended LLM generation remain limited: most existing benchmarks are English-centric, template-based, or restricted to recognizing pre-specified stereotypes. We introduce StereoTales, a multilingual dataset and evaluation pipeline for systematically studying the emergence of social bias in open-ended LLM generation. The dataset covers 10 languages and 79 socio-demographic attributes, and comprises over 650k stories generated by 23 recent LLMs, each annotated with the socio-demographic profile of the protagonist across 19 dimensions. From these, we apply statistical tests to identify more than 1{,}500 over-represented associations, which we then rate for harmfulness through both a panel of humans (N = 247) and the same LLMs. We report three main findings. \textbf{(i)} Every model we evaluate emits consequential harmful stereotypes in open-ended generation, regardless of size or capabilities, and these associations are largely shared across providers rather than isolated misbehaviors. \textbf{(ii)} Prompt language strongly shapes which stereotypes appear: rather than transferring as a shared set of biases, harmful associations adapt culturally to the prompt language and amplify bias against locally salient protected groups. \textbf{(iii)} Human and LLM harmfulness judgments are broadly aligned (Spearman $ρ=0.62$), with disagreements concentrating on specific attribute classes rather than specific providers. To support further analyses, we release the evaluation code and the dataset, including model generations, attribute annotations, and harmfulness ratings.

analysis.tldr: 提出多语言框架StereoTales，系统发现LLM在开放式生成中普遍存在有害刻板印象，且随提示语言文化适应。
