papers.title: Filtering Memorization from Parameter-Space in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become a widely used mechanism for customizing diffusion models, enabling users to inject new visual concepts or styles through lightweight parameter updates. However, LoRAs can memorize training images, causing generated outputs to reproduce copyrighted or sensitive content. This risk is particularly concerning in LoRA-sharing ecosystems, where users distribute trained LoRAs without releasing the underlying training data. Existing approaches for mitigating memorization rely on access to the training pipeline, training data, or control over the inference process, making them difficult to apply when only the released LoRA weights are available. We propose \textbf{Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)}, a training-free and data-free framework for post-hoc memorization mitigation in diffusion LoRAs. BAF decomposes LoRA updates into spectral channels and measures their alignment with the principal subspace of the pretrained backbone. Channels strongly aligned with this subspace are retained as generalizable adaptations, while weakly aligned channels are suppressed as potential carriers of memorized content. Experiments on multiple datasets and diffusion backbones demonstrate that BAF consistently reduces memorization while preserving or even improving generation quality. Our code is available in the supplementary material.

analysis.tldr: 提出Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)，无需训练和数据即可过滤扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化参数。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA在扩散模型定制中广泛应用，但可能记忆训练图像，生成受版权保护或敏感内容，尤其在LoRA共享生态中风险突出。现有方法需访问训练流程、数据或控制推理过程，难以在仅有权重时应用。
analysis.problem: 在仅提供LoRA权重的情况下，如何后验地缓解扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LoRA更新可分解为谱通道，与预训练骨干主子空间对齐强的通道保留为泛化适应，弱对齐通道可能携带记忆内容。
analysis.method: BAF：将LoRA更新分解为谱通道，测量其与预训练骨干主子空间的对齐程度，保留强对齐通道，抑制弱对齐通道。
contributions: 提出BAF，一种无需训练和数据的后验记忆化缓解方法，仅需LoRA权重。
在多个数据集和扩散骨干上验证BAF能持续减少记忆化，同时保持或提升生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集和扩散骨干上进行实验，结果表明BAF能持续减少记忆化并保持或提升生成质量。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于LoRA的扩散模型，对其他微调方法或模型架构的泛化性未知。
谱分解和对齐计算可能引入额外计算开销，需评估效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，针对LoRA记忆化问题提出无需训练和数据的后验方案，实验验证有效，但摘要未提供详细数值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Base-Anchored Filtering (BAF)，无需训练和数据即可过滤扩散模型LoRA中的记忆化参数。

papers.title: Beyond Spatial Compression: Interface-Centric Generative States for Open-World 3D Structure
papers.abstract: Current 3D tokenizers largely treat representation as spatial compression: compact codes reconstruct surface geometry, but leave component ownership and attachment validity implicit. In open-world assets with intersecting components, noisy topology, and weak canonical structure, this creates a representation mismatch: local shape, component identity, and assembly relations become entangled in a latent stream and are not natively addressable during decoding. We formulate an alternative view, interface-centric generative states, in which tokenization constructs an operational state rather than a passive compressed code. The state exposes local geometry, component ownership, and attachment validity as variables that can be queried, constrained, and repaired during decoding. We instantiate this formulation with Component-Conditioned Canonical Local Tokens (C2LT-3D), factorizing representation into canonical local geometry, partition-conditioned context, and relational seam variables. Each factor targets a distinct failure mode of compression-centric tokens: pose leakage, cross-component interference, or invalid local attachment. This exposed state supports attachment validation, latent structural repair, targeted intervention, and constrained serialization without a separate post-hoc structure recovery module. Trained on single-object CAD models and evaluated zero-shot on open-world multi-component assets, C2LT-3D improves structural robustness and shows that its latent variables remain actionable under adversarial attachment settings. These results suggest that open-world 3D generative representations should be evaluated not only by reconstruction fidelity, but by whether their discrete states remain operational for assembly-level structural reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出接口中心生成状态视角，通过C2LT-3D分解表示以提升开放世界3D结构鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D分词器将表示视为空间压缩，在开放世界资产中组件归属和连接有效性隐式化，导致局部形状、组件身份和装配关系在潜在流中纠缠，解码时无法直接处理。
analysis.problem: 解决压缩中心分词器在开放世界3D结构中因表示不匹配导致的姿态泄露、跨组件干扰和无效局部连接等失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出压缩中心分词器在开放世界多组件资产中面临姿态泄露、跨组件干扰和无效局部连接等失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出组件条件规范局部分词器（C2LT-3D），将表示分解为规范局部几何、分区条件上下文和关系接缝变量，每个因子针对一种失败模式。
contributions: 提出接口中心生成状态视角，将分词构建为可查询、约束和修复的操作状态而非被动压缩码。
实例化C2LT-3D，通过分解表示支持连接验证、潜在结构修复、定向干预和约束序列化，无需后处理结构恢复模块。
analysis.experiments: 在单对象CAD模型上训练，零样本评估开放世界多组件资产，C2LT-3D提升了结构鲁棒性，潜在变量在对抗性连接设置下仍可操作。
limitations: 可能依赖CAD模型训练，对真实扫描数据泛化性未知。
零样本评估场景有限，未提及大规模多类别测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，技术深度足，但实验规模有限，影响和相关性中等，建议精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出接口中心生成状态视角，通过C2LT-3D分解表示以提升开放世界3D结构鲁棒性。

papers.title: WorldReasonBench: Human-Aligned Stress Testing of Video Generators as Future World-State Predictors
papers.abstract: Commercial video generation systems such as Seedance2.0 and Veo3.1 have rapidly improved, strengthening the view that video generators may be evolving into "world simulators." Yet the community still lacks a benchmark that directly tests whether a model can reason about how an observed world should evolve over time. We introduce WorldReasonBench, which reframes video generation evaluation as world-state prediction: given an initial state and an action, can a model generate a future video whose state evolution remains physically, socially, logically, and informationally consistent? WorldReasonBench contains 436 curated test cases with structured ground-truth QA annotations spanning four reasoning dimensions and 22 subcategories. We evaluate generated videos with a human-aligned two-part methodology: Process-aware Reasoning Verification uses structured QA and reasoning-phase diagnostics to detect temporal and causal failures, while Multi-dimensional Quality Assessment scores reasoning quality, temporal consistency, and visual aesthetics for ranking and reward modeling. We further introduce WorldRewardBench, a preference benchmark with approximately 6K expert-annotated pairs over 1.4K videos, supporting pair-wise and point-wise reward-model evaluation. Across modern video generators, our results expose a persistent gap between visual plausibility and world reasoning: videos can look convincing while failing dynamics, causality, or information preservation. We will release our benchmarks and evaluation toolkit to support community research on genuinely world-aware video generation at https://github.com/UniX-AI-Lab/WorldReasonBench/.

analysis.tldr: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，将视频生成评估重构为世界状态预测，发现视觉逼真度与世界推理能力之间存在显著差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成评估缺乏直接测试模型是否能够推理世界状态演化的基准，而视频生成器正被视为潜在的世界模拟器。
analysis.problem: 如何评估视频生成器作为未来世界状态预测器的推理能力，包括物理、社会、逻辑和信息一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现代视频生成器在视觉上可能令人信服，但在动态、因果关系或信息保持方面存在失败，即视觉逼真度与世界推理之间存在持续差距。
analysis.method: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，包含436个测试用例和结构化QA标注，覆盖四个推理维度；采用人类对齐的两部分评估方法：过程感知推理验证和多维质量评估。同时引入WorldRewardBench偏好基准。
contributions: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，将视频生成评估重构为世界状态预测任务。
引入人类对齐的两部分评估方法，包括过程感知推理验证和多维质量评估。
构建WorldRewardBench偏好基准，包含约6K专家标注对。
实验揭示视觉逼真度与世界推理能力之间的差距。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在现代视频生成器上进行了实验，暴露了视觉逼真度与世界推理之间的差距，但未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限（436个测试用例），可能无法覆盖所有世界推理场景。
评估方法依赖人工标注，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准直接针对视频生成作为世界模拟器的核心问题，方法创新且实验揭示重要差距，与视频生成方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WorldReasonBench基准，将视频生成评估重构为世界状态预测，发现视觉逼真度与世界推理能力之间存在显著差距。

papers.title: Real vs. Semi-Simulated: Rethinking Evaluation for Treatment Effect Estimation
papers.abstract: Estimating heterogeneous treatment effects with machine learning has attracted substantial attention in both academic research and industrial practice. However, the two communities often evaluate models under markedly different conditions. Methodological work typically relies on semi-simulated benchmarks and metrics that require counterfactual outcomes, whereas real-world applications rely on observable metrics based on ranking or test outcomes. Despite the well-known gap between methodological progress and practical deployment, the relationship between these evaluation regimes has not been examined systematically. We conduct a large-scale empirical study of treatment effect evaluation across standard semi-simulated benchmark families and real-world datasets. Our benchmark covers meta-learners paired with multiple base learners, as well as specialized causal machine learning models. We evaluate these methods using observable metrics common in application-oriented literature, alongside counterfactual metrics commonly used in methods papers. Our results reveal two complementary gaps. First, counterfactual metrics do not reliably recover the estimators preferred by observable metrics, even on the same semi-simulated benchmarks. Second, rankings obtained on semi-simulated benchmarks do not transfer to real datasets. We further find that simple meta-learners with strong base models are consistently competitive, in contrast to specialized causal models. Overall, our findings suggest that progress in treatment effect estimation research should not be assessed solely through counterfactual metrics and semi-simulated benchmarks, but it would benefit from incorporating observable metrics and real-data validation.

analysis.tldr: 大规模实证研究发现，基于反事实指标和半模拟基准的因果效应评估结果与真实场景下的可观测指标评估结果存在系统性差异，简单元学习器反而更具竞争力。
analysis.research_motivation: 方法论研究通常依赖半模拟基准和反事实指标，而实际应用则使用可观测指标，两者之间的评估差异尚未被系统研究，导致方法进步与实际部署之间存在鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 系统评估反事实指标与可观测指标在治疗效果估计模型评估中的一致性，以及半模拟基准与真实数据集上模型排名的可迁移性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了两个互补的评估鸿沟：1）即使在相同的半模拟基准上，反事实指标也无法可靠地复现可观测指标偏好的模型排序；2）半模拟基准上的模型排名无法迁移到真实数据集。此外，简单元学习器搭配强基模型始终具有竞争力，而专门的因果模型表现并不突出。
analysis.method: 大规模实证研究，覆盖标准半模拟基准家族和真实数据集，评估元学习器（搭配多种基学习器）和专用因果机器学习模型，同时使用可观测指标和反事实指标。
contributions: 首次系统揭示反事实指标与可观测指标在治疗效果估计评估中的不一致性。
发现半模拟基准上的模型排名无法迁移到真实数据集，并指出简单元学习器搭配强基模型是稳健的选择。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了大规模实证研究的设计，包括多种基准、模型和指标。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有类型的因果模型或真实应用场景。
可观测指标的选择可能影响结论的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 系统揭示了评估鸿沟，对因果推断领域的方法论有重要指导意义，但未提供具体实验结果。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 大规模实证研究发现，基于反事实指标和半模拟基准的因果效应评估结果与真实场景下的可观测指标评估结果存在系统性差异，简单元学习器反而更具竞争力。

papers.title: Physical probes expose and alleviate chemical-environment collapse in molecular representations
papers.abstract: Nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy provides an experimental readout of local chemical environments, but its use in molecular representation learning has been constrained by heterogeneous data and incomplete atom-level assignments. Here we construct complementary high-fidelity experimental and computational 13C NMR resources, which reveal a recurrent form of representational collapse: atoms that are equivalent in molecular topology can remain experimentally distinct in their real chemical environments, whereas explicit 3D descriptions are further limited by static conformations in dynamic regimes. To alleviate this bottleneck, we develop CLAIM (Contrastive Learning for Atom-to-molecule Inference of Molecular NMR), a framework that aligns efficient topological molecular inputs with atom-resolved NMR observables. Through hierarchical chemical priors and cross-level contrastive learning, CLAIM restores lost chemical resolution and markedly improves atom-level molecule-spectrum retrieval. CLAIM remains robust in flexible and tautomeric systems for 13C NMR prediction, improves stereoisomer discrimination without explicit 3D modelling, and transfers to broader molecular property tasks including ADMET prediction and fluorescence estimation. These results establish physically grounded spectral alignment as an effective strategy for alleviating chemical-environment collapse and for guiding experimentally grounded molecular representation learning.

analysis.tldr: 通过物理核磁共振信号对齐，缓解分子表征中的化学环境坍缩问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 核磁共振（NMR）能提供局部化学环境的实验读数，但异构数据和原子级分配不完整限制了其在分子表征学习中的应用。
analysis.problem: 分子表征中存在化学环境坍缩：拓扑等价的原子在真实化学环境中可能不同，而3D描述受限于静态构象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示了表征坍缩现象：拓扑等价的原子在实验NMR中可区分，但传统分子表示无法捕捉这种差异。
analysis.method: 提出CLAIM框架，通过对比学习将高效拓扑分子输入与原子分辨的NMR观测对齐，利用层次化学先验和跨层对比学习恢复化学分辨率。
contributions: 构建了互补的高保真实验和计算13C NMR资源，揭示了化学环境坍缩现象。
提出CLAIM框架，通过物理光谱对齐有效缓解坍缩，提升原子级分子-光谱检索性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖NMR数据的质量和覆盖范围。
在动态构象或复杂体系中的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，利用物理实验数据指导分子学习，但摘要实验细节不足，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过物理核磁共振信号对齐，缓解分子表征中的化学环境坍缩问题。

papers.title: CoWorld-VLA: Thinking in a Multi-Expert World Model for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising paradigm for end-to-end autonomous driving. However, existing reasoning mechanisms still struggle to provide planning-oriented intermediate representations: textual Chain-of-Thought (CoT) fails to preserve continuous spatiotemporal structure, while latent world reasoning remains difficult to use as a direct condition for action generation. In this paper, we propose CoWorld-VLA, a multi-expert world reasoning framework for autonomous driving, where world representations serve as explicit conditions to guide action planning. CoWorld-VLA extracts complementary world information through multi-source supervision and encodes it into expert tokens within the VLA, thereby providing planner-accessible conditioning signals. Specifically, we construct four types of tokens: semantic interaction, geometric structure, dynamic evolution, and ego trajectory tokens, which respectively model interaction intent, spatial structure, future temporal dynamics, and behavioral goals. During action generation, CoWorld-VLA employs a diffusion-based hierarchical multi-expert fusion planner, which is coupled with scene context throughout the joint denoising process to generate continuous ego trajectories. Experiments show that CoWorld-VLA achieves competitive results in both future scene generation and planning on the NAVSIM v1 benchmark, demonstrating strong performance in collision avoidance and trajectory accuracy. Ablation studies further validate the complementarity of expert tokens and their effectiveness as planning conditions for action generation. Code will be available at https://github.com/potatochip1211/CoWorld-VLA.

analysis.tldr: CoWorld-VLA 提出多专家世界推理框架，用四种专家 token 作为显式条件指导自动驾驶动作生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLA 模型在端到端自动驾驶中缺乏面向规划的中间表示：文本 CoT 无法保留连续时空结构，隐式世界推理难以直接作为动作生成的条件。
analysis.problem: 如何设计可解释、可条件化的世界表示来显式引导自动驾驶动作规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建四种专家 token（语义交互、几何结构、动态演化、自车轨迹），通过多源监督提取互补世界信息，并采用扩散层次多专家融合规划器在联合去噪过程中耦合场景上下文生成连续自车轨迹。
contributions: 提出多专家世界推理框架 CoWorld-VLA，将世界表示作为显式条件指导动作规划。
设计四种专家 token 分别建模交互意图、空间结构、未来时序动态和行为目标。
提出扩散层次多专家融合规划器，在联合去噪中耦合场景上下文生成轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在 NAVSIM v1 基准上，CoWorld-VLA 在场景生成和规划任务上取得有竞争力的结果，在碰撞避免和轨迹精度上表现强；消融实验验证了专家 token 的互补性和作为规划条件的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖多源监督数据的质量与标注成本。
扩散规划器的实时性在真实部署中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，与自动驾驶规划方向高度相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoWorld-VLA 提出多专家世界推理框架，用四种专家 token 作为显式条件指导自动驾驶动作生成。

papers.title: Toward an Engineering of Science: Rebalancing Generation and Verification in the Age of AI
papers.abstract: AI systems can now cheaply generate plausible scientific artifacts such as papers, reviews, and surveys. This creates a risk of \emph{epistemic pollution} in our scientific systems, where unreliable but plausible-looking artifacts can accumulate faster than the system can filter them out. The problem is structural: the epistemic infrastructure of science was calibrated to a world where producing a plausible artifact required substantial expertise, labor, and time, so generation cost itself served as a rough filter; AI weakens that filter without comparably lowering verification cost. We argue that \textbf{AI-era science should treat this as an engineering problem: redesigning epistemic infrastructure to rebalance the costs of generation and verification}. The current paper-centered system makes verification expensive: papers compress long-context scientific logic into prose, forcing reviewers, human or AI, to reconstruct underlying argument structure before they can evaluate it. As one step in this direction, we propose \textbf{blueprints} as preliminary epistemic infrastructure: structured, decomposed research artifacts that represent claims, evidence, assumptions, and definitions as typed graph components. Blueprints are designed to trade an upfront generation cost for cheaper, more local, more distributed verification downstream. We have instantiated the proposal in a proof-of-concept prototype.

analysis.tldr: 提出通过结构化蓝图重新平衡AI时代科学产出的生成与验证成本，以应对认知污染。
analysis.research_motivation: AI可廉价生成看似可信的科学产物（论文、评审等），导致认知污染——不可靠但看似合理的产物积累速度快于系统过滤速度。传统科学基础设施依赖生成成本作为粗略过滤器，AI削弱了这一过滤器而未相应降低验证成本。
analysis.problem: 如何重新设计科学认识论基础设施，以在AI时代平衡生成与验证的成本，防止认知污染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成科学产物的成本大幅降低，但验证成本未同步下降，导致系统过滤能力不足。
analysis.method: 提出蓝图（blueprints）作为初步认识论基础设施：将研究产物分解为结构化的图组件（声明、证据、假设、定义），以增加前期生成成本换取更廉价、更局部、更分布式的验证。
contributions: 识别AI时代科学中的认知污染问题，并将其重构为工程问题——重新平衡生成与验证成本。
提出蓝图概念作为结构化研究产物的基础设施，并给出概念验证原型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 蓝图的具体实现和有效性尚未经过大规模实证验证。
可能面临社区采纳和标准化挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 问题新颖且重要，但方法尚处概念阶段，缺乏实验验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通过结构化蓝图重新平衡AI时代科学产出的生成与验证成本，以应对认知污染。

papers.title: Can Language Models Analyze Data? Evaluating Large Language Models for Question Answering over Datasets
papers.abstract: This paper investigates the effectiveness of large language models (LLMs) in answering questions over datasets. We examine their performance in two scenarios: (a) directly answering questions given a dataset file as input, and (b) generating SQL queries to answer questions given the schema of a relational database. We also evaluate the impact of different prompting strategies on model performance. The study includes both state-of-the-art LLMs and smaller language models that require fewer resources and operate at lower computational and financial cost. Experiments are conducted on two datasets containing questions of varying difficulty. The results demonstrate the strong performance of large LLMs, while highlighting the limitations of smaller, more cost-efficient models. These findings contribute to a better understanding of how LLMs can be utilized in data analytics tasks and their associated limitations.

analysis.tldr: 评估大语言模型在数据集问答任务中的表现，发现大模型性能强但小模型存在局限。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据分析和问答是LLM的重要应用场景，但不同规模和提示策略下的性能差异尚不明确，需要系统评估以指导实际应用。

papers.title: Progressive Photorealistic Simplification
papers.abstract: Existing image simplification techniques often rely on Non-Photorealistic Rendering (NPR), transforming photographs into stylized sketches, cartoons, or paintings. While effective at reducing visual complexity, such approaches typically sacrifice photographic realism. In this work, we explore a complementary direction: simplifying images while preserving their photorealistic appearance. We introduce progressive semantic image simplification, a framework that iteratively reduces scene complexity by removing and inpainting elements in a controlled manner. At each step, the resulting image remains a plausible natural photograph. Our method combines semantic understanding with generative editing, leveraging Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to identify and prioritize elements for removal, and a learned verifier to ensure photorealism and coherence throughout the process. This is implemented via an iterative Select-Remove-Verify pipeline that produces high-quality simplification trajectories. To improve efficiency, we further distill this process into an image-to-video generation model that directly predicts coherent simplification sequences from a single input image. Beyond generating cleaner and more focused compositions, our approach enables applications such as content-aware decluttering, semantic layer decomposition, and interactive editing. More broadly, our work suggests that simplification through structured content removal can serve as a practical mechanism for guiding visual interpretation within the photorealistic domain, complementing traditional abstraction methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式语义图像简化框架，在保持照片真实感的同时逐步移除场景元素。

papers.title: Position: Life-Logging Video Streams Make the Privacy-Utility Trade-off Inevitable
papers.abstract: With the growing prevalence of always-on hardware such as smart glasses, body cameras, and home security systems, life-logging visual sensing is becoming inevitable, forming the backbone of persistent, always-on AI systems. Meanwhile, recent advances in proactive agents and world models signal a fundamental shift from episodic, prompt-driven tools to next-generation AI systems that continuously perceive and react to the physical world. Although life-logging video streams can substantially improve utility of these promising systems, they also introduce significant privacy risks by revealing sensitive information, such as behavioral patterns, emotional states, and social interactions, beyond what isolated images expose. If unresolved, these risks may undermine public trust and hinder the sustainable development of always-on AI technologies. Existing privacy protections are either attack-specific or incur substantial utility loss, and fail to consider the entire data exploitation pipeline. We therefore posit that the privacy-utility trade-off in life-logging video streams is a foundational challenge for next-generation AI systems that demands further investigation. We call for novel pipeline-aware privacy-preserving designs that jointly optimize utility and privacy for long-horizon life-logging visual data. In parallel, formal privacy leakage metrics and standardized benchmarks remain important open directions for future research.

papers.title: Every finite group admits a just finite presentation
papers.abstract: A finite presentation < X | R > of a finite group is called `just finite' if removing any relation from R results in a presentation for an infinite group. It has been an open question (Kourovka Notebook, Problem 21.10) whether every finite group admits such a presentation. We resolve this conjecture in the affirmative.

analysis.tldr: 证明了每个有限群都存在一个“恰好有限”的表示。

papers.title: LLM4Branch: Large Language Model for Discovering Efficient Branching Policies of Integer Programs
papers.abstract: Efficient branching policies are essential for accelerating Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) solvers. Their design has long relied on hand-crafted heuristics, and now machine learning has emerged as a promising paradigm to automate this process. However, existing learning-based methods are often hindered by their dependence on expensive expert demonstrations and the gap between training objectives and the solver's end-to-end performance. In this work, we propose LLM4Branch, a novel framework that leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to automate the discovery of efficient branching policies. Specifically, the discovered policy is an executable program with a program skeleton generated by the LLM and a parameter vector, which is optimized via a zeroth-order method over a few instances with their end-to-end performance feedback. Extensive experiments on standard MILP benchmarks demonstrate that LLM4Branch establishes a new state-of-the-art among CPU-based methods and achieves performance competitive with advanced GPU-based models. Codes are available at https://github.com/hzn18/LLM4Branch.

analysis.tldr: 利用LLM自动发现高效MILP分支策略，通过程序骨架和零阶优化实现SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: MILP求解器的分支策略长期依赖手工启发式，现有学习方法依赖昂贵专家演示且训练目标与求解器端到端性能存在差距。
analysis.problem: 自动发现高效的MILP分支策略，以加速求解器性能。

papers.title: AnomalyClaw: A Universal Visual Anomaly Detection Agent via Tool-Grounded Refutation
papers.abstract: Visual anomaly detection (VAD) is crucial in many real-world fields, such as industrial inspection, medical imaging, infrastructure monitoring, and remote sensing. However, the specific anomaly definitions, data modalities, and annotation standards across different domains make it difficult to transfer single-domain trained VAD models. Vision-language models (VLMs), pre-trained on large-scale cross-domain data, can perform visual perception under task instructions, offering a promising solution for cross-domain VAD. However, single-inference VLM judgments are unreliable, since they rely more on prior knowledge than on normal-sample references or fine-grained feature evidence. We therefore present AnomalyClaw, a training-free VAD agent that turns anomaly judgment into a multi-round refutation process. In each round, the agent proposes candidate anomalies and refutes each against normal-sample references, drawing on a 13-tool library for visual verification, reference parsing, and frozen expert probing. On the CrossDomainVAD-12 benchmark (12 datasets), AnomalyClaw achieves consistent macro-AUROC improvements over single-step direct inference with +6.23 pp on GPT-5.5, +7.93 pp on Seed2.0-lite, and +3.52 pp on Qwen3.5-VL-27B. We further introduce an optional verbalized self-evolution extension. It builds an online rulebook from internal-branch disagreement without oracle labels. On Qwen3.5-VL-27B, it delivers a +2.09 pp mean gain, comparable to a K = 10 oracle-label supervised baseline (+1.99 pp). These results show that agentic refutation improve anomaly understanding and reasoning of VLMs, rather than merely aggregating tool outputs.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种无需训练的VAD智能体，通过多轮反驳机制提升VLM跨域异常检测的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉异常检测在工业、医疗、遥感等众多领域至关重要，但不同领域的异常定义、数据模态和标注标准差异巨大，导致单领域训练的模型难以迁移。VLM虽能跨域感知，但单次推理的VLM判断不可靠，更依赖先验知识而非正常样本参考或细粒度特征证据。
analysis.problem: 解决VLM在跨域视觉异常检测中单次推理不可靠的问题，即如何利用正常样本参考和细粒度证据进行多轮验证以提升判断准确性。

analysis.method: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种无需训练的VAD智能体，将异常判断转化为多轮反驳过程。每轮中，智能体提出候选异常并针对正常样本参考进行反驳，利用13个工具库进行视觉验证、参考解析和冻结专家探测。
contributions: 提出AnomalyClaw，一种基于工具化反驳的通用视觉异常检测智能体，无需训练即可跨域应用。
在CrossDomainVAD-12基准上，相比单步直接推理，在多个VLM上取得显著AUROC提升（GPT-5.5 +6.23pp, Seed2.0-lite +7.93pp, Qwen3.5-VL-27B +3.52pp）。
引入可选的言语化自我进化扩展，通过内部分支分歧构建在线规则库，无需真实标签即可提升性能（Qwen3.5-VL-27B +2.09pp），与有监督基线相当。

papers.title: Sens-VisualNews: A Benchmark Dataset for Sensational Image Detection
papers.abstract: The detection of sensational content in media items can be a critical filtering mechanism for identifying check-worthy content and flagging potential disinformation, since such content triggers physiological arousal that often bypasses critical evaluation and accelerates viral sharing. In this paper we introduce the task of sensational image detection, which aims to determine whether an image contains shocking, provocative, or emotionally charged features to grab attention and trigger strong emotional responses. To support research on this task, we create a new benchmark dataset (called Sens-VisualNews) that contains 9,576 images from news items, annotated based on the (in-)existence of various sensational concepts and events in their visual content. Finally, using Sens-VisualNews, we study the prompt sensitivity, performance and robustness of a wide range of open SotA Multimodal LLMs, across both zero-shot and fine-tuned settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出轰动性图像检测任务并构建 Sens-VisualNews 基准数据集，评估多模态大模型在零样本和微调下的表现。

papers.title: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium Technical Report
papers.abstract: We introduce Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium, a 123B-parameter natively multimodal and multilingual foundation model, adapted to regional languages and the Singapore context. Developed as a sovereign AI asset, it demonstrates that deep domain adaptation can be achieved with minimal degradation to broad-spectrum intelligence and alignment. Continued pretraining was performed on Mistral Medium 3.1 using a localized 1-trillion tokens multimodal corpus, followed by a 250-billion tokens long-context extension phase. Subsequent post-training incorporated a novel human-annotated Singapore multimodal dataset and curated textual corpus on Singapore culture, knowledge, and legislation, totaling 22-billion tokens. An additional 5 billion tokens of model alignment was performed through Online Direct Preference Optimization. Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium achieves state-of-the-art performance for its size on Singapore multimodal, legal, and government policy benchmarks while remaining globally competitive on general multimodal intelligence, multilingual, and STEM benchmarks. We also introduce a novel evaluation suite encompassing localized knowledge benchmarks and an institutionally aligned model behavior and safety framework. We report the data curation principles, training methodology, and highlight benchmark and inference performance.

analysis.tldr: Phoenix-VL 1.5 Medium 是一个123B参数的多模态多语言基础模型，通过本地化语料和偏好优化，在保持通用能力的同时，在新加坡多模态、法律和政策基准上达到SOTA。

analysis.method: 基于Mistral Medium 3.1进行持续预训练（1万亿token多模态语料），接着2500亿token长上下文扩展，然后使用22亿token的新加坡多模态和文本语料进行后训练，最后通过在线直接偏好优化（Online DPO）进行50亿token的对齐。

papers.title: Temporal Sampling Frequency Matters: A Capacity-Aware Study of End-to-End Driving Trajectory Prediction
papers.abstract: End to end (E2E) autonomous driving trajectory prediction is often trained with camera frames sampled at the highest available temporal frequency, assuming that denser sampling improves performance. We question this assumption by treating temporal sampling frequency as an explicit training set design variable. Starting from high frequency E2E driving datasets, we construct frequency sweep training sets by temporally subsampling camera frames along each trajectory. For each model dataset pair, we train and evaluate the same model under a fixed protocol, so the frequency response reflects how prediction performance changes with sampling frequency. We analyze this response from a capacity aware perspective. Sparse sampling may miss driving relevant cues, while dense sampling may add redundant visual content and off manifold noise. For finite capacity models, this can create a driving irrelevant capacity burden. We evaluate three smaller E2E models and a larger VLA style AutoVLA model on Waymo, nuScenes, and PAVE. Results show model and dataset dependent frequency responses. Smaller E2E models often show non monotonic or near plateau trends and achieve their best 3 second ADE at lower or intermediate frequencies. In contrast, AutoVLA achieves its best 3 second ADE and FDE at the highest evaluated frequency on all three datasets. Iteration matched controls suggest that the advantage of lower or intermediate frequencies for smaller models is not explained only by unequal training update counts. These findings show that temporal sampling frequency should be reported and tuned, rather than fixed to the highest available value.

analysis.tldr: 端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测中，时间采样频率并非越高越好，模型容量与频率存在最优匹配。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测通常使用最高时间频率的相机帧，但高密度采样可能引入冗余和噪声，对有限容量模型造成负担，而低频率可能丢失关键线索，因此需要系统研究采样频率的影响。
analysis.problem: 探究时间采样频率作为训练集设计变量对端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测性能的影响，并分析其与模型容量的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 较小模型在较低或中间频率达到最佳性能，而大模型（AutoVLA）在最高频率表现最佳；频率响应呈非单调或近平台趋势，且迭代匹配控制表明优势不完全由训练步数差异解释。
analysis.method: 通过时间下采样构建频率扫描训练集，在固定协议下训练和评估同一模型，从容量感知角度分析频率响应。
contributions: 将时间采样频率作为显式训练集设计变量，系统研究其对端到端轨迹预测的影响。
发现模型容量与最优采样频率相关：小模型偏好低/中频，大模型偏好高频。
提出应报告和调整采样频率，而非固定为最高值。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo、nuScenes和PAVE三个数据集上评估了三个较小E2E模型和一个大VLA模型（AutoVLA），报告了3秒ADE和FDE指标。
limitations: 仅针对轨迹预测任务，未涉及其他驾驶模块（如检测、规划）。
未深入分析频率对计算效率的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，实验充分，对自动驾驶训练实践有指导意义，但任务较专。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 端到端自动驾驶轨迹预测中，时间采样频率并非越高越好，模型容量与频率存在最优匹配。

papers.title: GuardAD: Safeguarding Autonomous Driving MLLMs via Markovian Safety Logic
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) are increasingly integrated into autonomous driving (AD) systems; however, they remain vulnerable to diverse safety threats, particularly in accident-prone scenarios. Recent safeguard mechanisms have shown promise by incorporating logical constraints, yet most rely on static formulations that lack temporally grounded safety reasoning over evolving traffic interactions, resulting in limited robustness in dynamic driving environments. To address these limitations, we propose GuardAD, a model-agnostic safeguard that formulates AD safety as an evolving Markovian logical state. GuardAD introduces Neuro-Symbolic Logic Formalization, which represents safety predicates over heterogeneous traffic participants and continuously induces them via n-th order Markovian Logic Induction. This design enables the inference of emerging and latent hazards beyond single-step observations. Rather than simply vetoing unsafe actions, GuardAD performs Logic-Driven Action Revision, where inferred safety states actively guide action refinement without modifying the underlying MLLM. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks and AD-MLLMs demonstrate that GuardAD substantially reduces accident rates (-32.07%) while slightly improving task performance (+6.85%). Moreover, closed-loop simulation evaluations, together with physical-world vehicle studies, further validate the effectiveness and potential of GuardAD.

analysis.tldr: GuardAD 通过马尔可夫逻辑状态推理，为自动驾驶多模态大模型提供动态安全防护，显著降低事故率。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶 MLLM 面临多种安全威胁，现有防护机制缺乏对动态交通交互的时序安全推理，鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何为自动驾驶 MLLM 设计一种能随时间演化、推理潜在危险的安全防护机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有安全防护依赖静态逻辑约束，无法处理动态驾驶环境中不断变化的交通交互，导致鲁棒性有限。
analysis.method: 提出 GuardAD，包含神经符号逻辑形式化（将安全谓词表示为马尔可夫逻辑状态）和逻辑驱动动作修正（根据推理出的安全状态引导动作优化）。
contributions: 提出一种模型无关的防护框架，将自动驾驶安全建模为演化的马尔可夫逻辑状态。
引入 n 阶马尔可夫逻辑归纳，实现超越单步观测的潜在危险推理。
通过逻辑驱动动作修正，在不修改底层 MLLM 的情况下提升安全性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和 AD-MLLM 上，事故率降低 32.07%，任务性能提升 6.85%；闭环仿真和实车实验验证了有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的安全谓词定义。
马尔可夫阶数选择可能影响推理效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与 VLM/MLLM 安全方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GuardAD 通过马尔可夫逻辑状态推理，为自动驾驶多模态大模型提供动态安全防护，显著降低事故率。

papers.title: Agentic Performance at the Edge: Insights from Benchmarking
papers.abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence (AI) is a natural fit for Internet of Things (IoT) and edge systems, but edge deployments are often constrained to models around 8 billion parameters or smaller. An important question is: How much agentic-task quality is lost when model size is constrained by memory, power, and latency budgets? To address this question, in this paper, we provide an initial empirical study considering edge-focused model scaling, general-purpose versus coder-oriented model effects, and tool-enabled execution under a fixed protocol. We introduce a domain-conditioned evaluation methodology, an implementation-grounded analysis of model-tool interactions, practical guidance for model selection under constraints, and an analysis of failure modes that reveals distinct semantic versus execution failure patterns across model families. Our core finding is that edge-agent quality is not a simple function of parameter count. Robust deployment depends on the joint design of model choice and tool workflow. Domain-conditioned analysis reveals Pareto fronts in the accuracy-latency space that can guide strategy selection based on operational priorities.

analysis.tldr: 边缘设备上的智能体性能并非仅由参数量决定，模型选择与工具流程的联合设计至关重要。
analysis.research_motivation: 物联网和边缘系统受限于内存、功耗和延迟，通常只能部署约8B参数以下的模型，但缺乏对模型规模压缩后智能体任务质量损失的量化研究。
analysis.problem: 在边缘部署约束下，如何评估和选择模型以最大化智能体任务性能？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出领域条件评估方法，通过固定协议下的工具执行实验，分析边缘模型缩放、通用型与编码型模型差异及模型-工具交互。
contributions: 提出领域条件评估方法用于边缘智能体基准测试
提供模型-工具交互的实现级分析
给出约束下模型选择的实用指南
揭示不同模型家族中语义失败与执行失败的差异模式
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于初始实证研究，可能缺乏大规模验证
未覆盖所有边缘硬件和模型类型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对边缘智能体评估提出新方法论，但摘要实验细节不足，贡献偏初步。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 边缘设备上的智能体性能并非仅由参数量决定，模型选择与工具流程的联合设计至关重要。

papers.title: Agent-X: Full Pipeline Acceleration of On-device AI Agents
papers.abstract: LLM-based agents deliver state-of-the-art performance across tasks but incur high end-to-end latency on edge devices. We introduce Agent-X, a software-only, accuracy-preserving framework that accelerates both the prefill and decode stages of on-device agent workloads. Agent-X's two key components rewrite prompts to leverage prefix caching tailored to agent-specific input-token patterns and enable LLM-free speculative decoding for fast token generation with minimal overhead. On representative agentic workloads, Agent-X achieves a 1.61x end-to-end speedup in real systems with no accuracy loss and can be seamlessly integrated into existing on-device AI agents. To the best of our knowledge, ours is the first to systematically characterize and eliminate latency bottlenecks in on-device agents.

analysis.tldr: Agent-X 通过提示重写和免 LLM 推测解码，实现端到端 1.61 倍加速且无精度损失。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于 LLM 的智能体在边缘设备上端到端延迟高，影响实际部署体验。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失精度的前提下，加速边缘设备上 LLM 智能体的预填充和解码阶段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Agent-X 框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 重写提示以利用前缀缓存，适配智能体特有的输入令牌模式；2) 免 LLM 推测解码，实现快速令牌生成。
contributions: 首个系统性地刻画并消除边缘设备上智能体延迟瓶颈的工作。
提出软件仅、保精度的加速框架，实现 1.61 倍端到端加速。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性智能体工作负载上，Agent-X 实现 1.61 倍端到端加速且无精度损失。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的智能体工作负载。
免 LLM 推测解码的通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对边缘设备 LLM 智能体延迟问题提出系统级加速方案，实验显示显著加速且无精度损失，但方法细节和泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Agent-X 通过提示重写和免 LLM 推测解码，实现端到端 1.61 倍加速且无精度损失。

papers.title: SleepWalk: A Three-Tier Benchmark for Stress-Testing Instruction-Guided Vision-Language Navigation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have advanced rapidly in multimodal perception and language understanding, yet it remains unclear whether they can reliably ground language into spatially coherent, plausibly executable actions in 3D digital environments. We introduce SleepWalk, a benchmark for evaluating instruction-grounded trajectory prediction in single-scene 3D worlds generated from textual scene descriptions and filtered for navigability. Unlike prior navigation benchmarks centered on long-range exploration across rooms, SleepWalk targets localized, interaction-centric embodied reasoning: given rendered visual observations and a natural-language instruction, a model must predict a trajectory that respects scene geometry, avoids collisions, and terminates at an action-compatible location. The benchmark covers diverse indoor and outdoor environments and organizes tasks into three tiers of spatial and temporal difficulty, enabling fine-grained analysis of grounding under increasing compositional complexity. Using a standardized pointwise judge-based evaluation protocol, we evaluate three frontier VLMs on 2,472 curated 3D environments with nine instructions per scene. Results reveal systematic failures in grounded spatial reasoning, especially under occlusion, interaction constraints, and multi-step instructions: performance drops as the difficulty level of the tasks increase. In general, current VLMs can somewhat produce trajectories that are simultaneously spatially coherent, plausibly executable, and aligned with intended actions. By exposing failures in a controlled yet scalable setting, SleepWalk provides a critical benchmark for advancing grounded multimodal reasoning, embodied planning, vision-language navigation, and action-capable agents in 3D environments.

analysis.tldr: SleepWalk 是一个三层次基准，用于压力测试指令引导的视觉-语言导航中 VLMs 的接地空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLMs 在 3D 环境中能否可靠地将语言接地到空间连贯、可执行的行动仍不清楚，而现有导航基准多关注跨房间长程探索，缺乏对局部、交互中心的具体推理评估。
analysis.problem: 评估 VLMs 在单场景 3D 世界中根据自然语言指令预测轨迹时，是否尊重场景几何、避免碰撞并终止于可交互位置。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示系统性的接地空间推理失败，尤其在遮挡、交互约束和多步指令下，性能随任务难度增加而下降。
analysis.method: 构建 SleepWalk 基准，包含从文本场景描述生成并过滤可导航性的 3D 环境，组织为三个难度层级，采用标准化逐点评分协议评估轨迹。
contributions: 提出 SleepWalk 基准，覆盖多样室内外环境，包含三个空间和时间难度层级。
在 2,472 个 3D 环境上评估三个前沿 VLM，揭示其在接地空间推理中的系统性失败。
analysis.experiments: 在 2,472 个 3D 环境上，每个场景 9 条指令，评估三个前沿 VLM，使用标准化逐点评分协议。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖单场景，未涉及多房间或动态环境。
评估依赖点状评分，可能无法完全捕捉轨迹的语义合理性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，针对 VLM 接地推理的痛点，实验规模大，但方法为基准构建而非新模型，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SleepWalk 是一个三层次基准，用于压力测试指令引导的视觉-语言导航中 VLMs 的接地空间推理能力。

papers.title: Halo Separation-guided Underwater Multi-scale Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Underwater images captured by Autonomous Underwater Vehicles (AUVs) are inevitably affected by artificial light sources, which often produce halos in the foreground of the camera and seriously interfere with the quality of the image. The existing underwater image enhancement methods fail to fully consider this key problem, and the robustness of processing images under artificial light scenes is poor. In practical applications, since underwater image enhancement itself is a very challenging task, the influence of artificial light sources will lead to serious degradation of image performance and affect subsequent vision tasks. In order to effectively deal with this problem, this paper designs a single halo image correction method based on an iterative structure. The network is mainly divided into two sub-networks, one is the halo layer separation sub-network which aims to separate the halo by gradient minimization, and the other is the multi-scale recovery sub-network which aims to recover the image information masked by halo. The UIEB and EUVP synthetic datasets are used for training to ensure that the network can fully learn the characteristics and laws of underwater halo images. Then a large number of halo images taken in an underwater environment with real artificial light are collected for testing. In addition, the brightness distribution characteristics of underwater halo images are analyzed and the radial gradient is introduced to constraint eliminate halo to improve the effect of underwater image restoration.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于迭代结构的单张水下图像去光晕方法，通过光晕层分离和多尺度恢复子网络实现。
analysis.research_motivation: 水下自主航行器（AUV）拍摄的图像常受人工光源影响产生光晕，严重干扰图像质量，而现有水下图像增强方法未充分考虑此问题，鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何有效去除水下图像中由人工光源引起的光晕，恢复被光晕遮挡的图像信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人工光源会在相机前景产生光晕，导致图像性能严重下降，影响后续视觉任务。
analysis.method: 设计一个基于迭代结构的单张光晕图像校正方法，包含两个子网络：光晕层分离子网络（通过梯度最小化分离光晕）和多尺度恢复子网络（恢复被光晕遮挡的图像信息）。引入径向梯度约束以消除光晕。
contributions: 提出一种针对水下人工光源光晕的迭代校正网络，包含光晕分离和多尺度恢复子网络。
引入径向梯度约束以改善水下图像恢复效果。
analysis.experiments: 使用UIEB和EUVP合成数据集训练，并在真实人工光源水下环境中采集的大量光晕图像上测试。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂光晕场景的泛化能力有限
依赖合成数据集训练，真实场景适应性需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法针对特定水下光晕问题有创新，但实验信息不足，应用范围较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于迭代结构的单张水下图像去光晕方法，通过光晕层分离和多尺度恢复子网络实现。

papers.title: Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects: From Passive Assertions to Active Knowledge
papers.abstract: Scientific knowledge on the Web is published as passive assertions and cannot decide when to validate evidence, reconcile contradictions, or update confidence as findings accumulate. Curation depends on centralised middleware and institutional continuity, but when registries close, active stewardship stops even when data remain online. We advance the concept of Autonomous FAIR Digital Objects (aFDOs) from an abstract idea to an operational model, to offer a route from passive scientific publication toward accountable, standards-aligned automation that can outlive its publishing institutions. aFDO augments FDOs with three capabilities anchored in Semantic Web standards, namely 1) a policy layer over RDF-star aligned with PROV-O, SHACL, and ODRL for portable condition-action rules, 2) an announcement layer over ActivityStreams 2.0 that bounds per-announcement evaluation cost, and 3) an agreement layer that resolves multi-source contradictions through reputation and confidence weighted agreement under a bounded adversarial model. We provide a formal definition that distinguishes policy specifications, event handlers, and communication interfaces. We evaluate an open reference implementation on 4,305 FDOs grounded in rare-disease ontologies, namely ClinVar, HPO, and Orphanet, combined with controlled synthetic observations. The consensus mechanism resolves 56.3% of 3,914 naturally occurring ClinVar conflicts where multiple submitters disagree and an expert panel has subsequently adjudicated. Under Sybil, collusion, and poisoning attacks, the mechanism degrades gracefully within its design Byzantine-tolerance bound (f < n/5), and fails as predicted beyond that bound.

analysis.tldr: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO）概念，使科学知识从被动断言转向主动知识管理，并在罕见病本体上验证了共识机制的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前Web上的科学知识以被动断言形式发布，无法自主验证证据、协调矛盾或更新置信度；依赖集中式中间件和机构持续性，一旦注册中心关闭，即使数据在线，主动管理也会停止。
analysis.problem: 如何使科学出版物从被动断言转变为能够自主执行条件-动作规则、协调多源矛盾并适应机构存续性变化的主动知识系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO），在FDO基础上增加三层能力：基于RDF-star的策略层（PROV-O、SHACL、ODRL）、基于ActivityStreams 2.0的公告层、以及基于声誉和置信度加权的协议层，用于在有限对抗模型下解决多源矛盾。
contributions: 将自治FAIR数字对象从抽象概念推进到可操作模型，提供正式定义区分策略规范、事件处理器和通信接口。
在罕见病本体（ClinVar、HPO、Orphanet）上实现开源参考实现，共识机制解决了56.3%的ClinVar自然冲突，并在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下优雅降级。
analysis.experiments: 在4305个FDO上评估，基于罕见病本体和受控合成观测；共识机制解决3914个ClinVar自然冲突中的56.3%；在Sybil、合谋和投毒攻击下，在拜占庭容错界限内优雅降级，超出后失败。
limitations: 共识机制仅在罕见病领域验证，泛化性未知。
拜占庭容错界限（f < n/5）可能在某些实际场景中过于严格。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法新颖但应用领域较窄，与机器学习核心方向关联较弱，适合保存以备后续参考。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自治FAIR数字对象（aFDO）概念，使科学知识从被动断言转向主动知识管理，并在罕见病本体上验证了共识机制的有效性。

papers.title: EGL-SCA: Structural Credit Assignment for Co-Evolving Instructions and Tools in Graph Reasoning Agents
papers.abstract: Graph reasoning agents operating from natural-language inputs must solve a coupled problem: they must reconstruct a structured graph instance from text, decide whether existing computational assets are sufficient, interact with tools under a strict execution protocol, and satisfy an external verifier that checks structured correctness rather than textual plausibility. Existing approaches usually improve either the instruction side or the tool side in isolation, which leaves unclear what should be updated after failure. We propose EGL-SCA, a verifier-centric dual-space framework that models a graph reasoning agent using two collaborative components: an instruction-side policy space for reasoning strategies, and a tool-side program space for executable algorithmic tools. Our central mechanism is structural credit assignment, which maps trajectory evidence to conditional updates, precisely routing failures to either prompt optimization or tool synthesis and repair. To provide sufficient learning signals for dual-space adaptation, we introduce a training distribution stratified by task family, coupled with a Pareto-style retention strategy to balance success, generality, and parsimony. Experiments on four graph reasoning benchmarks show that EGL-SCA achieves a state-of-the-art 92.0\% average success rate. By effectively co-evolving instructions and tools, our framework significantly outperforms both pure-prompting and fixed-toolbox baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过结构信用分配协同进化指令和工具，在图推理任务中达到92.0%平均成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通常单独改进指令或工具，未解决失败后应更新哪一侧的问题，导致图推理代理在自然语言输入下难以协同优化。
analysis.problem: 图推理代理需要从文本重建图实例、决定工具是否足够、在严格协议下交互并满足外部验证器，但缺乏协同更新指令和工具的机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出EGL-SCA，包含指令侧策略空间和工具侧程序空间，通过结构信用分配将轨迹证据映射到条件更新，精确路由失败到提示优化或工具合成/修复；并引入按任务族分层的训练分布和Pareto式保留策略。
contributions: 提出基于验证器的双空间框架，协同进化指令和工具。
设计结构信用分配机制，实现失败路由和条件更新。
引入分层训练分布和Pareto保留策略，平衡成功率、通用性和简洁性。
analysis.experiments: 在四个图推理基准上达到92.0%平均成功率，优于纯提示和固定工具箱基线。
limitations: 可能依赖外部验证器的设计质量。
双空间协同进化可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验效果好，与Agent和工具使用方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EGL-SCA框架，通过结构信用分配协同进化指令和工具，在图推理任务中达到92.0%平均成功率。

papers.title: Agent-ValueBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Evaluating Agent Values
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents have rapidly matured as task executors and seen widespread deployment via harnesses such as OpenClaw. Safety concerns have rightly drawn growing research attention, and beneath them lie the values silently steering agent behavior. Existing value benchmarks, however, remain confined to LLMs, leaving agent values largely uncharted. From intuitive, empirical, and theoretical vantage points, we show that an agent's values diverge from those of its underlying LLM, and the agentic modality further introduces dataset-, evaluation-, and system-level challenges absent from text-only protocols. We close this gap with Agent-ValueBench, the first benchmark dedicated to agent values. It features 394 executable environments across 16 domains, offering 4,335 value-conflict tasks that cover 28 value systems and 332 dimensions. Every instance is co-synthesized through our purpose-built end-to-end pipeline and curated per-instance by professional psychologists. Each task ships with two pole-aligned golden trajectories whose checkpoints anchor a trajectory-level rubric-based judge. Benchmarking 14 frontier proprietary and open-weights models across 4 mainstream harnesses, we uncover three concerted findings. Agent values first manifest as a Value Tide of cross-model homogeneity beneath interpretable counter-currents. This tide bends non-additively under harness pull, and yet more decisively under deliberate steering via embedded skills. Together these results signal that the agent-alignment lever is shifting from classical model alignment and prompt steering toward harness alignment and skill steering.

analysis.tldr: 首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，揭示智能体价值观与底层LLM存在差异，并受框架和技能影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有价值观基准局限于LLM，忽略了智能体模态带来的数据集、评估和系统级挑战，而智能体价值观对安全至关重要。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门评估智能体价值观的基准，无法系统衡量智能体行为背后的价值观。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 智能体价值观与底层LLM价值观存在分歧，且受框架（harness）和嵌入技能（embedded skills）的非加性影响，形成跨模型同质性的“价值潮”（Value Tide）现象。
analysis.method: 构建包含394个可执行环境、4335个价值冲突任务的基准，通过端到端管道和专业心理学家逐实例策划，每个任务附带两个极对齐的黄金轨迹和基于轨迹的评分标准。
contributions: 提出首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，覆盖16个领域、28种价值系统和332个维度。
通过实验发现智能体价值观的“价值潮”现象，以及框架和技能对价值观的显著影响。
analysis.experiments: 在4个主流框架上评估了14个前沿专有和开源模型，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有可能的价值观维度。
评估依赖黄金轨迹和评分标准，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 首个智能体价值观基准，方法创新且实验全面，对安全对齐领域有重要影响。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个专门评估智能体价值观的基准Agent-ValueBench，揭示智能体价值观与底层LLM存在差异，并受框架和技能影响。

papers.title: CellDX AI Autopilot: Agent-Guided Training and Deployment of Pathology Classifiers
papers.abstract: Training AI models for computational pathology currently requires access to expensive whole-slide-image datasets, GPU infrastructure, deep expertise in machine learning, and substantial engineering effort. We present CellDX AI Autopilot, a platform that lets users -- from pathologists with no ML background to ML practitioners running many parallel experiments -- train, evaluate, and deploy whole-slide image classifiers through natural language interaction with an AI agent. The platform provides a structured set of agent skills that guide the user through dataset curation, automated hyperparameter tuning, multi-strategy model comparison, and human-in-the-loop deployment, all on a pre-built dataset of over 32,000 cases and 66,000 H&E-stained whole-slide images with pre-extracted features. We describe the agent skill architecture, the underlying Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) training framework supporting four classification strategies, and an iterative pairwise hyperparameter search (grid or seeded random) that reduces tuning cost by over 30x compared to exhaustive search. CellDX AI Autopilot is, to our knowledge, the first system to expose pathology-specialized agent skills and a pathology-specialized training platform to general-purpose AI agents (e.g. any LLM-based agent runtime), delivering end-to-end automated model training without requiring the agent itself to be domain-specific. The platform addresses both the ML-expertise bottleneck that limits adoption in diagnostic pathology and the engineering bottleneck that limits how many experiments a researcher can run cost-effectively.

analysis.tldr: CellDX AI Autopilot 是一个通过自然语言交互指导用户训练和部署病理学分类器的 AI 代理平台，显著降低了计算病理学中 AI 模型训练的门槛和成本。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算病理学中训练 AI 模型需要昂贵的全切片图像数据集、GPU 基础设施、机器学习深度知识和大量工程努力，这限制了其在诊断病理学中的采用和研究效率。
analysis.problem: 如何让没有机器学习背景的病理学家和机器学习从业者都能通过自然语言交互，高效地训练、评估和部署全切片图像分类器。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析或失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出 CellDX AI Autopilot 平台，包含结构化代理技能集，指导用户完成数据集整理、自动超参数调优、多策略模型比较和人在回路部署；底层使用多实例学习（MIL）训练框架支持四种分类策略，并采用迭代成对超参数搜索（网格或种子随机）将调优成本降低 30 倍以上。
contributions: 首个将病理学专业代理技能和病理学专业训练平台暴露给通用 AI 代理的系统，实现端到端自动化模型训练。
提出迭代成对超参数搜索方法，相比穷举搜索降低调优成本超过 30 倍。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及平台基于包含超过 32,000 个病例和 66,000 张 H&E 染色全切片图像的数据集。
limitations: 可能依赖预提取特征，未讨论端到端特征学习。
未提供与现有方法的定量比较结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 平台创新性强，解决了实际瓶颈，但摘要缺乏实验细节，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CellDX AI Autopilot 是一个通过自然语言交互指导用户训练和部署病理学分类器的 AI 代理平台，显著降低了计算病理学中 AI 模型训练的门槛和成本。

papers.title: DySurface: Consistent 4D Surface Reconstruction via Bridging Explicit Gaussians and Implicit Functions
papers.abstract: While novel view synthesis (NVS) for dynamic scenes has seen significant progress, reconstructing temporally consistent geometric surfaces remains a challenge. Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) offer powerful dynamic scene rendering capabilities; however, relying solely on photometric optimization often leads to geometric ambiguities. This results in discontinuous surfaces, severe artifacts, and broken surfaces over time. To address these limitations, we present DySurface, a novel framework that bridges the effectiveness of explicit Gaussians with the geometric fidelity of implicit Signed Distance Functions (SDFs) in dynamic scenes. Our approach tackles the structural discrepancy between the forward deformation of 3DGS ($canonical \rightarrow dynamic$) and the backward deformation required for volumetric SDF rendering ($dynamic \rightarrow canonical$). Specifically, we propose the VoxGS-DSDF branch that leverages deformed Gaussians to construct a dynamic sparse voxel grid, providing explicit geometric guidance to the implicit SDF field. This explicit anchoring effectively regularizes the volumetric rendering process, significantly improving surface reconstruction quality, with watertight boundaries and detailed representations. Quantitative and qualitative experiments demonstrate that DySurface significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in geometric accuracy metrics while maintaining competitive rendering performance.

analysis.tldr: DySurface通过显式高斯与隐式SDF桥接，实现动态场景的4D一致表面重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态场景的新视角合成虽有进展，但重建时间一致的几何表面仍具挑战，现有方法因光度优化导致几何歧义，产生不连续表面和严重伪影。
analysis.problem: 动态场景中显式高斯与隐式SDF之间的结构差异（前向变形与后向变形不匹配）导致表面重建质量差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅依赖光度优化会导致几何歧义，表现为表面不连续、随时间出现断裂和严重伪影。
analysis.method: 提出VoxGS-DSDF分支，利用变形高斯构建动态稀疏体素网格，为隐式SDF场提供显式几何引导，从而正则化体渲染过程。
contributions: 提出DySurface框架，桥接显式高斯与隐式SDF，实现动态场景的4D一致表面重建。
设计VoxGS-DSDF分支，通过显式几何锚定有效正则化体渲染，提升表面重建质量。
analysis.experiments: 定量和定性实验表明，DySurface在几何精度指标上显著优于最先进基线，同时保持有竞争力的渲染性能。
limitations: 可能对快速运动或复杂拓扑场景的泛化能力有限。
计算开销可能较高，因需同时维护高斯和SDF场。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对动态场景表面重建有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DySurface通过显式高斯与隐式SDF桥接，实现动态场景的4D一致表面重建。

papers.title: RW-Post: Auditable Evidence-Grounded Multimodal Fact-Checking in the Wild
papers.abstract: Multimodal misinformation increasingly leverages visual persuasion, where repurposed or manipulated images strengthen misleading text. We introduce \textbf{RW-Post}, a post-aligned \textbf{text--image benchmark} for real-world multimodal fact-checking with \emph{auditable} annotations: each instance links the original social-media post with reasoning traces and explicitly linked evidence items derived from human fact-check articles via an LLM-assisted extraction-and-auditing pipeline. RW-Post supports controlled evaluation across closed-book, evidence-bounded, and open-web regimes, enabling systematic diagnosis of visual grounding and evidence utilization. We provide \textbf{AgentFact} as a reference verification baseline and benchmark strong open-source LVLMs under unified protocols. Experiments show substantial headroom: current models struggle with faithful evidence grounding, while evidence-bounded evaluation improves both accuracy and faithfulness. Code and dataset will be released at https://github.com/xudanni0927/AgentFact.

analysis.tldr: 提出RW-Post基准和AgentFact基线，用于多模态事实核查中的可审计证据推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态虚假信息利用视觉说服力，现有基准缺乏可审计的证据链接和系统化的评估协议。
analysis.problem: 缺乏支持可审计证据推理和可控评估的真实世界多模态事实核查基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前模型在忠实证据推理上存在显著不足，而证据受限评估能同时提升准确性和忠实度。
analysis.method: 构建RW-Post基准，通过LLM辅助的提取-审计流程将社交媒体帖子与人类事实核查文章中的推理轨迹和证据项链接；提供AgentFact作为参考验证基线。
contributions: 提出RW-Post，一个后对齐的多模态事实核查基准，包含可审计的注释和三种评估协议。
提供AgentFact基线，并系统评估了开源LVLM在证据推理上的表现，揭示了现有模型的不足。
analysis.experiments: 在RW-Post上评估了多个强开源LVLM，实验表明模型在忠实证据推理上存在显著提升空间，证据受限评估能改善准确性和忠实度。
limitations: 基准可能受限于LLM辅助提取的噪声。
仅评估了开源模型，闭源模型表现未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 基准设计新颖，实验揭示重要现象，但方法增量有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RW-Post基准和AgentFact基线，用于多模态事实核查中的可审计证据推理。

papers.title: Portable Active Learning for Object Detection
papers.abstract: Annotating bounding boxes is costly and limits the scalability of object detection. This challenge is compounded by the need to preserve high accuracy while minimizing manual effort in real-world applications. Prior active learning methods often depend on model features or modify detector internals and training schedules, increasing integration overhead. Moreover, they rarely jointly exploit the benefits of image-level signals, class-imbalance cues, and instance-level uncertainty for comprehensive selection. We present Portable Active Learning (PAL), a detector-agnostic, easily portable framework that operates solely on inference outputs. PAL combines class-wise instance uncertainty with image-level diversity to guide data selection. At each round, PAL trains lightweight class-specific logistic classifiers to distinguish true from false positives, producing entropy-based uncertainty scores for proposals. Candidate images are then refined using global image entropy, class diversity, and image similarity, yielding batches that are both informative and diverse. PAL requires no changes to model internals or training pipelines, ensuring broad compatibility across detectors. Extensive experiments on COCO, PASCAL VOC, and BDD100K demonstrate that PAL consistently improves label efficiency and detection accuracy compared to existing active learning baselines, making it a practical solution for scalable and cost-effective deployment of object detection in real-world settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种与检测器无关的主动学习框架PAL，仅利用推理输出来选择信息量丰富的图像，提升标注效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 目标检测中边界框标注成本高昂，限制了模型的可扩展性；现有主动学习方法依赖模型内部特征或修改训练流程，集成开销大，且很少联合利用图像级信号、类别不平衡线索和实例级不确定性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种与检测器无关、易于移植的主动学习方法，仅基于推理输出高效选择有标注价值的图像，以最小化人工标注成本并保持高检测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PAL框架：训练轻量级类别逻辑回归分类器区分真/假阳性，得到基于熵的不确定性分数；再结合全局图像熵、类别多样性和图像相似度精炼候选批次，确保信息性和多样性。
contributions: 提出一种与检测器无关的主动学习框架PAL，仅需推理输出，无需修改模型内部或训练流程。
联合利用实例级不确定性、图像级多样性和类别不平衡线索进行数据选择。
在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K上验证了PAL在标签效率和检测精度上的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在COCO、PASCAL VOC和BDD100K数据集上进行了实验，与现有主动学习基线相比，PAL持续提升了标签效率和检测精度。
limitations: 可能依赖轻量级分类器的质量，在极端类别不平衡下性能未知。
未讨论在实时或资源受限场景下的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简洁实用，与检测器无关，实验充分，但创新点主要为组合现有技术。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种与检测器无关的主动学习框架PAL，仅利用推理输出来选择信息量丰富的图像，提升标注效率。

papers.title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?
papers.abstract: Recent advances in vision-language models have enabled mobile GUI agents to perceive visual interfaces and execute user instructions, but reliable prediction of action consequences remains critical for long-horizon and high-risk interactions. Existing mobile world models provide either text-based or image-based future states, yet it remains unclear which representation is useful, whether generated rollouts can replace real environments, and how test-time guidance helps agents of different strengths. To answer the above questions, we filter and annotate mobile world-model data, then train world models across four modalities: delta text, full text, diffusion-based images, and renderable code. These models achieve SoTA performance on both MobileWorldBench and Code2WorldBench. Furthermore, by evaluating their downstream utility on AITZ, AndroidControl, and AndroidWorld, we obtain three findings. First, renderable code reconstruction achieves high in-distribution fidelity and provides effective multimodal supervision for data construction, while text-based feedback is more robust for online out-of-distribution (OOD) execution. Second, world-model-generated trajectories can provide transferable interaction experience in the training process and improve agents' end-to-end task performance, although these data do not preserve the original distribution. Last, for overconfident mobile agents with low action entropy, posterior self-reflection provides limited gains, suggesting that world models are more effective as prior perception or training supervision than as universal post-hoc verifiers.

analysis.tldr: 移动世界模型通过可渲染代码和文本反馈为GUI代理提供有效指导，但作为后验验证器效果有限。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动GUI代理需要可靠的动作后果预测以支持长程和高风险交互，但现有世界模型在表示形式、生成轨迹的可用性以及测试时指导的有效性方面缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 系统探究移动世界模型的不同表示形式（delta文本、全文、扩散图像、可渲染代码）在下游任务中的效用，以及生成轨迹能否替代真实环境、测试时指导如何帮助不同强度的代理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可渲染代码重建具有高分布内保真度，为数据构建提供有效多模态监督；文本反馈在在线分布外执行中更鲁棒。世界模型生成的轨迹可提供可迁移交互经验，但无法保持原始分布。对于低动作熵的过度自信代理，后验自我反思收益有限。
analysis.method: 筛选并标注移动世界模型数据，训练四种模态的世界模型（delta文本、全文、扩散图像、可渲染代码），并在多个基准上评估其下游效用。
contributions: 构建了四种模态的移动世界模型，并在MobileWorldBench和Code2WorldBench上达到SOTA。
通过系统实验揭示了不同表示形式的适用场景：可渲染代码适合数据构建，文本反馈适合在线OOD执行。
发现世界模型生成的轨迹可提升代理端到端任务性能，但作为后验验证器对过度自信代理效果有限。
analysis.experiments: 在MobileWorldBench、Code2WorldBench、AITZ、AndroidControl和AndroidWorld上进行了评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 生成轨迹无法保持原始分布，可能限制其在某些场景下的直接使用。
后验自我反思对低动作熵代理提升有限，世界模型作为通用后验验证器的适用性有待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 系统探究移动世界模型多种表示形式的下游效用，实验设计全面，对GUI代理领域有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 移动世界模型通过可渲染代码和文本反馈为GUI代理提供有效指导，但作为后验验证器效果有限。

papers.title: BGG: Bridging the Geometric Gap between Cross-View images by Vision Foundation Model Adaptation for Geo-Localization
papers.abstract: Geometric differences between cross-view images, such as drone and satellite views, significantly increase the challenge of Cross-View Geo-Localization (CVGL), which aims to acquire the geolocation of images by image retrieval. To further enhance the CVGL performance, this paper proposes a parameter-efficient adaptation framework for bridging the geometric gap across images based on the vision foundation model (VFM) (e.g., DINOv3), termed BGG. BGG not only effectively leverages the general visual representations of VFM and captures the robust and consistent features from cross-view images, but also utilizes the generalization capabilities of the VFM, significantly improving the CVGL performance. It mainly contains a Multi-granularity Feature Enhancement Adapter (MFEA) and a Frequency-Aware Structural Aggregation (FASA) module. Specifically, MFEA enhances the scale adaptability and viewpoint robustness of features by multi-level dilated convolutions, effectively bridging the cross-view geometric gap with small training costs. Additionally, considering the [CLS] token lacks spatial details for precise image retrieval and localization, the FASA module modulates patch tokens in the frequency domain and performs adaptive aggregation for local structural feature enhancement. Finally, BGG fuses the enhanced local features with the [CLS] token for more accurate CVGL. Extensive experiments on University-1652 and SUES-200 datasets demonstrate that BGG has significant advantages over other methods and achieves state-of-the-art localization performance with low training costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于视觉基础模型DINOv3的参数高效适应框架BGG，通过多粒度特征增强适配器和频域感知结构聚合模块，弥合跨视角图像几何差异，实现跨视角地理定位SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨视角图像（如无人机与卫星视图）间的几何差异严重制约了跨视角地理定位（CVGL）的性能，现有方法难以高效利用视觉基础模型的通用表征来桥接这一几何鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何以参数高效的方式利用视觉基础模型（如DINOv3）提取跨视角图像中鲁棒且一致的几何不变特征，提升CVGL的定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出[CLS]标记缺乏空间细节，不利于精确图像检索和定位；同时跨视角图像存在显著的几何差异（尺度、视角变化）。
analysis.method: 提出BGG框架，包含多粒度特征增强适配器（MFEA）和频域感知结构聚合（FASA）模块。MFEA通过多级膨胀卷积增强尺度适应性和视角鲁棒性；FASA在频域调制patch token并进行自适应聚合以增强局部结构特征，最后融合增强的局部特征与[CLS]标记进行定位。
contributions: 提出基于VFM的参数高效适应框架BGG，有效桥接跨视角几何差距。
设计MFEA模块，通过多级膨胀卷积以低训练成本增强特征尺度与视角鲁棒性。
设计FASA模块，在频域增强局部结构特征并自适应聚合，弥补[CLS]标记空间细节不足。
在University-1652和SUES-200数据集上取得SOTA定位性能，且训练成本低。

analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高（结合VFM与参数高效适配），实验验证SOTA且低训练成本，与视觉-语言模型应用方向相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于视觉基础模型DINOv3的参数高效适应框架BGG，通过多粒度特征增强适配器和频域感知结构聚合模块，弥合跨视角图像几何差异，实现跨视角地理定位SOTA。

papers.title: TMAS: Scaling Test-Time Compute via Multi-Agent Synergy
papers.abstract: Test-time scaling has become an effective paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models by allocating additional computation during inference. Recent structured approaches have further advanced this paradigm by organizing inference across multiple trajectories, refinement rounds, and verification-based feedback. However, existing structured test-time scaling methods either weakly coordinate parallel reasoning trajectories or rely on noisy historical information without explicitly deciding what should be retained and reused, limiting their ability to balance exploration and exploitation. In this work, we propose TMAS, a framework for scaling test-time compute via multi-agent synergy. TMAS organizes inference as a collaborative process among specialized agents, enabling structured information flow across agents, trajectories, and refinement iterations. To support effective cross-trajectory collaboration, TMAS introduces hierarchical memories: the experience bank reuses low-level reliable intermediate conclusions and local feedback, while the guideline bank records previously explored high-level strategies to steer subsequent rollouts away from redundant reasoning patterns. Furthermore, we design a hybrid reward reinforcement learning scheme tailored to TMAS, which jointly preserves basic reasoning capability, enhances experience utilization, and encourages exploration beyond previously attempted solution strategies. Extensive experiments on challenging reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TMAS achieves stronger iterative scaling than existing test-time scaling baselines, while hybrid reward training further improves scaling effectiveness and stability across iterations. Code and data are available at https://github.com/george-QF/TMAS-code.

analysis.tldr: TMAS通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制，在推理时扩展计算以提升大语言模型推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有测试时扩展方法要么弱协调并行推理轨迹，要么依赖噪声历史信息，难以平衡探索与利用。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多智能体协同和结构化信息流，有效组织推理轨迹间的协作以提升测试时扩展效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TMAS框架，包含分层记忆（经验库和指导库）和混合奖励强化学习方案，实现多智能体间的结构化信息流。
contributions: 提出TMAS，通过多智能体协同和分层记忆机制实现结构化测试时扩展。
设计混合奖励强化学习方案，平衡基础推理、经验利用和探索。
analysis.experiments: 在多个挑战性推理基准上，TMAS优于现有测试时扩展基线，混合奖励训练进一步提升扩展效果和稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务设计，泛化性需进一步验证。

papers.title: EvoStreaming: Your Offline Video Model Is a Natively Streaming Assistant
papers.abstract: Streaming video understanding demands more than watching longer videos: assistants must decide when to speak in real time, balancing responsiveness against verbosity. Yet most video-language models (VideoLLMs) are trained for offline inference, and existing streaming benchmarks externalize this timing decision to the evaluator. We address this gap with RealStreamEval, a frame-level multi-turn evaluation protocol that exposes models to sequential observations and penalizes unnecessary responses. Under this protocol, we observed that strong offline VideoLLMs retain useful visual understanding but lack an interaction policy for deciding when to respond. Motivated by this observation, we propose EvoStreaming, a self-evolved streaming adaptation framework in which the base model itself acts as data generator, relevance annotator, and roll-out policy to synthesize streaming trajectories without external supervision. With only $1{,}000$ self-generated samples ($139\times$ less than the leading streaming instruction-tuning approach) and no architectural changes, EvoStreaming consistently improves the overall RealStreamEval score by up to $10.8$ points across five open VideoLLM backbones (Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5) while largely preserving offline video performance. These results suggest that data-efficient interaction tuning is a practical path for adapting existing VideoLLMs to streaming assistants.

analysis.tldr: 提出EvoStreaming框架，仅用1000自生成样本即可将离线视频模型高效转化为流式交互助手。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频语言模型（VideoLLMs）主要针对离线推理设计，缺乏实时流式交互中的响应时机决策能力，而现有流式基准将时序决策外化给评估者，无法有效衡量模型自主交互能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让离线视频模型具备流式交互中的自主响应时机决策能力，同时保持数据高效且无需架构修改。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 强离线VideoLLMs保留有用视觉理解能力，但缺乏何时响应的交互策略。
analysis.method: EvoStreaming：一种自进化流式适应框架，基模型自身作为数据生成器、相关性标注器和展开策略，合成流式交互轨迹，无需外部监督。
contributions: 提出RealStreamEval，一个帧级多轮评估协议，暴露模型于序列观测并惩罚不必要响应。
提出EvoStreaming，仅用1000自生成样本（比领先方法少139倍）即可将离线VideoLLMs转化为流式助手，无需架构修改。
analysis.experiments: 在五个开源VideoLLM骨干（Qwen2/2.5/3-VL, InternVL-3.5, MiniCPM-V4.5）上，RealStreamEval总分提升高达10.8分，同时基本保持离线视频性能。
limitations: 仅基于1000自生成样本，可能对复杂场景泛化性有限。
未涉及架构修改，可能无法处理极端实时性要求。

papers.title: PaperFit: Vision-in-the-Loop Typesetting Optimization for Scientific Documents
papers.abstract: A LaTeX manuscript that compiles without error is not necessarily publication-ready. The resulting PDFs frequently suffer from misplaced floats, overflowing equations, inconsistent table scaling, widow and orphan lines, and poor page balance, forcing authors into repetitive compile-inspect-edit cycles. Rule-based tools are blind to rendered visuals, operating only on source code and log files. Text-only LLMs perform open-loop text editing, unable to predict or verify the two-dimensional layout consequences of their changes. Reliable typesetting optimization therefore requires a visual closed loop with verification after every edit. We formalize this problem as Visual Typesetting Optimization (VTO), the task of transforming a compilable LaTeX paper into a visually polished, page-budget-compliant PDF through iterative visual verification and source-level revision, and introduce a five-category taxonomy of typesetting defects to guide diagnosis. We present PaperFit, a vision-in-the-loop agent that iteratively renders pages, diagnoses defects, and applies constrained repairs. To benchmark VTO, we construct PaperFit-Bench with 200 papers across 10 venue templates and 13 defect types at different difficulty. Extensive experiments show that PaperFit outperforms all baselines by a large margin, establishing that bridging the gap from compilable source to publication-ready PDF requires vision-in-the-loop optimization and that VTO constitutes a critical missing stage in the document automation pipeline.

analysis.tldr: PaperFit 提出视觉在环的排版优化方法，通过迭代渲染和诊断修复 LaTeX 文档的视觉缺陷，显著优于基线。
analysis.research_motivation: LaTeX 文档编译无错但 PDF 常存在浮动体错位、公式溢出、孤行等视觉缺陷，手动修复耗时且规则工具和纯文本 LLM 无法感知二维布局效果。
analysis.problem: 如何将可编译的 LaTeX 论文自动优化为视觉美观、符合页数限制的 PDF。

提出 PaperFit 视觉在环智能体，实现迭代渲染-诊断-修复流程

papers.title: CORTEG: Foundation Models Enable Cross-Modality Representation Transfer from Scalp to Intracranial Brain Recordings
papers.abstract: Intracranial electrocorticography (ECoG) offers high-signal-to-noise access to cortical activity for brain-computer interfaces, yet limited per-patient data has led most prior work to rely on small, subject-specific decoders that neglect information shared across patients. We investigate whether large pretrained scalp-EEG foundation models (EEG FMs) can be adapted to ECoG, enabling cross-patient learning and competitive decoding performance while calibrating to a held-out patient in 10-30 minutes on a single GPU. We introduce CORTEG, a cross-modality transfer framework that combines a pretrained EEG FM backbone, an electrode-aware KNNSoftFourier spatial adapter, a dual-stream tokenizer for low-frequency and high-gamma activity, and a leave-one-subject-out fine-tuning strategy. We evaluate CORTEG on two challenging regression tasks: public finger trajectory regression (n=9) and private audio envelope regression (n=16). CORTEG matches or exceeds the strongest task-specific baselines on both tasks: it reaches the highest mean correlation among compared methods on the public finger benchmark (gain not statistically significant on n=9 subjects), with larger and statistically significant gains on the audio task and in low-data per-patient calibration. Feature analyses align with neurophysiology, and latent manifolds capture low-dimensional finger-movement structure. CORTEG provides systematic evidence that scalp-EEG pretraining can be repurposed for ECoG decoding, enabling data-efficient intracranial BCIs that can adapt to new patients.

analysis.tldr: 利用预训练头皮脑电图基础模型通过跨模态迁移实现颅内脑电图高效解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 颅内ECoG信号质量高但患者数据有限，传统方法依赖小规模个体解码器，忽略了跨患者共享信息，导致数据效率低。

contributions: 首次系统证明头皮EEG预训练可迁移至ECoG解码。

papers.title: PowerStep: Memory-Efficient Adaptive Optimization via $\ell_p$-Norm Steepest Descent
papers.abstract: Adaptive optimizers, most notably Adam, have become the default standard for training large-scale neural networks such as Transformers. These methods maintain running estimates of gradient first and second moments, incurring substantial memory overhead. We introduce PowerStep, a memory-efficient optimizer that achieves coordinate-wise adaptivity without storing second-moment statistics. Motivated by steepest descent under an $\ell_p$-norm geometry, we show that applying a nonlinear transform directly to a momentum buffer yields coordinate-wise adaptivity. We prove that PowerStep converges at the optimal $O(1/\sqrt{T})$ rate for non-convex stochastic optimization. Extensive experiments on Transformer models ranging from 124M to 235B parameters demonstrate that PowerStep matches Adam's convergence speed while halving optimizer memory. Furthermore, when combined with aggressive \texttt{int8} quantization, PowerStep remains numerically stable and reduces optimizer memory by $\sim\!8\times$ compared to full-precision Adam. PowerStep thus provides a principled, scalable and resource-efficient alternative for large-scale training. Code is available at https://github.com/yaolubrain/PowerStep.

analysis.tldr: PowerStep 通过 ℓ_p 范数最速下降实现无需二阶矩的自适应优化，内存减半且收敛速度与 Adam 相当。
analysis.research_motivation: Adam 等自适应优化器在训练大模型时需存储梯度一阶和二阶矩，导致显著的内存开销，限制了大规模训练的扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不存储二阶矩统计量的前提下实现坐标级自适应优化，同时保持与 Adam 相当的收敛速度和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 ℓ_p 范数几何下的最速下降，直接对动量缓冲应用非线性变换以获得坐标级自适应性，无需二阶矩。
contributions: 提出 PowerStep 优化器，通过 ℓ_p 范数最速下降实现内存高效的自适应优化。
理论证明 PowerStep 在非凸随机优化中达到最优 O(1/√T) 收敛率。
实验表明在 124M 到 235B 参数的 Transformer 上，PowerStep 匹配 Adam 收敛速度且优化器内存减半，结合 int8 量化可减少约 8 倍内存。
analysis.experiments: 在 124M 到 235B 参数的 Transformer 模型上进行实验，验证了收敛速度和内存效率。
limitations: 可能对 ℓ_p 范数的选择敏感，需要调参。
仅验证了 Transformer 架构，其他架构效果未知。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: PowerStep 通过 ℓ_p 范数最速下降实现无需二阶矩的自适应优化，内存减半且收敛速度与 Adam 相当。

papers.title: The Alpha Blending Hypothesis: Compositing Shortcut in Deepfake Detection
papers.abstract: Recent deepfake detection methods demonstrate improved cross-dataset generalization, yet the underlying mechanisms remain underexplored. We introduce the Alpha Blending Hypothesis, positing that state-of-the-art frame-based detectors primarily function as alpha blending searchers; rather than learning semantic anomalies or specific generative neural fingerprints, they localize low-level compositing artifacts introduced during the integration of manipulated faces into target frames. We experimentally validate the hypothesis, demonstrating that deepfake detectors exhibit high sensitivity to the so-called self-blended images (SBI) and non-generative manipulations. We propose the method BlenD that leverages a large-scale, diverse dataset of real-only facial images augmented with SBI. This approach achieves the best average cross-dataset generalization on 15 compositional deepfake datasets released between 2019 and 2025 without utilizing explicitly generated deepfakes during training. Furthermore, we show that predictions from explicit blending searchers and models resilient to blending shortcuts are highly complementary, yielding a state-of-the-art AUROC of 94.0% in an ensemble configuration. The code with experiments and the trained model will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出Alpha Blending假说，揭示深度伪造检测器主要依赖低层次合成伪影而非语义异常，并基于此设计BlenD方法实现跨数据集泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法虽在跨数据集泛化上有所提升，但其内在机制尚不明确，阻碍了更鲁棒检测器的设计。
analysis.problem: 深度伪造检测器究竟学习何种特征，以及如何利用该发现提升跨数据集泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 检测器对自混合图像（SBI）和非生成式操作高度敏感，表明其核心是搜索alpha混合伪影，而非学习生成模型指纹或语义异常。
analysis.method: 提出BlenD方法，利用大规模仅含真实人脸图像的数据集，通过自混合图像（SBI）增强训练，避免使用显式生成的深度伪造数据。
contributions: 提出Alpha Blending假说，揭示深度伪造检测器主要依赖低层次合成伪影。
设计BlenD方法，仅用真实图像和SBI增强即可达到最优跨数据集泛化性能。
发现显式混合搜索器与对混合捷径鲁棒的模型互补，集成后AUROC达94.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在2019至2025年间发布的15个组合深度伪造数据集上评估，BlenD取得最佳平均跨数据集泛化性能；集成模型AUROC达94.0%。
limitations: 假说可能不适用于所有类型的深度伪造检测器，尤其是基于时序或音频的检测器。
BlenD依赖SBI增强，对非混合类伪造（如全脸生成）的检测效果未知。
