papers.title: Empty SPACE: Cross-Attention Sparsity for Concept Erasure in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Erasing specific concepts from text-to-image diffusion models is essential for avoiding the generation of copyrighted and explicit content. Closed-form concept erasure methods offer a fast alternative to backpropagation-based techniques, but they become less effective when scaling from smaller models such as Stable Diffusion 1.5 to larger models like Stable Diffusion XL. To maintain erasure effectiveness in these larger-scale architectures, we propose SParse cross-Attention-based Concept Erasure (SPACE). SPACE iteratively modifies the cross-attention parameters of a model with a closed-form update that jointly induces sparsity and erases target concepts. By concentrating the concept mapping to a lower-dimensional subspace, SPACE achieves superior erasure efficacy compared to dense baselines. Extensive experimental results show improvements in erasure effectiveness and robustness against adversarial prompts. Furthermore, SPACE achieves 80\%-90\% cross-attention sparsity, reducing the storage requirements for saving the modified parameters by 70\%, demonstrating its memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出SPACE方法，通过稀疏化交叉注意力实现扩散模型中的概念擦除，在保持效果的同时大幅降低存储需求。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型需要擦除特定概念（如版权或露骨内容），现有闭式方法在扩展到更大模型（如Stable Diffusion XL）时效果下降，亟需一种高效且可扩展的擦除方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在大规模扩散模型中高效、鲁棒地擦除特定概念，同时降低存储开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 闭式概念擦除方法从Stable Diffusion 1.5扩展到Stable Diffusion XL时效果变差，表明现有方法在更大架构中有效性不足。
analysis.method: SPACE：通过闭式更新迭代修改交叉注意力参数，联合引入稀疏性并擦除目标概念，将概念映射集中到低维子空间。
contributions: 提出SPACE方法，利用交叉注意力稀疏性实现高效概念擦除，在更大模型上优于密集基线。
实现80%-90%的交叉注意力稀疏性，存储需求降低70%，显著提升内存效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion XL等模型上进行实验，展示了擦除效果和对抗提示鲁棒性的提升，并报告了稀疏性和存储节省指标。
limitations: 可能仅适用于基于交叉注意力的扩散模型架构。
稀疏性引入可能对生成质量有潜在影响，摘要未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，在概念擦除和存储效率上有显著提升，但技术细节和实验范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SPACE方法，通过稀疏化交叉注意力实现扩散模型中的概念擦除，在保持效果的同时大幅降低存储需求。

papers.title: TRACE: Distilling Where It Matters via Token-Routed Self On-Policy Alignment
papers.abstract: On-policy self-distillation (self-OPD) densifies reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) by letting a policy teach itself under privileged context. We find that when this guidance spans the full response, all-token KL spends gradients on mostly redundant positions and amplifies privileged-information leakage, causing entropy rise, shortened reasoning, and out-of-distribution degradation in long-horizon math training. We propose Token-Routed Alignment for Critical rEasoning (TRACE), which distills only on annotator-marked critical spans: forward KL on key spans of correct rollouts, optional reverse KL on localized error spans, and GRPO on all remaining tokens, with the KL channel annealed away after a short warm-up. Our analysis explains TRACE through two effects: forward KL provides non-vanishing lift to teacher-supported tokens that the student under-allocates, while span masking and decay keep cumulative privileged-gradient exposure finite. On four held-out math benchmarks plus GPQA-Diamond, TRACE improves over GRPO by 2.76 percentage points on average and preserves the Qwen3-8B base OOD score on GPQA-Diamond, where GRPO and all-token self-OPD baselines degrade. Gains persist under online self-annotation (+1.90 percentage points, about 69% of the strong-API gain), reducing the concern that TRACE merely imports external annotator capability. Across scales, the best routed action is base-dependent: on Qwen3-8B it is forward KL on key spans, while on Qwen3-1.7B it shifts to reverse KL on error spans.

analysis.tldr: TRACE通过仅对关键推理跨度进行蒸馏，解决了全token自蒸馏中熵增和分布外退化问题，在数学推理上超越GRPO。
analysis.research_motivation: 在基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中，on-policy自蒸馏（self-OPD）让策略在特权上下文中自我学习，但全token KL散度在冗余位置上浪费梯度并放大特权信息泄露，导致熵增、推理缩短和长程数学训练中的分布外退化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种蒸馏方法，仅对关键推理跨度进行对齐，避免全token蒸馏的负面效应，同时保持或提升数学推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 全token KL散度在长程数学训练中导致熵增、推理缩短和分布外退化，原因是梯度被分配到冗余位置且特权信息泄露被放大。
analysis.method: 提出Token-Routed Alignment for Critical rEasoning (TRACE)，仅在标注的关键跨度上进行蒸馏：正确轨迹的关键跨度上使用前向KL，可选地在错误跨度上使用反向KL，其余token使用GRPO，且KL通道在短预热后衰减。
contributions: 提出TRACE方法，通过关键跨度蒸馏和KL衰减解决全token自蒸馏的退化问题。
在四个数学基准和GPQA-Diamond上平均提升GRPO 2.76个百分点，并保持OOD性能。
分析表明TRACE通过前向KL提升教师支持token的分配，并通过跨度掩码和衰减限制累积特权梯度暴露。
analysis.experiments: 在四个数学基准和GPQA-Diamond上评估，TRACE平均比GRPO提升2.76个百分点，且在线自标注下增益为强API增益的69%。
limitations: 依赖标注的关键跨度，可能引入标注偏差。
最佳路由动作因模型规模而异，需要针对不同基础模型调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与LLM推理强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TRACE通过仅对关键推理跨度进行蒸馏，解决了全token自蒸馏中熵增和分布外退化问题，在数学推理上超越GRPO。

papers.title: DetRefiner: Model-Agnostic Detection Refinement with Feature Fusion Transformer
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary object detection (OVOD) aims to detect both seen and unseen categories, yet existing methods often struggle to generalize to novel objects due to limited integration of global and local contextual cues. We propose DetRefiner, a simple yet effective plug-and-play framework that learns to fuse global and local features to refine open-vocabulary detection. DetRefiner processes global image features and patch-level image features from foundational models (e.g., DINOv3) through a lightweight Transformer encoder. The encoder produces a class vector capturing image-level attributes and patch vectors representing local region attributes, from which attribute reliability is inferred to recalibrate the base model's confidence. Notably, DetRefiner is trained independently of the base OVOD model, requiring neither access to its internal features nor retraining. At inference, it operates solely on the base detector's predictions, producing auxiliary calibration scores that are merged with the base detector's scores to yield the final refined confidence. Despite this simplicity, DetRefiner consistently enhances multiple OVOD models across COCO, LVIS, ODinW13, and Pascal VOC, achieving gains of up to +10.1 AP on novel categories. These results highlight that learning to fuse global and local representations offers a powerful and general mechanism for advancing open-world object detection. Our codes and models are available at https://github.com/hitachi-rd-cv/detrefiner.

analysis.tldr: DetRefiner 通过融合全局与局部特征，以即插即用方式提升开放词汇目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放词汇目标检测（OVOD）在检测未见类别时泛化能力不足，现有方法对全局与局部上下文线索的整合有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖基础检测器内部特征或重新训练的情况下，利用全局与局部特征融合来校准检测置信度，提升 OVOD 模型对未见类别的检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DetRefiner，一个与模型无关的即插即用框架，通过轻量 Transformer 编码器融合基础模型（如 DINOv3）的全局图像特征和局部 patch 特征，生成类向量与 patch 向量，推断属性可靠性以校准基础检测器的置信度。训练独立于基础 OVOD 模型，推理时仅依赖基础检测器的预测输出。
contributions: 提出 DetRefiner，一种简单有效的即插即用框架，通过融合全局与局部特征来细化开放词汇检测。
在 COCO、LVIS、ODinW13 和 Pascal VOC 上，DetRefiner 一致提升多个 OVOD 模型，在未见类别上最高提升 +10.1 AP。
analysis.experiments: 在 COCO、LVIS、ODinW13 和 Pascal VOC 上评估，DetRefiner 一致提升多个 OVOD 模型，在未见类别上最高提升 +10.1 AP。
limitations: 可能依赖基础模型（如 DINOv3）的特征质量，若基础模型特征不佳则效果受限。
仅通过置信度校准进行细化，未改变检测框位置，可能无法处理定位误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法简单有效，实验充分，但创新性中等，适合关注开放词汇检测的研究者阅读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DetRefiner 通过融合全局与局部特征，以即插即用方式提升开放词汇目标检测性能。

papers.title: ProteinOPD: Towards Effective and Efficient Preference Alignment for Protein Design
papers.abstract: Designing proteins with desired functions or properties represents a core goal in synthetic biology and drug discovery. Recent advances in protein language models (PLMs) have enabled the generation of highly designable protein sequences, while preference alignment provides a promising way to steer designs toward desired functions and properties. Nevertheless, they often trigger catastrophic forgetting of pretrained knowledge, degrading basic designability and failing to balance multiple competing objectives. To address these issues, we draw inspiration from On-Policy Distillation (OPD), an advanced post-training method renowned for mitigating catastrophic forgetting through its mode-seeking nature. In this work, we propose ProteinOPD, a multi-objective preference alignment framework that can effectively balance multiple preference objectives while maintaining the inherent designability of PLMs. ProteinOPD adapts a pretrained PLM into preference-specific teachers and distills their knowledge into a shared student via token-level OPD on the student's own trajectories. During this process, the student is aligned to a unique normalized geometric consensus of weighted teachers while ensuring bounded optimization under conflicts. This bridges the gap for OPD in multi-objective/teacher alignment. Extensive experiments show that ProteinOPD achieves substantial gains on target preference objectives without compromising the designability, with an 8x training speedup over RL-based alignment competitors.

analysis.tldr: 提出ProteinOPD框架，通过多教师蒸馏实现蛋白质设计中的多目标偏好对齐，避免灾难性遗忘并提升训练效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 蛋白质设计需要同时满足多个功能偏好，但现有偏好对齐方法会导致预训练知识灾难性遗忘，且难以平衡多个竞争目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲蛋白质基本可设计性的前提下，有效平衡多个偏好目标进行对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有偏好对齐方法会触发灾难性遗忘，降低基本可设计性，且无法平衡多个竞争目标。
analysis.method: ProteinOPD框架：将预训练蛋白质语言模型适配为多个偏好特定教师，通过学生自身轨迹上的token级在线策略蒸馏（OPD），将教师知识蒸馏到共享学生中，利用归一化几何共识处理冲突目标。
contributions: 提出ProteinOPD，首个将在线策略蒸馏应用于蛋白质多目标偏好对齐的框架。
通过多教师蒸馏和归一化几何共识，有效平衡多个偏好目标并保持可设计性。
相比基于RL的对齐方法，实现8倍训练加速。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在目标偏好目标上取得显著提升，且不损害可设计性，训练速度提升8倍，但未提供具体数据集或指标。
limitations: 可能依赖多个预训练教师模型，增加存储和计算开销。
归一化几何共识的权重选择可能影响多目标平衡效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，将在线策略蒸馏引入蛋白质多目标对齐，但摘要实验信息有限，且与核心关注方向（VLM/LLM）中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ProteinOPD框架，通过多教师蒸馏实现蛋白质设计中的多目标偏好对齐，避免灾难性遗忘并提升训练效率。

papers.title: SciVQR: A Multidisciplinary Multimodal Benchmark for Advanced Scientific Reasoning Evaluation
papers.abstract: Scientific reasoning is a key aspect of human intelligence, requiring the integration of multimodal inputs, domain expertise, and multi-step inference across various subjects. Existing benchmarks for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) often fail to capture the complexity and traceability of reasoning processes necessary for rigorous evaluation. To fill this gap, we introduce SciVQR, a multimodal benchmark covering 54 subfields in mathematics, physics, chemistry, geography, astronomy, and biology. SciVQR includes domain-specific visuals, such as equations, charts, and diagrams, and challenges models to combine visual comprehension with reasoning. The tasks range from basic factual recall to complex, multi-step inferences, with 46% including expert-authored solutions. SciVQR not only evaluates final answers but also examines the reasoning process, providing insights into how models reach their conclusions. Our evaluation of leading MLLMs, including both proprietary and open-source models, reveals significant limitations in handling complex multimodal reasoning tasks, underscoring the need for improved multi-step reasoning and better integration of interdisciplinary knowledge in advancing MLLMs toward true scientific intelligence. The dataset and evaluation code are publicly available at https://github.com/CASIA-IVA-Lab/SciVQR.

analysis.tldr: SciVQR 是一个覆盖 54 个科学子领域的多模态基准，用于评估 MLLM 的复杂科学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 MLLM 基准缺乏对推理过程复杂性和可追溯性的评估，难以严格衡量科学推理能力。
analysis.problem: 需要构建一个覆盖多学科、包含领域特定视觉内容、并评估推理过程的多模态基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估显示领先的 MLLM 在处理复杂多模态推理任务时存在显著局限，多步推理和跨学科知识整合不足。
analysis.method: 构建包含 54 个子领域（数学、物理、化学、地理、天文学、生物学）的多模态基准，含领域特定视觉（方程、图表、图示），任务从事实回忆到多步推理，46% 含专家编写的解答，同时评估最终答案和推理过程。
contributions: 提出了 SciVQR，一个覆盖 54 个科学子领域的多模态推理基准。
揭示了当前 MLLM 在复杂科学推理中的显著不足，强调多步推理和跨学科知识整合的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 评估了多个领先的 MLLM（包括闭源和开源模型），发现其在复杂多模态推理任务中表现有限。
limitations: 基准覆盖的学科和子领域可能仍有遗漏。
推理过程评估的自动化和客观性可能受限于专家解答的覆盖范围。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 该基准覆盖多学科、评估推理过程，对 MLLM 科学推理研究有重要价值，但方法创新中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SciVQR 是一个覆盖 54 个科学子领域的多模态基准，用于评估 MLLM 的复杂科学推理能力。

papers.title: LegalCiteBench: Evaluating Citation Reliability in Legal Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly integrated into legal drafting and research workflows, where incorrect citations or fabricated precedents can cause serious professional harm. Existing legal benchmarks largely emphasize statutory reasoning, contract understanding, or general legal question answering, but they do not directly study a central common-law failure mode: when asked to provide case authorities without external grounding, models may return plausible-looking but incorrect citations or cases. We introduce LegalCiteBench, a benchmark for studying closed-book citation recovery, citation verification, and case matching in legal language models. LegalCiteBench contains approximately 24K evaluation instances constructed from 1,000 real U.S. judicial opinions from the Case Law Access Project. The benchmark covers five citation-centric tasks: citation retrieval, citation completion, citation error detection, case matching, and case verification and correction. Across 21 LLMs, exact citation recovery remains highly challenging in this closed-book setting: even the strongest models score below 7/100 on citation retrieval and completion. Within the evaluated models, scale and legal-domain pretraining provide limited gains and do not resolve this difficulty. Models also frequently provide concrete but incorrect or low-overlap authorities under our evaluation protocol, with Misleading Answer Rates (MAR) exceeding 94% for 20 of 21 evaluated models on retrieval-heavy tasks. A prompt-only abstention experiment shows that explicit uncertainty instructions reduce some confident fabrication but do not improve citation correctness. LegalCiteBench is intended as a diagnostic framework for studying authority generation failures, verification behavior, and abstention when external grounding is absent, incomplete, or bypassed.

analysis.tldr: 提出LegalCiteBench基准，评估法律LLM在无外部检索时引用案例的可靠性，发现即使最强模型引用准确率也低于7/100，且误导率超94%。
analysis.research_motivation: 法律领域对引用准确性要求极高，但现有基准未专门评估LLM在无外部检索时生成错误或虚构案例的失败模式，这种错误可能造成严重专业危害。
analysis.problem: 法律LLM在封闭式设置下引用案例时，容易生成看似合理但错误的引用或虚构判例，缺乏系统评估该失败模式的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：1）即使最强模型在引用检索和补全任务上得分低于7/100；2）模型规模和法律领域预训练带来的提升有限；3）20/21个模型在检索密集型任务上误导率超过94%；4）明确不确定性指令可减少部分自信编造，但不提高引用正确性。
analysis.method: 构建LegalCiteBench基准，包含约24K评估实例（来自1000份真实美国司法意见），覆盖5项任务：引用检索、引用补全、引用错误检测、案例匹配、案例验证与纠正。
contributions: 提出首个系统评估法律LLM封闭式引用可靠性的基准LegalCiteBench，包含5项任务和约24K实例。
通过21个LLM的评估揭示当前模型在引用恢复上的严重不足（准确率<7/100）和高误导率（>94%）。
分析模型规模、法律预训练和明确不确定性指令对引用正确性的有限影响。
analysis.experiments: 在21个LLM上评估了5项任务，报告了引用检索/补全得分（<7/100）和误导率（>94%），并进行了提示式弃权实验。
limitations: 基准仅基于美国判例法，可能不适用于其他法域。
封闭式设置可能无法完全反映实际使用中混合检索的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 针对法律LLM引用可靠性这一重要但未被充分研究的失败模式，构建了系统基准，实验揭示严重问题，但方法本身为基准构建，技术深度中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LegalCiteBench基准，评估法律LLM在无外部检索时引用案例的可靠性，发现即使最强模型引用准确率也低于7/100，且误导率超94%。

papers.title: DynGhost: Temporally-Modelled Transformer for Dynamic Ghost Imaging with Quantum Detectors
papers.abstract: Ghost imaging reconstructs spatial information from a single-pixel bucket detector by correlating structured illumination patterns with scalar intensity measurements. While deep learning approaches have achieved promising results on static scenes, two critical limitations remain unaddressed: existing architectures fail to exploit temporal coherence across frames, leaving dynamic ghost imaging largely unsolved, and they assume additive Gaussian noise models that do not reflect the true Poissonian statistics of real single-photon hardware. We present DynGhost (Dynamic Ghost Imaging Transformer), a transformer architecture that addresses both limitations through alternating spatial and temporal attention blocks. Our quantum-aware training framework, based on physically accurate detector simulations (SNSPDs, SPADs, SiPMs) and Anscombe variance-stabilizing normalization, resolves the distribution shift that causes classical models to fail under realistic hardware constraints. Experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that DynGhost outperforms both traditional reconstruction methods and existing deep learning architectures, with particular gains in dynamic and photon-starved settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出DynGhost Transformer，利用时空注意力与量子感知训练实现动态鬼成像重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法在静态场景表现良好，但无法利用帧间时间相关性，且假设的高斯噪声模型与真实单光子硬件的泊松统计不符，导致动态鬼成像和光子匮乏场景重建效果差。
analysis.problem: 解决动态鬼成像中时间相干性缺失和噪声模型不匹配的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出经典模型在真实硬件约束下因分布偏移而失败，且现有架构无法利用帧间时间相关性。
analysis.method: 提出DynGhost Transformer，采用交替的空间和时间注意力块；基于物理精确的探测器模拟（SNSPDs、SPADs、SiPMs）和Anscombe方差稳定归一化构建量子感知训练框架。
contributions: 提出首个利用时间相干性的Transformer架构用于动态鬼成像。
引入量子感知训练框架，解决真实硬件下的分布偏移问题。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上，DynGhost优于传统重建方法和现有深度学习架构，尤其在动态和光子匮乏场景中提升显著。
limitations: 可能依赖特定探测器模拟，泛化性需验证。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新（时空注意力+量子感知训练）且实验验证有效，但应用领域较专，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DynGhost Transformer，利用时空注意力与量子感知训练实现动态鬼成像重建。

papers.title: Developing a foundation model for high-resolution remote sensing data of the Netherlands
papers.abstract: We develop a foundation model using 1.2m high resolution satellite images of the Netherlands. By combining a Convolutional Neural Network and a Vision Transformer, the model captures both low- and high-frequency landscape features, such as fine textures, edges, and small objects as well as large terrain structures, elevation patterns, and land-cover distributions. Leveraging temporal data as input, the model learns from broader contextual information across time, allowing the model to exploit the temporal dependencies, such as topographic features, land-cover changes, and seasonal dynamics. These additional constraints reduce feature ambiguity, improve representation learning, and enable better generalization with fewer labeled samples. The foundation model is evaluated on multiple downstream tasks, ranging from use cases within the Netherlands to global benchmarking datasets. On the vegetation monitoring dataset of the Netherlands, the model shows clear performance improvements by incorporating temporal information instead of relying on a single time point. Despite using a smaller model and less pretraining data limited to the Netherlands, it achieves competitive results on global benchmarks when compared to state-of-the-art models. These results demonstrate that the model can learn rich, generalizable representations from limited data, achieving competitive performance on global benchmarks while using a fraction of the parameters of larger state-of-the-art remote sensing models. To maximize reproducibility and reuse, we made the scripts and the model accessible on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 基于荷兰高分辨率遥感数据训练的基础模型，结合CNN与ViT，利用时序信息提升下游任务表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率遥感数据在环境监测、城市规划等领域有重要应用，但现有基础模型通常需要大规模全球数据训练，且难以同时捕捉低高频景观特征。荷兰本地数据丰富但缺乏专用基础模型，且时序信息未被充分利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用有限区域（荷兰）的高分辨率遥感数据，结合时序信息，训练一个能捕捉多尺度特征且泛化能力强的遥感基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合卷积神经网络（CNN）和视觉Transformer（ViT）的混合架构，以1.2百万张荷兰高分辨率卫星图像为训练数据，并利用时序数据作为输入，使模型学习时间依赖关系（如地形特征、土地覆盖变化、季节动态）。
contributions: 提出一种结合CNN和ViT的遥感基础模型，能同时捕捉低高频景观特征。
证明利用时序信息可减少特征模糊性、改善表征学习，并在荷兰植被监测数据集上带来性能提升。
在仅使用荷兰本地数据和较小模型的情况下，在全球基准上取得与更大规模模型竞争的结果。
analysis.experiments: 在荷兰植被监测数据集和多个全球基准数据集上评估，结果显示引入时序信息比单时间点有显著提升，且模型在全局基准上达到与最先进模型竞争的性能。
limitations: 模型仅基于荷兰数据训练，可能在其他地理区域泛化性有限。
时序信息的利用方式可能依赖于数据的时间分辨率，对数据要求较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法结合CNN和ViT并利用时序信息，在遥感领域有应用价值，但创新性中等，实验规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于荷兰高分辨率遥感数据训练的基础模型，结合CNN与ViT，利用时序信息提升下游任务表现。

papers.title: A Comparative Study of Machine Learning and Deep Learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection
papers.abstract: Out-of-distribution (OOD) detection is essential for building reliable AI systems, as models that produce outputs for invalid inputs cannot be trusted. Although deep learning (DL) is often assumed to outperform traditional machine learning (ML), medical imaging data are typically acquired under standardized protocols, leading to relatively constrained image variability in OOD detection tasks. This motivates a direct comparison between ML and DL approaches in this setting. The two approaches are evaluated on open datasets comprising over 60,000 fundus and non-fundus images across multiple resolutions. Both approaches achieved an AUROC of 1.000 and accuracies between 0.999 and 1.000 on internal and external validation sets, showing comparable detection performance. The ML approach, however, exhibited substantially lower end-to-end latency while maintaining equivalent accuracy, indicating greater computational efficiency. These results suggest that for OOD detection tasks of limited visual complexity, lightweight ML approaches can achieve DL-level performance with significantly reduced computational cost, supporting practical real-world deployment.

analysis.tldr: 在医学图像OOD检测中，传统机器学习与深度学习性能相当，但ML计算效率更高。
analysis.research_motivation: OOD检测对AI系统可靠性至关重要，但深度学习通常被认为优于传统机器学习，然而医学图像因标准化采集流程导致视觉变化有限，这促使在OOD检测场景下直接比较ML与DL。
analysis.problem: 在医学图像OOD检测中，传统机器学习与深度学习的性能与效率对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在包含6万张眼底和非眼底图像的数据集上，分别使用传统机器学习方法和深度学习方法进行OOD检测，并比较AUROC、准确率和端到端延迟。
contributions: 在医学图像OOD检测中，系统比较了传统机器学习与深度学习的性能与效率。
发现传统机器学习在保持同等检测性能（AUROC=1.000，准确率0.999-1.000）的同时，具有显著更低的端到端延迟。
analysis.experiments: 在开放数据集上评估，包含超过6万张眼底和非眼底图像，多个分辨率，内部和外部验证集。
limitations: 仅针对医学图像中的OOD检测，可能不适用于视觉复杂度更高的场景。
未探讨更复杂的OOD定义或更广泛的模型类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法对比较为常规，但实验充分，结果有实际意义，适合快速浏览。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在医学图像OOD检测中，传统机器学习与深度学习性能相当，但ML计算效率更高。

papers.title: What Concepts Lie Within? Detecting and Suppressing Risky Content in Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: The rise of text-to-image (T2I) models has increasingly raised concerns regarding the generation of risky content, such as sexual, violent, and copyright-protected images, highlighting the need for effective safeguards within the models themselves. Although existing methods have been proposed to eliminate risky concepts from T2I models, they are primarily developed for earlier U-Net architectures, leaving the state-of-the-art Diffusion-Transformer-based T2I models inadequately protected. This gap stems from a fundamental architectural shift: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) entangle semantic injection and visual synthesis via joint attention, which makes it difficult to isolate and erase risky content within the generation. To bridge this gap, we investigate how semantic concepts are represented in DiTs and discover that attention heads exhibit concept-specific sensitivity. This property enables both the detection and suppression of risky content. Building on this discovery, we propose AHV-D\&S, a training-free inference-time safeguard for image generation in DiTs. Specifically, AHV-D\&S quantifies each textual token's sensitivity across all attention heads as an Attention Head Vector (AHV), which serves as a discriminative signature for detecting risky generation tendencies. In the inference stage, we propose a momentum-based strategy to dynamically track token-wise AHVs across denoising steps, and a sensitivity-guided adaptive suppression strategy that suppresses the attention weights of identified risky tokens based on head-specific risk scores. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AHV-D\&S effectively suppresses sexual, copyrighted-style, and various harmful content while preserving visual quality, and further exhibits strong robustness against adversarial prompts and transferability across different DiT-based T2I models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的推理时安全机制AHV-D&S，利用注意力头向量检测并抑制扩散Transformer中的风险内容生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I模型的安全防护方法主要针对早期U-Net架构，而扩散Transformer（DiT）因语义注入与视觉合成通过联合注意力纠缠，难以隔离和擦除风险内容，亟需针对DiT架构的安全机制。
analysis.problem: 如何检测并抑制扩散Transformer模型生成性、暴力、版权等风险内容，同时保持生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现DiT中注意力头对特定语义概念具有敏感性，即不同注意力头对不同文本token的响应存在差异，这一特性可用于风险内容的检测与抑制。
analysis.method: 提出AHV-D&S方法，包括：1) 计算每个文本token在所有注意力头上的敏感性作为注意力头向量（AHV），作为检测风险生成倾向的判别签名；2) 在推理阶段，基于动量的策略动态跟踪去噪步骤中的token级AHV；3) 基于敏感性的自适应抑制策略，根据头特定风险分数抑制识别出的风险token的注意力权重。
contributions: 首次揭示扩散Transformer中注意力头对语义概念具有特异性敏感性，并利用该特性实现风险内容检测与抑制。
提出无需训练的推理时安全方法AHV-D&S，有效抑制性、版权风格及多种有害内容，同时保持视觉质量。
在多个DiT基T2I模型上验证了方法的鲁棒性和可迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个DiT基T2I模型上进行了实验，结果表明AHV-D&S有效抑制性、版权风格及有害内容，保持视觉质量，并对对抗性提示具有鲁棒性，且在不同模型间可迁移。
limitations: 方法依赖于注意力头对概念的敏感性，可能对某些复杂或混合概念检测效果有限。
仅针对推理时防护，未涉及模型训练阶段的根本性安全改进。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 针对DiT架构的安全防护方法新颖且实用，实验充分，与生成模型安全方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的推理时安全机制AHV-D&S，利用注意力头向量检测并抑制扩散Transformer中的风险内容生成。

papers.title: One-Step Graph-Structured Neural Flows for Irregular Multivariate Time Series Classification
papers.abstract: Neural Flows efficiently model irregular multivariate time series by directly learning ODE solution trajectories with neural networks, bypassing step-by-step numerical solvers. Despite their efficiency, many existing approaches treat variables independently, leaving inter-variable interactions underexplored. Moreover, their one-step mapping makes interaction modeling inherently challenging, as it removes the iterative refinement of interactions during learning. To address this challenge, we propose one-step Graph-Structured Neural Flows (GSNF), which introduce two auxiliary-trajectory self-supervision strategies to strengthen interaction learning: (i) interaction-aware trajectory generation via re-initialization, which induces trajectory divergence to expose graph-induced interactions, with a theoretically derived lower bound on divergence; and (ii) reverse-time trajectory generation, which enforces forward-backward consistency to regularize graph learning, enabled by flow invertibility. Experiments on five real-world datasets show that GSNF achieves state-of-the-art classification performance with highly competitive training time and memory usage.

analysis.tldr: 提出一步图结构神经流，通过辅助轨迹自监督策略增强不规则多变量时间序列中的变量交互建模，实现高效分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 不规则多变量时间序列中变量间交互建模困难，现有神经流方法常独立处理变量且一步映射缺乏迭代交互细化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不规则多变量时间序列分类中高效建模变量间交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一步映射使交互建模固有困难，因为缺乏学习过程中交互的迭代细化。
analysis.method: 提出一步图结构神经流（GSNF），引入两种辅助轨迹自监督策略：交互感知轨迹生成（通过重初始化诱导轨迹发散，暴露图诱导交互）和反向时间轨迹生成（利用流可逆性强制前向-后向一致性以正则化图学习）。
contributions: 提出GSNF，在不规则多变量时间序列分类中实现高效交互建模。
设计两种自监督辅助轨迹策略，理论推导了发散下界。
在五个真实数据集上达到SOTA分类性能，且训练时间和内存使用极具竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在五个真实世界数据集上进行实验，GSNF实现了最先进的分类性能，训练时间和内存使用极具竞争力。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如重初始化步长。
理论下界可能在实际中不紧。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，理论有界，实验充分，但应用范围限于分类任务。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一步图结构神经流，通过辅助轨迹自监督策略增强不规则多变量时间序列中的变量交互建模，实现高效分类。

papers.title: MTA-RL: Robust Urban Driving via Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Robust urban autonomous driving requires reliable 3D scene understanding and stable decision-making under dense interactions. However, existing end-to-end models lack interpretability, while modular pipelines suffer from error propagation across brittle interfaces. This paper proposes MTA-RL, the first framework that bridges perception and control through Multi-modal Transformer-based 3D Affordances and Reinforcement Learning (RL). Unlike previous fusion models that directly regress actions, RGB images and LiDAR point clouds are fused using a transformer architecture to predict explicit, geometry-aware affordance representations. These structured representations serve as a compact observation space, enabling the RL policy to operate purely on predicted driving semantics, which significantly improves sample efficiency and stability. Extensive evaluations in CARLA Town01-03 across varying densities (20-60 background vehicles) show that MTA-RL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Trained solely on Town03, our method demonstrates superior zero-shot generalization in unseen towns, achieving up to a 9.0% increase in Route Completion, an 11.0% increase in Total Distance, and an 83.7% improvement in Distance Per Violation. Furthermore, ablation studies confirm that our multi-modal fusion and reward shaping are critical, significantly outperforming image-only and unshaped variants, demonstrating the effectiveness of MTA-RL for robust urban autonomous driving.

analysis.tldr: 提出MTA-RL，通过多模态Transformer预测3D驾驶语义作为强化学习观测，提升城市自动驾驶鲁棒性与零样本泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端模型缺乏可解释性，模块化流水线存在误差传播问题，亟需一种兼具可解释性与稳定性的驾驶决策框架。
analysis.problem: 如何融合RGB图像与LiDAR点云，显式预测几何感知的驾驶语义（3D affordances），并利用强化学习实现鲁棒的城市自动驾驶。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用Transformer架构融合RGB图像与LiDAR点云，预测显式的3D affordance表示（如可行驶区域、障碍物距离等），并将这些结构化语义作为紧凑观测空间，输入强化学习策略进行决策。
contributions: 首个将多模态Transformer预测的3D affordance与强化学习结合用于城市自动驾驶的框架。
在CARLA模拟器中，仅用Town03训练即可在未见城镇实现零样本泛化，路线完成率提升9.0%，总距离提升11.0%，每次违规距离提升83.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在CARLA Town01-03中，背景车辆密度20-60辆，与多个基线对比，并进行了消融实验验证多模态融合与奖励塑形的重要性。
limitations: 仅在CARLA模拟器中验证，真实场景效果未知。
依赖3D affordance的预测精度，预测误差可能影响RL策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合多模态Transformer与RL，实验充分且零样本泛化显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MTA-RL，通过多模态Transformer预测3D驾驶语义作为强化学习观测，提升城市自动驾驶鲁棒性与零样本泛化。

papers.title: When Prompts Become Payloads: A Framework for Mitigating SQL Injection Attacks in Large Language Model-Driven Applications
papers.abstract: Natural language interfaces to structured databases are becoming increasingly common, largely due to advances in large language models (LLMs) that enable users to query data using conversational input rather than formal query languages such as SQL. While this paradigm significantly improves usability and accessibility, it introduces new security risks, particularly the amplification of SQL injection vulnerabilities through the prompt-to-SQL translation process. Malicious users can exploit these mechanisms by crafting adversarial prompts that manipulate model behavior and generate unsafe queries. In this work, we propose a multi-layered security framework designed to detect and mitigate LLM-mediated SQL injection attacks. The framework integrates a front-end security shield for prompt sanitization, an advanced threat detection model for behavioral and semantic anomaly identification, and a signature-based control layer for known attack patterns. We evaluate the proposed framework under diverse and realistic attack scenarios, including prompt injection, obfuscated SQL payloads, and context-manipulation attacks. To ensure robustness, we generate and curate a comprehensive benchmark dataset of adversarial prompts and assess performance across a fine-tuned LLM configuration. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high detection accuracy while maintaining low false-positive rates, significantly improving the secure deployment of LLM-powered database applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多层安全框架，用于检测和缓解LLM驱动的数据库应用中的SQL注入攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言查询数据库的普及带来了SQL注入风险，恶意用户可通过对抗性提示操纵LLM生成不安全查询，现有方法缺乏针对性防护。
analysis.problem: LLM驱动的提示转SQL过程中SQL注入攻击的检测与缓解问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个多层安全框架，包括前端提示净化盾、行为与语义异常检测模型、基于签名的已知攻击模式控制层。
contributions: 提出针对LLM驱动应用SQL注入攻击的多层安全框架
构建包含对抗性提示的基准数据集
analysis.experiments: 在多种攻击场景（提示注入、混淆SQL负载、上下文操纵）下评估，使用微调LLM配置，达到高检测准确率和低误报率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构
对未知攻击模式的泛化能力未充分验证
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有实际应用价值，但创新性中等，实验细节有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个多层安全框架，用于检测和缓解LLM驱动的数据库应用中的SQL注入攻击。

papers.title: BathyFacto: Refraction-Aware Two-Media Neural Radiance Fields for Bathymetry
papers.abstract: Through-water photogrammetry based on UAV imagery enables shallow-water bathymetry, but refraction at the air-water interface violates the straight-ray assumption of Structure-from-Motion and causes systematic depth bias. We present BathyFacto, a refraction-aware two-media extension of Nerfacto integrated into Nerfstudio that targets metrically precise underwater point clouds. BathyFacto uses a shared hash-grid-based density field with a medium-conditioned color head that receives a one-bit medium flag (air or water) and traces each camera ray as two segments: a straight segment in air up to a planar water surface and a refracted segment in water computed via Snell's law with known refractive indices. To allocate samples efficiently across the air-water boundary, we employ a single proposal-network sampler that operates on a virtual straight ray spanning both media, combined with a kinked density wrapper that transparently corrects water-segment positions along the refracted direction before density evaluation. A data adaptation pipeline converts photogrammetric reconstructions to a Nerfstudio-compatible format, estimates the water plane from boundary markers, and provides per-pixel medium masks to gate refraction. We also extend the point cloud export with refraction-corrected backprojection and reversible coordinate transforms to world and global frames. On a simulated two-media scene with known ground truth, BathyFacto with refraction achieves a Cloud-to-Mesh mean distance of 0.06 m and 87 % completeness, compared to 0.52 m / 29 % for the Nerfacto baseline and 0.36 m / 21% for conventional MVS without refraction correction.

analysis.tldr: 提出折射感知的双介质神经辐射场BathyFacto，用于浅水测深，显著提升水下点云精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于无人机影像的水上摄影测量可实现浅水测深，但空气-水界面的折射违反了运动恢复结构的直线射线假设，导致系统性深度偏差，现有方法未有效解决此问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在水上摄影测量中精确建模折射效应，实现公制精确的水下点云重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: BathyFacto扩展了Nerfacto，采用共享哈希网格密度场和介质条件颜色头（接收空气/水标志），每条相机射线分为空气段（直线）和水段（斯涅尔定律折射），使用单一提案网络采样器在虚拟直射线上采样，并通过扭结密度包装器修正水段位置，同时提供数据适配流水线估计水面和介质掩码。
contributions: 提出折射感知的双介质神经辐射场BathyFacto，集成于Nerfstudio框架。
设计共享密度场、介质条件颜色头、扭结密度包装器和数据适配流水线，实现高效折射建模。
在模拟场景中验证，相比基线方法显著提升点云精度和完整性。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟双介质场景中，BathyFacto的Cloud-to-Mesh平均距离为0.06米，完整性87%，而Nerfacto基线为0.52米/29%，传统MVS为0.36米/21%。
limitations: 假设水面为平面，可能不适用于波浪水面。
仅模拟场景验证，真实场景效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，技术实现详细，但仅在模拟场景验证，实际应用潜力待评估。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出折射感知的双介质神经辐射场BathyFacto，用于浅水测深，显著提升水下点云精度。

papers.title: V-ABS: Action-Observer Driven Beam Search for Dynamic Visual Reasoning
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable success in general perception, yet complex multi-step visual reasoning remains a persistent challenge. Although recent agentic approaches incorporate tool use, they often neglect critical execution feedback. Consequently, they suffer from the imagination-action-observer (IAO) bias, a misalignment between prior imagination and observer feedback that undermines reasoning stability and optimality. To bridge this gap, we introduce V-ABS, an action-observer driven beam search framework that enables deliberate reasoning through thinker-actor-observer iterations. We also propose an entropy-based adaptive weighting algorithm to mitigate the IAO bias by dynamically balancing the confidence scores between the policy priors and the observational feedback. Moreover, we construct a large-scale supervised fine-tuning (SFT) dataset comprising over 80k samples to guide the model to assign higher prior confidence to correct action paths. Extensive experiments across eight diverse benchmarks show that V-ABS achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering an average improvement of 19.7% on the Qwen3-VL-8B baseline and consistent gains across both open-source and proprietary models.

analysis.tldr: 提出V-ABS框架，通过行动-观察者驱动的束搜索和熵加权算法，缓解多步视觉推理中的想象-行动-观察者偏差，在多个基准上取得显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在通用感知上表现优异，但复杂多步视觉推理仍具挑战；现有智能体方法使用工具但忽略关键的执行反馈，导致推理不稳定和次优。
analysis.problem: 多步视觉推理中存在的想象-行动-观察者偏差（IAO bias），即先验想象与观察者反馈之间的错位，影响推理稳定性和最优性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法忽略执行反馈，导致IAO偏差，但未提供具体失败模式或经验规律。
analysis.method: 提出V-ABS框架，包含思考者-行动者-观察者迭代的束搜索，以及基于熵的自适应加权算法动态平衡策略先验与观察反馈的置信度；并构建80k样本的SFT数据集引导模型赋予正确行动路径更高先验置信度。
contributions: 提出V-ABS框架，通过行动-观察者驱动的束搜索实现深思熟虑的推理。
提出熵基自适应加权算法缓解IAO偏差。
构建大规模SFT数据集（80k+样本）提升模型对正确行动路径的先验置信度。
在八个基准上取得SOTA，平均提升19.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在八个不同基准上进行了广泛实验，在Qwen3-VL-8B基线上平均提升19.7%，并在开源和闭源模型上均取得一致增益。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基座模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
SFT数据集构建成本较高，可能限制可扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与VLM/MLLM方向高度相关，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出V-ABS框架，通过行动-观察者驱动的束搜索和熵加权算法，缓解多步视觉推理中的想象-行动-观察者偏差，在多个基准上取得显著提升。

papers.title: When Reviews Disagree: Fine-Grained Contradiction Analysis in Scientific Peer Reviews
papers.abstract: Scientific peer reviews frequently contain conflicting expert judgments, and the increasing scale of conference submissions makes it challenging for Area Chairs and editors to reliably identify and interpret such disagreements. Existing approaches typically frame reviewer disagreement as binary contradiction detection over isolated sentence pairs, abstracting away the review-level context and obscuring differences in the severity of evaluative conflict. In this work, we introduce a fine-grained formulation of reviewer contradiction analysis that operates over full peer reviews by explicitly identifying contradiction evidence spans and assigning graded disagreement intensity scores. To support this task, we present RevCI, an expert-annotated benchmark of peer-review pairs with evidence-level contradiction annotations with graded intensity labels. We further propose IMPACT, a structured multi-agent framework that integrates aspect-conditioned evidence extraction, deliberative reasoning, and adjudication to model reviewer contradictions and their intensity. To support efficient deployment, we distill IMPACT into TIDE, a small language model that predicts contradiction evidence and intensity in a single forward pass. Experimental results show that IMPACT substantially outperforms strong single-agent and generic multi-agent baselines in both evidence identification and intensity agreement, while TIDE achieves competitive performance at significantly lower inference cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出细粒度审稿矛盾分析任务、基准RevCI和多智能体框架IMPACT及轻量模型TIDE。
analysis.research_motivation: 科学同行评审中常出现冲突意见，但现有方法仅做二元矛盾检测，忽略评审上下文和冲突严重程度，难以辅助领域主席高效识别分歧。
analysis.problem: 如何对完整同行评审进行细粒度矛盾分析，包括识别矛盾证据片段并量化分歧强度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出IMPACT多智能体框架，包含方面条件证据提取、审慎推理和裁决模块；并蒸馏为轻量模型TIDE，单次前向传播预测矛盾证据和强度。
contributions: 提出细粒度审稿矛盾分析任务，定义证据级矛盾标注和分级强度评分。
构建专家标注的RevCI基准，包含评审对证据级矛盾标注。
提出IMPACT多智能体框架和蒸馏模型TIDE，在证据识别和强度一致性上超越基线。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明IMPACT在证据识别和强度一致性上显著优于强单智能体和通用多智能体基线，TIDE以更低推理成本达到竞争性能。
limitations: 可能依赖专家标注质量，扩展性待验证。
轻量模型TIDE性能与IMPACT仍有差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 任务定义新颖，方法有系统性，但应用场景较窄，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出细粒度审稿矛盾分析任务、基准RevCI和多智能体框架IMPACT及轻量模型TIDE。

papers.title: Automated Approach for Solving Infinite-state Polynomial Reachability Games
papers.abstract: Reachability games are two-player games played on a graph, where the objective of $\texttt{REACH}$ player is to reach the target set whereas the objective of $\texttt{SAFE}$ player is to stay away from the target set. Reachability games have important applications in artificial intelligence and reactive synthesis, and many of these applications give rise to infinite-state reachability games. In this paper, we study turn-based reachability games on infinite-state graphs defined over valuations of a finite set of real variables. We consider the problem of determining the existence of and computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player. Our contributions are twofold. First, we propose ranking certificates for reachability games, a sound and complete proof rule for proving that $\texttt{REACH}$ player has a winning strategy from the specified initial state. Second, we consider polynomial reachability games, where transitions and objectives are described by polynomial constraints over real variables, and propose a fully automated algorithm for computing a winning strategy for $\texttt{REACH}$ player together with a formal correctness witness in the form of a ranking certificate. The algorithm is sound, semi-complete, and runs in sub-exponential time. Our experiments demonstrate the ability of our method to solve challenging examples from the literature that were out of the reach of existing methods. Specifically, for the classical Cinderella-Stepmother game, we are able to compute an optimal winning strategy for an arbitrary precision parameter for the first time.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自动化方法求解无限状态多项式可达性博弈，通过排名证书证明获胜策略并实现次指数时间算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 可达性博弈在人工智能和反应式合成中有重要应用，但许多实际场景涉及无限状态图，现有方法难以处理。
analysis.problem: 确定并计算无限状态多项式可达性博弈中REACH玩家的获胜策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出排名证书作为完备的证明规则，并设计全自动算法，通过多项式约束描述博弈，输出获胜策略及形式化正确性证明。
contributions: 提出排名证书，一种用于可达性博弈的完备证明规则。
给出全自动算法，在次指数时间内求解多项式可达性博弈，并首次为Cinderella-Stepmother博弈计算任意精度参数下的最优获胜策略。
analysis.experiments: 在文献中的挑战性示例上测试，表明方法能解决现有方法无法处理的实例，包括Cinderella-Stepmother博弈。
limitations: 算法仅半完备，可能无法处理所有情况。
仅针对多项式约束，未扩展到更一般的约束类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新且理论扎实，但属于博弈论形式化方法，与主流ML方向关联较弱。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自动化方法求解无限状态多项式可达性博弈，通过排名证书证明获胜策略并实现次指数时间算法。

papers.title: Task-Agnostic Noisy Label Detection via Standardized Loss Aggregation
papers.abstract: Noisy labels are common in large-scale medical imaging datasets due to inter-observer variability and ambiguous cases. We propose a statistically grounded and task-agnostic framework, Standardized Loss Aggregation (SLA), for detecting noisy labels at the sample level. SLA quantifies label reliability by aggregating standardized fold-level validation losses across repeated cross-validation runs. This formulation generalizes discrete hard-counting schemes into a continuous estimator that captures both the frequency and magnitude of performance deviations, yielding interpretable and statistically stable noisiness scores. Experiments on a public fundus dataset demonstrate that SLA consistently outperforms the hard-counting baseline across all noise levels and converges substantially faster, especially under low noise ratios where subtle loss variations are informative. Samples with high SLA scores indicate potentially ambiguous or mislabeled cases, guiding efficient re-annotation and improving dataset reliability for any classification task.

analysis.tldr: 提出标准化损失聚合（SLA）框架，通过统计方法检测医学图像中的噪声标签，无需任务特定设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模医学影像数据集中噪声标签普遍存在，现有检测方法多为任务特定或依赖硬计数，缺乏统计稳定性和泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何以任务无关的方式，在样本级别可靠地检测噪声标签。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SLA通过聚合多次交叉验证中标准化后的折级损失，将离散硬计数扩展为连续估计器，同时捕捉性能偏差的频率和幅度，生成可解释的噪声分数。
contributions: 提出任务无关的噪声标签检测框架SLA，基于统计原理。
将硬计数方案泛化为连续估计器，提升检测稳定性和可解释性。
在公开眼底数据集上验证SLA优于基线，且低噪声比下收敛更快。
analysis.experiments: 在公开眼底数据集上进行实验，SLA在所有噪声水平下均优于硬计数基线，尤其在低噪声比下收敛更快。
limitations: 仅在单一模态（眼底图像）上验证，泛化性需更多实验。
未讨论高噪声比下的性能边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法有统计创新，但实验规模有限，适合关注噪声标签检测的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出标准化损失聚合（SLA）框架，通过统计方法检测医学图像中的噪声标签，无需任务特定设计。

papers.title: Coarsening Linear Non-Gaussian Causal Models with Cycles
papers.abstract: Recent work on causal abstraction, in particular graphical approaches focusing on causal structure between clusters of variables, aims to summarize a high-dimensional causal structure in terms of a low-dimensional one. Existing methods for learning such summaries from data assume that both the high- and low-dimensional structures are acyclic, which is helpful for causal effect identification and reasoning but excludes many high-dimensional models and thus limits applicability. We show that in the linear non-Gaussian (LiNG) setting, the high-dimensional acyclicity assumption can be relaxed while still allowing recovery of a low-dimensional causal directed acyclic graph (DAG). We further connect identifiability of this low-dimensional DAG to existing results: LiNG models with cycles are observationally identifiable only up to an equivalence class whose members differ by reversals of directed cycles; our low-dimensional DAG, which is invariant across all members of a given equivalence class, thus forms a natural representative of the class. While existing approaches for learning this observational equivalence class over high-dimensional variables have exponential time complexity, our low-dimensional summary is learned in worst-case cubic time and comes with explicit bounds on the sample complexity. We provide open source code and experiments on synthetic data to corroborate our theoretical results.

analysis.tldr: 提出在含环线性非高斯因果模型中，通过粗化学习低维有向无环图（DAG）的方法，放宽了高维无环假设，并保证多项式时间可学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果抽象方法假设高维和低维结构均为无环，限制了含环高维模型的应用，且学习高维观测等价类的时间复杂度为指数级。
analysis.problem: 如何在含环的线性非高斯（LiNG）因果模型中，从数据中学习一个低维的因果有向无环图（DAG）作为高维结构的摘要。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出含环LiNG模型在观测上仅可识别到等价类，等价类成员间通过有向环的反转区分；而低维DAG在该等价类中保持不变，可作为自然代表。
analysis.method: 提出一种粗化方法，将高维含环线性非高斯因果模型粗化为低维DAG，利用LiNG模型的特性放宽高维无环假设，并给出样本复杂度界。
contributions: 放宽了高维因果抽象中的无环假设，允许高维模型包含环。
证明了低维DAG在含环LiNG模型的观测等价类中不变，可作为等价类的代表。
提出最坏情况立方时间复杂度的学习算法，并给出样本复杂度界。
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据上进行实验，验证理论结果。
limitations: 仅适用于线性非高斯（LiNG）模型，非线性或高斯情况未涉及。

analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高，放宽了重要假设，但实验仅限合成数据，应用范围有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在含环线性非高斯因果模型中，通过粗化学习低维有向无环图（DAG）的方法，放宽了高维无环假设，并保证多项式时间可学习。

papers.title: Active-SAOOD: Active Sparsely Annotated Oriented Object Detection in Remote Sensing Images
papers.abstract: Reducing the annotation cost of oriented object detection in remote sensing remains a major challenge. Recently, sparse annotation has gained attention for effectively reducing annotation redundancy in densely remote sensing scenes. However, (1) the sparse data reliance on class-dependent sampling, and (2) the lack of in-depth investigation into the characteristics of sparse samples hinders its further development. This paper proposes an active learning-based sparsely annotated oriented object detection (SAOOD) method, termed Active-SAOOD. Based on a model state observation module, Active-SAOOD actively selects the most valuable sparse samples at the instance level that are best suited to the current model state, by jointly considering orientation, classification, and localization uncertainty, as well as inter- and intra-class diversity. This design enables SAOOD to operate stably under completely randomly initialized sparse annotations and extends its applicability to broader real-world. Experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that Active-SAOOD significantly improves both performance and stability of existing SAOOD methods under various random sparse annotation. In particular, with only 1\% annotated ratios, it achieves a 9\% performance gain over the baseline, further enhancing the practical value of SAOOD in remote sensing. The code will be public.

analysis.tldr: 提出主动学习策略选择最有价值的稀疏标注样本，提升遥感图像旋转目标检测性能与稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感图像旋转目标检测中标注成本高，稀疏标注虽能减少冗余但依赖类别相关采样且对稀疏样本特性研究不足，限制了其应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在完全随机初始化的稀疏标注下，稳定且高效地选择最有价值的样本以提升旋转目标检测性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于模型状态观测模块，联合考虑方向、分类、定位不确定性以及类间和类内多样性，主动选择实例级最有价值的稀疏样本。
contributions: 提出Active-SAOOD方法，实现完全随机初始化稀疏标注下的稳定旋转目标检测。
在多个数据集上验证，仅用1%标注比例即可获得9%的性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在多个遥感数据集上实验，与现有SAOOD方法对比，显示性能与稳定性提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
主动选择策略的计算开销未在摘要中讨论。

analysis.reason: 方法有创新但属于增量改进，实验充分但未超出遥感领域，建议阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主动学习策略选择最有价值的稀疏标注样本，提升遥感图像旋转目标检测性能与稳定性。

papers.title: MolSight: Molecular Property Prediction with Images
papers.abstract: Every molecule ever synthesised can be drawn as a 2D skeletal diagram, yet in modern property prediction this universally available representation has received less focus in favour of molecular graphs, 3D conformers, or billion-parameter language models, each imposing its own computational and data-engineering overhead. We present $\textbf{MolSight}$, the first systematic large-scale study of vision-based Molecular Property Prediction (MPP). Using 10 vision architectures, 7 pre-training strategies, and $2\,M$ molecule images, we evaluate performance across 10 downstream tasks spanning physical-property regression, drug-discovery classification, and quantum-chemistry prediction. To account for the wide variation in structural complexity across pre-training molecules, we further propose a $\textbf{chemistry-informed curriculum}$: five structural complexity descriptors partition the corpus into five tiers of increasing chemical difficulty, consistently outperforming non-curriculum baselines. We show that a single rendered bond-line image, processed by a vision encoder, is sufficient for competitive molecular property prediction, i.e. $\textit{chemical insight from sight alone}$. The best curriculum-trained configuration achieves the top result on $\textbf{5 of 10}$ benchmarks and top two on $\textbf{all 10}$, at $\textbf{$\textit{80$\times$ lower}$}$ FLOPs than the nearest multi-modal competitor.

analysis.tldr: MolSight首次系统研究基于图像的分子性质预测，使用视觉编码器处理2D结构图，在10个基准上取得5个最优，计算量降低80倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子性质预测中，2D骨架图作为通用表示未被充分利用，而分子图、3D构象或大语言模型等方法计算和数据工程开销大。
analysis.problem: 探索纯视觉方法（仅用2D分子图像）进行分子性质预测的可行性和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MolSight框架，系统评估10种视觉架构和7种预训练策略，并设计基于结构复杂度的化学信息课程学习（chemistry-informed curriculum）来组织预训练数据。
contributions: 首次大规模系统研究基于图像的分子性质预测，涵盖多种架构和预训练策略。
提出化学信息课程学习，利用结构复杂度描述符分层次训练，提升性能。
证明单张2D分子图像经视觉编码器即可实现竞争性预测，计算量比多模态方法低80倍。
analysis.experiments: 在10个下游任务（物理性质回归、药物发现分类、量子化学预测）上评估，最佳课程训练配置在5/10基准上取得最优，在所有10个基准上进入前二。
limitations: 可能依赖图像渲染质量，对复杂分子结构可能不鲁棒。

papers.title: Improving Temporal Action Segmentation via Constraint-Aware Decoding
papers.abstract: Temporal action segmentation (TAS) divides untrimmed videos into labeled action segments. While fully supervised methods have advanced the field, challenges such as action variability, ambiguous boundaries, and high annotation costs remain, especially in new or low-resource domains. Grammar-based approaches improve segmentation with structural priors but rely on complex parsing limiting scalability. In this work, we propose a lightweight, constraint-based refinement framework that enhances TAS predictions by integrating statistical structural priors such as transition confidence, action boundary sets, and per-class duration, that can be directly extracted from annotated data. These constraints are integrated into a modified Viterbi decoding algorithm, allowing inference-time refinement without retraining or added model complexity. Our approach improves both fully and semi-supervised TAS models by correcting structural prediction errors while maintaining high efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/LUNAProject22/CAD

analysis.tldr: 提出一种轻量级约束感知解码框架，通过统计结构先验改进时间动作分割的推理后精炼。
analysis.research_motivation: 时间动作分割面临动作变异性、边界模糊和标注成本高等挑战，现有语法方法依赖复杂解析，扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加模型复杂度或重新训练的情况下，利用结构先验提升时间动作分割预测的准确性。

在完全和半监督时间动作分割模型上均能提升性能，纠正结构预测错误。

papers.title: MicroViTv2: Beyond the FLOPS for Edge Energy-Friendly Vision Transformers
papers.abstract: The Vision Transformer (ViT) achieves remarkable accuracy across visual tasks but remains computationally expensive for edge deployment. This paper presents MicroViTv2, a lightweight Vision Transformer optimized for real-device efficiency. Built upon the original MicroViT, the proposed model is designed based on reparameterized design, specifically Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed) and Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW) for faster inference, and introduces the Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA) to capture long-range dependencies with minimal redundancy. Despite slightly higher FLOPs, MicroViTv2 improves accuracy up to 0.5% compared to its predecessor and surpassing MobileViTv2, EdgeNeXt, and EfficientViT while maintaining fast inference and high energy efficiency on Jetson AGX Orin. Experiments on ImageNet-1K and COCO demonstrate that hardware-aware design and structural re-parameterization are key to achieving high accuracy and low energy consumption, validating the need to evaluate efficiency beyond FLOPs. Code is available at https://github.com/novendrastywn/MicroViT.

analysis.tldr: MicroViTv2通过重参数化设计和单深度可分离转置注意力，在边缘设备上实现高能效视觉Transformer，超越FLOPs指标。
analysis.research_motivation: Vision Transformer在视觉任务中精度高，但计算成本高，难以部署在边缘设备上；传统FLOPs指标不能反映真实设备效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量级Vision Transformer，使其在边缘设备上同时实现高精度、低能耗和快速推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于重参数化设计，包括Reparameterized Patch Embedding (RepEmbed)和Reparameterized Depth-Wise convolution mixer (RepDW)以加速推理；引入Single Depth-Wise Transposed Attention (SDTA)捕获长距离依赖并减少冗余。
contributions: 提出MicroViTv2，一种面向边缘设备能效优化的轻量级Vision Transformer。
设计RepEmbed和RepDW模块，通过结构重参数化实现更快推理。

在ImageNet-1K和COCO上验证，MicroViTv2在精度和能效上优于MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt、EfficientViT等模型。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet-1K和COCO数据集上进行实验，在Jetson AGX Orin上测量推理速度和能效，与MicroViT、MobileViTv2、EdgeNeXt、EfficientViT对比。

papers.title: Benchmarking Safety Risks of Knowledge-Intensive Reasoning under Malicious Knowledge Editing
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly rely on knowledge editing to support knowledge-intensive reasoning, but this flexibility also introduces critical safety risks: adversaries can inject malicious or misleading knowledge that corrupts downstream reasoning and leads to harmful outcomes. Existing knowledge editing benchmarks primarily focus on editing efficacy and lack a unified framework for systematically evaluating the safety implications of edited knowledge on reasoning behavior. To address this gap, we present EditRisk-Bench, a benchmark for systematically evaluating safety risks of knowledge-intensive reasoning under malicious knowledge editing. Unlike prior benchmarks that mainly emphasize edit success, generalization, and locality, EditRisk-Bench focuses on how injected knowledge affects downstream reasoning behavior and reliability. It integrates diverse malicious scenarios, including misinformation, bias, and safety violations, together with multi-level knowledge-intensive reasoning tasks and representative editing strategies within a unified evaluation framework measuring attack effectiveness, reasoning correctness, and side effects. Extensive experiments on both open-source and closed-source LLMs show that malicious knowledge editing can reliably induce incorrect or unsafe reasoning while largely preserving general capabilities, making such risks difficult to detect. We further identify several key factors influencing these risks, including edit scale, knowledge characteristics, and reasoning complexity. EditRisk-Bench provides an extensible testbed for understanding and mitigating safety risks in knowledge editing for LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EditRisk-Bench 基准，系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 依赖知识编辑支持知识密集型推理，但恶意编辑可能注入误导性知识，导致有害推理结果；现有基准缺乏统一框架评估编辑知识对推理行为的安全影响。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 恶意知识编辑能可靠地诱导不正确或不安全的推理，同时基本保持通用能力，使风险难以检测；风险受编辑规模、知识特征和推理复杂度影响。
analysis.method: 构建 EditRisk-Bench 基准，集成多种恶意场景（错误信息、偏见、安全违规）、多级知识密集型推理任务和代表性编辑策略，统一评估攻击有效性、推理正确性和副作用。
contributions: 提出 EditRisk-Bench，首个系统评估恶意知识编辑安全风险的基准。
通过实验揭示恶意编辑可诱导不安全推理且难以检测，并识别关键影响因素。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和闭源 LLM 上进行实验，验证恶意知识编辑能可靠诱导错误或不安全推理，并分析编辑规模、知识特征和推理复杂度的影响。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有恶意编辑场景。
实验仅基于当前代表性编辑策略，未来策略可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 聚焦 LLM 安全风险，提出系统基准，实验充分，但方法创新性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EditRisk-Bench 基准，系统评估恶意知识编辑对 LLM 知识密集型推理的安全风险。

papers.title: Scaling Vision Models Does Not Consistently Improve Localisation-Based Explanation Quality
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence models are increasingly scaled to improve predictive accuracy, yet it remains unclear whether scale improves the quality of post-hoc explanations. We investigate this relationship by evaluating 11 computer vision models representing increasing levels of depth and complexity within the ResNet, DenseNet, and Vision Transformer families, trained from scratch or pretrained, across three image datasets with ground-truth segmentation masks. For each model, we generate explanations using five post-hoc explainable AI methods and quantify mask alignment using two localisation metrics: Relevance Rank Accuracy (Arras et al., 2022) and the proposed Dual-Polarity Precision, which measures positive attributions inside the class mask and negative attributions outside it. Across datasets and methods, increasing architectural depth and parameter count does not improve explanation quality in most statistical comparisons, and smaller models often match or exceed deeper variants. While pretraining typically improves predictive performance and increases the dependence of explanations on learned weights, it does not consistently increase localisation scores. We also observe scenarios in which models achieve strong predictive performance while localisation precision is near zero, suggesting that performance metrics alone may not indicate whether predictions are based on the annotated regions. These results indicate that larger models do not reliably provide higher-quality explanations, and that explainability should therefore be assessed explicitly during model selection for safety-sensitive deployments.

analysis.tldr: 增大视觉模型规模并不能稳定提升基于定位的解释质量，小模型有时表现更好。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI模型规模增大，预测精度提升，但后验解释质量是否随之提升尚不明确，这对安全敏感应用至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究模型规模（深度、参数量）与基于定位的解释质量之间的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 增大模型深度和参数量在多数统计比较中并未提升解释质量；小模型常匹配或超越大模型；预训练虽提升预测性能，但未一致提升定位分数；存在预测性能强但定位精度接近零的情况。
analysis.method: 在ResNet、DenseNet、Vision Transformer系列中选取11个模型，使用5种后验可解释AI方法生成解释，并用Relevance Rank Accuracy和提出的Dual-Polarity Precision两个定位指标量化掩码对齐。
contributions: 系统评估了模型规模与解释质量的关系，发现增大规模并不一致提升解释质量。
提出了Dual-Polarity Precision指标，同时衡量掩码内正归因和掩码外负归因。
揭示了预测性能与解释定位精度之间的脱节现象。
analysis.experiments: 在三个带有真实分割掩码的图像数据集上，对11个模型（含不同深度和复杂度）进行实验，使用5种XAI方法，统计比较定位指标。
limitations: 仅评估了基于定位的解释质量，未覆盖其他解释属性（如忠实度、可理解性）。
模型仅限于计算机视觉领域，结论可能不适用于其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.reason: 论文挑战了'大模型解释更好'的常见假设，实验设计系统，对安全敏感应用有重要启示，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 增大视觉模型规模并不能稳定提升基于定位的解释质量，小模型有时表现更好。

papers.title: FormalRewardBench: A Benchmark for Formal Theorem Proving Reward Models
papers.abstract: Recent neural theorem provers use reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), where proof assistants provide binary correctness signals. While verifiable rewards are cheap and scalable without reward hacking issues, they suffer from sparse credit assignment: models receive no learning signal from difficult problems where partial progress goes unrewarded. This motivates learned reward models that can evaluate proof quality beyond binary verification. However, comparing reward models is challenging since it typically requires expensive RL training ablations. To address this, we introduce \textbf{FormalRewardBench}, the first benchmark for evaluating reward models in formal theorem proving with Lean 4. Our benchmark consists of 250 preference pairs where correct proofs are paired with incorrect variants generated through five expert curated error injection strategies: forced mistakes, minimal single-point variations, verbose incorrect proofs, natural language justification, and Python code injection. We evaluate frontier LLMs (e.g., Claude Opus 4.5), judge LLMs (e.g., CompassJudger-1-14B), general-purpose LLMs (e.g., Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct), and specialized theorem proving models (e.g., DeepSeek-Prover-V2-7B). Our results reveal that frontier LLMs achieve the highest performance (59.8\%) while specialized theorem provers perform the worst (24.4\%), suggesting that theorem proving ability does not transfer to proof evaluation. We provide further insights on various error injection mechanisms, highlighting the challenging nature of most injection mechanisms. We release \textbf{FormalRewardBench} publicly to encourage more research on developing reward models in formal mathematics.

analysis.tldr: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型基准，揭示定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经定理证明器使用RLVR面临稀疏奖励问题，而学习奖励模型缺乏统一评估基准，难以比较不同模型。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估形式化定理证明中的奖励模型，以促进其发展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 前沿LLM在奖励模型评估中表现最好（59.8%），而专用定理证明模型表现最差（24.4%），表明定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。
analysis.method: 构建包含250个偏好对的基准，通过五种专家设计的错误注入策略生成正确与错误证明对，并评估多种LLM。
contributions: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型评估基准FormalRewardBench
揭示定理证明能力与证明评估能力之间的差距
analysis.experiments: 在250个偏好对上评估了前沿LLM、评判LLM、通用LLM和专用定理证明模型，前沿LLM最高59.8%，专用模型最低24.4%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（250对），可能不足以全面评估
错误注入策略可能未覆盖所有错误类型
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型基准，创新性高，实验揭示重要现象，但规模有限。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个形式化定理证明奖励模型基准，揭示定理证明能力不迁移到证明评估。

papers.title: Thermal-Det: Language-Guided Cross-Modal Distillation for Open-Vocabulary Thermal Object Detection
papers.abstract: Existing open-vocabulary detectors focus on RGB images and fail to generalize to thermal imagery, where low texture and emissivity variations challenge RGB-based semantics. We present Thermal-Det, the first large language model (LLM) supervised open-vocabulary detector tailored for thermal images. To enable large-scale training, we develop a synthetic dataset by converting GroundingCap-1M into the thermal domain and filtering captions to remove RGB-specific terms, yielding over one million thermally aligned samples with bounding boxes, grounding texts, and detailed captions. Thermal-Det jointly optimizes detection, captioning, and cross-modal distillation objectives. A frozen RGB teacher provides geometric and semantic pseudo-supervision for paired but unlabeled RGB-thermal data, transferring open-vocabulary knowledge without manual annotation. The model further employs a Thermal-Text Alignment Head for text calibration and a Modality-Fused Cross-Attention module for dual-modality reasoning. Unlike prior domain-adaptation methods, the detector is fully fine-tuned to internalize thermal contrast patterns while preserving language alignment. Experiments on public benchmarks show consistent 2-4% AP gains over existing open-vocabulary detectors, establishing a strong foundation for scalable, language-driven thermal perception.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向热红外图像的开放词汇目标检测器，利用LLM监督和跨模态蒸馏实现语言引导的热感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开放词汇检测器仅针对RGB图像，无法泛化到热红外图像，因为热图像纹理弱、发射率变化大，RGB语义难以直接迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够处理热红外图像、支持开放词汇检测的模型，并解决热域标注数据稀缺的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 热红外图像的低纹理和发射率变化导致RGB预训练语义失效，直接迁移效果差。
analysis.method: 提出Thermal-Det，包含三个关键组件：1) 将GroundingCap-1M转换为热域并过滤RGB特定词，生成百万级合成热数据集；2) 联合优化检测、描述和跨模态蒸馏目标，冻结RGB教师网络为未标注RGB-热配对数据提供伪监督；3) 热-文本对齐头进行文本校准，模态融合交叉注意力模块实现双模态推理。
contributions: 首个LLM监督的开放词汇热红外目标检测器，无需人工标注即可迁移开放词汇知识。
构建了百万级热红外合成数据集，包含边界框、定位文本和详细描述。
在公开基准上取得2-4% AP提升，为可扩展的语言驱动热感知奠定基础。
analysis.experiments: 在公开基准上测试，相比现有开放词汇检测器获得2-4% AP提升。
limitations: 合成数据与真实热图像之间可能存在域差异，影响泛化。
依赖RGB教师网络，在无配对RGB-热数据场景下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 首个热红外开放词汇检测器，方法创新且实验有提升，但依赖合成数据，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向热红外图像的开放词汇目标检测器，利用LLM监督和跨模态蒸馏实现语言引导的热感知。

papers.title: Fashion130K: An E-commerce Fashion Dataset for Outfit Generation with Unified Multi-modal Condition
papers.abstract: Recent research work on fashion outfit generation focuses on promoting visual consistency of garments by leveraging key information from reference image and text prompt. However, the potential of outfit generation remains underexplored, requiring comprehensive e-commercial dataset and elaborative utilization of multi-modal condition. In this paper, we propose a brand-new e-commerce dataset, named Fashion130k, with various occasions, models, and garment types. For the consistent generation of garment, we design a framework with Unified Multi-modal Condition (UMC) to align and integrate the text and visual prompts into generation model. Specifically, we explore an embedding refiner to extract the unified embeddings of multi-modal prompts, within which a Fusion Transformer is proposed to align the multi-modal embeddings by adjusting the modality gap between text and image. Based on unified embeddings, the attention in generation model is redesigned to emphasis the correlations between prompts and noise image, inducing that the noise image can select the pivotal tokens of prompts for consistent outfit generation. Our dataset and proposed framework offer a general and nuanced exploration of multi-modal prompts for generation models. Extensive experiments on real-world applications and benchmark demonstrate the effectiveness of UMC in visual consistency, achieving promising result than that of SoTA methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出Fashion130k电商服装数据集和UMC框架，通过多模态条件对齐提升服装生成一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有服装生成研究依赖参考图像和文本提示，但缺乏全面的电商数据集和对多模态条件的有效利用，导致生成视觉一致性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何构建电商服装数据集并设计多模态条件对齐框架，实现视觉一致的服装生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Fashion130k数据集和UMC框架，包括嵌入精炼器提取统一多模态嵌入、融合Transformer对齐文本与图像模态、以及重设计生成模型注意力以增强提示与噪声图像的相关性。
contributions: 构建了包含多种场合、模特和服装类型的电商数据集Fashion130k。
提出统一多模态条件框架UMC，通过嵌入精炼和融合Transformer对齐文本与视觉提示，提升生成视觉一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实应用和基准上验证了UMC在视觉一致性上的有效性，优于现有方法。
limitations: 数据集可能局限于电商场景，泛化性待验证。
多模态对齐的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

papers.title: Useful for Exploration, Risky for Precision: Evaluating AI Tools in Academic Research
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) tools are being incorporated into scientific research workflows with the potential to enhance efficiency in tasks such as document analysis, question answering (Q and A), and literature search. However, system outputs are often difficult to verify, lack transparency in their generation and remain prone to errors. Suitable benchmarks are needed to document and evaluate arising issues. Nevertheless, existing benchmarking approaches are not adequately capturing human-centered criteria such as usability, interpretability, and integration into research workflows. To address this gap, the present work proposes and applies a benchmarking framework combining human-centered and computer-centered metrics to evaluate AI-based Q&A and literature review tools for research use. The findings suggest that Q and A tools can offer valuable overviews and generally accurate summaries; however, they are not always reliable for precise information extraction. Explainable AI (xAI) accuracy was particularly low, meaning highlighted source passages frequently failed to correspond to generated answers. This shifted the burden of validation back onto the researcher. Literature review tools supported exploratory searches but showed low reproducibility, limited transparency regarding chosen sources and databases, and inconsistent source quality, making them unsuitable for systematic reviews. A comparison of these tool groups reveals a similar pattern: while AI tools can enhance efficiency in the early stages of the research workflow and shallow tasks, their outputs still require human verification. The findings underscore the importance of explainability features to enhance transparency, verification efficiency and careful integration of AI tools into researchers' workflows. Further, human-centered evaluation remains an important concern to ensure practical applicability.

analysis.tldr: AI工具在学术研究中适合探索性任务，但在精确信息提取和可重复性方面存在风险。
analysis.research_motivation: AI工具被引入科研工作流，但输出难以验证、缺乏透明度且易出错，现有基准未充分涵盖以人为中心的评估标准。
analysis.problem: 缺乏结合人本和计算机指标的基准来评估AI问答和文献综述工具在科研中的实际可用性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 问答工具提供有用概览但精确信息提取不可靠，可解释AI准确性低；文献综述工具支持探索但可重复性差、来源质量不一致。
analysis.method: 提出并应用一个结合人本和计算机指标的基准框架，评估AI问答和文献综述工具。
contributions: 提出一个结合人本和计算机指标的基准框架用于评估科研AI工具。
实证发现AI工具在探索性任务中有用，但在精确性和可重复性上存在局限。

papers.title: Rethinking Constraint Awareness for Efficient State Embedding of Neural Routing Solver
papers.abstract: Heavy-Encoder-Light-Decoder (HELD) neural routing solvers have emerged as a promising paradigm due to their broad applicability across multiple vehicle routing problems (VRPs). However, they typically struggle with VRP variants with complex constraints. To address this limitation, this paper systematically revisits existing neural solvers from the perspective of the generation mechanism for state embeddings (i.e., query vector prior to compatibility calculation) during decoding. We identify that current mechanisms restrict the observation space during attention computation, introducing a key bottleneck to achieving high-quality solutions. Through detailed empirical analysis, we demonstrate the necessity of preserving a global observation space. To overcome the constraint-agnostic drawback inherent to global observation spaces, we propose a simple yet powerful Constraint-Aware Residual Modulation (CARM) module. By adaptively modulating the context embedding with constraint-relevant variables, CARM effectively enhances constraint awareness, enabling the neural solver to fully leverage the global observation space and generate an efficient state embedding. Extensive experimental results across two single-task and five multi-task neural routing solvers confirm that the CARM module consistently boosts baseline performance. Notably, solvers equipped with our CARM achieve substantial improvements in scaling to large-scale instances and in generalizing to unseen VRP variants. These findings provide valuable insights for the architectural design of neural routing solvers.

analysis.tldr: 提出约束感知残差调制模块，使神经路由求解器在全局观测空间下高效编码状态，显著提升多任务VRP求解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HELD神经路由求解器在处理复杂约束的VRP变体时性能不佳，主要原因是解码时状态嵌入的生成机制限制了观测空间，导致无法获得高质量解。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲全局观测空间的前提下，增强神经路由求解器对复杂约束的感知能力，从而生成高效的状态嵌入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前机制在注意力计算时限制观测空间，成为实现高质量解的关键瓶颈；全局观测空间虽好但缺乏约束感知能力。
analysis.method: 提出约束感知残差调制（CARM）模块，通过用约束相关变量自适应调制上下文嵌入，增强约束感知，使求解器能充分利用全局观测空间生成高效状态嵌入。
contributions: 系统回顾了现有神经求解器在解码时状态嵌入的生成机制，识别出观测空间限制是性能瓶颈。
提出CARM模块，简单有效，能增强约束感知并保持全局观测空间。
在多个单任务和多任务求解器上验证CARM的通用性和有效性，显著提升大规模实例和未见VRP变体的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在两个单任务和五个多任务神经路由求解器上进行实验，CARM模块一致提升基线性能，并在大规模实例和未见VRP变体上取得显著改进。
limitations: 可能仅适用于HELD架构的神经路由求解器，对其他范式效果未知。
CARM模块的引入可能增加少量计算开销，未在摘要中量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较高，实验充分，但属于运筹优化领域，与核心关注方向中等相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出约束感知残差调制模块，使神经路由求解器在全局观测空间下高效编码状态，显著提升多任务VRP求解性能。

papers.title: Explainability of Recurrent Neural Networks for Enhancing P300-based Brain-Computer Interfaces
papers.abstract: Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs) based on P300 event-related potentials offer promising applications in health, education, and assistive technologies. However, challenges related to inter- and intra-subject variability and the explainability of Deep Learning (DL) models limit their practical deployment. In this work, we present the Post-Recurrent Module (PRM), an additional layer designed to improve both performance and transparency, incorporated into a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) architecture for classifying P300 signals from EEG data. Our approach enables a dual analysis of spatio-temporal signals through both global and local explainability techniques, allowing us not only to identify the most relevant brain regions and critical time intervals involved in classification, but also to interpret model decisions in terms of spatio-temporal EEG patterns consistent with well-stablished neurophysiological descriptions of the P300. Experimental results show a 9\% improvement in performance over state of the art, while also revealing the importance of inter- and intra-subject variability, in alignment with established neuroscience literature. By making model decisions transparent and efficient, we present a framework for explainable EEG-based models. This framework is not limited to more efficient P300 detection, but can be generalized to a wide range of EEG-based tasks. Its ability to identify key spatial and temporal features makes it suitable for applications such as motor imagery, steady-state visual evoked potentials, and even cognitive workload assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出后循环模块(PRM)提升RNN在P300脑机接口中的性能与可解释性，实现时空特征的双重解释。
analysis.research_motivation: P300脑机接口在健康、教育等领域有前景，但受限于个体差异和深度学习模型的可解释性不足，阻碍实际部署。
analysis.problem: 现有深度学习模型在P300脑电信号分类中性能有限且缺乏可解释性，无法有效识别关键时空特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在RNN架构中引入后循环模块(PRM)，通过全局和局部可解释性技术对时空信号进行双重分析，识别相关脑区和关键时间区间。
contributions: 提出PRM模块，同时提升P300分类性能和模型透明度
实现全局与局部可解释性分析，揭示与神经生理学一致的时空模式
analysis.experiments: 在P300脑电数据集上，性能比现有最优方法提升9%，并验证了与神经科学文献一致的个体差异重要性。
limitations: 仅在P300任务上验证，其他EEG任务需进一步测试
可解释性分析可能依赖特定网络架构
