analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且性能提升显著，可解释性贡献突出，但技术细节中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后循环模块(PRM)提升RNN在P300脑机接口中的性能与可解释性，实现时空特征的双重解释。

papers.title: MicroWorld: Empowering Multimodal Large Language Models to Bridge the Microscopic Domain Gap with Multimodal Attribute Graph
papers.abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) show remarkable potential for scientific reasoning, yet their performance in specialized domains such as microscopy remains limited by the scarcity of domain-specific training data and the difficulty of encoding fine-grained expert knowledge into model parameters. To bridge the gap, we introduce MicroWorld, a framework that constructs a multimodal attributed property graph (MAPG) from large-scale scientific image--caption corpora and leverages it to augment MLLM reasoning at inference time without any domain-specific fine-tuning. MicroWorld extracts biomedical entities and relations via scispaCy or LLM-based triplet mining, aligns images and entities in a shared embedding space using Qwen3-VL-Embedding, and assembles a knowledge graph comprising approximately 111K nodes and 346K typed edges spanning eight relation categories. At inference time, a graph-augmented retrieval pipeline matches query entities to the MAPG and injects structured knowledge context into the MLLM prompt. On the MicroVQA benchmark, MicroWorld improves the reasoning performance of Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct by 37.5%, outperforming GPT-5 by 13.0% to achieve a new state-of-the-art. Furthermore, it yields a 6.0% performance gain on the MicroBench benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate the enhanced generalization capability introduced by MicroWorld. A qualitative case study further reveals both the mechanisms through which structured knowledge improves reasoning and the failure modes that point to promising future directions. Code and data are available at https://github.com/ieellee/MicroWorld.

analysis.tldr: MicroWorld 通过构建多模态属性图增强 MLLM 在显微镜领域的推理能力，无需微调即实现 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态大模型在显微镜等专业领域因缺乏领域数据和细粒度知识编码而性能受限，亟需一种无需微调即可注入结构化知识的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行领域特定微调的情况下，利用结构化知识图谱提升 MLLM 在显微镜领域的推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从大规模科学图像-文本对中构建多模态属性图（MAPG），包含约111K节点和346K边，通过图增强检索在推理时向MLLM注入结构化知识。
contributions: 提出 MicroWorld 框架，构建多模态属性图并用于推理时增强 MLLM。
在 MicroVQA 上提升 Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct 性能 37.5%，超越 GPT-5 13.0%，并在 MicroBench 上提升 6.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在 MicroVQA 和 MicroBench 基准上评估，MicroWorld 显著提升推理性能并实现新 SOTA。
limitations: 依赖 scispaCy 或 LLM 进行三元组挖掘，可能引入噪声。
知识图谱规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有微观领域实体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新且实验充分，与 VLM 方向强相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MicroWorld 通过构建多模态属性图增强 MLLM 在显微镜领域的推理能力，无需微调即实现 SOTA。

papers.title: Think as Needed: Geometry-Driven Adaptive Perception for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: Autonomous driving scenes range from empty highways to dense intersections with dozens of interacting road users, yet current 3D detection models apply a fixed computation budget to every frame, wasting resources on simple scenes while lacking capacity for complex ones. Existing approaches compound this problem: Transformer-based interaction models scale quadratically with the number of detected objects, and frame-by-frame processing causes the system to immediately forget objects the moment they become occluded. We propose Enhanced HOPE, an adaptive perception architecture that measures the geometric complexity of each incoming LiDAR frame using an unsupervised statistical estimator and routes it through a shallow or deep processing path accordingly, requiring no manual scene labels. To keep interaction modeling efficient, we replace quadratic pairwise attention with a linear-time subspace-based network that groups nearby objects into clusters and processes them jointly. The computational savings from these two mechanisms free up resources for a persistent temporal memory module that retains previously detected objects and traffic rules across frames, enabling the system to recall occluded objects seconds after they disappear from view. On the nuScenes and CARLA benchmarks, Enhanced HOPE reduces latency by 38% on simple scenes with no accuracy loss, improves mean Average Precision by 2.7 points on rare long-tail scenarios, and tracks objects through occlusions lasting over 5 seconds, where all tested baselines fail.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应感知架构Enhanced HOPE，根据几何复杂度动态分配计算资源，并引入线性时间交互建模和持久时间记忆模块，在自动驾驶3D检测中实现高效与鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶场景复杂度差异大，现有3D检测模型对所有帧使用固定计算预算，简单场景浪费资源、复杂场景能力不足；Transformer交互模型随目标数二次增长，帧处理导致遮挡后立即遗忘。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自适应计算分配、高效交互建模和跨帧持久记忆，以提升自动驾驶3D检测的效率和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用无监督统计估计器测量每帧LiDAR的几何复杂度，路由至浅或深处理路径；用线性时间子空间网络替代二次注意力，将邻近目标分组联合处理；引入持久时间记忆模块，跨帧保留检测目标和交通规则。
contributions: 提出几何复杂度驱动的自适应感知架构，无需人工场景标签。
设计线性时间子空间交互网络，降低计算复杂度。
引入持久时间记忆模块，实现长时遮挡目标回忆。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes和CARLA基准上，简单场景延迟降低38%且无精度损失，罕见长尾场景mAP提升2.7点，可跟踪遮挡超过5秒的目标，所有基线失败。
limitations: 可能依赖LiDAR模态，未验证多模态融合。
持久记忆模块的存储和更新开销未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分且效果显著，与自动驾驶导航高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应感知架构Enhanced HOPE，根据几何复杂度动态分配计算资源，并引入线性时间交互建模和持久时间记忆模块，在自动驾驶3D检测中实现高效与鲁棒。

papers.title: CFSPMNet: Cross-subject Fourier-guided Spatial-Patch Mamba Network for EEG Motor Imagery Decoding in Stroke Patients
papers.abstract: Motor imagery electroencephalography (MI-EEG) decoding offers a non-invasive route for post-stroke rehabilitation, but cross-patient use remains difficult because pathological neural reorganization changes task-related EEG dynamics, aperiodic activity, local excitability, cross-regional coordination, and trial-level brain-state context. This makes source-learned MI representations unreliable for unseen patients. To address this problem, we propose CFSPMNet, a cross-patient adaptation framework that models post-stroke MI-EEG as latent neural-state organization. CFSPMNet combines a Fourier-Reorganized State Mamba Network (FRSM) with Shared-Private Prototype Matching (SPPM). FRSM represents each trial as a latent physiological token sequence, reorganizes token states in the Fourier domain, and uses Fourier-derived trial context to guide Mamba state-space propagation. SPPM improves target pseudo-label updating by combining semantic confidence with shared-private physiological consistency, filtering confident but physiologically inconsistent target predictions. Leave-one-subject-out experiments on two stroke MI-EEG datasets show that CFSPMNet outperforms representative CNN-, Transformer-, Mamba-, and adaptation-based baselines, achieving average accuracies of 68.23% on XW-Stroke and 73.33% on 2019-Stroke, with gains of 5.63 and 8.25 percentage points over the strongest competitors. Ablation, sensitivity, feature-alignment, pseudo-label selection, and neurophysiological visualization analyses further support the roles of Fourier-domain token-state reorganization and calibrated pseudo-label updating. These results suggest that latent neural-state modeling can improve rehabilitation-oriented cross-patient BCI decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/wxk1224/CFSPMNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出CFSPMNet，结合傅里叶域状态重组和共享-私有原型匹配，提升脑卒中患者运动想象脑电解码的跨被试泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 脑卒中患者的病理神经重组导致MI-EEG信号在跨被试使用时不可靠，现有方法难以适应个体差异，限制了BCI康复系统的临床应用。
analysis.problem: 如何实现脑卒中患者MI-EEG解码的跨被试泛化，克服病理神经重组带来的信号动态变化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 病理神经重组改变了任务相关的EEG动态、非周期活动、局部兴奋性、跨区域协调和试次级脑状态上下文，导致源域学习的MI表示对未见患者不可靠。
analysis.method: 提出CFSPMNet，包含傅里叶重组织状态Mamba网络（FRSM）和共享-私有原型匹配（SPPM）。FRSM将每个试次表示为潜在生理令牌序列，在傅里叶域重组令牌状态，并利用傅里叶导出的试次上下文引导Mamba状态空间传播；SPPM通过结合语义置信度和共享-私有生理一致性来改进目标伪标签更新。
contributions: 提出FRSM，在傅里叶域重组令牌状态并利用傅里叶上下文引导Mamba传播，建模潜在神经状态组织。
提出SPPM，通过共享-私有生理一致性过滤置信但生理不一致的目标预测，提升伪标签质量。
在两个卒中MI-EEG数据集上取得SOTA性能，平均准确率68.23%和73.33%，分别比最强基线高5.63和8.25个百分点。
analysis.experiments: 在两个卒中MI-EEG数据集（XW-Stroke和2019-Stroke）上进行留一被试实验，与CNN、Transformer、Mamba和基于适应的基线对比，并进行了消融、敏感性、特征对齐、伪标签选择和神经生理可视化分析。
limitations: 仅在两个数据集上验证，泛化性需更多数据支持。
方法复杂度较高，可能影响实时解码效率。

analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学

papers.title: Arcane: An Assertion Reduction Framework through Semantic Clustering and MCTS-Guided Rule Exploring
papers.abstract: Assertion-based Verification (ABV) is essential for ensuring that hardware designs conform to their intended specifications. However, existing automated assertion-generation approaches, such as LLM-based frameworks, often generate large numbers of redundant assertions, which significantly degrade simulation efficiency. To mitigate the simulation overhead caused by redundant assertions, this paper proposes Arcane, an efficient assertion reduction framework. It integrates a two-tier assertion clustering approach for accurate semantic classification of large assertion sets, and employs Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) to explore optimal rule-application sequences for efficient assertion reduction. The experimental results on Assertionbench [20] show that Arcane achieves a reduction of up to 76.2% in the assertion count while fully preserving formal coverage and mutation-detection ability. Further simulation studies demonstrate a speedup of 2.6x to 6.1x speedup in simulation time. The proposed framework is released at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Arcane1-0A6F/.

analysis.tldr: 提出Arcane框架，通过语义聚类和MCTS规则探索减少硬件验证中的冗余断言，最高减少76.2%断言数并加速仿真2.6-6.1倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于断言的验证（ABV）对硬件设计至关重要，但现有自动化断言生成方法（如基于LLM的框架）常产生大量冗余断言，严重降低仿真效率。
analysis.problem: 如何有效减少硬件验证中的冗余断言数量，同时保持形式化覆盖和突变检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Arcane框架，包含两层断言聚类（两层级语义聚类）和基于蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）的最优规则应用序列探索。
contributions: 提出两层级断言聚类方法，实现大规模断言集的精确语义分类。
采用MCTS探索最优规则应用序列，高效减少断言数量。
在Assertionbench上实现高达76.2%的断言减少，同时完全保持形式化覆盖和突变检测能力，仿真加速2.6-6.1倍。
analysis.experiments: 在Assertionbench数据集上评估，结果显示断言数量减少高达76.2%，形式化覆盖和突变检测能力完全保留；仿真时间加速2.6倍至6.1倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的硬件设计或断言格式。
MCTS探索的计算开销可能较大，未在摘要中讨论。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Arcane框架，通过语义聚类和MCTS规则探索减少硬件验证中的冗余断言，最高减少76.2%断言数并加速仿真2.6-6.1倍。

papers.title: ViSRA: A Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent for Multi-modal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) target 3D spatial intelligence, yet the progress has been largely driven by post-training on curated benchmarks, leaving the inference-time approach relatively underexplored. In this paper, we take a training-free perspective and introduce ViSRA, a human-aligned Video-based Spatial Reasoning Agent, as a framework to probe the spatial reasoning mechanism of MLLMs. ViSRA elicits spatial reasoning in a modular and extensible manner by leveraging explicit spatial information from expert models, enabling a plug-and-play flexible paradigm. ViSRA offers two key advantages: (1) human-aligned and transferable 3D understanding rather than task-specific overfitting; and (2) no post-training computational cost along with heavy manual curation of spatial reasoning datasets. Experimental results demonstrate consistent improvement across a set of MLLMs on both existing benchmarks and unseen 3D spatial reasoning tasks, with ViSRA outperforming baselines by up to a 15.6% and 28.9% absolute margin respectively.

analysis.tldr: ViSRA 是一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，通过模块化利用专家模型的空间信息提升 MLLM 的 3D 空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前 MLLM 的 3D 空间智能主要依赖后训练和精心设计的基准，推理时方法探索不足，且存在任务特定过拟合和高计算成本问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行后训练的情况下，提升 MLLM 在 3D 空间推理任务上的泛化能力和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ViSRA，一种训练无关的模块化框架，通过从专家模型中提取显式空间信息并以即插即用方式增强 MLLM 的空间推理。
contributions: 提出 ViSRA，一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，实现模块化、可扩展的空间推理。
在多个 MLLM 和基准上验证了 ViSRA 的通用性和有效性，在已知和未知任务上分别提升 15.6% 和 28.9% 的绝对性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个 MLLM 上对现有基准和未见过的 3D 空间推理任务进行测试，ViSRA 优于基线，绝对提升最高达 15.6% 和 28.9%。
limitations: 依赖外部专家模型，可能引入额外推理延迟。
在极端复杂或动态场景中的泛化能力尚未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities

analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViSRA 是一种无需训练的视频空间推理智能体，通过模块化利用专家模型的空间信息提升 MLLM 的 3D 空间推理能力。

papers.title: HYPERPOSE: Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention for 3D Human Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: We introduce HYPERPOSE, a novel 3D human pose estimation framework that performs spatio-temporal reasoning entirely within the Lorentz model of hyperbolic space $\mathbb{H}^d$ to natively preserve the hierarchical tree topology of the human skeleton. Current state-of-the-art pose estimators aim to capture complex joint dynamics by relying on transformers and graph convolutional networks. Since these architectures operate exclusively in Euclidean space which fundamentally mismatches the inherent tree structure of the human body, these methods inevitably suffer from exponential volume distortion and struggle to maintain structural coherence. To this end, we depart from flat spaces and aim to improve geometric fidelity with Hyperbolic Kinematic Phase-Space Attention (HKPSA), natively embedding complex joint relationships without distortion, alongside a multi-scale windowed hyperbolic attention mechanism that efficiently models temporal dynamics in $O(TW)$ complexity. Furthermore, to overcome the well-known instability of training non-Euclidean manifolds, HYPERPOSE introduces a novel Riemannian loss suite and an uncertainty-weighted curriculum, enforcing physical geodesic constraints like bone length and velocity consistency. Extensive evaluations on the Human3.6M and MPI-INF-3DHP datasets demonstrate that HYPERPOSE achieves state-of-the-art structural and temporal coherence, significantly reducing both volume distortion and velocity error, while establishing new state-of-the-art benchmarks in overall positional accuracy.

analysis.tldr: HYPERPOSE利用双曲空间洛伦兹模型进行时空推理，实现3D人体姿态估计，减少体积失真并提升结构一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D人体姿态估计方法基于欧几里得空间，与人体骨架的树状层级结构不匹配，导致指数级体积失真和结构连贯性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在非欧几里得空间中有效建模人体骨架的层级树状拓扑结构，同时保持时空动态的高效性和训练稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出欧几里得空间架构（如Transformer、GCN）因与人体树状结构不匹配，导致体积失真和结构连贯性差。
analysis.method: 提出HYPERPOSE框架，在双曲空间洛伦兹模型中进行时空推理，包含双曲运动相位空间注意力（HKPSA）和多尺度窗口化双曲注意力机制，并引入黎曼损失套件和不确定性加权课程学习。
contributions: 首次在双曲空间洛伦兹模型中进行3D人体姿态估计的时空推理，原生保留人体骨架层级树状拓扑。
提出双曲运动相位空间注意力和多尺度窗口化双曲注意力，实现O(TW)复杂度的时序建模。
引入黎曼损失套件和不确定性加权课程学习，解决非欧几里得流形训练不稳定性问题。
analysis.experiments: 在Human3.6M和MPI-INF-3DHP数据集上评估，达到结构、时序和位置精度的新SOTA。
limitations: 双曲空间计算复杂度可能高于欧几里得方法，实际部署需优化。
方法依赖人体骨架树状结构假设，对非严格树状结构（如手部）可能效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，在双曲空间进行3D姿态估计，实验达到SOTA，但摘要未提供具体数值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HYPERPOSE利用双曲空间洛伦兹模型进行时空推理，实现3D人体姿态估计，减少体积失真并提升结构一致性。

papers.title: Retrieve-then-Steer: Online Success Memory for Test-Time Adaptation of Generative VLAs
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation, yet their closed-loop reliability often degrades under local deployment conditions. Existing evaluations typically treat test episodes as independent zero-shot trials. However, real robots often operate repeatedly in the same or slowly changing environments, where successful executions provide environment-verified evidence of reliable behavior patterns. We study this persistent-deployment setting, asking whether a partially competent frozen VLA can improve its reliability by reusing its successful test-time experience. We propose an online success-memory guided test-time adaptation framework for generative VLAs. During deployment, the robot stores progress-calibrated successful observation-action segments in a long-term memory. At inference, it retrieves state-relevant action chunks, filters inconsistent candidates via trajectory-level consistency, and aggregates them into an elite action prior. To incorporate this prior into action generation, we introduce confidence-adaptive prior guidance, which injects the elite prior into an intermediate state of the flow-matching action sampler and adjusts the guidance strength based on retrieval confidence. This design allows the frozen VLA to exploit environment-specific successful experience while preserving observation-conditioned generative refinement. This retrieve-then-steer mechanism enables lightweight, non-parametric test-time adaptation without requiring parameter updates. Simulation and real-world experiments show improved task success and closed-loop stability, especially in long-horizon and multi-stage tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出检索-引导框架，通过在线成功记忆实现生成式VLA的测试时自适应，无需参数更新即可提升部署可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型在本地部署时闭环可靠性下降，且测试时通常视为独立零样本任务，未利用重复部署环境中积累的成功经验。
analysis.problem: 如何让冻结的生成式VLA模型在测试时利用在线成功经验提升闭环可靠性，而不更新模型参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 真实机器人常在相同或缓慢变化环境中重复运行，成功执行提供了环境验证的可靠行为模式，但现有方法未利用这一经验。
analysis.method: 提出检索-引导框架：部署时存储进度校准的成功观测-动作片段；推理时检索状态相关动作块，通过轨迹级一致性过滤并聚合为精英动作先验；通过置信度自适应先验引导注入流匹配动作采样器的中间状态。
contributions: 提出在线成功记忆引导的测试时自适应框架，无需参数更新即可提升生成式VLA的可靠性。
设计检索-引导机制，结合轨迹级一致性和置信度自适应先验引导，有效利用环境特定成功经验。
analysis.experiments: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，该方法在长时域和多阶段任务中提升了任务成功率和闭环稳定性。
limitations: 依赖成功记忆的质量和检索相关性，在高度动态环境中可能失效。
未讨论记忆存储容量和检索效率的扩展性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实用，针对VLA部署痛点提出轻量级自适应方案，实验验证有效，与机器人操作方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出检索-引导框架，通过在线成功记忆实现生成式VLA的测试时自适应，无需参数更新即可提升部署可靠性。

papers.title: Initiation of Interaction Detection Framework using a Nonverbal Cue for Human-Robot Interaction
papers.abstract: This paper describes an initiation of interaction(IoI) detection framework without keywords for human-robot interaction(HRI) based on audio and vision sensor fusion in a domestic environment. In the proposed framework, the robot has its own audio and vision sensors, and can employ external vision sensor for stable human detection and tracking. When the user starts to speak while looking at the robot, the robot can localize his or her position by its sound source localization together with human tracking information. Then the robot can detect the IoI if it perceives the face of the speaker faces the robot. In case that the user does not speak directly, the robot can also detect the IoI if he or she looks at the robot for more than predefined periods of time. A state transition model for the proposed IoI detection framework is designed and verified by experiments with a mobile robot. In order to implement and associate our model in a robot architecture, all the components are implemented and integrated in the Robot Operating System(ROS) environment.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于音视频融合的非关键词交互启动检测框架，用于家庭环境中的人机交互。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有HRI交互启动通常依赖关键词或特定指令，缺乏自然、无关键词的检测方法，限制了交互的自然性和便捷性。
analysis.problem: 如何在无关键词条件下，通过多传感器融合准确检测用户启动交互的意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 融合机器人自身音视频传感器与外部视觉传感器，通过声源定位与人体跟踪确定用户位置，结合面部朝向和注视时长判断交互启动，并设计状态转移模型。
contributions: 提出一种无需关键词的交互启动检测框架，融合音频和视觉信息。
设计了状态转移模型并在ROS中实现，通过移动机器人实验验证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在家庭环境验证，泛化性未知。
依赖外部视觉传感器，部署成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验信息不足，应用场景较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于音视频融合的非关键词交互启动检测框架，用于家庭环境中的人机交互。

papers.title: PoDAR: Power-Disentangled Audio Representation for Generative Modeling
papers.abstract: The performance of audio latent diffusion models is primarily governed by generator expressivity and the modelability of the underlying latent space. While recent research has focused primarily on the former, as well as improving the reconstruction fidelity of audio codecs, we demonstrate that latent modelability can be significantly improved through explicit factor disentanglement. We present PoDAR (Power-Disentangled Audio Representation), a framework that utilizes a randomized power augmentation and latent consistency objective to decouple signal power from invariant semantic content. This factorization makes the latent space easier to model, which both accelerates the convergence of downstream generative models and improves final overall performance. When applied to a Stable Audio 1.0 VAE with an F5-TTS generator, PoDAR achieves about a $2\times$ acceleration in convergence to match baseline performance, while increasing final speaker similarity by 0.055 and UTMOS by 0.22 on the LibriSpeech-PC dataset. Furthermore, isolating power into dedicated channels enables the application of CFG exclusively to power-invariant content, effectively extending the stable guidance regime to higher scales.

analysis.tldr: PoDAR通过解耦信号功率与语义内容，提升音频潜空间的可建模性，加速扩散模型收敛并改善生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频潜扩散模型主要关注生成器表达力和编解码器重建保真度，但潜空间的可建模性被忽视，导致模型训练效率低、性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何通过显式因子解耦来提升音频潜空间的可建模性，从而加速下游生成模型收敛并提高最终性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PoDAR框架，利用随机功率增强和潜一致性目标，将信号功率与不变语义内容解耦，使潜空间更易建模。
contributions: 提出功率解耦的音频表示方法PoDAR，显著提升潜空间可建模性。
在Stable Audio 1.0 VAE和F5-TTS生成器上实现约2倍收敛加速，同时提高说话人相似度和UTMOS分数。
将功率隔离到专用通道，允许CFG仅应用于功率不变内容，扩展稳定引导范围。
analysis.experiments: 在LibriSpeech-PC数据集上，PoDAR相比基线实现约2倍收敛加速，最终说话人相似度提升0.055，UTMOS提升0.22。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定音频生成任务，泛化性未验证。
功率解耦策略可能对噪声敏感，鲁棒性需进一步分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法有创新性，但属于音频生成特定方向，与重点方向相关性中等。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PoDAR通过解耦信号功率与语义内容，提升音频潜空间的可建模性，加速扩散模型收敛并改善生成质量。

papers.title: SocialDirector: Training-Free Social Interaction Control for Multi-Person Video Generation
papers.abstract: Video generation has advanced rapidly, producing photorealistic videos from text or image prompts. Meanwhile, film production and social robotics increasingly demand multi-person videos with rich social interactions, including conversations, gestures, and coordinated actions. However, existing models offer no explicit control over interactions, such as who performs which action, when it occurs, and toward whom it is directed. This often results in wrong person performing unintended actions (actor-action mismatch), disordered social dynamics, and wrong action targets. To address these challenges, we present SocialDirector, a training-free interaction controller that enhances the generation model by modulating cross-attention maps. SocialDirector contains two modules: Social Actor Masking and Directional Reweighting. Social Actor Masking constrains each person's visual tokens to attend only to their own textual descriptions via a spatiotemporal mask, avoiding actor-action mismatch and disordered social dynamics. Directional Reweighting amplifies attention to directional words (e.g., "leftward", "right"), leading each action towards its intended target. To evaluate generated social interactions, we annotate existing datasets with interaction descriptions and build a fully automated evaluation pipeline powered by open-source VLMs. Experiments on different video generation models show that SocialDirector significantly improves interaction fidelity and approaches the upper bound set by real videos.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的社会交互控制方法SocialDirector，通过调节交叉注意力图实现多人物视频中交互的精确控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频生成模型无法控制多人物视频中的社会交互（如谁执行动作、何时发生、针对谁），导致角色-动作不匹配、社交动态混乱等问题，而电影制作和社交机器人对此有强烈需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练模型的前提下，对多人物视频生成中的社会交互（动作执行者、动作时间、动作目标）进行显式控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有模型生成的多人物视频常出现角色-动作不匹配、社交动态无序、动作目标错误等失败模式。
analysis.method: SocialDirector包含两个模块：Social Actor Masking（通过时空掩码约束每个人物视觉token仅关注自身文本描述）和Directional Reweighting（放大方向性词汇的注意力，引导动作朝向正确目标）。
contributions: 提出无需训练的社会交互控制方法，可即插即用于现有视频生成模型。
构建基于开源VLM的全自动评估流程，并标注现有数据集以评估社会交互质量。
analysis.experiments: 在不同视频生成模型上实验，显示SocialDirector显著提升交互保真度，接近真实视频的上限。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练模型对方向性词汇的理解能力。
未提及对复杂多人交互（如群体对话）的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（无需训练），针对视频生成中社会交互控制这一重要问题，实验显示有效，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的社会交互控制方法SocialDirector，通过调节交叉注意力图实现多人物视频中交互的精确控制。

papers.title: Active Testing of Large Language Models via Approximate Neyman Allocation
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) require reliable evaluation from pre-training to test-time scaling, making evaluation a recurring rather than one-off cost. As model scales grow and target tasks increasingly demand expert annotators, both the compute and labeling costs needed for each evaluation rise rapidly. Active testing aims to alleviate this bottleneck by approximating the evaluation result from a small but informative subset of the evaluation pool. However, existing approaches primarily target classification and break down on generative tasks. We introduce a novel active testing algorithm tailored to generative tasks. Our method leverages semantic entropy from surrogate models to stratify the evaluation pool and then conducts approximate Neyman allocation based on signals extracted from these surrogates. Across multiple language and multimodal benchmarks and a range of surrogate-target model pairs, our method significantly improves on baselines and closely tracks Oracle-Neyman, delivering up to 28\% MSE reduction over Uniform Sampling and an average of 22.9\% budget savings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于近似Neyman分配的主动测试方法，用于高效评估大语言模型，显著降低标注成本。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM评估从预训练到测试时缩放都需要反复进行，随着模型规模增长和任务对专家标注的需求增加，计算和标注成本急剧上升。现有主动测试方法主要针对分类任务，在生成任务上失效。
analysis.problem: 如何在生成任务中利用少量有信息量的样本近似评估结果，从而降低LLM评估的标注成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用替代模型的语义熵对评估池进行分层，然后基于替代模型提取的信号进行近似Neyman分配，以优化样本分配。
contributions: 提出首个针对生成任务的主动测试算法，利用语义熵和近似Neyman分配。
在多个语言和多模态基准上，相比均匀采样实现高达28%的MSE降低和平均22.9%的预算节省。
analysis.experiments: 在多个语言和多模态基准上，使用多种替代-目标模型对进行实验，与均匀采样和Oracle-Neyman对比，报告了MSE降低和预算节省。
limitations: 依赖替代模型的质量，可能影响分层和分配效果。
未讨论在极端低预算或高噪声场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验充分，对LLM评估效率有显著提升，值得精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于近似Neyman分配的主动测试方法，用于高效评估大语言模型，显著降低标注成本。

papers.title: MFVLR: Multi-domain Fine-grained Vision-Language Reconstruction for Generalizable Diffusion Face Forgery Detection and Localization
papers.abstract: The swift advancement in photo-realistic face generation technology has sparked considerable concerns across society and academia, emphasizing the requirement of generalizable face forgery detection and localization methods. Prior works tend to capture face forgery patterns across multiple domains using image modality, other modalities like fine-grained texts are not comprehensively investigated, which restricts the generalization capability of models. Besides, they usually analyze facial images created by GAN, but struggle to identify and localize those synthesized by diffusion. To solve the problems, in this paper, we devise a novel multi-domain fine-grained vision-language reconstruction (MFVLR) model, which explores comprehensive and diverse visual forgery traces via language-guided face forgery representation learning, to achieve generalizable diffusion-synthesized face forgery detection and localization (DFFDL). Specifically, we devise a fine-grained language transformer that studies general fine-grained language embeddings using language reconstruction. We propose a multi-domain vision encoder to capture general and complementary visual forgery patterns across the image and residual domains. A vision decoder is designed to reconstruct image appearance and achieve forgery localization. Besides, we propose an innovative plug-and-play vision injection module to enhance the interaction between the vision and language embeddings. Extensive experiments and visualizations demonstrate that our network outperforms the state of the art on different settings like cross-generator, cross-forgery, and cross-dataset evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出多域细粒度视觉-语言重建模型MFVLR，通过语言引导的伪造表征学习实现可泛化的扩散合成人脸伪造检测与定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法主要基于图像模态分析伪造痕迹，忽略了细粒度文本等模态信息，且难以检测和定位扩散模型合成的人脸图像，限制了泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多域细粒度视觉-语言信息实现可泛化的扩散合成人脸伪造检测与定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计细粒度语言Transformer学习通用语言嵌入，多域视觉编码器捕获图像和残差域的互补伪造模式，视觉解码器重建图像外观并定位伪造区域，以及即插即用的视觉注入模块增强视觉与语言嵌入的交互。
contributions: 提出MFVLR模型，首次将多域细粒度视觉-语言重建用于扩散合成人脸伪造检测与定位。
设计细粒度语言Transformer和多域视觉编码器，实现跨生成器、跨伪造类型和跨数据集的泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 在跨生成器、跨伪造类型和跨数据集设置下进行实验，结果表明MFVLR优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的语言标注数据。
对极端伪造或低质量图像的泛化能力未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，结合多模态和扩散伪造检测，实验充分，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多域细粒度视觉-语言重建模型MFVLR，通过语言引导的伪造表征学习实现可泛化的扩散合成人脸伪造检测与定位。

papers.title: Metis: Learning to Jailbreak LLMs via Self-Evolving Metacognitive Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Red teaming is critical for uncovering vulnerabilities in Large Language Models (LLMs). While automated methods have improved scalability, existing approaches often rely on static heuristics or stochastic search, rendering them brittle against advanced safety alignment. To address this, we introduce Metis, a framework that reformulates jailbreaking as inference-time policy optimization within an adversarial Partially Observable Markov Decision Process (POMDP). Metis employs a self-evolving metacognitive loop to perform causal diagnosis of a target's defense logic and leverages structured feedback as a semantic gradient to refine its policy, offering enhanced interpretability through transparent reasoning traces. Extensive evaluations across 10 diverse models demonstrate that Metis achieves the strongest average Attack Success Rate (ASR) among compared methods at 89.2%, maintaining high efficacy on resilient frontier models (e.g., 76.0% on O1 and 78.0% on GPT-5-chat) where traditional baselines exhibit substantial performance degradation. By replacing redundant exploration with directed optimization, Metis reduces token costs by an average of 8.2x and up to 11.4x. Our analysis reveals that current defenses remain vulnerable to internally-steered, closed-loop reasoning trajectories under the tested settings, highlighting a critical need for next-generation defenses capable of reasoning about safety dynamically during inference.

analysis.tldr: Metis将越狱攻击建模为对抗POMDP中的推理时策略优化，通过自演化元认知循环实现高效、可解释的LLM漏洞挖掘。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自动化红队方法依赖静态启发式或随机搜索，面对先进安全对齐时脆弱且效率低，亟需更智能、可解释的越狱框架。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、可解释地生成针对LLM的越狱攻击，以揭示其安全对齐漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 传统基线在鲁棒前沿模型（如O1、GPT-5-chat）上性能显著下降，而Metis通过定向优化替代冗余探索，大幅降低token成本。
analysis.method: 将越狱建模为对抗POMDP中的推理时策略优化，采用自演化元认知循环进行目标防御逻辑的因果诊断，并利用结构化反馈作为语义梯度来细化策略。
contributions: 提出Metis框架，将越狱重新定义为对抗POMDP中的推理时策略优化。
引入自演化元认知循环，实现可解释的因果诊断和策略细化。
在10个模型上达到89.2%的平均ASR，在O1和GPT-5-chat上分别达到76.0%和78.0%，同时降低8.2倍token成本。
analysis.experiments: 在10个不同模型上评估，Metis平均ASR为89.2%，在O1和GPT-5-chat上分别为76.0%和78.0%，token成本平均降低8.2倍。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的越狱场景，未在更多样化的防御机制上验证。
元认知循环的计算开销可能在高实时性场景中受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（POMDP+元认知），实验充分且效果显著，对安全对齐领域有重要启示。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Metis将越狱攻击建模为对抗POMDP中的推理时策略优化，通过自演化元认知循环实现高效、可解释的LLM漏洞挖掘。

papers.title: NCO: A Versatile Plug-in for Handling Negative Constraints in Decoding
papers.abstract: Controlling Large Language Models (LLMs) to prevent the generation of undesirable content, such as profanity and personally identifiable information (PII), has become increasingly critical. While earlier approaches relied on post-processing or resampling, recent research has shifted towards constrained decoding methods that control outputs during generation to mitigate high computational costs and quality degradation. However, preventing multiple forbidden hard constraints or regex constraints from appearing anywhere in the output is computationally challenging. A straightforward solution is to convert these constraints into a single automaton that tracks all forbidden patterns during decoding, but this often becomes impractically large. Standard regex engines also do not readily support the operations needed to build such a constraint, such as complement and intersection. In order to address these limitations, we propose NCO, a decoding strategy that performs online pattern matching over finite hard constraints and regex constraints, reducing computational overhead without inducing state explosion. NCO is fully compatible with standard inference strategies, including various sampling methods and beam search, while also supporting soft masking for probabilistic suppression. We empirically demonstrate its effectiveness across practical tasks, including PII and profanity suppression. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/hyundong98/NCO-Decoding.git .

analysis.tldr: 提出NCO解码策略，通过在线模式匹配高效处理LLM解码中的硬约束和正则约束，避免状态爆炸。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM生成中需要防止不当内容（如脏话、个人身份信息），现有约束解码方法在处理多个禁止硬约束或正则约束时计算成本高，且标准正则引擎不支持补集和交集操作。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地在LLM解码过程中施加多个禁止硬约束和正则约束，避免状态爆炸和计算开销过大。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 将多个禁止约束转换为单一自动机跟踪所有禁止模式会导致自动机规模过大，不实用；标准正则引擎不支持构建此类约束所需的补集和交集操作。
analysis.method: 提出NCO解码策略，采用在线模式匹配（如Aho-Corasick算法）处理有限硬约束和正则约束，避免状态爆炸，兼容多种采样方法和束搜索，并支持软掩码进行概率抑制。
contributions: 提出NCO，一种高效的约束解码策略，通过在线模式匹配处理多个硬约束和正则约束，避免状态爆炸。
NCO兼容标准推理策略（采样、束搜索）并支持软掩码，在PII和脏话抑制任务上验证有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在PII和脏话抑制等实际任务上进行了实验，展示了有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有限类型的约束（硬约束和正则约束），对更复杂的语义约束支持有限。
在线模式匹配在处理极大量约束时可能仍有性能瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验信息不足，且属于安全对齐方向，推荐阅读摘要。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NCO解码策略，通过在线模式匹配高效处理LLM解码中的硬约束和正则约束，避免状态爆炸。

papers.title: MAGE: Multi-Agent Self-Evolution with Co-Evolutionary Knowledge Graphs
papers.abstract: Self-evolving language-model agents must decide what to learn next and how to preserve what they have learned across iterations. Existing systems typically carry this cross-iteration knowledge as natural-language feedback, flat episodic memory, or implicit reinforcement signals, none of which cleanly supports a frozen weak backbone at inference time. This paper introduces MAGE (Multi-Agent Graph-guided Evolution), a framework that externalizes self-knowledge into a four-subgraph co-evolutionary knowledge graph. Its experience subgraph stores both teacher-written failure corrections and the learner's own past correct reasoning traces, which are retrieved as task-conditioned guidance for a frozen execution model. During evolution, the graph, a task-level search bandit, and a skill-level routing bandit are updated from the same reward stream, while the learner's backbone remains unchanged. We further provide structural analysis showing how append-only memory growth, bounded curriculum coverage, and task-filtered retrieval together support stable improvement of the retrieval substrate for frozen-learner evolution. Across nine benchmarks spanning mathematical reasoning, multi-hop and open-domain question answering, spatio-temporal analysis, financial numerical reasoning, medical multiple-choice, an open-world survival game, and web navigation, MAGE achieves strong performance against prompt-based frozen-backbone baselines. Ablations show that self-harvested success traces and teacher-written corrections are complementary, with success memories contributing most on reasoning-template-heavy tasks and corrective memories supporting harder composition and interaction settings.

analysis.tldr: MAGE 通过四子图协同进化知识图谱实现冻结骨干语言模型的多智能体自我进化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言模型智能体在跨迭代知识保留上依赖自然语言反馈、平面情景记忆或隐式强化信号，无法在推理时支持冻结的弱骨干网络，限制了持续学习能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个框架，使冻结骨干的语言模型智能体能够自主决定学习内容并有效保留跨迭代知识，同时保持推理时骨干不变。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出自我收获的成功轨迹和教师编写的修正记忆具有互补性：成功记忆在推理模板密集型任务上贡献最大，而修正记忆支持更难的组合和交互设置。
analysis.method: MAGE 框架将自我知识外部化为四子图协同进化知识图谱（经验子图、任务级搜索臂、技能级路由臂），经验子图存储教师编写的失败修正和学习者过去的正确推理轨迹，在推理时作为任务条件化指导检索给冻结的执行模型；进化过程中，图谱、任务级搜索臂和技能级路由臂从同一奖励流更新，骨干保持不变。
contributions: 提出 MAGE 框架，通过协同进化知识图谱实现冻结骨干语言模型的多智能体自我进化。
提供结构分析，证明仅追加记忆增长、有界课程覆盖和任务过滤检索共同支持冻结学习者进化的稳定改进。
在九个基准上（数学推理、多跳问答、开放域问答、时空分析、金融数值推理、医学选择题、开放世界生存游戏、网页导航）取得强性能。
消融实验揭示自我收获的成功轨迹和教师编写的修正记忆的互补作用。

papers.title: Not-So-Strange Love: Language Models and Generative Linguistic Theories are More Compatible than They Appear
papers.abstract: Futrell and Mahowald (2025) frame the success of neural language models (LMs) as supporting gradient, usage-based linguistic theories. I argue that LMs can also instantiate theories based on formal structures - the types of theories seen in the generative tradition. This argument expands the space of theories that can be tested with LMs, potentially enabling reconciliations between usage-based and generative accounts.

papers.title: Strategic Exploitation in LLM Agent Markets: A Simulation Framework for E-Commerce Trust
papers.abstract: Agent-based modeling (ABM) has long been used in economics to study human behavior, and large language model (LLM) agents now enable new forms of social and economic simulation. While prior work has discovered strategic deception by LLM agents in financial trading and auction markets, e-commerce remains underexplored despite its distinctive information asymmetry: sellers privately observe product quality, whereas buyers rely on advertised claims and reputation signals. We introduce TruthMarketTwin, a controlled simulation framework for studying LLM-agent behavior in e-commerce markets. The framework is one of the first to model bilateral trade under asymmetric information sharing, where agents make strategic listing, purchasing, rating, and recourse-related decisions to optimize seller profit and buyer utility. We find that LLM agents released into traditional markets autonomously exploit weaknesses in reputation-based governance, while warrant enforcement reduces deception and reshapes strategic reasoning. Our results position LLM-agent simulation as a tool for studying institution-governed autonomous markets.

analysis.tldr: 提出TruthMarketTwin框架，模拟LLM代理在电商市场中的策略性剥削行为，发现声誉治理存在漏洞而担保执行可减少欺骗。
analysis.research_motivation: 电商市场存在信息不对称（卖家私知产品质量，买家依赖广告和声誉），但LLM代理在该场景下的策略性行为尚未被充分研究。

papers.title: Route by State, Recover from Trace: STAR with Failure-Aware Markov Routing for Multi-Agent Spatiotemporal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Compositional spatiotemporal reasoning often requires a system to invoke multiple heterogeneous specialists, such as geometric, temporal, topological, and trajectory agents. A central question is how such a system should route among specialists when execution does not simply succeed or fail, but fails in qualitatively different ways. Existing tool-augmented and multi-agent LLM systems typically leave this routing decision implicit in language generation, making recovery ad hoc, difficult to interpret, and hard to optimize. This paper presents STAR (Spatio-Temporal Agent Router), a failure-aware routing framework that externalizes inter-agent control as a state-conditioned transition policy over the current agent, task type, and typed execution status. At the center of STARis an agent routing matrix that combines expert-specified nominal routes with recovery transitions learned from execution traces. Because the matrix conditions on distinct failure states, the router can respond differently to malformed outputs, missing dependencies, and tool--query mismatches, rather than collapsing them into a generic retry signal. Specialists execute through a tool-grounded extract--compute--deposit protocol and write intermediate results to a shared blackboard for downstream fusion. Results prove that retaining unsuccessful traces during training enlarges the support of the routing policy on error states, enabling recovery transitions that success-only training cannot represent. Across three spatiotemporal benchmarks and eight backbone LLMs, STAR improves over multiple baselines with the clearest gains on queries whose execution deviates from the nominal routing path. Router-specific ablations and recovery analyses further show that typed failure-aware routing, rather than specialist composition alone, is a key factor for these improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出STAR框架，通过状态感知的马尔可夫路由策略，在多智能体时空推理中实现基于失败类型的恢复路由。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具增强和多智能体LLM系统将路由决策隐式嵌入语言生成，导致恢复过程临时、难以解释和优化，尤其当执行失败呈现多种定性差异时。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个显式的、可优化的路由机制，使多智能体系统能根据不同的失败类型（如格式错误、依赖缺失、工具查询不匹配）采取不同的恢复策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，保留失败轨迹进行训练能扩大路由策略在错误状态上的支持，而仅用成功轨迹训练无法学习恢复转移。
analysis.method: STAR框架包含一个状态条件转移策略，基于当前智能体、任务类型和带类型的执行状态；核心是智能体路由矩阵，结合专家指定的名义路由和从执行轨迹学习的恢复转移；智能体通过提取-计算-存储协议执行并写入共享黑板。
contributions: 提出STAR，一个失败感知的路由框架，将智能体间控制外部化为状态条件转移策略。
引入智能体路由矩阵，结合专家名义路由和从执行轨迹学习的恢复转移。
实验证明保留失败轨迹训练能学习恢复转移，并在多个基准和骨干LLM上取得改进。
analysis.experiments: 在三个时空推理基准和八个骨干LLM上评估，与多个基线比较，在偏离名义路由路径的查询上提升最明显；进行了路由消融和恢复分析。
limitations: 可能依赖专家指定的名义路由，在全新任务上需要重新设计。
路由矩阵的规模可能随智能体数量增加而增长。

papers.title: Explanation-Aware Learning for Enhanced Interpretability in Biomedical Imaging
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks for medical image diagnosis often achieve high predictive accuracy while relying on spurious or clinically irrelevant visual cues, limiting their trustworthiness in practice. Post-hoc explanation methods are widely used to visualize model decisions in the form of saliency maps; however, these explanations do not influence how models learn during training, allowing non-causal or confounding features to persist. This motivates the incorporation of explanation supervision directly into the training objective to guide model attention toward clinically meaningful regions and promote clinically grounded decision-making. This paper presents a systematic approach to integrate explanation loss into model training and analyzes how different explanation loss designs and supervision strengths influence both predictive performance and spatial faithfulness of explanations. To quantitatively assess interpretability, two complementary explanation performance metrics-annotation coverage and saliency precision-are introduced, enabling rigorous evaluation beyond qualitative visualization. Our experimental results reveal a clear trade-off between explanation quality and explanation loss coefficients. Furthermore, quantitative statistical analysis yields consistently improved explanation alignment while maintaining comparable accuracy. Experiments were conducted on annotated chest X-ray datasets; however, the proposed framework is applicable to a broad range of annotated biomedical imaging modalities. Overall, these findings demonstrate that explanation supervision is not a monolithic design choice and provide practical guidance for incorporating explanation loss into training objectives under noisy clinical annotations.

analysis.tldr: 通过将解释损失融入训练目标，引导医学影像模型关注临床相关区域，在保持精度的同时提升可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学影像诊断模型常依赖虚假或临床无关特征，后验解释方法无法影响模型训练，导致不可信决策。
analysis.problem: 如何将解释监督直接融入训练目标，引导模型关注临床有意义区域，并量化解释质量。

在胸部X光数据集上验证，表明解释监督可提升解释对齐且保持精度，并提供噪声注释下的实践指导。
analysis.experiments: 在带注释的胸部X光数据集上进行实验，定量统计显示解释对齐改善且精度可比。
limitations: 依赖高质量注释，噪声注释可能影响效果。

papers.title: Swarm Skills: A Portable, Self-Evolving Multi-Agent System Specification for Coordination Engineering
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence engineering paradigms shift from single-agent Prompt and Context Engineering toward multi-agent \textbf{Coordination Engineering}, the ability to codify and systematically improve how multiple agents collaborate has emerged as a critical bottleneck. While single-agent skills can now be distributed as portable assets, multi-agent coordination protocols remain locked within framework-internal code or static configurations, preventing them from being shared across systems or autonomously improved over time. We propose \textbf{Swarm Skills}, a portable specification that extends the Anthropic Skills standard with multi-agent semantics. Swarm Skills turns multi-agent workflows into first-class, distributable assets that consist of roles, workflows, execution bounds, and a built-in semantic structure for self-evolution. To operationalize the specification's evolving nature, we present a companion self-evolution algorithm that automatically distills successful execution trajectories into new Swarm Skills and continuously patches existing ones based on multi-dimensional scoring (Effectiveness, Utilization, and Freshness), eliminating the need for human-in-the-loop oversight during the refinement process. Through an architectural compatibility analysis and a comprehensive qualitative case study using the open-source JiuwenSwarm reference implementation, we demonstrate how Swarm Skills achieves zero-adapter cross-agent portability via progressive disclosure, enabling agent teams to self-evolve their coordination strategies without framework lock-in.

analysis.tldr: 提出Swarm Skills规范，将多智能体协调协议封装为可移植、自演化的资产，实现跨框架零适配迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前多智能体协调协议被锁定在框架内部代码或静态配置中，无法跨系统共享或自主改进，成为多智能体工程化的关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Guided Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy
papers.abstract: Inference-time guidance is essential for steering generative robot policies toward dynamic objectives without retraining, yet existing methods are largely confined to chunk-based architectures that exhibit high latency and lack the reactivity needed for test-time preference alignment or obstacle avoidance. In this work, we formally derive the optimal guidance term for Stochastic Interpolants (SI) by analyzing the value function's time evolution via the Backward Kolmogorov Equation, establishing a modified drift that theoretically guarantees sampling from a target distribution. We apply this framework to real-time control through the Streaming Stochastic Interpolant Policy (SSIP), which generalizes the deterministic Streaming Flow Policy (SFP). Unifying this guidance law with the streaming architecture enables fast and reactive control. To support diverse deployment needs, we propose two complementary mechanisms: training-free Stochastic Trajectory Ensemble Guidance (STEG) that computes gradients on-the-fly for zero-shot adaptation, and training-based Conditional Critic Guidance (CCG) for amortized inference. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that our guided streaming approach significantly outperforms conventional chunk-based policies in reactivity and provides superior, physically valid guidance for dynamic, unstructured environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种用于流式机器人策略的引导式随机插值方法，实现快速反应性控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推理时引导方法多基于分块架构，延迟高且缺乏反应性，难以满足机器人策略在测试时偏好对齐或避障等动态目标的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何为流式随机插值策略设计最优引导项，实现低延迟、反应性的实时控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过反向柯尔莫哥洛夫方程分析价值函数的时间演化，推导出随机插值的最优引导项；提出流式随机插值策略（SSIP），并设计两种互补机制：无需训练的随机轨迹集成引导（STEG）和基于训练的条件评论家引导（CCG）。
contributions: 从理论上推导了随机插值的最优引导项，建立了修改漂移项以保证从目标分布采样的理论保证。
将引导律与流式架构统一，提出SSIP，实现快速反应性控制。
提出STEG和CCG两种引导机制，分别支持零样本适应和摊销推理。

papers.title: EchoPrune: Interpreting Redundancy as Temporal Echoes for Efficient VideoLLMs
papers.abstract: Long-form video understanding remains challenging for Video Large Language Models (VideoLLMs), as the dense frame sampling introduces massive visual tokens while sparse sampling risks missing critical temporal evidence and leading to LLM hallucination. Existing training-free token reduction methods either treat videos equally as static images or rely on segment-level merging heuristics, which weaken fine-grained spatiotemporal modeling and introduce additional overhead. In this paper, we propose EchoPrune, a lightweight and training-free token pruning method that improves temporal resolution under a fixed LLM-side visual token budget. Our core idea is to interpret redundant video tokens as temporal echoes: if a token is well reconstructed from the previous frame, it is merely a temporally redundant echo; otherwise, it may capture new events, motion, or query-relevant visual evidence. Based on this insight, EchoPrune scores visual tokens by (i) query-guided crossmodal relevance and (ii) temporal reconstruction error, measured by correspondence matching and echo matching across consecutive frames. The selected tokens preserve task-relevant cues and temporal novelty while suppressing predictable redundancy, allowing VideoLLMs to observe more frames without increasing the decoding budget. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-OV, Qwen2.5VL, and Qwen3VL across six video understanding benchmarks show that EchoPrune enables VideoLLMs to process up to 20x frames under the same token budget, yielding improved performance (+8.6%) and inference speedup (5.6x for prefilling) on Qwen2.5VL-7B.

analysis.tldr: EchoPrune通过将冗余视频令牌解释为时间回声，实现无训练令牌剪枝，使VideoLLM在固定令牌预算下处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%。
analysis.research_motivation: 长视频理解中，密集帧采样产生大量视觉令牌，而稀疏采样可能遗漏关键时间证据导致幻觉；现有无训练令牌缩减方法要么将视频等同静态图像，要么依赖分段合并启发式，削弱了细粒度时空建模并引入额外开销。
analysis.problem: 如何在固定LLM侧视觉令牌预算下，提高VideoLLM的时间分辨率，同时保持或提升性能与推理速度？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：若一个令牌能从前一帧良好重建，则它是时间冗余的“回声”；否则可能捕获新事件、运动或查询相关视觉证据。基于此，可通过查询引导的跨模态相关性和时间重建误差来评分令牌。
analysis.method: EchoPrune：一种轻量级、无训练的令牌剪枝方法。通过（i）查询引导的跨模态相关性和（ii）时间重建误差（通过连续帧间的对应匹配和回声匹配测量）对视觉令牌评分，保留任务相关线索和时间新颖性，抑制可预测冗余。
contributions: 提出EchoPrune，一种无训练令牌剪枝方法，通过时间回声解释冗余令牌，提升VideoLLM的时间分辨率。
在LLaVA-OV、Qwen2.5VL和Qwen3VL上验证，在六个视频理解基准上实现多达20倍帧数处理，性能提升8.6%，推理加速5.6倍（预填充阶段）。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-OV、Qwen2.5VL和Qwen3VL上，跨六个视频理解基准进行实验，结果显示EchoPrune在相同令牌预算下可处理多达20倍帧数，Qwen2.5VL-7B上性能提升8.6%，推理速度提升5.6倍（预填充阶段）。
limitations: 可能对极短或运动极少的视频效果有限，因为时间回声假设可能不成立。
依赖帧间对应匹配，可能在高动态场景或快速切换镜头时引入误差。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: EchoPrune通过将冗余视频令牌解释为时间回声，实现无训练令牌剪枝，使VideoLLM在固定令牌预算下处理多达20倍帧数，性能提升8.6%。

papers.title: Rethinking Loss Reweighting for Imbalance Learning as an Inverse Problem: A Neural Collapse Point of View
papers.abstract: Loss reweighting is a widely used strategy for long-tailed classification, but existing reweighting strategies often rely on heuristics and rarely define a well-specified target. Inspired by Neural Collapse (NC), the ideal simplex Equiangular Tight Frame (ETF) terminal geometry suggests equal per-class average loss as a reasonable target for reweighting. Based on the ideal equal loss objective, we consider loss reweighting as an inverse problem and propose an inverse-view reweighting strategy that infers class weights dynamically to match this ideal objective. Empirically, NC metrics suggest our method can effectively reduce the loss imbalance coefficient and closer alignment with NC geometry while consistently outperforming strong long-tailed baselines on different datasets.

analysis.tldr: 将损失重加权视为逆问题，利用神经坍缩的等损失目标动态推断类别权重，有效缓解长尾分类中的不平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 长尾分类中常用的损失重加权策略多基于启发式方法，缺乏明确的目标定义，导致性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何为损失重加权定义一个合理的目标，并据此动态调整类别权重以改善长尾分类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于神经坍缩（NC）的理想单纯形等角紧框架（ETF）终端几何，将等平均损失作为重加权目标，将损失重加权视为逆问题，动态推断类别权重以匹配该目标。
contributions: 提出将损失重加权视为逆问题的新视角，并基于神经坍缩的等损失目标设计重加权策略。
实验表明该方法能有效降低损失不平衡系数，更接近NC几何，并在多个数据集上优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖神经坍缩假设的成立条件。
动态权重推断可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.reason: 方法视角新颖，但摘要实验信息有限，属于增量贡献。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将损失重加权视为逆问题，利用神经坍缩的等损失目标动态推断类别权重，有效缓解长尾分类中的不平衡。

papers.title: PixelFlowCast: Latent-Free Precipitation Nowcasting via Pixel Mean Flows
papers.abstract: Precipitation nowcasting aims to forecast short-term radar echo sequences for extreme weather warning, where both prediction fidelity and inference efficiency are critical for real-world deployment. However, diffusion-based models, despite their strong generative capability, suffer from slow inference due to multi-step sampling trajectories, limiting their practical usability. Conditional Flow Matching (CFM) improves efficiency via straightened trajectories, but relies on latent space compression, which inevitably discards high-frequency physical details and degrades fine-grained prediction quality. To address these limitations, we propose PixelFlowCast, a two-stage probabilistic forecasting framework that achieves both high-efficiency and high-fidelity prediction without latent compression. Specifically, in the first stage, a deterministic model first produces coarse forecasts to capture global evolution trends. In the subsequent stage, the proposed KANCondNet extracts deep spatiotemporal evolution features to provide accurate conditional guidance. Based on this, a latent-free, few-step Pixel Mean Flows (PMF) predictor employs an $x$-prediction mechanism to generate high-quality predictions, effectively preserving fine-grained structures while maintaining fast inference. Experiments on the publicly available SEVIR dataset demonstrate that PixelFlowCast outperforms existing mainstream methods in both prediction accuracy and inference efficiency, particularly for long sequence forecasting, highlighting its strong potential for real-world operational deployment.

analysis.tldr: 提出无隐空间压缩的像素均值流预测器，实现高效高保真降水临近预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 降水临近预报对预测保真度和推理效率要求极高，现有扩散模型推理慢，条件流匹配虽提升效率但依赖隐空间压缩丢失高频细节。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持高推理效率的同时，避免隐空间压缩导致的高频物理细节丢失，实现高保真降水临近预报。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段概率预测框架：第一阶段用确定性模型生成粗预测捕捉全局演化趋势；第二阶段用KANCondNet提取深度时空演化特征作为条件，再通过无隐空间、少步的像素均值流（PMF）预测器采用x-预测机制生成高质量预测。
contributions: 提出PixelFlowCast框架，实现无隐空间压缩的高效高保真降水临近预报。
设计KANCondNet提取深度时空演化特征，以及像素均值流（PMF）预测器采用x-预测机制保留细粒度结构。
analysis.experiments: 在公开SEVIR数据集上，PixelFlowCast在预测精度和推理效率上均优于现有主流方法，尤其在长序列预测中表现突出。
limitations: 可能依赖两阶段级联，误差传播风险。
仅在单一数据集SEVIR上验证，泛化性待考。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性高（无隐空间压缩的流匹配），实验在SEVIR上表现优异，与视频预测/视觉理解方向相关，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无隐空间压缩的像素均值流预测器，实现高效高保真降水临近预报。

papers.title: ExtraVAR: Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping for Resolution Extrapolation in Visual Autoregressive Models
papers.abstract: Visual Autoregressive (VAR) models have emerged as a strong alternative to diffusion for image synthesis, yet their fixed training resolution prevents direct generation at higher resolutions. Naively transferring training-free extrapolation methods from LLMs or diffusion models to VAR yields three characteristic failure modes: global repetition, local repetition, and detail degradation. We trace them to a unified band-stage mismatch: VAR generates images in a coarse-to-fine, scale-wise process where each stage is driven by a distinct dominant RoPE frequency band, and each failure mode emerges when the dominant band of a particular stage is disrupted. Building on this insight, we propose Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping, a training-free strategy that assigns each frequency band a stage-specific remapping rule, jointly suppressing all three failure modes. We further observe that attention becomes systematically dispersed as the image resolution increases. Existing methods typically depend on predefined attention scaling factors, which are neither adaptive to the target resolution nor capable of faithfully capturing the actual extent of attention dispersion. We therefore propose Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration, which quantifies dispersion via a resolution-invariant normalized entropy and yields a closed-form per-head scaling factor that realigns the extrapolated-resolution attention entropy with its training-resolution counterpart. Extensive experiments show that our method consistently outperforms prior resolution-extrapolation methods in both structural coherence and fine-detail fidelity. Our code is available at https://github.com/feihongyan1/ExtraVAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping和自适应注意力校准，实现VAR模型的无训练分辨率外推。
analysis.research_motivation: VAR模型在固定分辨率下训练，无法直接生成更高分辨率图像，而直接迁移LLM或扩散模型的无训练外推方法会导致全局重复、局部重复和细节退化三种失败模式。
analysis.problem: 解决VAR模型在分辨率外推时出现的全局重复、局部重复和细节退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现三种失败模式源于统一的band-stage mismatch：VAR以粗到细的尺度生成图像，每个阶段由不同的主导RoPE频带驱动，当某阶段的主导频带被破坏时出现相应失败模式；此外，注意力随分辨率增加而系统性分散，现有方法依赖预定义缩放因子，无法自适应或准确捕捉分散程度。
analysis.method: 提出Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping，为每个频带分配阶段特定的重映射规则，联合抑制三种失败模式；以及Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration，通过分辨率不变归一化熵量化注意力分散，导出闭式每头缩放因子，使外推分辨率下的注意力熵与训练分辨率对齐。
contributions: 识别VAR模型分辨率外推中的band-stage mismatch并统一解释三种失败模式
提出Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping和Entropy-Driven Adaptive Attention Calibration两种无训练策略
在多个分辨率上超越先前方法，在结构一致性和细节保真度上取得更好效果
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 方法仅在VAR模型上验证，未推广到其他自回归生成模型
可能对极高分辨率外推效果有限
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对VAR模型分辨率外推的独特问题提出有效解决方案，但摘要未提供实验细节，影响评分。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Stage-Aware RoPE Remapping和自适应注意力校准，实现VAR模型的无训练分辨率外推。

papers.title: Adaptive Action Chunking via Multi-Chunk Q Value Estimation
papers.abstract: Action chunking emerged as a pivotal technique in imitation learning, enabling policies to predict cohesive action sequences rather than single actions. Recently, this approach has expanded to reinforcement learning (RL), enhancing behavioral consistency and reducing bootstrapping errors in value function estimation. However, existing methods rely on a fixed chunk length, creating a performance bottleneck as the optimal length varies across states and tasks. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Action CHunking (ACH), a novel offline-to-online RL algorithm that dynamically modulates chunk length during both training and inference. To find the optimal chunk length for a dynamically varying current state, we simultaneously estimate action-values for all candidate chunk lengths in a single forward pass, using a Transformer-based architecture. Our mechanism allows the agent to select the most effective chunk length adaptively based on the current state. Evaluated on 34 challenging tasks, ACH consistently outperforms fixed-length baselines, demonstrating superior generalization and learning efficiency in complex environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应动作分块算法ACH，通过多分块Q值估计动态调整分块长度，提升强化学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有动作分块方法使用固定分块长度，导致性能瓶颈，因为最优分块长度随状态和任务变化。
analysis.problem: 如何动态选择最优动作分块长度以提升强化学习中的行为一致性和学习效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定分块长度在不同状态和任务下表现不一致，存在性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出ACH算法，基于Transformer架构在单次前向传播中同时估计所有候选分块长度的动作值，从而自适应选择当前状态下的最优分块长度。
contributions: 提出自适应动作分块算法ACH，动态调整分块长度。
在34个挑战性任务上验证了ACH优于固定长度基线，展现更好的泛化和学习效率。
analysis.experiments: 在34个挑战性任务上评估，ACH一致优于固定长度基线。
limitations: 可能增加计算开销，因为需要同时估计多个分块长度的Q值。
Transformer架构可能对资源要求较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应动作分块算法ACH，通过多分块Q值估计动态调整分块长度，提升强化学习性能。

papers.title: Personalizing LLMs with Binary Feedback: A Preference-Corrected Optimization Framework
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM) personalization aims to align model behaviors with individual user preferences. Existing methods often focus on isolated user histories, neglecting the essential role of inter-user differences. We propose C-BPO, a framework that personalizes LLMs via preference-calibrated binary signals. By treating target user data as positive feedback and other users' data as an auxiliary set of implicit negative signals, C-BPO captures distinct inter-user differences. To mitigate the preference overlap issue, where shared task knowledge is erroneously penalized, we derive an objective grounded in Positive-Unlabeled (PU) learning theory. This approach purifies negative signals by subtracting ``positive bias'', ensuring alignment with unique idiosyncrasies without compromising general helpfulness. Empirical experiments across various personalization tasks and backbone LLMs show C-BPO consistently outperforms baselines, demonstrating the efficacy of preference-calibrated binary signals in modeling inter-user differences.

analysis.tldr: 提出C-BPO框架，利用偏好校准的二元信号和正-无标签学习理论实现LLM个性化，有效建模用户间差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM个性化方法多聚焦于孤立用户历史，忽略了用户间差异的关键作用，导致个性化效果受限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用二元反馈信号（如点赞/点踩）有效建模用户间差异，同时避免因共享知识被错误惩罚而损害通用帮助性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到偏好重叠问题：共享任务知识在个性化过程中被错误地作为负信号惩罚，影响模型通用能力。
analysis.method: 提出C-BPO框架，将目标用户数据视为正反馈，其他用户数据作为隐式负信号集，并基于正-无标签（PU）学习理论推导目标函数，通过减去“正偏差”净化负信号，实现偏好校准。
contributions: 提出C-BPO框架，利用偏好校准的二元信号建模用户间差异，实现LLM个性化。
将PU学习理论应用于个性化场景，解决偏好重叠问题，保持通用帮助性。
在多种个性化任务和骨干LLM上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖二元反馈信号的质量和覆盖度。
PU学习理论假设可能不完全适用于所有个性化场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，理论扎实，与LLM个性化对齐方向高度相关，但实验细节未提供。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出C-BPO框架，利用偏好校准的二元信号和正-无标签学习理论实现LLM个性化，有效建模用户间差异。

papers.title: Only Train Once: Uncertainty-Aware One-Class Learning for Face Authenticity Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid evolution of generative paradigms has enabled the creation of highly realistic imagery, which escalating the risks of identity fraud and the dissemination of disinformation. Most existing approaches frame face forgery detection as a fully supervised binary classification problem. Consequently, these models typically exhibit significant performance decay when tasked with detecting forgeries from previously unseen generative paradigms. Furthermore, these methods focus exclusively on either DeepFakes or fully synthesized faces, thereby failing to provide a generalized framework for universal face forgery detection. In this paper, we address this challenge by introducing FADNet (Face Authenticity Detector Net), % a self-supervised framework that which reformulates face forgery detection as a one-class classification (OCC) task. By training exclusively on authentic facial data to capture their intrinsic representations, FADNet flags any image whose feature embedding deviates significantly from the learned distribution of real faces as a forgery. The framework incorporates Evidential Deep Learning (EDL) to quantify predictive uncertainty and utilizes a plug-and-play pseudo-forgery image generator (PFIG) to tighten decision boundaries around authentic data. Extensive experimental evaluations on the DF40 and ASFD benchmarks demonstrate that FADNet achieves superior performance and generalization capabilities. Specifically, FADNet substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) methods, yielding a remarkable average accuracy of 96.63\% and an average precision of 98.83\%.

analysis.tldr: 提出FADNet，将人脸伪造检测转化为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸训练，结合证据深度学习量化不确定性，在DF40和ASFD基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度伪造检测方法多为全监督二分类，对未见过的生成范式泛化性差，且无法统一处理DeepFake和全合成人脸。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个仅需真实人脸数据训练、能泛化到未知伪造类型的通用人脸真实性检测框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FADNet，采用单类分类（OCC）范式，仅用真实人脸数据训练；引入证据深度学习（EDL）量化预测不确定性；设计即插即用的伪伪造图像生成器（PFIG）收紧真实数据决策边界。
contributions: 首次将人脸伪造检测重新定义为单类分类任务，仅需真实数据训练。
结合证据深度学习进行不确定性量化，提升检测可靠性。
提出伪伪造图像生成器，无需伪造样本即可收紧决策边界。
analysis.experiments: 在DF40和ASFD基准上评估，FADNet平均准确率96.63%，平均精度98.83%，显著优于现有SOTA方法。
limitations: 可能对极端逼真的伪造样本仍存在漏检风险。
伪伪造生成器的多样性可能有限，影响边界收紧效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强（OCC+EDL），实验性能突出，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FADNet，将人脸伪造检测转化为单类分类任务，仅用真实人脸训练，结合证据深度学习量化不确定性，在DF40和ASFD基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: TimeClaw: A Time-Series AI Agent with Exploratory Execution Learning
papers.abstract: Time series analysis underpins forecasting, monitoring, and decision making in domains such as finance and weather, where solving a task often requires both numerical accuracy and contextual reasoning. Recent progress has moved from specialized neural predictors to approaches built on LLMs and foundation models that can reason over time series inputs and use external tools. However, most such systems remain execution-centric: they focus on solving the current instance but learn little from exploratory execution. This is especially limiting in verifiable numeric settings, where multiple candidate executions and tool-use procedures may all be task-valid yet differ sharply in quantitative quality, and where early success can trigger tool-prior collapse that suppresses further exploration. To address this limitation, we present TimeClaw, an exploratory execution learning framework that turns exploratory execution into reusable hierarchical distilled experience through a four-stage loop: Explore, Compare, Distill, and Reinject. TimeClaw combines metric-supervised exploratory execution learning, task-aware tool dropout, and hierarchical distilled experience for inference-time reinjection, while keeping the base model frozen and avoiding online test-time adaptation. In an MTBench-aligned evaluation with 17 tasks that span finance and weather prediction and reasoning tasks, TimeClaw delivers consistent gains over the baselines. These results suggest that, for scientific systems, the bottleneck is not only execution-time capability, but how exploratory experience is compared, distilled, and reused.

analysis.tldr: TimeClaw 通过探索性执行学习框架，将时间序列分析中的探索经验蒸馏为可复用的分层知识，显著提升 LLM 在数值任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有时间序列 AI 系统以执行为中心，缺乏从探索性执行中学习的能力，导致在可验证数值任务中容易陷入工具优先崩溃，限制了定量质量。
analysis.problem: 如何让时间序列 AI 代理从探索性执行中学习并复用经验，避免工具优先崩溃，提升数值任务性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在可验证数值任务中，多个候选执行和工具使用过程可能都任务有效但定量质量差异大，早期成功会触发工具优先崩溃，抑制进一步探索。
analysis.method: TimeClaw 提出四阶段循环（探索、比较、蒸馏、再注入），结合度量监督的探索性执行学习、任务感知工具丢弃和分层蒸馏经验，用于推理时再注入，保持基础模型冻结且无需在线测试时适应。
contributions: 提出探索性执行学习框架 TimeClaw，将探索经验转化为可复用的分层蒸馏知识。
设计度量监督的探索性执行学习、任务感知工具丢弃和分层蒸馏经验再注入机制。
在 17 个金融和天气预测与推理任务上验证了方法有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 MTBench 对齐的评估中，使用 17 个涵盖金融和天气预测与推理的任务，TimeClaw 相比基线取得一致提升。
limitations: 摘要未提及在非数值或非可验证任务上的表现。
可能依赖任务特定的度量设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，聚焦 LLM 代理在时间序列中的探索学习，实验验证有效，但应用领域较窄。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TimeClaw 通过探索性执行学习框架，将时间序列分析中的探索经验蒸馏为可复用的分层知识，显著提升 LLM 在数值任务上的表现。

papers.title: Bridging the Cognitive Gap: A Unified Memory Paradigm for 6G Agentic AI-RAN
papers.abstract: As 6G evolves, the radio access network must transcend traditional automation to embrace agentic AI capable of perception, reasoning, and evolution. A fundamental cognitive gap persists in current disaggregated architectures, where interfaces force the physical layer to compress high-dimensional states into low-dimensional metrics, trapping reasoning agents behind a semantic bottleneck. This article envisions a shift from interface-bound to memory-centric architectures. We propose a unified memory paradigm that dissolves the boundaries between sensing and reasoning by mapping biological memory hierarchies onto heterogeneous computing fabrics. Enabled by emerging coherent interconnects, this approach creates a cognitive continuum where microsecond-level reflexes, millisecond-level reasoning, and long-term evolution share state across time scales. By replacing message passing with zero-copy observability, we empower AI agents to bridge the gap between real-time responsiveness and long-horizon context for truly autonomous 6G networks.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一内存范式，通过生物记忆层次映射到异构计算架构，解决6G代理AI-RAN中感知与推理之间的语义瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 6G网络需要超越传统自动化的代理AI，但当前分散架构中物理层与推理代理之间存在语义瓶颈，限制了智能体的感知与推理能力。
analysis.problem: 现有接口迫使物理层将高维状态压缩为低维指标，导致推理代理面临语义瓶颈，无法实现实时响应与长期上下文的统一。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一内存范式，将生物记忆层次映射到异构计算架构，利用相干互连实现微秒级反射、毫秒级推理和长期演化的状态共享，以零拷贝可观测性替代消息传递。

papers.title: From Single-Step Edit Response to Multi-Step Molecular Optimization
papers.abstract: Conditional molecular optimization aims to edit a molecule to realize a specified property shift. In practice, structurally similar molecule data is scarce, while decisions are inherently action-level: at each step, the system must select one local structural edit from a candidate set that is strictly filtered by chemical feasibility rules. This level mismatch between supervision and decision makes oracle-in-the-loop search unstable in molecular optimization. Regressing on property differences between molecule pairs improves data efficiency but relies on oracle-in-the-loop search, entangling transformation effects with global context and providing limited guidance for selecting the next feasible edit, often resorting to oracle-in-the-loop search. For this reason, we propose a response-oriented discrete edit optimization approach comprising two tightly coupled components: a single-step molecular edit response predictor (SMER) and a multi-step planner that composes local predictions into optimization trajectories via guided tree search (SMER-Opt). The approach learns a directional evaluation model over edit actions to support constraint-aware planning. It mines weakly related molecule pairs and decomposes their structural differences into minimal edit units, turning endpoint property annotations into process-level supervision and yielding reusable, transferable action primitives. A directional edit evaluator then scores feasible candidate edits by their likelihood of moving the molecule toward the desired property change, substantially reducing dependence on external evaluator queries at decision time. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/SMER.

papers.title: Slum Detection and Density Mapping with AlphaEarth Foundations: A Representation Learning Evaluation Across 12 Global Cities
papers.abstract: Pixel-level slum mapping has long been constrained by limited cross-city generalisation, the absence of continuous density estimation, and weak global comparability. AlphaEarth Foundations (AEF), a globally consistent 64-dimensional annual surface embedding at 10 m, offers a new analysis-ready basis for lightweight slum monitoring, but its applicability to slum detection - an indirectly coupled task shaped by both built form and socio-economic processes - remains untested. We evaluate AEF on slum classification and sub-pixel density estimation across 12 cities and 69 city-year pairs (2017-2024), using GRAM pseudo-masks as supervisory labels. The evaluation spans four training strategies, two protocols (random split and 3x3 spatial block cross-validation), six auxiliary feature configurations, and five baseline models, complemented by representation-level analyses (PCA, SHAP) and full-AOI mapping. Five findings emerge. (1) Same-city cross-year training is optimal under both protocols (median spatial F1 = 0.616, R^2 = 0.466); temporal expansion outperforms cross-city transfer, indicating city-scale representational drift. (2) Regression R^2 is driven primarily by zero/non-zero boundary discrimination: positive-pixel R^2 is consistently negative across all cities, revealing limited capacity to model intra-pixel density gradients at 10 m. (3) PC36 is consistently top-ranked across tasks; classification saturates at k = 32 while regression remains unsaturated at k = 64. (4) POI features yield the largest density gain (Delta R^2 = +0.064). (5) For six cities meeting dual-task usability thresholds, full-AOI inference across 2017-2024 preserves slum cluster structure (mean SSIM = 0.926). The study delineates the capabilities and complementarity needs of foundation-model embeddings for slum monitoring.

analysis.tldr: 评估AlphaEarth Foundations嵌入在12个全球城市贫民窟检测与密度估计中的表现，发现同城跨年训练最优，但密度梯度建模能力有限。

analysis.method: 使用GRAM伪掩码作为监督标签，在12个城市69个城市-年对（2017-2024）上评估AEF嵌入，采用四种训练策略、两种协议（随机分割和3x3空间块交叉验证）、六种辅助特征配置和五种基线模型，并进行表征级分析（PCA、SHAP）和全AOI制图。
contributions: 首次系统评估AEF嵌入在贫民窟检测和密度估计中的跨城市泛化能力。
揭示了AEF在10米分辨率下建模像素内密度梯度的局限性，并指出POI特征可显著提升密度估计。
analysis.experiments: 在12个城市69个城市-年对上进行了贫民窟分类和亚像素密度估计实验，包括四种训练策略、两种协议、六种辅助特征配置和五种基线模型，并进行了PCA、SHAP分析和全AOI制图。

papers.title: Speech-based Psychological Crisis Assessment using LLMs
papers.abstract: Psychological support hotlines provide critical support for individuals experiencing mental health emergencies, yet current assessments largely rely on human operators whose judgments may vary with professional experience and are constrained by limited staffing resources. This paper proposes a large language model (LLM)-based framework for automated crisis level classification, a key indicator that supports many downstream tasks and improves the overall quality of hotline services. To better capture emotional signals in spoken conversations, we introduce a paralinguistic injection method that inserts identified non-verbal emotional cues into speech transcripts, enabling LLM-based reasoning to incorporate critical acoustic nuances. In addition, we propose a reasoning-enhanced training strategy that trains the model to generate diagnostic reasoning chains as an auxiliary task, which serves as a regulariser to improve classification performance. Combined with data augmentation, our final system achieves a macro F1-score of 0.802 and an accuracy of 0.805 on the three-class classification task under 5-fold cross-validation.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于LLM的语音心理危机评估框架，通过副语言注入和推理增强训练提升分类性能。

papers.title: MUSDA: Multi-source Multi-modality Unsupervised Domain Adaptive 3D Object Detection for Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: With the advancement of autonomous driving, numerous annotated multi-modality datasets have become available. This presents an opportunity to develop domain-adaptive 3D object detectors for new environments without relying on labor-intensive manual annotations. However, traditional domain adaptation methods typically focus on a single source domain or a single modality, limiting their effectiveness in multi-source, multi-modality scenarios. In this paper, we propose a novel framework for multi-source, multi-modality unsupervised domain adaptation in 3D object detection for autonomous driving. Given multiple labeled source domains and one unlabeled target domain, our framework first introduces hierarchical spatially-conditioned (HSC) domain classifiers, which jointly align features from both camera and LiDAR modalities at two distinct levels for each source-target domain pair. To effectively leverage information from multiple source domains, we construct a prototype graph between each pair of domains. Based on this, we develop a prototype graph weighted (PGW) multi-source fusion strategy to aggregate predictions from multiple source detection heads. Experimental results on three widely used 3D object detection datasets - Waymo, nuScenes, and Lyft - demonstrate that our proposed framework effectively integrates information across both modalities and source domains, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出多源多模态无监督域自适应框架MUSDA，通过层次化空间条件域分类器和原型图加权融合策略提升自动驾驶3D目标检测性能。

papers.title: Medical Incident Causal Factors and Preventive Measures Generation Using Tag-based Example Selection in Few-shot Learning
papers.abstract: In high-stakes domains such as healthcare, the reliability of Large Language Models (LLMs) is critical, particularly when generating clinical insights from incident reports. This study proposes a tag-based few-shot example selection method for prompting LLMs to generate background/causal factors and preventive measures from details of the medical incidents. For our experiments, we use the Japanese Medical Incident Dataset (JMID), a structured dataset of 3,884 real-world medical accident and near-miss reports. These reports are variably annotated with a wide range of tags--some include descriptive information (e.g., "medications," "blood transfusion therapy"). We compare three few-shot example selection strategies--random sampling, cosine similarity-based selection, and our proposed tag-based method--using GPT-4o and LLaMA 3.3. Results show that the tag-based approach achieves the highest precision and most stable generation behavior, while similarity-based selection often leads to unintended outputs and safety filter activation. These findings suggest that selecting examples based on human-interpretable dataset tags can improve generation precision and stability in clinical LLM applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于标签的少样本示例选择方法，提升医疗事故报告中因果因素与预防措施生成的精度和稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在高风险医疗领域，LLM生成临床见解的可靠性至关重要，但现有少样本示例选择方法（如随机采样、余弦相似度）可能导致输出不稳定或触发安全过滤。
analysis.problem: 如何从医疗事故报告中准确生成背景/因果因素和预防措施，并提高生成精度与稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于余弦相似度的示例选择常导致意外输出和安全过滤器激活，而基于标签的方法生成行为更稳定。
analysis.method: 提出基于标签的少样本示例选择方法，利用医疗事故报告中的结构化标签（如“药物”、“输血治疗”）选择示例，并提示LLM生成因果因素和预防措施。
contributions: 提出一种基于标签的少样本示例选择方法，用于医疗事故报告中的因果因素和预防措施生成。
在JMID数据集上实验证明，该方法相比随机采样和余弦相似度选择，在精度和稳定性上更优。

limitations: 仅针对日语医疗事故报告，可能不适用于其他语言或领域。

papers.title: The two clocks and the innovation window: When and how generative models learn rules
papers.abstract: Generative models trained on finite data face a fundamental tension: their score-matching or next-token objective converges to the empirical training distribution rather than the population distribution we seek to learn. Using rule-valid synthetic tasks, we trace this tension across two training timescales: $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, the step at which generations first become rule-valid, and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, the step at which models begin reproducing training samples. Focusing on parity and extending to other binary rules and combinatorial puzzles, we characterize how these two clocks, $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ and $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$, depend on key aspects of the learning setup. Specifically, we show that $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$ increases with rule complexity and decreases with model capacity, while $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$ is approximately invariant to the rule and scales nearly linearly with dataset size $N$. We define the \emph{innovation window} as the interval $[τ_{\mathrm{rule}}, τ_{\mathrm{mem}}]$. This window widens with increasing $N$ and narrows with rule complexity, and may vanish entirely when $τ_{\mathrm{rule}} \geq τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. The same two-clock structure arises in both diffusion (DiT) and autoregressive (GPT) models, with architecture-dependent offsets. Dissecting the learned score of DiT models reveals a corresponding evolution of the optimization landscapes, where rule-valid samples' basins expand substantially around $τ_{\mathrm{rule}}$, while training samples' basins begin to dominate around $τ_{\mathrm{mem}}$. Together, these results yield a unified and predictive account of when and how generative models exhibit genuine innovation.

analysis.tldr: 生成模型在训练中经历规则学习与记忆两个时间尺度，其间隔定义了创新窗口。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成模型在有限数据上训练时，其目标函数收敛到经验分布而非真实分布，导致模型可能只是记忆训练样本而非学习通用规则，这限制了模型的泛化和创新能力。理解何时模型真正学习规则而非记忆数据对于改进生成模型至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化生成模型在训练过程中从学习规则到记忆训练样本的转变，并定义创新窗口。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过规则验证的合成任务观察到两个时间尺度：规则学习时间（τ_rule）和记忆时间（τ_mem），并发现τ_rule随规则复杂度增加而增加，随模型容量增加而减少；τ_mem近似与规则无关，随数据集大小N线性增长。创新窗口[τ_rule, τ_mem]随N增大而变宽，随规则复杂度增大而变窄，可能消失。
analysis.method: 使用规则验证的合成任务（如奇偶校验、二进制规则、组合谜题），训练扩散模型（DiT）和自回归模型（GPT），追踪训练过程中生成样本的规则有效性和训练样本复现性，定义并分析两个时间尺度。
contributions: 定义了生成模型训练中的两个时间尺度τ_rule和τ_mem，并刻画了它们与规则复杂度、模型容量、数据集大小的依赖关系。
提出了创新窗口的概念，并展示了其在不同模型架构（DiT和GPT）中的存在性及架构依赖偏移。
通过分析DiT模型的得分函数，揭示了优化景观的演化，解释了规则有效样本和训练样本吸引盆的变化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了在规则验证的合成任务上对DiT和GPT模型的实验设置。
limitations: 实验基于合成任务，可能无法完全推广到真实复杂数据分布。
未讨论创新窗口内生成样本的质量或多样性。
