papers.title: Hystar: Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval via Dynamic SVD Modulation
papers.abstract: Query-based image retrieval (QBIR) requires retrieving relevant images given diverse and often stylistically heterogeneous queries, such as sketches, artworks, or low-resolution previews. While large-scale vision--language representation models (VLRMs) like CLIP offer strong zero-shot retrieval performance, they struggle with distribution shifts caused by unseen query styles. In this paper, we propose the Hypernetwork-driven Style-adaptive Retrieval (Hystar), a lightweight framework that dynamically adapts model weights to each query's style. Hystar employs a hypernetwork to generate singular-value perturbations ($ΔS$) for attention layers, enabling flexible per-input adaptation, while static singular-value offsets on MLP layers ensure cross-style stability. To better handle semantic confusions across styles, we design StyleNCE as part of Hystar, an optimal-transport-weighted contrastive loss that emphasizes hard cross-style negatives. Extensive experiments on multi-style retrieval and cross-style classification benchmarks demonstrate that Hystar consistently outperforms strong baselines, achieving state-of-the-art performance while being parameter-efficient and stable across styles.

analysis.tldr: Hystar 通过超网络动态调整模型权重，实现跨风格图像检索的 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 VLRM（如 CLIP）在查询风格（如草图、艺术画）变化时性能下降，需要轻量级自适应方法。

papers.title: Measurement-Adapted Eigentask Representations for Photon-Limited Optical Readout
papers.abstract: Optical readout in low-light imaging is fundamentally limited by measurement noise, including photon shot noise, detector noise, and quantization error. In this regime, downstream inference depends not only on the optical front end, but also on how noisy high-dimensional sensor measurements are represented before classification or decision-making. Here we show that eigentasks provide a measurement-adapted representation for optical sensor outputs by ordering readout features according to their resolvability under noise. Using experimental data from a lens-based optical imaging system and a reanalysis of published data from a single-photon-detection neural network, we find that eigentask representations frequently outperform standard baselines including principal component analysis and filtering-based compression. The advantage is most pronounced in photon-limited, few-shot, and higher-difficulty classification regimes. In few-shot MPEG-7 classification, for example, the advantage over other methods reaches about 10 percentage points as the number of classes increases. In these settings, eigentasks yield more informative low-dimensional features and improve sample-efficient downstream learning. These results identify measurement-adapted representation as a promising strategy for optical inference when photon budget, acquisition time, and task complexity are constrained.

analysis.tldr: 提出测量自适应特征任务表示，在光子受限光学读出中优于PCA等基线方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光成像中光学读出受测量噪声（光子散粒噪声、探测器噪声、量化误差）根本限制，下游推理依赖于如何表示高维噪声传感器测量值，现有方法如PCA和滤波压缩在光子受限场景下不够有效。
analysis.problem: 如何在光子受限光学读出中，为分类或决策任务构建噪声鲁棒且信息丰富的低维表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征任务表示根据噪声下的可分辨性排序读出特征，在光子受限、少样本和高难度分类场景中优势最明显，例如在少样本MPEG-7分类中，随类别数增加准确率提升约10个百分点。
analysis.method: 提出测量自适应特征任务表示，通过特征任务（eigentask）对光学传感器输出进行排序和压缩，优先保留噪声下可分辨性高的特征。
contributions: 提出特征任务表示作为测量自适应表示方法，用于光子受限光学读出。
在实验数据和已发表数据上验证其优于PCA和滤波压缩，尤其在少样本和高难度分类中。
analysis.experiments: 使用透镜光学成像系统的实验数据和单光子探测神经网络的已发表数据，在MPEG-7分类等任务上评估，摘要未提供完整实验细节。
limitations: 方法可能依赖任务特定的特征分解，泛化性需进一步验证。
实验仅在特定光学系统和数据集上测试，实际部署效果未知。

papers.title: Combining Mechanical and Agentic Specification Inference for Move
papers.abstract: In this paper, we describe early work on a specification inference tool for the Move Prover that combines a weakest-precondition (WP) analysis over Move bytecode with an agentic coding CLI such as Claude Code. Specification inference reduces the boilerplate of writing specifications in Move: in order to verify a high-level property such as a global state invariant, pre- and post-conditions for the supporting functions typically have to be written by hand, which is tedious. In our setting, a Model Context Protocol (MCP) service exposes the WP analysis and the prover itself to the coding agent. The WP analysis provides a sound, mechanical baseline for inference; the AI is used precisely where WP is weakest -- for loop invariants and high-level idiomatic specifications such as monotonicity, conservation, and structural invariants. The Move Prover serves as the oracle that decides whether the generated specs are valid, and the agent is equipped to generate proof hints and to refine the inferred specification until verification succeeds. The tool has been applied to a corpus of canonical Move code, including code that uses higher-order functions, dynamic dispatch, global state, references, and various forms of loops.

analysis.tldr: 结合机械弱前置条件分析与AI智能体，自动推断Move Prover的形式化规约。
analysis.research_motivation: Move语言的形式化验证需要大量手写规约（如前置/后置条件），过程繁琐且易出错，现有方法缺乏自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 如何自动推断Move函数的规约，减少手动编写规约的负担，同时保证推断的准确性和完备性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 弱前置条件分析在循环不变量和高层惯用规约（如单调性、守恒性）上表现较弱，而AI智能体可弥补这一不足。
analysis.method: 结合弱前置条件（WP）分析与AI编码智能体（如Claude Code），通过MCP服务暴露WP分析和证明器，AI负责生成循环不变量和高层规约，证明器验证并迭代优化。
contributions: 提出一种结合机械分析与AI智能体的规约推断框架
在Move代码语料库上验证了工具的有效性，涵盖高阶函数、动态分发、全局状态等复杂特性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及应用于规范Move代码语料库。
limitations: 可能依赖AI智能体的质量，存在不稳定性
仅针对Move语言，泛化性待验证

papers.title: Med-StepBench: A Hierarchical Reasoning Framework for Evaluating Hallucinations in Medical Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Large vision-language models (VLMs) demonstrate strong performance in medical image understanding, but frequently generate clinically plausible yet incorrect statements, raising significant safety concerns. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks primarily focus on 2D imaging with one-shot diagnostic questions, offering limited insight into whether predictions are grounded in correct localization and abnormality identification, allowing critical reasoning errors to remain hidden behind seemingly correct diagnoses. We introduce Med-StepBench, the first large-scale benchmark for step-wise hallucination detection in 3D oncological PET/CT, comprising over 12,000 images and more than 1,000,000 image-statement pairs across volumetric and multi-view 2D data, which decomposes clinical reasoning into four expert-designed diagnostic stages. Using clinician-verified annotations, we perform the first step-level evaluation of general-purpose and medical VLMs, revealing systematic failure modes obscured by aggregate accuracy metrics. Furthermore, we show that current VLMs are highly susceptible to adversarial yet clinically plausible intermediate explanations, which significantly amplify hallucinations despite contradictory visual evidence. Together, our findings highlight fundamental limitations in grounding multi-step clinical reasoning and establish Med-StepBench as a rigorous benchmark for developing safer and more reliable medical VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对3D肿瘤PET/CT的逐步幻觉检测基准，揭示多步临床推理中的系统性失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医疗幻觉基准主要关注2D影像和单次诊断问题，无法检测预测是否基于正确的定位和异常识别，导致关键推理错误被掩盖。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估医疗视觉语言模型在多步临床推理中逐步幻觉的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前VLM对看似合理但具有对抗性的中间解释高度敏感，即使存在矛盾的视觉证据，也会显著放大幻觉。
analysis.method: 构建包含12000+图像和100万+图像-语句对的3D肿瘤PET/CT基准，将临床推理分解为四个专家设计的诊断阶段，并采用临床医生验证的标注进行逐步评估。
contributions: 首个大规模逐步幻觉检测基准Med-StepBench，覆盖3D和2D多视图数据。
首次对通用和医疗VLM进行逐步评估，揭示被聚合准确率掩盖的系统性失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 对通用和医疗VLM进行逐步评估，发现系统性失败模式，并验证了对抗性中间解释对幻觉的放大效应。
limitations: 仅针对肿瘤PET/CT领域，泛化性有待验证。
对抗性解释的构造可能依赖专家知识，自动化程度有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对3D肿瘤PET/CT的逐步幻觉检测基准，揭示多步临床推理中的系统性失败模式。

papers.title: Continual Harness: Online Adaptation for Self-Improving Foundation Agents
papers.abstract: Coding harnesses such as Claude Code and OpenHands wrap foundation models with tools, memory, and planning, but no equivalent exists for embodied agents' long-horizon partial-observability decision-making. We first report our Gemini Plays Pokemon (GPP) experiments. With iterative human-in-the-loop harness refinement, GPP became the first AI system to complete Pokemon Blue, Yellow Legacy on hard mode, and Crystal without a lost battle. In the hardest stages, the agent itself began iterating on its strategy through long-context memory, surfacing emergent self-improvement signals alongside human-in-the-loop refinement. Continual Harness removes the human fully from this loop: a reset-free self-improving harness for embodied agents that formalizes and automates what we observed. Starting from only a minimal environment interface, the agent alternates between acting and refining its own prompt, sub-agents, skills, and memory, drawing on any past trajectory data. Prompt-optimization methods require episode resets; Continual Harness adapts online within a single run. On Pokemon Red and Emerald across frontier models, Continual Harness starting from scratch substantially reduces button-press cost relative to the minimalist baseline and recovers a majority of the gap to a hand-engineered expert harness, with capability-dependent gains, despite starting from the same raw interface with no curated knowledge, no hand-crafted tools, and no domain scaffolding. We then close the loop with the model itself: an online process-reward co-learning loop, in which an open-source agent's rollouts through the refining harness are relabeled by a frontier teacher and used to update the model, drives sustained in-game milestone progress on Pokemon Red without resetting the environment between training iterations.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Continual Harness，一种无需重置的在线自改进框架，使具身智能体在单次运行中通过交替行动与自我优化实现持续提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编码工具（如 Claude Code）为语言模型提供了工具、记忆和规划支持，但具身智能体在长时域、部分可观测决策任务中缺乏类似的持续自改进框架，且现有提示优化方法需要回合重置，无法在线适应。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需人类干预、无需环境重置的在线自改进框架，使具身智能体在单次运行中持续提升决策能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在 Gemini Plays Pokemon 实验中，通过人工迭代优化，智能体在困难阶段开始利用长上下文记忆自主迭代策略，涌现出自我改进信号，表明在线自改进的可行性。
analysis.method: Continual Harness 框架：智能体在单次运行中交替执行行动和优化自身提示、子智能体、技能和记忆，利用历史轨迹数据，无需环境重置；并引入在线过程奖励共学习循环，使用前沿模型对开源智能体的轨迹进行重标注并更新模型。
contributions: 提出 Continual Harness，首个无需重置的在线自改进框架，形式化了具身智能体的持续自我优化过程。
在 Pokemon Red 和 Emerald 上验证了有效性，显著降低按钮成本并缩小与手工专家系统的差距。
引入在线过程奖励共学习循环，使开源智能体在无需环境重置的情况下持续提升游戏里程碑进度。
analysis.experiments: 在 Pokemon Red 和 Emerald 上使用多种前沿模型进行实验，从零开始，相比最小基线大幅减少按钮成本，并恢复大部分与手工专家系统的差距；在线共学习循环在 Pokemon Red 上实现了持续的里程碑进展。
limitations: 实验仅在 Pokemon 游戏环境中进行，泛化性需进一步验证。
依赖前沿模型作为教师进行轨迹重标注，可能引入额外成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对具身智能体在线学习有重要价值，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Continual Harness，一种无需重置的在线自改进框架，使具身智能体在单次运行中通过交替行动与自我优化实现持续提升。

papers.title: Omni-Persona: Systematic Benchmarking and Improving Omnimodal Personalization
papers.abstract: While multimodal large language models have advanced across text, image, and audio, personalization research has remained primarily vision-language, with unified omnimodal benchmarking that jointly covers text, image, and audio still limited, and lacking the methodological rigor to account for absent-persona scenarios or systematic grounding studies. We introduce Omni-Persona, the first comprehensive benchmark for omnimodal personalization. We formalize the task as cross-modal routing over the \emph{Persona Modality Graph}, encompassing 4 task groups and 18 fine-grained tasks across ${\sim}750$ items. To rigorously diagnose grounding behavior, we propose \emph{Calibrated Accuracy ($\mathrm{Cal}$)}, which jointly rewards correct grounding and appropriate abstention, incorporating absent-persona queries within a unified evaluation framework. On our dedicated experiments, three diagnostic findings emerge: (i) open-source models show a consistent audio-vs-visual grounding gap that RLVR partially narrows via dense rule-based supervision; (ii) answerable recall and parameter scale are incomplete diagnostics, since strong recall can coexist with absent-persona hallucination and larger models do not always achieve higher $\mathrm{Cal}$, exposing calibration as a separate evaluation axis; and (iii) SFT is bounded by the difficulty of constructing annotated ground-truth supervision at scale, while RLVR generalizes more consistently through outcome-level verifiable feedback yet drifts toward conservative behavior and lower generation quality under our reward design. Omni-Persona thus serves as a diagnostic framework that surfaces the pitfalls of omnimodal personalization, guiding future post-training and reward design.

analysis.tldr: 首个全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，揭示多模态大模型在文本/图像/音频联合个性化中的校准与泛化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有个性化研究主要局限于视觉-语言模态，缺乏覆盖文本、图像和音频的统一全模态基准，且缺少对缺失人物场景的系统性评估和接地行为诊断方法。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个全面的全模态个性化基准，并设计能够同时评估正确接地和适当弃权的统一指标，以诊断多模态大模型在跨模态个性化中的行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现三个诊断性现象：(i)开源模型存在音频与视觉接地能力差距，RLVR通过密集规则监督可部分缩小；(ii)可回答召回率和参数规模不足以完全诊断，强召回可能与缺失人物幻觉共存，大模型不一定获得更高校准精度；(iii)SFT受限于大规模标注真实监督的构建难度，RLVR通过结果级可验证反馈更一致地泛化，但会导致保守行为和生成质量下降。
analysis.method: 提出Omni-Persona基准，形式化任务为人物模态图上的跨模态路由，包含4个任务组和18个细粒度任务（约750项）；提出校准精度（Cal）指标，在统一评估框架中联合奖励正确接地和适当弃权，并纳入缺失人物查询。
contributions: 首个覆盖文本、图像和音频的全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，包含4个任务组和18个细粒度任务。
提出校准精度（Cal）指标，统一评估接地和弃权行为。
通过实验揭示全模态个性化中的关键诊断发现，指导后训练和奖励设计。
analysis.experiments: 在Omni-Persona基准上对多种模型进行实验，比较SFT和RLVR等后训练方法，并分析接地差距、校准与规模关系等。
limitations: 基准规模有限（约750项），可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
RLVR的保守行为和生成质量下降问题未完全解决。

analysis.reason: 首个全模态个性化基准，方法创新且实验系统，对多模态个性化领域有重要指导意义。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个全模态个性化基准Omni-Persona，揭示多模态大模型在文本/图像/音频联合个性化中的校准与泛化问题。

papers.title: Attention Drift: What Autoregressive Speculative Decoding Models Learn
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting future tokens with a small model, but drafter models degrade sharply under template perturbation and long-context inputs. We identify a previously-unreported phenomenon we call \textbf{attention drift}: as the drafter generates successive tokens within a speculation chain, attention progressively moves from the prompt onto its own recently-generated tokens. We observe this across both \emph{EAGLE3} drafters and \emph{MTP heads}, suggesting drift is a property of drafter designs. We trace this to the un-normalized residual path between chain steps: the drafter's hidden state magnitude grows monotonically with chain depth, which exhibits dynamics consistent with additional pre-norm transformer layers stacked on the target rather than as a standalone autoregressive predictor. In order to limit the growth, we propose two architectural changes: Post-norm on the drafter hidden states and per-hidden-state RMSNorm after capturing target hidden states. Our interventions improve acceptance length over the current leading model, pre-norm EAGLE3, by up to $2\times$ under template perturbation, $1.18\times$ on long-context tasks, and $1.10\times$ on seven standard benchmarks spanning multi-turn chat, math, and coding. Our changes also allow shorter train-time-test depths to generalize over longer drafting sequences.

analysis.tldr: 投机解码中的小模型存在注意力漂移现象，通过后归一化和RMSNorm可提升长上下文和模板扰动下的接受长度。
analysis.research_motivation: 投机解码通过小模型加速LLM推理，但小模型在模板扰动和长上下文输入下性能急剧下降，限制了其实际应用。
analysis.problem: 投机解码中的小模型（drafter）在生成连续token时，注意力从提示词逐渐转移到自身生成的token上，导致性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现注意力漂移现象：在推测链中，注意力逐渐从提示词转移到最近生成的token；隐藏状态幅度随链深度单调增长，表现出类似额外预归一化Transformer层的动态。
analysis.method: 提出两种架构修改：对drafter隐藏状态使用后归一化（Post-norm），以及在捕获目标隐藏状态后对每个隐藏状态应用RMSNorm。
contributions: 首次识别并命名投机解码中的注意力漂移现象。
提出两种简单有效的架构修改（后归一化和RMSNorm），显著提升接受长度。
analysis.experiments: 在模板扰动下接受长度提升2倍，长上下文任务提升1.18倍，七个标准基准（多轮对话、数学、编码）提升1.10倍；允许更短的训练深度泛化到更长的推理序列。
limitations: 仅针对EAGLE3和MTP头验证，可能不适用于其他drafter设计。
未讨论对目标模型推理速度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 发现新现象并给出有效改进，实验充分，对LLM推理加速有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 投机解码中的小模型存在注意力漂移现象，通过后归一化和RMSNorm可提升长上下文和模板扰动下的接受长度。

papers.title: Optimizer-Induced Mode Connectivity: From AdamW to Muon
papers.abstract: Mode connectivity has been widely studied, yet the role of the optimizer remains underexplored. We revisit it through optimizer-induced implicit regularization, asking how connectivity behaves when restricted to solutions constrained by a given optimizer. For two-layer ReLU networks, we show that solutions from a single optimizer -- AdamW, Muon, or others in the Lion-$\mathcal{K}$ family -- form a connected set at sufficiently large width, a result not implied by prior work. We then characterize how optimizer-induced regions interact: at large width two different regions can be disjoint or overlap depending on regularization, while in our small-width example AdamW and Muon converge to disconnected zero-loss components separated by a provable loss barrier. Empirically, in GPT-2 pretraining, we observe same-optimizer paths preserve each model's spectrum while cross-optimizer paths traverse a smooth transition. Our results reveal optimizer-dependent structure beyond classical mode connectivity literature.

analysis.tldr: 发现优化器（如AdamW和Muon）会诱导出不同的模式连通性结构，在宽网络下同一优化器的解连通，不同优化器间可能存在损失屏障。
analysis.research_motivation: 模式连通性已有广泛研究，但优化器在其中的作用尚未被充分探索，理解优化器如何影响解空间的连通性有助于揭示训练动态和泛化机制。
analysis.problem: 研究优化器诱导的隐式正则化如何影响模式连通性，特别是同一优化器或不同优化器得到的解在参数空间中的连通性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在两层ReLU网络中，同一优化器（如AdamW、Muon或Lion-𝒦族）的解在足够宽度下形成连通集；不同优化器的区域可能不相交或重叠，取决于正则化；小宽度下AdamW和Muon收敛到被损失屏障隔开的零损失分量；GPT-2预训练中，同优化器路径保留模型谱，跨优化器路径经历平滑过渡。
analysis.method: 理论分析两层ReLU网络的模式连通性，结合小宽度示例和GPT-2预训练实验验证优化器诱导的结构。
contributions: 首次揭示优化器在模式连通性中的关键作用，证明同一优化器的解在宽网络中连通。
刻画不同优化器区域间的交互，发现可能存在的损失屏障和谱保留现象。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2预训练任务上进行了实证分析，观察同优化器和跨优化器路径的谱变化。
limitations: 理论结果主要针对两层ReLU网络，更深或更复杂架构的推广性未知。
实验仅涉及GPT-2，未在更大模型或不同任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory

papers.title: StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception
papers.abstract: Recent advances in robot imitation learning have yielded powerful visuomotor policies capable of manipulating a wide variety of objects directly from monocular visual inputs. However, monocular observations inherently lack reliable depth cues and spatial awareness, which are critical for precise manipulation in cluttered or geometrically complex scenes. To address this limitation, we introduce StereoPolicy, a new visuomotor policy learning framework that directly leverages synchronized stereo image pairs to strengthen geometric reasoning, without requiring explicit 3D reconstruction or camera calibration. StereoPolicy employs pretrained 2D vision encoders to process each image independently and fuses the resulting representations through a Stereo Transformer. This design implicitly captures spatial correspondence and disparity cues. The framework integrates seamlessly with diffusion-based and pretrained vision-language-action (VLA) policies, delivering consistent improvements over RGB, RGB-D, point cloud, and multi-view baselines across three simulation benchmarks: RoboMimic, RoboCasa, and OmniGibson. We further validate StereoPolicy on real-robot experiments spanning both tabletop and bimanual mobile manipulation settings. Our results underscore stereo vision as a scalable and robust modality that bridges 2D pretrained representations with 3D geometric understanding for robotic manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出StereoPolicy框架，利用立体图像对提升机器人操作策略的几何推理能力，无需显式3D重建或相机标定。
analysis.research_motivation: 单目视觉缺乏可靠深度线索和空间感知，难以在杂乱或几何复杂场景中实现精确操作，而现有方法依赖RGB-D或点云等昂贵或校准敏感的传感器。

在多个仿真和真实机器人实验中验证了立体视觉优于RGB、RGB-D、点云和多视角基线。

papers.title: Prospective Compression in Human Abstraction Learning
papers.abstract: A core challenge in program synthesis is online library learning: the incremental acquisition of reusable abstractions under uncertainty about future task demands. Existing algorithms treat library learning as retrospective compression over a static task distribution, where the learned library is determined by the corpus of past tasks. However, real-world learning domains are often non-stationary, with tasks arising from a generative process that evolves over time. We propose and test the hypothesis that in non-stationary domains human library learning selects abstractions prospectively: targeting compression of future tasks. We study this question using the Pattern Builder Task, a visual program synthesis paradigm in which participants construct increasingly complex geometric patterns from a small set of primitives, transformations, and custom helpers that carry forward across trials. Using this task, we conduct two experiments with complementary latent curricula, designed to dissociate between behaviors consistent with prospective compression, and alternative library learning accounts. Using six computational models spanning online library learning strategies, we show that human abstraction behavior reflects sensitivity to latent, non-stationary structure in the task-generating process. This behavior is consistent with prospective compression, and cannot be captured by existing retrospective compression-based algorithms, or inductive biases modeled by LLM-based program synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 人类在非平稳任务中通过前瞻性压缩选择抽象，而非回顾性压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有程序合成中的库学习方法假设任务分布静态，但现实世界任务生成过程常随时间演变，人类如何在这种非平稳环境中学习抽象尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 研究人类在非平稳任务领域中是否采用前瞻性压缩（针对未来任务）而非回顾性压缩（基于过去任务）来学习抽象。

通过实验和计算模型表明现有回顾性压缩算法和LLM程序合成无法解释人类行为。

papers.title: Geometric 4D Stitching for Grounded 4D Generation
papers.abstract: Recent 4D generation methods complete scene-level missing information using generative models and reconstruct the scene into radiance-based representations. However, these pipelines often present geometric inconsistencies in the generated content, and the radiance-based reconstruction requires expensive optimization. Furthermore, radiance-based representations often absorb these geometric inconsistencies into their view-dependent nature, failing to enforce the grounded geometric consistency. To address these issues, we propose Geometric 4D Stitching, an efficient framework that explicitly identifies missing geometric regions and complements them with geometrically grounded 4D stitches. As a result, our method constructs 4D scene representations in under 10 minutes on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPU per one-step scene expansion, while improving geometric consistency. Moreover, we demonstrate that our explicit 4D stitching supports interative expansion of 4D mesh as well as 4D scene editing.

analysis.tldr: 提出几何4D拼接框架，通过显式识别缺失几何区域并补充几何一致的4D补丁，实现高效且几何一致的4D场景生成。

papers.title: ERASE: Eliminating Redundant Visual Tokens via Adaptive Two-Stage Token Pruning
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) enable large language models (LLMs) to process high-resolution images, significantly improving real-world multimodal understanding. However, this capability introduces a large number of vision tokens, resulting in substantial computational overhead. To mitigate this issue, various vision token pruning methods have been proposed. Nevertheless, existing approaches predominantly rely on learned semantic features within the model to capture visual redundancy. Moreover, they lack adaptive mechanisms to adjust pruning strategies according to the complexity of the input image. In this paper, we propose ERASE, a two-stage vision token pruning framework that identifies and retains salient tokens through pruning strategies adaptive to image complexity. Experiment results demonstrate that ERASE significantly reduces vision tokens while preserving accuracy. For Qwen2.5-VL-7B, at a token pruning ratio of 85\%, ERASE retains 89.46% of the original model accuracy, whereas the best prior method retains only 78.1%. Our code is available at https://github.com/Tuna-Luna/ERASE.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架ERASE，在85%剪枝率下保留89.46%的原始准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率图像输入导致视觉令牌数量激增，带来巨大计算开销；现有剪枝方法依赖模型内部语义特征且缺乏自适应调整策略。
analysis.problem: 如何根据图像复杂度自适应地剪枝冗余视觉令牌，在保持模型精度的同时显著降低计算量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法依赖模型内部语义特征捕捉冗余，且无法根据图像复杂度调整剪枝策略，导致高剪枝率下精度损失严重。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架ERASE，通过自适应于图像复杂度的剪枝策略识别并保留关键令牌。
contributions: 提出自适应两阶段视觉令牌剪枝框架ERASE，根据图像复杂度动态调整剪枝策略。
在Qwen2.5-VL-7B上，85%剪枝率下保留89.46%的原始准确率，显著优于此前最佳方法的78.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-VL-7B模型上评估，85%令牌剪枝率下ERASE保留89.46%原始准确率，此前最佳方法仅保留78.1%。
limitations: 摘要未提及在不同模型架构或更大规模模型上的泛化能力。

papers.title: Yeti: A compact protein structure tokenizer for reconstruction and multi-modal generation
papers.abstract: Multimodal models that jointly reason over protein sequences, structures, and function annotations within a unified representation hold immense potential for integrating multimodal data and generating new proteins with designed functional properties. To utilize transformer architectures, such models require a tokenizer that converts protein structure from continuous atomic coordinates into discrete representations suitable for scalable multimodal training. The quality of such models are fundamentally upper bounded by the fidelity and expressiveness of the underlying tokenized structure. However, existing tokenizers prioritize reconstruction over generative abilities. To address these gaps, we introduce Yeti, a simple and compact protein structure tokenizer based on lookup free quantization and trained end to end with a flow matching objective for multimodal learning. Compared to existing models, Yeti generally achieves the best codebook utilization and token diversity, and second best reconstruction accuracy (with 10x fewer parameters than ESM3) on diverse datasets. To validate Yeti's generative capability, we trained a compact multimodal model jointly over its structure tokens and amino acid sequence entirely from scratch, with no pretrained initialization. The resulting multimodal model generates plausible structures under unconditional cogeneration of protein sequence and structures, achieving comparable results to 10x larger models. Together, these results demonstrate that Yeti is a compact and expressive protein structure tokenizer suitable for training multimodal models that cogenerates highly plausible sequences and structures.

analysis.tldr: Yeti 是一种紧凑的蛋白质结构分词器，通过流匹配目标训练，在重建和多模态生成中表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有蛋白质结构分词器优先重建而非生成能力，且多模态模型性能受限于分词器的保真度和表达力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既高保真又具生成能力的紧凑蛋白质结构分词器，以支持多模态模型训练。

analysis.method: 基于查找自由量化（lookup free quantization）和流匹配目标（flow matching）的端到端训练，生成离散结构 token。
contributions: 提出 Yeti，一种紧凑的蛋白质结构分词器，在代码本利用率和 token 多样性上达到最优，重建精度第二（参数比 ESM3 少 10 倍）。
验证了 Yeti 在多模态生成中的有效性，从头训练的小模型在序列-结构共生成上达到与 10 倍大模型相当的结果。

papers.title: INFANiTE: Implicit Neural representation for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI
papers.abstract: Spatio-temporal fetal brain atlases are important for characterizing normative neurodevelopment and identifying congenital anomalies. However, existing atlas construction pipelines necessitate days for slice-to-volume reconstruction (SVR) to generate high-resolution 3D brain volumes and several additional days for iterative volume registration, thereby rendering atlas construction from large-scale cohorts prohibitively impractical. We address these limitations with INFANiTE, an Implicit Neural Representation (INR) framework for high-resolution Fetal brain spatio-temporal Atlas learNing from clinical Thick-slicE MRI scans, bypassing both the costly SVR and the iterative non-rigid registration steps entirely, thereby substantially accelerating atlas construction. Extensive experiments demonstrate that INFANiTE outperforms existing baselines in subject consistency, reference fidelity, intrinsic quality and biological plausibility, even under challenging sparse-data settings. Additionally, INFANiTE reduces the end-to-end processing time (i.e., from raw scans to the final atlas) from days to hours compared to the traditional 3D volume-based pipeline (e.g., SyGN), facilitating large-scale population-level fetal brain analysis. Our code is publicly available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/INFANiTE-5D74

analysis.tldr: INFANiTE用隐式神经表示直接从厚层MRI切片构建胎儿脑时空图谱，省去传统重建与配准步骤，将处理时间从数天缩短至数小时。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有胎儿脑图谱构建需要先进行切片到体积重建（SVR）生成高分辨率3D脑体积，再进行迭代体积配准，整个过程耗时数天，难以在大规模队列中应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从临床厚层MRI扫描中高效构建高分辨率胎儿脑时空图谱，避免昂贵的SVR和迭代非刚性配准步骤。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出INFANiTE框架，基于隐式神经表示（INR）直接从厚层MRI切片学习时空图谱，跳过SVR和迭代配准。
contributions: 首次将隐式神经表示用于胎儿脑时空图谱构建，绕过传统SVR和配准步骤。
在subject一致性、参考保真度、内在质量和生物学合理性上超越现有基线，且处理时间从数天降至数小时。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行了广泛实验，包括稀疏数据设置，与SyGN等传统3D体积方法对比，展示了性能提升和加速效果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定MRI采集协议，泛化性需进一步验证。

analysis.one_sentence_summary: INFANiTE用隐式神经表示直接从厚层MRI切片构建胎儿脑时空图谱，省去传统重建与配准步骤，将处理时间从数天缩短至数小时。

papers.title: OZ-TAL: Online Zero-Shot Temporal Action Localization
papers.abstract: Online Temporal Action Localization (On-TAL) aims to detect the occurrence time and category of actions in untrimmed streaming videos immediately upon their completion. Recent advancements in this field focus on developing more sophisticated frameworks, shifting from Online Action Detection (OAD)-based aggregation paradigm to instance-level understanding. However, existing approaches are typically trained on specific domains and often exhibit limited generalization capabilities when applied to arbitrary videos, particularly in the presence of previously unseen actions. In this paper, we introduce a new task called Online Zero-shot Temporal Action Localization (OZ-TAL), which aims to detect previously unseen actions in an online fashion. Furthermore, we propose a training-free framework that leverages off-the-shelf Vision-Language Models (VLMs) while introducing additional mechanisms to enhance visual representations and mitigate their inherent biases. We establish new benchmarks and representative baselines for OZ-TAL on THUMOS14 and ActivityNet-1.3, and extensive experiments demonstrate that our method substantially outperforms existing state-of-the-art approaches under both offline and online zero-shot settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出在线零样本时序动作定位任务及无训练框架，利用现成VLM并增强视觉表示，在基准上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线时序动作定位方法依赖特定域训练，泛化能力有限，无法处理未见过的动作类别。
analysis.problem: 在流式视频中实时检测未见过的动作类别（在线零样本时序动作定位）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出无训练框架，利用现成视觉-语言模型，并引入额外机制增强视觉表示、缓解固有偏差。
contributions: 定义在线零样本时序动作定位（OZ-TAL）新任务。
提出无需训练、基于现成VLM的框架，并设计增强视觉表示和缓解偏差的机制。
在THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3上建立基准，实验表明方法在离线和在线零样本设置下均优于现有方法。

papers.title: GLiNER2-PII: A Multilingual Model for Personally Identifiable Information Extraction
papers.abstract: Reliable detection of personally identifiable information (PII) is increasingly important across modern data-processing systems, yet the task remains difficult: PII spans are heterogeneous, locale-dependent, context-sensitive, and often embedded in noisy or semi-structured documents. We present GLiNER2-PII, a small 0.3B-parameter model adapted from GLiNER2 and designed to recognize a broad taxonomy of 42 PII entity types at character-span resolution. Training such systems, however, is constrained by the scarcity of shareable annotated data and the privacy risks associated with collecting real PII at scale. To address this challenge, we construct a multilingual synthetic corpus of 4,910 annotated texts using a constraint-driven generation pipeline that produces diverse, realistic examples across languages, domains, formats, and entity distributions. On the challenging SPY benchmark, GLiNER2-PII achieves the highest span-level F1 among five compared systems, including OpenAI Privacy Filter and three GLiNER-based detectors. We publicly release the model on Hugging Face to support further research and practical deployment of open PII detection systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个0.3B参数的多语言PII提取模型GLiNER2-PII，通过合成数据训练，在SPY基准上取得最佳F1。
analysis.research_motivation: PII检测在现代数据处理中日益重要，但任务困难：实体类型多样、依赖语言环境、上下文敏感且常嵌入噪声或半结构化文档中。同时，共享标注数据稀缺且收集真实PII存在隐私风险。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个多语言、高精度的PII提取模型，并解决训练数据稀缺和隐私问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从GLiNER2微调得到0.3B参数的GLiNER2-PII模型，识别42种PII实体类型（字符级跨度）。使用约束驱动生成流水线构建包含4,910个标注文本的多语言合成语料库进行训练。
contributions: 提出GLiNER2-PII，一个0.3B参数的多语言PII提取模型，覆盖42种实体类型。
构建多语言合成语料库，通过约束驱动生成流水线产生多样、真实的示例。

papers.title: HiDrive: A Closed-Loop Benchmark for High-Level Autonomous Driving
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving has witnessed rapid progress, yet existing benchmarks are increasingly saturated, with state-of-the-art models achieving near-perfect scores on widely used open-loop and closed-loop benchmarks. This saturation does not mean that the problem has been solved; instead, it reveals that current benchmarks remain limited in scenario diversity, object variety, and the breadth of driving capabilities they evaluate. In particular, they lack sufficient long-tail scenarios involving rare but safety-critical objects and fail to assess advanced decision-making such as legal compliance, ethical reasoning, and emergency response. To address these gaps, we propose HiDrive, a new closed-loop benchmark for end-to-end autonomous driving that emphasizes long-tail scenarios and a richer evaluation of driving capabilities. HiDrive introduces a diverse set of rare objects and uncommon traffic situations, and expands evaluation from basic driving skills to more advanced capabilities, including rule compliance, moral reasoning, and context-dependent emergency maneuvers. Correspondingly, we extend previous collision-avoidance-centered metrics into a comprehensive evaluation system that encompasses collision and braking, traffic-rule compliance, and moral-reasoning indicators. Built on a more advanced physics engine, HiDrive provides physically realistic lighting and high-fidelity visual rendering, offering a more challenging and realistic testbed for assessing whether autonomous driving systems can handle the complexity of real-world deployment. The HiDrive software, source code, digital assets, and documentation are available at https://github.com/VDIGPKU/HiDrive.

analysis.tldr: HiDrive 是一个面向高级自动驾驶的闭环基准测试，专注于长尾场景和更丰富的驾驶能力评估。

papers.title: HapticLDM: A Diffusion Model for Text-to-Vibrotactile Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-vibration generation converts natural language into haptic feedback, enabling vibration-effect designers to get scenarios-fitted vibrations more efficiently, which shows great potentials in application fields such as metaverse, games, and film to enrich the user experience in interactive scenarios. The core challenge in this field is how to generate accurate, consistent, and complete vibrations according to textual semantics. Very recent autoregressive (AR) approaches (e.g., HapticGen) exhibit limited capacity in fully capturing global dependencies, owing to the inherent sequential nature of their modeling and prevailing data constraints. In this paper, we proposed HapticLDM, the first text-to-vibration generative model built upon Latent Diffusion Models (LDMs). Firstly, with respect to the data, we introduced a text-processing strategy that emphasizes dynamic characteristics to curate high-quality data pairs for fine-grained dynamic modeling. Secondly, HapticLDM incorporates a global denoising mechanism that regulates coherent and stable variations in the temporal envelope. Furthermore, we conduct extensive evaluations, including A/B testing against the state-of-the-art baseline and a user study involving 30 participants. The results demonstrate that our model enhances realism and semantic alignment. Qualitative feedback further indicates that HapticLDM simplifies the haptic design workflow while generating diverse, subtle, and physically precise vibrations.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于潜在扩散模型的文本到振动生成方法，通过全局去噪机制和动态文本策略提升语义对齐与真实感。

papers.title: Towards Generalist Game Players: An Investigation of Foundation Models in the Game Multiverse
papers.abstract: The real world unfolds along a single set of physics laws, yet human intelligence demonstrates a remarkable capacity to generalize experiences from this singular physical existence into a multiverse of games, each governed by entirely different rules, aesthetics, physics, and objectives. This omni-reality adaptability is a hallmark of general intelligence. As Artificial Intelligence progresses towards Artificial General Intelligence, the multiverse of games has evolved from mere entertainment into the ultimate ground for training and evaluating AGI. The pursuit of this generality has unfolded across four eras: from environment-specific symbolic and reinforcement learning agents, to current large foundation models acting as generalist players, and toward a future creator stage where agent both creates new game worlds and continually evolves within them. We trace the full lifecycle of a generalist game player along four interdependent pillars: Dataset, Model, Harness, and Benchmark. Every advance across these pillars can be read as an attempt to break one of five fundamental trade-offs that currently bound the whole system. Building on this end-to-end view, we chart a five-level roadmap, progressing from single-game mastery to the ultimate creator stage in which the agent simultaneously creates and evolves within theoretical game multiverse. Taken together, our work offers a unified lens onto a rapidly shifting field,and a principled path toward the omnipotent generalist agent capable of seamlessly mastering any challenge within the multiverse of games, thereby paving the way for AGI.

papers.title: Learning the Interaction Prior for Protein-Protein Interaction Prediction: A Model-Agnostic Approach
papers.abstract: Protein-protein interactions (PPIs) are fundamental to cellular function and disease mechanisms. Current learning-based PPI predictors focus on learning powerful protein representations but neglect designing specialized classification heads. They mainly rely on generic aggregating methods like concatenation or dot products, which lack biological insight. Motivated by the biological "L3 rule", where multiple length-3 paths between a pair of proteins indicate their interaction likelihood, our study addresses this gap by designing a biologically informed PPI classifier. In this paper, we provide empirical evidence that popular PPI datasets strongly support the L3 rule. We propose an L3-path-regularized graph prompt learning method called L3-PPI, which can generate a prompt graph with virtual L3 paths based on protein representations and controls the number of paths. L3-PPI reformulates the classification of protein embedding pairs into a graph-level classification task over the generated prompt graph. This lightweight module seamlessly integrates with PPI predictors as a plug-and-play component, injecting the interaction prior of complementarity to enhance performance. Extensive experiments show that L3-PPI achieves superior performance enhancements over advanced competitors.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于L3规则的轻量级图提示学习模块L3-PPI，作为即插即用组件提升蛋白质相互作用预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有PPI预测方法专注于学习更好的蛋白质表征，但忽略了设计具有生物学洞察的分类头，普遍使用拼接或点积等通用聚合方法，缺乏生物学先验。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个生物信息驱动的PPI分类器，以注入蛋白质互补性先验，提升现有PPI预测器的性能。

analysis.method: 提出L3-PPI，一种L3路径正则化的图提示学习方法。它基于蛋白质表征生成包含虚拟L3路径的提示图，并控制路径数量，将蛋白质嵌入对的分类转化为对提示图的图级分类任务。该模块作为即插即用组件，可无缝集成到现有PPI预测器中。

实验证明L3-PPI在多个数据集上优于先进竞争者。

papers.title: Learning to Perceive "Where": Spatial Pretext Tasks for Robust Self-Supervised Learning
papers.abstract: Existing self-supervised learning (SSL) methods primarily learn object-invariant representations but often neglect the spatial structure and relationships among object parts. To address this limitation, we introduce Spatial Prediction (SP), a spatially aware pretext regression task that predicts the relative position and scale between a pair of disentangled local views from the same image. By modeling part-to-part relationships in a continuous geometric space, SP encourages representations to capture fine-grained spatial dependencies beyond invariant categorical semantics, thereby learning the compositional structure of visual scenes. SP is implemented as a decoupled plug-in and can be seamlessly integrated into diverse SSL frameworks. Extensive experiments show consistent improvements across image recognition, fine-grained classification, semantic segmentation, and depth estimation, as well as substantial gains in out-of-distribution robustness for object recognition. To evaluate spatial reasoning, we introduce (1) a position and scale prediction task on image patch pairs and (2) a jigsaw understanding task requiring patch reordering and recognition after reconstruction. Strong performance on these tasks indicates improved spatial structure and geometric awareness. Overall, explicitly modeling spatial information provides an effective inductive bias for SSL, leading to more structured representations and better generalization. Code and models will be released.

analysis.tldr: 提出空间预测（SP）自监督预文本任务，通过预测局部视图间的相对位置和尺度来增强视觉表征的空间结构感知能力。

papers.title: G-Zero: Self-Play for Open-Ended Generation from Zero Data
papers.abstract: Self-evolving LLMs excel in verifiable domains but struggle in open-ended tasks, where reliance on proxy LLM judges introduces capability bottlenecks and reward hacking. To overcome this, we introduce G-Zero, a verifier-free, co-evolutionary framework for autonomous self-improvement. Our core innovation is Hint-$δ$, an intrinsic reward that quantifies the predictive shift between a Generator model's unassisted response and its response conditioned on a self-generated hint. Using this signal, a Proposer model is trained via GRPO to continuously target the Generator's blind spots by synthesizing challenging queries and informative hints. The Generator is concurrently optimized via DPO to internalize these hint-guided improvements. Theoretically, we prove a best-iterate suboptimality guarantee for an idealized standard-DPO version of G-Zero, provided that the Proposer induces sufficient exploration coverage and the data filteration keeps pseudo-label score noise low. By deriving supervision entirely from internal distributional dynamics, G-Zero bypasses the capability ceilings of external judges, providing a scalable, robust pathway for continuous LLM self-evolution across unverifiable domains.

analysis.tldr: G-Zero通过自博弈和内在奖励Hint-δ实现无验证器的开放式文本生成自我进化。

papers.title: SDTalk: Structured Facial Priors and Dual-Branch Motion Fields for Generalizable Gaussian Talking Head Synthesis
papers.abstract: High-quality, real-time talking head synthesis remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing reconstruction- and rendering-based methods typically rely on identity-specific models, limiting cross-identity generalization. To address this issue, we propose SDTalk, a one-shot 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)-based framework that generalizes to unseen identities without personalized training or fine-tuning. Our framework comprises two modules with a two-stage training strategy. In the first stage, we incorporate structured facial priors into the reconstruction module and separately predict 3DGS parameters for visible and occluded regions, enabling complete head reconstruction from a single image. In the second stage, we introduce a dual-branch motion field to model coarse and fine facial dynamics, improving detail fidelity and lip synchronization. Experiments demonstrate that SDTalk surpasses existing methods in both visual quality and inference efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出SDTalk框架，利用结构化面部先验和双分支运动场实现单张图像驱动的泛化说话头生成。

papers.title: JODA: Composable Joint Dynamics for Articulated Objects
papers.abstract: Articulated objects used in simulation and embodied AI are typically specified by geometry and kinematic structure, but lack the fine-grained dynamical effects that govern realistic mechanical behavior, such as frictional holding, detents, soft closing, and snap latching. Existing approaches either ignore the detailed structure of dynamics entirely, or use simple models with limited expressiveness. We introduce JODA, a framework for generating joint-level dynamics as a structured three-channel field over the joint degree of freedom, capturing conservative forces, dry friction, and damping. Instantiated using shape-constrained piecewise cubic interpolation (PCHIP), this formulation defines a compact and expressive function space that is both interpretable and compatible with differentiable simulation. Building on this representation, we develop methods for inferring and refining joint dynamics from multimodal inputs. Given visual observations and joint context, a vision-language model proposes structured dynamical primitives, which are composed into a unified dynamics field. The resulting representation supports both direct manipulation and gradient-based refinement. We demonstrate that JODA enables plausible and controllable modeling of diverse joint behaviors, providing a unified interface for inference, editing, and optimization. Code and example assets with their generated profiles will be released upon publication.

analysis.tldr: JODA 提出一种可组合的关节动力学框架，通过结构化三通道场和视觉-语言模型实现从多模态输入推断和优化关节行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 仿真和具身 AI 中使用的铰接物体通常只指定几何和运动学结构，缺乏细粒度的动力学效应（如摩擦保持、软关闭、卡扣锁定），现有方法要么忽略动力学细节，要么使用表达能力有限的简单模型。

contributions: 提出一种紧凑且表达力强的关节动力学表示方法，支持可解释性和可微分仿真。
开发了从多模态输入（视觉+关节上下文）推断和优化关节动力学的方法，利用视觉-语言模型生成结构化基元。

papers.title: Novel GPU Boruta algorithms for feature selection from high-dimensional data
papers.abstract: Most feature selection algorithms, especially wrapper methods, run inefficiently on CPU based platforms because of their high computational complexity. This inefficiency makes them unsuitable for processing large scale datasets. To address this challenge, the present study proposed two GPU accelerated versions of the Boruta feature selection procedure, in which Boruta-Permut relies on permutation based feature importance and Boruta-TreeImp employs importance based on impurity reduction. To evaluate these methods we conducted experiments on both a self constructed dataset and several publicly available datasets. The experimental results show that the proposed GPU accelerated algorithms greatly improve computational efficiency while preserving feature selection accuracy comparable to the original Boruta algorithm. In our analysis we also observe that the impurity reduction based version can overestimate the importance of some features. Overall these findings suggest that performing Boruta feature selection on GPUs offers an effective and cost efficient solution for large scale data analysis, which is a good deal.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种GPU加速的Boruta特征选择算法，大幅提升高维数据特征选择效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 包装类特征选择算法在CPU上计算复杂度高，难以处理大规模数据集，亟需高效加速方案。
analysis.problem: 解决Boruta特征选择算法在CPU上运行效率低、不适合大规模高维数据的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于杂质减少的版本可能高估某些特征的重要性。
analysis.method: 提出两种GPU加速的Boruta变体：Boruta-Permut（基于排列的特征重要性）和Boruta-TreeImp（基于杂质减少的重要性）。
contributions: 提出两种GPU加速的Boruta特征选择算法，显著提升计算效率。
在自建和公开数据集上验证了加速效果和准确性保持。
analysis.experiments: 在自建数据集和多个公开数据集上进行了实验，结果显示GPU加速算法大幅提升计算效率，同时保持与原始Boruta相当的准确性。
limitations: 基于杂质减少的版本可能高估特征重要性，需谨慎使用。
未讨论GPU内存限制对超大规模数据的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种GPU加速的Boruta特征选择算法，大幅提升高维数据特征选择效率。

papers.title: LoopVLA: Learning Sufficiency in Recurrent Refinement for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models typically treat the deepest representation of a vision-language backbone as universally optimal for action prediction. However, robotic manipulation is composed of many frequent closed-loop spatial adjustments, for which excessive abstraction may waste computation and weaken low-level geometric cues essential for precise control. Existing early-exit strategies attempt to reduce computation by stopping at predefined layers or applying heuristic rules such as action consistency, but they do not directly answer when a representation is actually sufficient for action. In this paper, we present LoopVLA, a recurrent VLA architecture that jointly learns representation refinement, action prediction, and sufficiency estimation. LoopVLA iteratively applies a shared Transformer block to refine multimodal tokens, and at each iteration produces both a candidate action and a sufficiency score that estimates whether further refinement is necessary. By sharing parameters across iterations, LoopVLA decouples refinement from absolute layer indices and grounds sufficiency estimation in the evolving representation itself. Since sufficiency has no direct supervision, we introduce a self-supervised distribution alignment objective, where intermediate confidence scores are trained to match the relative action quality across refinement steps, thereby linking sufficiency learning to policy optimization signals. Experiments on LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and VLA-Arena show that LoopVLA pushes the efficiency-performance frontier of VLA policies, reducing parameters by 45% and improving inference throughput by up to 1.7 times while matching or outperforming strong baselines in task success.

analysis.tldr: LoopVLA通过循环精炼和自监督充分性学习，在减少45%参数的同时提升VLA策略推理吞吐量1.7倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型将视觉-语言骨干的最深层表示视为通用最优，但机器人操作需要频繁闭环空间调整，过度抽象浪费计算并削弱低级几何线索；现有早退策略依赖预定义层或启发式规则，无法直接判断表示何时足够用于动作预测。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLA模型在循环精炼过程中自主判断表示何时充分，从而在保持或提升任务成功率的同时减少计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出机器人操作包含大量闭环空间调整，过度抽象会削弱低级几何线索；现有早退策略未直接回答表示充分性问题。
analysis.method: 提出LoopVLA，一种循环VLA架构，通过共享Transformer块迭代精炼多模态token，每次迭代输出候选动作和充分性分数；引入自监督分布对齐目标，训练中间置信度分数匹配相对动作质量，将充分性学习与策略优化信号关联。
contributions: 提出LoopVLA，一种循环精炼VLA架构，联合学习表示精炼、动作预测和充分性估计。
引入自监督分布对齐目标，无需直接监督即可学习充分性估计。
在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和VLA-Arena上验证，参数减少45%，推理吞吐量提升1.7倍，任务成功率匹配或超越强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和VLA-Arena基准上评估，与强基线比较任务成功率和效率。
limitations: 可能仅在特定机器人操作场景中有效，泛化性需进一步验证。
自监督目标依赖动作质量相对排序，可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划

analysis.one_sentence_summary: LoopVLA通过循环精炼和自监督充分性学习，在减少45%参数的同时提升VLA策略推理吞吐量1.7倍。

papers.title: HAGE: Harnessing Agentic Memory via RL-Driven Weighted Graph Evolution
papers.abstract: Memory retrieval in agentic large language model (LLM) systems is often treated as a static lookup problem, relying on flat vector search or fixed binary relational graphs. However, fixed graph structures cannot capture the varying strength, confidence, and query-dependent relevance of relationships between events. In this paper, we propose HAGE, a weighted multi-relational memory framework that reconceptualizes retrieval as sequential, query-conditioned traversal over a unified relational memory graph. Memory is organized as relation-specific graph views over shared memory nodes, where each edge is associated with a trainable relation feature vector encoding multiple relational signals. Given a query, an LLM-based classifier identifies the relational intent, and a routing network dynamically modulates the corresponding dimensions of the edge embedding. Traversal scores are computed via a learned combination of semantic similarity and these query-conditioned edge representations. This allows memory traversal to prioritize high-utility relational paths while softly suppressing noisy or weakly relevant connections. Beyond adaptive traversal, HAGE further introduces a reinforcement learning-based training framework that jointly optimizes routing behavior and edge representations using downstream tasks. Finally, empirical results demonstrate improved long-horizon reasoning accuracy and a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off compared to state-of-the-art agentic memory systems. Our code is available at https://github.com/FredJiang0324/HAGE_MVPReview.

analysis.tldr: HAGE 提出基于强化学习的加权多关系图记忆框架，通过查询条件遍历提升 LLM 智能体长期推理的准确性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体记忆系统将检索视为静态查找，依赖平面向量搜索或固定二元关系图，无法捕捉事件间关系的强度、置信度和查询相关性的动态变化，导致长期推理时记忆利用效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能根据查询动态调整关系权重、并支持序列化遍历的统一关系记忆图，以提升 LLM 智能体在长期任务中的推理准确性和检索效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定图结构无法适应查询依赖的关系相关性，导致弱相关连接干扰检索，高效用路径未被优先利用。
analysis.method: 提出 HAGE 框架：1) 构建多关系加权记忆图，每个边关联可训练的关系特征向量；2) 用 LLM 分类器识别查询的关系意图，路由网络动态调制边嵌入的对应维度；3) 遍历分数由语义相似度和查询条件边表示联合计算；4) 引入强化学习联合优化路由行为和边表示。
contributions: 提出将智能体记忆检索重新定义为查询条件序列遍历的加权多关系图框架。
设计可训练的关系特征向量与路由网络，实现查询自适应的边权重调制。
引入强化学习训练框架，联合优化路由与边表示，提升长期推理准确性与效率。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在长期推理准确性和准确率-效率权衡上优于现有智能体记忆系统。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 分类器的关系意图识别准确性。
强化学习训练框架的收敛性和计算开销未在摘要中讨论。

papers.title: Urban-ImageNet: A Large-Scale Multi-Modal Dataset and Evaluation Framework for Urban Space Perception
papers.abstract: We present Urban-ImageNet, a large-scale multi-modal dataset and evaluation benchmark for urban space perception from user-generated social media imagery. The corpus contains over 2 Million public social media images and paired textual posts collected from Weibo across 61 urban sites in 24 Chinese cities across 2019-2025, with controlled benchmark subsets at 1K, 10K, and 100K scale and a full 2M corpus for large-scale training and evaluation. Urban-ImageNet is organized by HUSIC, a Hierarchical Urban Space Image Classification framework that defines a 10-class taxonomy grounded in urban theory. The taxonomy is designed to distinguish activated and non-activated public spaces, exterior and interior urban environments, accommodation spaces, consumption content, portraits, and non-spatial social-media content. Rather than treating urban imagery as generic scene data, Urban-ImageNet evaluates whether machine perception models can capture spatial, social, and functional distinctions that are central to urban studies. The benchmark supports three tasks within one standardized library: (T1) urban scene semantic classification, (T2) cross-modal image-text retrieval, and (T3) instance segmentation. Our experiments evaluate representative vision, vision-language, and segmentation models, revealing strong performance on supervised scene classification but more challenging behavior in cross-modal retrieval and instance-level urban object segmentation. A multi-scale study further examines how model performance changes as balanced training data increases from 1K, 10K to 100K images. Urban-ImageNet provides a unified, theory-grounded, multi-city benchmark for evaluating how AI systems perceive and interpret contemporary urban spaces across modalities, scales, and task formulations. Dataset and benchmark are available at: huggingface.co/datasets/Yiwei-Ou/Urban-ImageNet and github.com/yiasun/dataset-2.

analysis.tldr: Urban-ImageNet 是一个大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集和评测基准，包含 200 万社交媒体图像-文本对，支持场景分类、跨模态检索和实例分割三类任务。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有城市图像数据集缺乏理论指导，且未区分城市空间的社会功能与空间属性，导致机器感知模型难以捕捉城市研究中的空间、社会和功能差异。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个理论驱动的、多城市、多模态的城市空间感知数据集和评测基准，以评估 AI 模型对城市空间的语义理解、跨模态对齐和细粒度分割能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现监督场景分类性能较强，但跨模态检索和实例级城市物体分割更具挑战性；随着训练数据从 1K 增加到 100K，模型性能呈规律性变化。
analysis.method: 提出 Urban-ImageNet 数据集，基于 HUSIC 分层分类体系（10 类），包含 200 万图像-文本对，并设计三个标准化任务（场景分类、跨模态检索、实例分割）作为评测基准。
contributions: 构建了大规模多模态城市空间感知数据集 Urban-ImageNet，覆盖 24 个中国城市 61 个地点，含 200 万图像-文本对。
提出 HUSIC 分层分类框架，基于城市理论定义 10 类空间语义标签。
设计三个标准化评测任务（场景分类、跨模态检索、实例分割），并评估多种视觉、视觉-语言和分割模型。
analysis.experiments: 在 1K、10K、100K 和 2M 规模上评测了代表性视觉、视觉-语言和分割模型，分析了数据规模对性能的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 数据仅来自中国社交媒体平台 Weibo，可能引入地域和文化偏差。
分类体系基于城市理论，但可能无法覆盖所有城市空间类型。

papers.title: Evidence-based Decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with Uncertainty-driven Active Learning
papers.abstract: With the rapid development of deep generative models, forged facial images are massively exploited for illegal activities. Although existing synthetic face detection methods have achieved significant progress, they suffer from the inherent limitation of overconfidence due to their reliance on the Softmax activation function. Thus, these methods often lead to unreliable predictions when encountering unknown Out-of-Distribution (OOD) images, and cannot ascertain the model's uncertainty in its prediction. Meanwhile, most existing methods require massive high-quality annotated data, which greatly limits their practicability across diverse scenarios. To address these limitations, we propose EMSFD (Evidence-based decision Modeling for Synthetic Face Detection with uncertainty-driven active learning), an approach designed to enhance detection reliability and generalizability. Specifically, EMSFD models class evidence using the Dirichlet distribution and explicitly incorporates model uncertainty into the prediction process. Furthermore, during training, the estimated uncertainty is exploited to prioritize more informative samples from the unlabeled pool for annotation, thereby reducing labeling cost and improving model generalization. Extensive experimental evaluations demonstrate that our method enhances the interpretability of synthetic face detection. Meanwhile, our method yields a 15\% increase in accuracy compared to existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, which demonstrates the superior detection performance and generalizability of our approach. Our code is available at: https://github.com/hzx111621/EMSFD.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于证据建模和不确定性驱动主动学习的合成人脸检测方法，提升可靠性和泛化性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有合成人脸检测方法依赖Softmax激活函数导致过度自信，对未知分布图像预测不可靠，且需要大量高质量标注数据，实用性受限。
analysis.problem: 解决合成人脸检测中的过自信问题、不确定性量化不足以及标注成本高的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出Softmax激活函数导致模型对未知分布图像产生不可靠的过自信预测，且现有方法依赖大量标注数据。
analysis.method: 使用狄利克雷分布对类证据建模，显式将模型不确定性融入预测过程；训练时利用估计的不确定性从无标签池中优先选择信息量大的样本进行标注，降低标注成本。
contributions: 提出EMSFD框架，结合证据建模和不确定性驱动主动学习，提升合成人脸检测的可靠性和泛化性。
在多个基准上相比SOTA方法准确率提升15%，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上进行实验，与现有SOTA方法比较，准确率提升15%，验证了检测性能和泛化性。
limitations: 可能对极端未知分布图像的鲁棒性有待进一步验证。
主动学习策略在标注预算极低时的效果未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 方法创新性较强，结合证据建模和主动学习解决合成人脸检测中的关键问题，实验提升显著，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于证据建模和不确定性驱动主动学习的合成人脸检测方法，提升可靠性和泛化性。

papers.title: PruneTIR: Inference-Time Tool Call Pruning for Effective yet Efficient Tool-Integrated Reasoning
papers.abstract: Tool-integrated reasoning (TIR) enables large language models (LLMs) to enhance their capabilities by interacting with external tools, such as code interpreters (CI). Most recent studies focus on exploring various methods to equip LLMs with the ability to use tools. However, how to further boost the reasoning ability of already tool-capable LLMs at inference time remains underexplored. Improving reasoning at inference time requires no additional training and can help LLMs better leverage tools to solve problems. We observe that, during tool-capable LLM inference, both the number and the proportion of erroneous tool calls are negatively correlated with answer correctness. Moreover, erroneous tool calls are typically resolved successfully within a few subsequent turns. If not, LLMs often struggle to resolve such errors even with many additional turns. Building on the above observations, we propose PruneTIR, a rather effective yet efficient framework that enhances the tool-integrated reasoning at inference time. During LLM inference, PruneTIR prunes trajectories, resamples tool calls, and suspends tool usage through three components: Success-Triggered Pruning, Stuck-Triggered Pruning and Resampling, and Retry-Triggered Tool Suspension. These three components enable PruneTIR to mitigate the negative impact of erroneous tool calls and prevent LLMs from getting stuck in repeated failed resolution attempts, thereby improving overall LLM performance. Extensive experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of PruneTIR, which significantly improves Pass@1 and efficiency while reducing the working context length for tool-capable LLMs.

analysis.tldr: PruneTIR 通过剪枝、重采样和暂停工具调用来提升 LLM 工具集成推理的准确性和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有工具集成推理研究主要关注如何让 LLM 学会使用工具，但如何在推理时进一步提升已具备工具能力的 LLM 的推理能力尚未充分探索，且无需额外训练。
analysis.problem: 在 LLM 推理过程中，错误工具调用会降低答案正确性，且 LLM 可能陷入重复失败尝试，需要有效机制来减少错误影响并提升效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到错误工具调用的数量和比例与答案正确性负相关；错误调用通常在少数后续轮次内成功解决，否则即使增加轮次也难以解决。
analysis.method: 提出 PruneTIR 框架，包含三个组件：成功触发剪枝、卡住触发剪枝与重采样、重试触发工具暂停，在推理时动态剪枝轨迹、重采样工具调用和暂停工具使用。
contributions: 首次系统研究推理时工具调用剪枝以提升工具集成推理性能
提出 PruneTIR 框架，通过三种机制有效减少错误工具调用影响并防止陷入重复失败
实验证明 PruneTIR 显著提升 Pass@1 和效率，同时缩短工作上下文长度
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到大量实验证明了 PruneTIR 的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具类型（如代码解释器）的假设
剪枝策略可能在某些场景下过度剪枝导致信息丢失
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对 LLM 工具推理效率问题提出创新剪枝方法，实验显示显著提升，与重点方向强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PruneTIR 通过剪枝、重采样和暂停工具调用来提升 LLM 工具集成推理的准确性和效率。

papers.title: Frequency Adapter with SAM for Generalized Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Medical image segmentation is a critical task in computer-aided diagnosis and treatment planning. However, deep learning models often struggle to generalize across datasets due to domain shifts arising from variations in imaging protocols, scanner types, and patient populations. Traditional domain generalization (DG) methods utilize causal feature learning, adversarial consistency, and style augmentation to improve segmentation robustness. While effective, these approaches rely on explicit feature alignment, adversarial objectives, or handcrafted augmentations, which may not fully exploit the capabilities of foundation models. Recently, the Segment Anything Model (SAM) has demonstrated strong generalization capabilities in segmentation tasks. SAM-based DG methods attempt to improve medical image segmentation. However, these approaches primarily operate in the spatial domain and overlook frequency-based discrepancies that significantly affect model robustness. In this work, we propose Frequency-based Domain Generalization with SAM (FSAM), a novel framework that integrates Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) for efficient fine-tuning and a frequency adapter to incorporate frequency-domain representations for single-source domain generalization. FSAM enhances SAM's segmentation robustness by extracting domain-invariant high-frequency features, mitigating frequency-related domain shifts. Experimental results on fundus and prostate datasets demonstrate that FSAM outperforms existing traditional DG and SAM-based DG approaches in domain generalization. Codes and pre-trained models will be made available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出频率适配器结合SAM实现医学图像分割的域泛化，优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割中深度学习模型因成像协议、扫描仪类型和患者群体的差异导致的域偏移而泛化能力不足，现有域泛化方法依赖显式特征对齐或手工增强，未能充分利用基础模型的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用SAM模型并引入频域信息，实现单源域泛化下的鲁棒医学图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有SAM-based域泛化方法主要在空间域操作，忽略了影响模型鲁棒性的频率相关差异。
analysis.method: 提出FSAM框架，集成低秩适配（LoRA）进行高效微调，并设计频率适配器提取域不变的高频特征，缓解频率相关的域偏移。
contributions: 提出频率适配器与SAM结合的域泛化框架FSAM，首次在SAM中引入频域表示用于医学图像分割。
在眼底和前列腺数据集上验证FSAM优于传统域泛化和SAM-based域泛化方法。
analysis.experiments: 在眼底和前列腺数据集上进行实验，FSAM在域泛化性能上优于现有传统DG和SAM-based DG方法。
limitations: 仅在眼底和前列腺数据集上验证，其他医学模态（如CT、MRI）的泛化性未知。
频率适配器的设计可能依赖特定任务，需要进一步探索通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.reason: 方法新颖，结合SAM和频域信息解决医学图像域泛化问题，实验验证有效，但仅两个数据集，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出频率适配器结合SAM实现医学图像分割的域泛化，优于现有方法。

papers.title: expo: Exploration-prioritized policy optimization via adaptive kl regulation and gaussian curriculum sampling
papers.abstract: Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the standard paradigm for LLM mathematical reasoning, where Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) serves as the mainstream algorithm. We point out two understudied inefficiencies existing in GRPO. First, the fixed KL penalty coefficient overly restricts policy exploration at stages where the model requires significant deviation from the reference policy. Second, uniform sampling of training questions ignores that moderately difficult problems provide the most informative gradient signals for optimization. We propose Exploration-Prioritized Policy Optimization (EXPO) with two lightweight plug-in modules. The Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL) dynamically adjusts KL regularization strength through a smooth nonlinear function of batch average accuracy, relaxing the penalty when the model underperforms and strengthening it when the model achieves good results. The Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS) assigns sampling weights to questions following a Gaussian distribution centered at moderate accuracy around 0.5, focusing training on the model's learning frontier. We conduct extensive experiments on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B and Qwen3-8B-Base over six mathematical reasoning benchmarks. The results show EXPO steadily surpasses vanilla GRPO. It obtains an absolute gain of 13.34 on AIME 2025 pass@32, rising from 63.33 percent to 76.67 percent, and achieves an average pass@32 improvement of 2.66 on the 8B model. The much larger performance gains on pass@32 compared with pass@1 demonstrate that EXPO effectively enlarges the model's exploration boundary under a fixed inference cost budget.

analysis.tldr: EXPO通过自适应KL调节和高斯课程采样提升GRPO在数学推理中的探索效率。
analysis.research_motivation: GRPO在LLM数学推理中广泛使用，但存在两个效率问题：固定KL惩罚系数限制探索，以及均匀采样忽略问题难度差异。
analysis.problem: 解决GRPO中KL惩罚系数固定和训练问题均匀采样导致的探索不充分和优化效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定KL惩罚系数在模型需要大幅偏离参考策略时过度限制探索；均匀采样忽略了中等难度问题提供最有效梯度信号的现象。
analysis.method: 提出EXPO，包含两个轻量插件：Accuracy-Conditioned KL Scaling (AKL)根据批次平均准确率动态调整KL正则化强度，以及Gaussian Curriculum Sampling (GCS)根据问题准确率按高斯分布分配采样权重。
contributions: 指出GRPO中KL惩罚系数固定和均匀采样两个效率问题
提出AKL和GCS两个轻量插件，显著提升数学推理性能
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B和Qwen3-8B-Base上，覆盖六个数学推理基准，EXPO在AIME 2025 pass@32上绝对提升13.34%，8B模型平均pass@32提升2.66。
limitations: 仅验证了数学推理任务，其他领域效果未知
GCS依赖准确率估计，可能受噪声影响
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 针对GRPO的实用改进，实验充分且提升显著，与LLM推理强相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: EXPO通过自适应KL调节和高斯课程采样提升GRPO在数学推理中的探索效率。

papers.title: Team-Based Self-Play With Dual Adaptive Weighting for Fine-Tuning LLMs
papers.abstract: While recent self-training approaches have reduced reliance on human-labeled data for aligning LLMs, they still face critical limitations: (i) sensitivity to synthetic data quality, leading to instability and bias amplification in iterative training; (ii) ineffective optimization due to a diminishing gap between positive and negative responses over successive training iterations. In this paper, we propose Team-based self-Play with dual Adaptive Weighting (TPAW), a novel self-play algorithm designed to improve alignment in a fully self-supervised setting. TPAW adopts a team-based framework in which the current policy model both collaborates with and competes against historical checkpoints, promoting more stable and efficient optimization. To further enhance learning, we design two adaptive weighting mechanisms: (i) a response reweighting scheme that adjusts the importance of target responses, and (ii) a player weighting strategy that dynamically modulates each team member's contribution during training. Initialized from a SFT model, TPAW iteratively refines alignment without requiring additional human supervision. Experimental results demonstrate that TPAW consistently outperforms existing baselines across various base models and LLM benchmarks. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/lab-klc/TPAW.

analysis.tldr: TPAW通过团队自对弈和双自适应加权机制，在无需人工标注下提升LLM对齐效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自训练方法依赖合成数据质量，存在不稳定性和偏差放大问题，且正负响应差距缩小导致优化低效。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖人工标注的情况下，稳定高效地微调LLM以提升对齐性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出迭代训练中正负响应差距缩小导致优化低效，以及合成数据质量敏感性问题。
analysis.method: 提出团队自对弈框架，当前策略模型与历史检查点协作竞争，并设计响应重加权和玩家加权两种自适应机制。
contributions: 提出TPAW算法，结合团队自对弈与双自适应加权，实现全自监督对齐微调。
设计响应重加权和玩家加权机制，动态调整样本和模型贡献，提升训练稳定性与效率。
实验表明TPAW在多种基模型和基准上优于现有方法，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 在多种基模型和LLM基准上评估，TPAW一致优于现有基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖SFT初始模型质量。
团队自对弈的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，针对LLM对齐痛点，实验验证有效，开源代码，与指令微调方向高度相关。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TPAW通过团队自对弈和双自适应加权机制，在无需人工标注下提升LLM对齐效果。

papers.title: Verifier-Free RL for LLMs via Intrinsic Gradient-Norm Reward
papers.abstract: While Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has recently emerged as a promising post-training paradigm for Large Language Models (LLMs), its dependency on the gold label or domain-specific verifiers limits its scalability to new tasks and domains. In this work, we propose Verifier-free Intrinsic Gradient-Norm Reward (VIGOR), a simple reward that uses only the policy model itself. Given a prompt, VIGOR samples a group of completions and assigns higher within-group rewards to outputs that induce smaller $\ell_2$ norms of the teacher-forced negative log-likelihood gradients under the current parameters. Intuitively, lower gradient norms suggest the completion aligns better with the current policy, serving as an intrinsic preference signal for policy optimization. To make this intrinsic signal practical for RL, we correct the systematic length bias of averaged token-level gradients with a $\sqrt{T}$ scaling, and apply group-wise rank shaping to stabilize reward scales across prompts. Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks, VIGOR outperforms the state-of-the-art Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) baseline, and it also exhibits cross-domain transfer to code benchmarks when trained only on math data. For instance, on Qwen2.5-7B-Base post-trained on MATH, VIGOR improves the average math accuracy by +3.31% and the average code accuracy by +1.91% over this baseline, while exhibiting more stable training dynamics. The code is available at https://github.com/ZJUSCL/VIGOR.

analysis.tldr: 提出无验证器强化学习方法VIGOR，利用梯度范数作为内在奖励信号，在数学和代码基准上超越基线。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR依赖领域特定的验证器或标签，限制了其在新任务和领域的可扩展性，需要一种无需外部验证器的通用奖励信号。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种仅使用策略模型本身、无需外部验证器的奖励信号，以支持LLM的强化学习后训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VIGOR：对同一提示采样多个补全，计算每个补全在教师强制下的负对数似然梯度的ℓ2范数，范数越小奖励越高；通过√T缩放校正长度偏差，并应用组内排名整形稳定奖励尺度。
contributions: 提出VIGOR，一种仅依赖策略模型内在梯度范数的无验证器奖励信号。
在数学推理基准上超越RLIF基线，并展示跨领域迁移到代码基准的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Base上使用MATH数据训练，数学准确率平均提升+3.31%，代码准确率平均提升+1.91%，训练动态更稳定。
limitations: 可能对梯度计算开销敏感，需要进一步分析效率。
跨领域迁移的通用性可能受限于数学到代码的特定场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法新颖且实验效果显著，但技术细节中等，推荐精读。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无验证器强化学习方法VIGOR，利用梯度范数作为内在奖励信号，在数学和代码基准上超越基线。

papers.title: NaiAD: Initiate Data-Driven Research for LLM Advertising
papers.abstract: Reconciling platform revenue with user experience in LLM advertising motivates a data-centric foundation. We introduce NaiAD, the first comprehensive dataset for LLM-native advertising comprising 58,999 carefully constructed ad-embedded responses paired with user queries. NaiAD is organized around theoretically grounded evaluation metrics that separately and comprehensively capture user and commercial utility. To mitigate the dimensional collinearity of aligned LLMs, we propose a decoupled generation pipeline that produces structurally diverse samples, ranging from responses that explicitly disentangle stakeholder utilities to responses that are uniformly strong or weak across dimensions. We further provide score labels calibrated by a Variance-Calibrated Prediction-Powered Inference (VC-PPI) framework, aligning automated scoring with human annotations. Mechanistic analyses reveal that successful ad integration relies on reasoning paths that cluster into four distinct semantic strategies. Models leveraging NaiAD internalize these strategies to simultaneously improve user and commercial utility, while enabling independent control over these distinct objectives via in-context learning. Together, these results position NaiAD as a foundational infrastructure for developing future LLM-native ad systems.

analysis.tldr: 首个面向LLM原生广告的数据集NaiAD，包含58,999条广告嵌入响应，支持解耦生成与校准评分，揭示广告整合的四种推理策略。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM广告中平台收入与用户体验的平衡缺乏数据驱动基础，现有方法难以同时优化用户效用和商业效用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏专门用于LLM原生广告研究的数据集和评估框架，且对齐LLM的维度共线性导致样本多样性不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成功广告整合依赖四种语义推理策略；解耦生成可产生结构多样的样本；VC-PPI校准可对齐自动评分与人工标注。
analysis.method: 构建包含58,999条广告嵌入响应的数据集NaiAD，提出解耦生成管道以缓解维度共线性，并采用方差校准预测驱动推断（VC-PPI）框架校准评分。
contributions: 首个面向LLM原生广告的综合数据集NaiAD，包含58,999条精心构建的广告嵌入响应及用户查询。
提出解耦生成管道，生成结构多样的样本，并引入VC-PPI框架校准自动评分与人工标注。
通过机制分析揭示四种广告整合推理策略，并证明模型可通过上下文学习独立控制用户与商业效用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据集规模可能不足以覆盖所有广告场景。
解耦生成管道的泛化性可能受限于特定LLM架构。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.reason: 首个LLM广告数据集，方法创新且实用，但摘要未提供实验细节。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个面向LLM原生广告的数据集NaiAD，包含58,999条广告嵌入响应，支持解耦生成与校准评分，揭示广告整合的四种推理策略。

papers.title: Position: Academic Conferences are Potentially Facing Denominator Gaming Caused by Fully Automated Scientific Agents
papers.abstract: The implicit policy of maintaining relatively stable acceptance rates at top AI conferences, despite exponentially growing submissions, introduces a critical structural vulnerability. This position paper characterizes a new systemic threat we term Agentic Denominator Gaming, in which a malicious actor deploys AI agents to generate and submit a large volume of superficially plausible but low-quality papers. Crucially, their objective is not the acceptance of low-quality papers, but rather to inflate the submission denominator and overwhelm reviewing capacity. Under a relatively stable acceptance rate, this dilution can systematically increase the publication probability of a small, targeted set of legitimate papers. We analyze the practical feasibility of this threat and its broader consequences, including intensified reviewer burnout, degraded review quality, and the emergence of industrialized automated agent mills. Finally, we propose and evaluate a range of mitigation strategies, and argue that durable protection will require system-level policy and incentive reforms, rather than relying primarily on technical detection alone.

analysis.tldr: 论文指出AI会议因稳定录取率而面临“分母博弈”威胁，恶意代理可大量提交低质论文稀释分母，提升目标论文录取概率。
analysis.research_motivation: 顶级AI会议投稿量指数增长但录取率保持稳定，这种结构脆弱性可能被恶意利用，导致评审系统崩溃和学术质量下降。
analysis.problem: 提出并分析一种新型系统性威胁——Agentic Denominator Gaming，即恶意行为者利用AI代理大量生成并提交低质量论文，通过膨胀分母来操纵录取概率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在稳定录取率政策下，恶意代理通过大量提交低质论文可稀释分母，从而系统性提高少量目标论文的录取概率，同时加剧审稿人倦怠、降低评审质量，并催生工业化自动代理工厂。
analysis.method: 作为立场论文，通过理论分析威胁的可行性、后果，并提出包括系统级政策和激励改革在内的缓解策略，而非依赖纯技术检测。
contributions: 首次定义并形式化Agentic Denominator Gaming这一新型学术操纵威胁
系统分析其可行性、后果及缓解策略，并论证系统级政策改革的重要性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏实证数据验证威胁的实际发生频率和影响规模
提出的缓解策略可能面临实施难度和副作用
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.reason: 问题新颖且具有现实紧迫性，但作为立场论文缺乏实验验证，适合关注AI安全与学术诚信的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文指出AI会议因稳定录取率而面临“分母博弈”威胁，恶意代理可大量提交低质论文稀释分母，提升目标论文录取概率。

papers.title: Voice Biomarkers for Depression and Anxiety
papers.abstract: Current approaches to detecting depression and anxiety from speech primarily rely on machine learning techniques that utilize hand-engineered paralinguistic features and related acoustic descriptors derived from time- and frequency-domain representations of speech signals. Applying deep learning methods directly to raw speech signals has the potential to produce biomarker representations with substantially greater predictive power. However, these approaches typically require large volumes of carefully annotated data to learn robust and clinically meaningful representations of the underlying biomarkers. In this paper, we describe our efforts toward developing a deep learning model trained on a large-scale proprietary dataset comprising ~65,000 utterances collected from more than 23,000 subjects representative of relevant United States demographics. We present the techniques employed and analyze their impact on model performance. Our results demonstrate that the proposed models can extract content-agnostic biomarker information, which, when combined with lexical features extracted from audio, yields improved predictive performance in production settings. Our models are evaluated on ~5000 unique subjects and achieve performance of 71% in terms of sensitivity and specificity. To foster further research in mental health assessment from speech, we release the best-performing model described in this paper on HuggingFace.

analysis.tldr: 利用大规模语音数据集训练的深度学习模型，从原始语音中提取内容无关的生物标志物，结合词汇特征提升抑郁和焦虑检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法依赖手工设计的声学特征，预测能力有限；深度学习方法需要大量标注数据，限制了在临床中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从原始语音信号中学习鲁棒且临床有意义的生物标志物，以准确检测抑郁和焦虑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用大规模专有数据集（约65,000条语音，23,000名受试者）训练深度学习模型，提取内容无关的生物标志物，并与从音频中提取的词汇特征结合。
contributions: 提出一种从原始语音中学习内容无关生物标志物的深度学习方法。
在约5000名受试者上评估，达到71%的敏感性和特异性。
在HuggingFace上发布最佳模型以促进研究。
analysis.experiments: 在约5000名受试者上评估，达到71%的敏感性和特异性。
limitations: 数据集为专有，可能限制泛化性。

analysis.reason: 方法有一定创新性，但实验规模有限且未提供详细对比，适合关注语音健康应用的读者。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用大规模语音数据集训练的深度学习模型，从原始语音中提取内容无关的生物标志物，结合词汇特征提升抑郁和焦虑检测性能。

papers.title: RADAR: Redundancy-Aware Diffusion for Multi-Agent Communication Structure Generation
papers.abstract: Compared with individual agents, large language model based multi-agent systems have shown great capabilities consistently across diverse tasks, including code generation, mathematical reasoning, and planning, etc. Despite their impressive performance, the effectiveness and robustness of these systems heavily rely on their communication topology, which is often fixed or generated in a single step. This restricts fine-grained structural exploration and flexible composition, resulting in excessive token utilization on simple tasks while limiting capability on complicated tasks. To mitigate this challenge, we introduce RADAR, a redundancy-aware and query-adaptive generative framework that actively reduce communication overhead. Motivated by recent progress in conditional discrete graph diffusion models, we formulate communication topology design as a step-by-step generation process, guided by the effective size of the graph. Comprehensive experiments on six benchmarks demonstrate that RADAR consistently outperforms recent baselines, achieving higher accuracy, lower token consumption, and greater robustness across diverse scenarios. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/cszhangzhen/RADAR.

analysis.tldr: 提出冗余感知扩散框架RADAR，通过逐步生成通信拓扑来降低多智能体系统的通信开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统的通信拓扑通常是固定的或单步生成，导致简单任务上token浪费、复杂任务上能力受限，缺乏细粒度结构探索和灵活组合。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地生成多智能体系统的通信拓扑，以在保持性能的同时减少冗余通信开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定或单步生成的通信拓扑无法根据任务复杂度动态调整，导致简单任务过度通信、复杂任务通信不足。
analysis.method: 基于条件离散图扩散模型，将通信拓扑设计建模为逐步生成过程，并以图的有效大小作为引导，实现冗余感知和查询自适应的通信结构生成。
contributions: 提出RADAR，一个冗余感知且查询自适应的生成框架，用于多智能体通信结构生成。
将通信拓扑设计形式化为逐步生成过程，利用条件离散图扩散模型和图有效大小引导。
在六个基准上验证了RADAR相比基线方法在准确率、token消耗和鲁棒性上的优势。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准上进行了综合实验，结果显示RADAR在准确率、token消耗和鲁棒性方面均优于近期基线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖图扩散模型的计算效率，大规模场景下生成速度可能受限。
图有效大小的定义和引导方式可能对特定任务不敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.reason: 方法创新性强，实验充分，对多智能体系统通信优化有实际价值。
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出冗余感知扩散框架RADAR，通过逐步生成通信拓扑来降低多智能体系统的通信开销。

papers.title: Separate First, Fuse Later: Mitigating Cross-Modal Interference in Audio-Visual LLMs Reasoning with Modality-Specific Chain-of-Thought
papers.abstract: Audio and vision provide complementary evidence for audio-visual question answering, yet current audio-visual large language models may suffer from cross-modal interference: information from one modality misguides the interpretation of another, thereby inducing hallucinations. We attribute this issue to uncontrolled cross-modal interactions during intermediate reasoning.
